Icons

Bob The Blob
Bob The Blob is a surfer from . They cost 30,000 in . Their first outfit, the Slime Outfit costs 300 in , currently 150, their second outfit, the Jingle Outfit costs 400 in , currently 150, just like almost every other outfit from 2023 and 2024 .
Appearance
Default Outfit
Bob The Blob is a slimy skeleton/blob-like character from / with a pink flower outline around their eye holes. They wear a teal backwards cap with some teal shoes with dark fuchsia colored shoelaces and white socks with some navy blue shorts on. They also have a pink flower showing from inside their ribs. Their slimy blob body is also colored teal.
Slime Outfit
Launched in , Bob The Blob’s cap now turns orange with their blob body being lime green. Their flower outline was removed from their ‘eyes’ and their flower heart was removed. They now have black pants with red stripes at the side. Their shoes are almost the same but with their shoelaces dark green and a shiny green surface at the end of their shoes.
Jingle Outfit
Launched in , Bob The Blob's slime turned blue and closer to the waist cyan. White eyebrows and a white mustache appeared on the skull, a white-red cap with a red brim. A red Christmas tree ball between the ribs, red shorts, white socks, red and white sneakers with cherry laces.
History
* An exact date was found where they appeared in, otherwise, the edition release date is assumed.
Trivia
Bob The Blob is the 26th character to be released in 2021 , after Frankette , Spacebot , Ox , Rat , Qin , Hou , Zayn , Darryl , Lana , Bonnie , Buzz , Trym , Pridebot , Pride Jake , Pride Fresh , Pride Spike , Pride Tricky , Pride Yutani , Pride Frank , Parkour Rin , Alexandre , Akira , Koral , Cleo , and Taha .
Bob the Blob is the third fan-made surfer (Bob is made by @amt_art_design ), the first being Tankbot , the second being Koral , the fourth being Super Runner Fernando , the fifth being Spraybot , the sixth being Hammy-Bee , the seventh being Dr. Flyman , the eighth being Snowy , the ninth being Valentina , and the tenth being Berta .
Bob The Blob is the third / surfer. The first being Rosa , second being Manny , and fourth being Fantasma .
They are the ninth Halloween themed character after Zombie Jake , Eddy , Mike , Manny , Scarlett , Cathy , Noel , and Morgan .
They are also the first Halloween themed fan-made character, with the second being Dr. Flyman .
They are the first fan-made LGBTQIA2S+ surfer in the game, the second being Hammy-Bee .
Bob The Blob is the second skeleton surfer , the first is Manny and the third is Poco .
They had a bug that eliminated sound effects when jumping or rolling.
The bug was fixed in .

In the trailer, Bob is transparent but not in the game.
They are the second non-binary surfer, the first being Callum , and the third being Charlie .
They are also the only non-binary surfer to not be from Europe.
Furthermore, Bob The Blob is the only non-binary surfer to not be human.

Bob The Blob is the second fan-made character to receive an outfit , the first being Tankbot .

Bodie Jahn-Mulliner
Bodie Jahn-Mulliner is a Danish game developer, animator, 3D artist and compositor. He is the founder and President of SYBO Games .
Biography
From 2004 to 2009, he studied at The Animation Workshop obtaining a Bachelor of Arts in Character Animation.
In 2009, he created Trainbombing with Sylvester Rishøj Jensen . Later in 2010, they both founded SYBO Games .
In that company, Jahn-Mulliner was the CEO from 2010 to April 2017 and in May 2017 he became its President.
In 2022, he married Danish model Louise Hammelsvang Pedersen, so she became named Louise Hammelsvang Jahn-Mulliner.
References

Bomb-Bastic
Bomb-Bastic is a hoverboard released in . Like any other hoverboard, it protects the character from crashing for 30 seconds. When crashed, it will need to recharge for a few seconds before it can be used again.
Appearance
A black, oval-shaped hoverboard with a narrow front and a wide rear. Its padding has a red border, two screws, and a flame design. At the back, its fuse is extending upwards and has a yellow end, and underneath it is a booster that looks like a yellow beak.
Trivia
It, Sewer Surfer , Rat Trap , and 14th Birthday are the 19th, 20th, 21st, and 22nd boards released in 2026 , after Road Rage , Frankmobile , Perfectoplasma , Fire Starter , Xtra Cool , Turbo Love , Gold Rush , The Green Flame , Lucky Fish , Marbleous , Arena Rider , Major Speed , Sunny Side Up , Pixel Perfect , Buzz BNY , Fast Fur-ward , Cathletic Ride , and Fox Trotter .
This is the first and only board.
This board's design is inspired from the character Bomb of Angry Birds .
It is Red and Chuck 's board.

Bonnie
Bonnie is a limited character from . She can be unlocked for 2.99$. Her 1st outfit, the Harajuku Outfit, can be unlocked for 22,000 in or 75, her 2nd outfit, the Lucky Outfit, can be unlocked for 35,000 in or 150, her 3rd outfit, the Thumper Outfit, can be unlocked in the event in .
Appearance
Default Outfit
Bonnie is a British teenage girl from with short cyan hair, purple contacts, blush, and cyan lipstick. She has black eyebrows, which may mean she had black hair before dying her hair cyan. She wears a pink bunny headband, a gold necklace, and an opened orange and yellow striped jacket with a cyan outline near the opening of the jacket and the sleeve holes. Under her jacket is a pink shirt. She also has lilac jeans and pink ballet shoes with blue socks.
Harajuku Outfit
Launched in , she has her hair dyed purple, and she now wears a neon green and pink shaded cap with pink rabbit ears. She wears a yellow and green striped long-sleeved shirt and a small violet side bag with an image of a star. She also wears a pastel blue and purple striped skirt with a pink belt securing it to the shirt. She also uses violet tights with neon yellow circles and blue ballet flats with green soles.
Lucky Outfit
Launched in , not much has changed from her Default Outfit, her bunny headband, jacket, and jeans turn red with yellow outlines, her eyebrows also become blue and her eyes also become brown her socks become a deeper blue and her shoes become black.
Thumper Outfit
Launched in , Bonnie's outfit now gives her an edgy vibe. Her hair is now dyed red and mostly tied up, held together by a black-and-red, transparent visor cap with a pair of gigantic pierced rabbit ears. For her attire, she has a black ripped vest and a red ribbon necklace on top of her white tube. She wears it with a red flowy skirt with black pants underneath, finishing it off with her white sneakers and long fingerless gloves.
History
* An exact date was found where she appeared in, otherwise, the edition release date is assumed.
Trivia
Bonnie is the 10th character released in 2021 , after Qin , Lana , Darryl , Zayn , Hou , Rat , Ox , Spacebot , and Frankette .

She's the second surfer who uses a mobile phone, as shown in her Harajuku outfit, the first being Jolien .

Boombox
Boombox was released In the update (version 2.20.1). This allows players to change the background music to almost any remix and all vocal remixes, in the settings of the game if they want to.
In the update (version 3.36.2), a search bar was added so that you can look up a certain remix of your choosing.
List of Boombox Soundtracks
These are all soundtracks that are currently available in the boombox. There are listed in the same order as in-game.
List of Removed Soundtracks
These are soundtracks that used to be in the boombox, but were later removed and/or replaced by the new version.
Trivia
For unknown reasons, the game's Boombox doesn't have all of the game's songs at the moment.
Also, the game's Boombox was introduced during the update.
Also, the game's Boombox was introduced during the update.
In , the music is either broken, and doesn’t work, or plays a different song, which was fixed later.
In the remix was removed from the boombox most likely to not cause confusion with the new remix.
Though most of the remixes came back in . The / , , and remixes were not added.
In , the / soundtrack was renamed from Mexico to Mexico Halloween this was to not get it confused with the / soundtrack which before had the same title.
In 3.10.1, the Edinburgh 2023 soundtrack was renamed to “Epic Edinburgh” and soundtrack was renamed to “Edinburgh”.
In 3.29.1, the default soundtrack was switched from the 8-Bit Remix to Subway Surfers Theme.
In 3.36.0, the soundtrack was removed from the Boombox for unknown reasons, but in 3.36.2, the soundtrack was added back to the Boombox.
In 3.36.2, a feature was added where you can search up songs in the Boombox.
When you enter an event and the map can load but music can't for whatever reason (such as disconnecting internet through the middle of loading), the old Subway Surfers theme will play instead. Once you play it again and have strong enough wi-fi it will play correct music.
Sometimes you can hear it for a split second when you try to enter an event while offline when it kicks you out of it.

Bouncer
Bouncer is a non-limited hoverboard released in Subway Surfers: Holiday .
Appearance
This is a green hoverboard featuring a split design and a golden bottom.
Special Power
Bouncer Hoverboards will have the " Super Jump " ability. All Bouncer hoverboards will automatically grant players the " Super Sneakers " powerup, making gameplay experience slightly easier.
Trivia
This is the only hoverboard so far to have a split design.
If you use a normal hoverboard when Super Sneakers are active, you will have a hoverboard similar to it, but with two differences:
Different time limit.
Different Hoverboards.
Different time limit.
Different Hoverboards.
When using the hoverboard, the player can be seen wearing the Super Sneakers power-up.
Also note that if you are wearing a Super Sneakers and activate this hoverboard or any hoverboard with the "Super Jump" ability, the Super Sneaker's timer will be paused, while the Hoverboard's timer will tick down. The Super Sneaker's timer will resume after the Hoverboard's timed out.
If you wish to complete the High Jumper Award, try using Bouncer.
It and Hot Rod are currently the third most expensive hoverboards, costing 280,000 each, with the second being Lowrider ( 320,000), and the first being Windglider ( 360,000).
It also has a special action when you jump with it; the character rotates the board on the right side.
Rave Rider also has this animation.
Rave Rider also has this animation.
This is the first hoverboard with the Super Jump ability.
In the Chinese Version, it's a board, and it's called Big Springboard (大跳板) .
It is Frank ’s board according to the old Subway Surfers website
Tryout
In the , it was available for free for everybody to use for 24 hours. It was also a tryout in , at 12 February 2014.

Brady
Brady is a limited hoverboard exclusive to . Like any other hoverboard, it protects you from crashing for 30 seconds. When crashed, the hoverboard will explode and need to recharge for a few seconds before using again. It needs 100 to be unlocked.
Appearance
The Brady board is in the shape of a hot pink football with the number "12" on the center.
Trivia

It's Tom 's board .

Brainstormer
Brainstormer is a limited hoverboard released in . Like any other hoverboard, it protects the character from crashing for 30 seconds. When crashed, it will need to recharge for a few seconds before it can be used again.
Appearance
A red-colored hoverboard that has a sharp front and paper-like gliders. It has pink and neon yellow stick notes pasted all around the sides, as well as a blue book and pink eraser on the back wrapped with a brown belt. For other designs, it has the Uptown College of Creatives logo on the front and a blue star in a circle logo in the middle. Pink, blue, and neon yellow sticky notes are emitted on the back as its trail.
Trivia
It, E-Racer , and Principal's Nightmare are the 33rd, 34th, and 35th boards released in 2025 , after Hyper Viper , Lantern , Override , Fresh Love , Heartstopper , Dear Dart , Roarsome , Arara Board , Moongazer , Purple Spin , Cyan Note , Blue Riff , Eggscalibur , Bloomster , Edinburst , Guard Board , Trespasser , Mizu Dash , Zapline , Seven Seas , 13th Birthday , You Are Here , Freebird , Glitter Blaster , Float-Booster , Feeling Beachy , Street Style , Roll & Race , Midsummer , Business Time , Rabbit Racer , and Circuit Bunny .
It is Tara 's board .
In , it costs in the Offer Trails .
In the Chinese Version, it's 2026 board.

Brandon
His Kung Fu Outfit can be purchased with 30 .
Appearance
Default Outfit
Brandon is a Chinese young man from with brown hair. He wears a red sleeveless shirt covered by a gold-colored jacket. He also wears black pants and white-and-red shoes.
Kung Fu Outfit
Launched in , his jacket is changed to a stylish purple jacket with a swirl pattern. The pants are the same as his original outfit. He is also barefooted and wears sunglasses with a gold frame.
Trivia
Brandon looks like Bruce Lee , but has the same name as Bruce Lee's son, Brandon Lee .

Brass Whizz
Brass Whizz  is a hoverboard released during . Like any other hoverboard, it protects you from crashing for 30 seconds. When crashed, the hoverboard will explode and need to recharge for a few seconds before using it again. It can be bought for 20.000.
Appearance
It's a black brass instrument themed board with orange trumpet-shaped exhaust pipes and on the front there is a black, purple and red audio disc.
Trivia
It, Raggedy Runner , and Turbo Stump are the 33rd, 34th, and 35th boards released in 2024 after Skyrocket , Electro Shock , Bada-Bomb , Confetti Crush , Red Velvet , Roaring Heart , Lunar Scroll , Astro Tune , Interstellar , Shamrock Shebang , Megga Bite , Fast and Festive , Radiant Rider , Jak , Tea Timer , Deli-Vroom , Yellow Sub , Jelly Board , Koinobori , Mayo Mania , 12th Birthday , Pixel Hoverboard , Street Grace , Alarm On , Rock n' Riley , Sunny Sailor , Laser Flip , Glarx 3000 , Standing Ovation , Risky Ride , Sporty Summer , Heavy Metal , Champ , and Arrow .
It's the fourth board , after Pumpkin , Raggedy Runner , and Turbo Stump .
It's Ozzy 's board.
Even though Ozzy uses a clarinet, which is a woodwind type of instrument and not a brass instrument, it's his board. E.Z. 's board is Jazz , even though he uses a trombone.
It has the same upgrades as Rave Rider , Electro Shock , Champ , Cook-Express , Couch Surfer , Fear Tractor , Lantern , and The Green Flame .
It did not return in for unknown reasons.
In the Chinese Version, this board is 2025 (this update is called Kyushu Wonderland ) board and called Sonic Steel Pipe (音速钢管) .

Brawl Stars Frame
The Brawl Stars Frame is a frame released in the update. This frame could be unlocked in the Brawl Stars Showdown event during .
Appearance
It has a cactus design with a face in the middle that resembles Spike .
Trivia
This and the Gems Frame is the eleventh and twelfth frames to be released, after the Default Frame in for Top Run and for Player Profile , the Birthday Frame in , the Hollywood Frame in , the Summer Frame in , the Plant and Lava Frames in , the Club Frame in , the Pride Frame in , and the Oxford Green and Oxford Red Frames in .

Brody
Brody is non-limited character that can be unlocked with 350,000. He is the second most expensive character in Subway Surfers , topped only by Prince K . His first outfit, the Posh Outfit, can be bought for   75. His second outfit, the Chill Outfit, can be bought for  100.
Appearance
Default Outfit
Brody looks like a young lifeguard. He wears a shark's tooth necklace, a watch, a prussian blue swim shirt, red shorts with a yellow stripe, a pair of blue flip flops, and flowing blond hair with black sunglasses on his head.
Posh Outfit
During the update, he received his Posh Outfit. In his Posh Outfit, his shirt changes to a black polo and he is now wearing his glasses and a silver ring. His shorts are also changed to brown. He also isnt wearing his necklace.
Chill Outfit
During the update, he received his Chill Outfit. In his Chill Outfit, he now has a large red headband with two v shaped white lines on the top of the headband, holding down his long hair. His glasses are now fuschia and are oval shaped. His necklace has multicolored beads with a green peace sign charm at the bottom. His shirt is also changed to midnight blue and the stripes of his shorts are now white.
Trivia
He is the third most expensive character in the game, costing 350.000, topped by Prince K and 2024/2025 characters/outfits in the revamped Flash Deals .
His hair is animated as if he is standing against the wind. However, this is only seen in his default outfit.
Brody appears to have the most different idle animations in the character select screen out of all characters (including limited characters).
He is the first character to wear flip flops, the second being Kim (Original only), the third being Edison , and the fourth being Jenny (Original only).
Unlike the other three, he is a non-limited character.
He, Nick , Dylan , Hugo , Philip , Phoenix , Buzz , Jamie , and Alexandre are the only blond boys in Subway Surfers.
Unlike the other three, he is a non-limited character.
He, Nick , Dylan , Hugo , Philip , Phoenix , Buzz , Jamie , and Alexandre are the only blond boys in Subway Surfers.
He has sunglasses in all of his outfits.
However, in his original outfit his sunglasses are on the top of his head instead.
However, in his original outfit his sunglasses are on the top of his head instead.
His natural hair colour appears to be black.
He gets +5 Multiplier Bonus for Special Thursdays such as: , , and .
In , his cost changed to 99 during The Best Deal of the year.
In , he could be bought with Wave Rider for 400,000. Oddly, Brody and Wave Rider would still cost 400,000 if you unlocked Brody and Wave Rider separately because Wave Rider could be unlocked for 50,000. The only difference is that you also got 10 if you unlocked them together, in the bundle.
In , he could be bought with Wave Rider for 250,000, which was a better deal than only unlocking Brody for 350,000 and you also got 5 if you unlock Brody and Wave Rider together.
He is the 37th surfer to have animations reused for a new surfer ( Enzo in ).

Bruno
Bruno is a limited character released in update. Bruno is the 163rd character in the game and the 2nd Rival character in the game, being one of the 4 Rivals, and the Rival of Yutani .
Appearance
Bruno is a 16-year-old Argentinian teenage boy and technologist from / . He has a blue T-shirt with a battery drawn on it. He has yellow shorts and black shoes with green laces. He has a prosthetic arm. On the back of his shirt he has a Rivals logo (®). His eyes are light blue. He wears gray glasses. He has what appears to be a virtual reality headset on his neck. He carries two technological devices in the pockets of his shorts. He carries a tablet with him which is used to control a drone that is only visible in its animation (similar to Catrine 's skateboard and boba tea, Hali 's DJ set and Lawrence 's microphone and poem book).
History
* An exact date was found where he appeared in, otherwise, the edition release date is assumed.
Trivia
Bruno is the ninth surfer released in 2023 after Rabbit , Soul , Tutti , Frutti , Spraybot , Catrine , Rain and Alfie .
He's the second  surfer after Sofia but he's also a  surfer.
He is also the eighth surfer after Alfie , Catrine , Elf Fresh , Elf Yutani , Elf Jake , The Burger King , and Super Runner Yutani .
In the rivals comics it was stated that Bruno is in fact from Argentina and he traveled to to battle Yutani .
He is the second Rivals character. The first being Catrine , the third being Hali and the fourth being Lawrence .
He is the seventh South American surfer in the game, the first being Carmen , the second being Edison , the third being Carlos , the fourth being Sofia , the fifth being Tankbot , the sixth being Super Runner Fernando , the eighth being Tainá , the ninth being Yutani Harlequin Toad , the teenth being J Balvin , the eleventh being Hammy-Bee , the twelfth being Rebeca Roar , and the thirteenth being Gabriel .

He is the second special birthday surfer for Yutani , the first being Super Runner Yutani .
He is the ninth surfer whose name starts with 'B' after Brody , Bjarki , Brandon , Buddy , Boombot , Bonnie , Bob the Blob , and Buzz .
His name may referred to a Disney 's character (Bruno Madrigal) in Encanto .
In the mailbox, the greeting title, Let's Talk Bruno! , is a parody of one of Encanto' s soundtracks ( We Don't Talk About Bruno ).

He is the only Rival to have short pants, whereas the other three Rivals have long pants.

He is the second surfer to have virtual reality (VR) box, the first being Andy in his Gamer Outfit and the third being Hammy-Bee .
He is the only Rival without letter A in the name.
He is the only Rival who wears spectacles.
He's the first member of the Rivals crew available in the Subway Studio , with the second being Catrine (added to it in 3.17.1).

Bubblegum
Bubblegum is the seventeenth limited hoverboard in Subway Surfers . Like all other hoverboards, it protects you from crashing for 30 seconds. When crashed, it will explode and needs 5 seconds to recharge before it can be reused. It has no special ability and this board costs 50,000.
Appearance
It has a pink background with the text 'POP!' written in light blue on it. On the backside, it shows a exclamation point.
History
The Bubblegum board was added to the game on February 13, 2014 with the update.
On January 22, 2015, it was re-released with the update.
On May 4, 2017, it reappeared in a Wild Wednesdays event.
On January 18, 2022, it reappeared in "The Kawaii Bundle" for 200,000 along Harumi (In her Meow Outfit).

Buck Lightdeer
Buck Lightdeer is a hoverboard released in . Like any other hoverboard, it protects the character from crashing for 30 seconds. When crashed, it will need to recharge for a few seconds before it can be used again.
Appearance
A red hoverboard with back gliders and a pair of deer antler propellers. For its base, it has a pale red border and straight maroon line at the center, which then placed with two white diagonal lines at its front.
Trivia
Buck Lightdeer, Chill Out , Candy Crash , and Mean Green Machine are the last boards released in 2025 .
It, Chill Out , Candy Crash , and Mean Green Machine are the 50th, 51th, 52th, and 53th boards released in 2025 , after Hyper Viper , Lantern , Override , Fresh Love , Heartstopper , Dear Dart , Roarsome , Arara Board , Moongazer , Purple Spin , Cyan Note , Blue Riff , Eggscalibur , Bloomster , Edinburst , Guard Board , Trespasser , Mizu Dash , Zapline , Seven Seas , 13th Birthday , You Are Here , Freebird , Glitter Blaster , Float-Booster , Feeling Beachy , Street Style , Roll & Race , Midsummer , Business Time , Rabbit Racer , Circuit Bunny , E-Racer , Brainstormer , Principal's Nightmare , The De-lyre-ious , Moon Biter , 8 Ball , Piece Of Cake , Finish Line , Motor Mania , Fiesta , Shin Supreme , Galactic Peel , Charmer , Bias Boom , Four-leaf Flux , Gobble Trouble , and Pie Express .
It's the seventh board, the first being Choo Choo , the second being Glacier , the third being Ginger Boom , the fourth being Flash Jet , the fifth being Wind-Up Rocket , the sixth being Snow Down , the eighth being Chill Out , the ninth being Candy Crash , and the tenth being Mean Green Machine .
Buck Lightdeer is the 17th Christmas -themed board, the 1st being Snowflake , the 2nd being Jingles , the 3rd being Rudy , the 4th being Choo Choo , the 5th being Glacier , the 6th being Sleigh , the 7th being Ginger Boom , the 8th being Ho Ho Hoverboard , the 9th being Snow Cloud , the 10th being Wrapped , the 11th being Wind-Up Rocket , the 12th being Snow Down , the 13th being Jingle Dingle , the 14th being Shiny Surprise , the 15th being Gadget Force , the 16th being Ice Cool , the 18th being Chill Out , the 19th being Candy Crash , and the 20th being Mean Green Machine .
It's Festive Tricky 's board .
In the Chinese Version, it's a (Bear Ridge) board, and it's called Spirit Deer Heart (灵鹿之心) .

Buddy
Buddy is a limited character that was released in . He was also the 22nd limited character in Subway Surfers , and the twentieth in the World tour series. He can be purchased with 95,000, just like any other limited character.
In the update, he appeared in the holiday special and gives him a new outfit, Candy Outfit.
Both his first outfit, the Sunny Outfit, and second outfit, Candy Outfit cost 30, respectively.
Appearance
Default Outfit
Buddy is a snowman from / with a dark red scarf, red-striped green shoes and gloves, a hat with a green feather and a snowball. His eyebrows are black and his hands, legs and eyes are blue.
Sunny Outfit
Launched in , the Sunny Outfit, he is wearing dark sunglasses, an open chested red shirt, tan shorts, a beach hat, and a lei.
Candy Outfit
Launched in , the Candy Outfit, he is wearing a salmon soldier hat and uniform made of candies, blue jeans, and maroon boots with red cuffs. His nose is a candy cane. He also has a cookie as a belt buckle.
Trivia
Buddy was the first limited character to be introduced in the re-release of an edition despite not being available the first time the edition was released.
Buddy is the last limited character of 2014 .
He returned on May 12th, 2017 , along with Tony and Nikos , as part of Subway Surfers' 5th anniversary special .
Buddy returns for Wild Wednesdays such as , , , and .
He replaced Jamie as a surfer but later changed to just a special surfer in , then being replaced with Malik , Festive Fresh , and Clementine in the later releases.

Bundles
Bundles are packs that give you more than 1 item most of the time. Most bundles cost . Sometimes they can be unlocked for coins, keys, hoverboards, or watching ads. Some bundles come back more frequently, and those bundles would either come back for in-game money ( / ), , or ads, depending on the value or rarity of that specific bundle.

Bunny
Bunny is an exclusive board to . Like any other hoverboard, it protects you from crashing for 30 seconds. When crashed, the hoverboard will explode and need to recharge for a few seconds before using again. It costs $1.99.
Appearance
It is a pink bunny board with black eyes and whiskers. It has a nose that is a deeper shade of pink.
Trivia
This is the seventh board out of eight in 2021 , after Secret Society , Endeavour , Discovery , Crane , Buddy Bear , Uprock and Shuttle .
It is the first board, the second being Rolls Rabbit , the third Ghastly Glider , the fourth being E-Racer , the fifth being Brainstormer , and the sixth being Principal's Nightmare .
This hoverboard, along with Rolls Rabbit , didn't reappear in and because of not being Easter themed.
In , it came back for 27,000.
In , it came back for free.
In , it came back for 19,000.
In , it can be unlocked in the Season Hunt by collecting 80.
In and , it can be unlocked in the .
It is Bonnie 's first board and Jamie 's second board. Jamie 's first board is Snowflake . While Bonnie ’s seconnd board is Sakura and her third board is Carp Diem .
In the Chinese Version, it's called Mini Rabbit (迷你兔) , and it have a Star Trail (For Free) and Super Jump Upgrades. However, it's shape doesn't change.

Bunny Betty
Bunny Betty is a character released in . She is the 273rd character in the game and the 11th surfer of 2026 . She is the winner of Eggspress Yourself Craft-a-Character Contest, made by @subw_aysurfersfans ( @emmamoreno208 ) .
Appearance
Default Outfit
Bunny Betty is a 14-year-old Irish teenage girl from with an egg-themed outfit; from her giant sunny side up headwear, her holding a pan with an egg on it, and her overall outfit having yellow and white motif. Her maid dress is styled in a way her skirt and waist apron would form an another egg. She also wears a pair of yellow fingerless gloves and loose socks, and her white shoes' laces are "made out" of bacon strips.
Red Bunny Outfit
Launched in , Bunny Betty finally has her giant rabbit ears, which are attached in her black headphones that has white and red accents. Her makeup is now fiercer, and her eye color changed from brown to red. Above her white polo dress is a black sleeveless coat, wrapped in waist with a red ribbon. Her high red boots have black soles, and underneath are black tight socks. As accessories, she also wrapped both of her arms with red ribbons, and now she colored her nails black in contrary to her Default Outfit.
Trivia
She and Sprinkle are the tenth and eleventh surfers released in 2026 , after Frank Noir , Holly , Sean Snow , Mia , Rosalita , Lorcan , Horse , Vittorio , and Enzo .
She is also the sixth female 2026 surfer, after Holly , Mia , Rosalita , Horse , and Sprinkle .
She is also the sixth female 2026 surfer, after Holly , Mia , Rosalita , Horse , and Sprinkle .
She is the eleventh fan made surfer, the others being Tankbot , Koral , Bob The Blob , Super Runner Fernando , Spraybot , Hammy-Bee , Dr. Flyman , Snowy , Valentina , and Berta .
She is also the third fan-made female surfer in the game, the first being Koral and the second being Valentina .
She is the first fan-made character released for Easter .
She is the first fan-made character of 2026 .
She is also the third fan-made female surfer in the game, the first being Koral and the second being Valentina .
She is the first fan-made character released for Easter .
She is the first fan-made character of 2026 .

Buried
Buried is the first episode of Subway Surfers: The Animated Series .
Jake , Tricky , Fresh , and Yutani make their debut in this episode. It is also the first animated episode from SYBO Games in their official YouTube Channel . It was aired on June 1, 2018 .
Synopsis
While Tricky practices typing an important message to her mom, Jake and Fresh play a game of “SKATE” for lunch money. But their attention turns to Yutani when her metal detector discovers a buried object that could forever change their city.
Plot
In a junkyard, where Fresh , Jake , Tricky and Yutani are hanging out, Tricky is sitting on a skate ramp, being nervous about texting her mother that she doesn't want to do ballet anymore. She asks aloud what her mom would do if she quit ballet, where Jake, skating past her, replies that she would be grounded for life, before doing a barley grind along the deck edge. Fresh then performs a boneless and a barley trick, where after he tells Tricky that her mother might get off her back. Fresh then tries to perform a roast beef to a barley stunt, but fails and falls on his face. Jake makes a jab at Fresh, spelling "S-K-A-T".
Tricky, who is still focused on writing a text to her mother, complains at Jake and Fresh for playing “S-K-A-T-E” while she's trying to have an existential crisis. Jake replies that they bet five bucks and he needs lunch money. Yutani then walks past Tricky with her make-shift metal detector and joins the conversation by telling Tricky about Newton's third law and how every action has an equal and opposite reaction. Yutani's detector then detects an object, which excites her, but to her disappointment only turns out to be a rusty can. Tricky, now somewhat panicked, questions Yutani if she thinks her mother will make her quit skateboarding instead. Yutani responds by saying that it's hard to argue with Newton.
Jake skates past Tricky again, agreeing with Yutani, saying that Tricky's mom is "so hardcore". Fresh also agrees with Jake before performing a stalefish to judo trick. Fresh then, however, assures Tricky that her mother could surprise her. But Tricky disagrees, saying that the only thing that surprises her is when Jake wears matching socks. While in the midst of an aerial trick, Jake's jean cuffs roll down (or up) exposing his mismatched socks: a red Christmas sock on his left foot and a blue sock with yellow stripes on his right foot. This distracts Jake, causing him to fall to ramp deck. Fresh points at Jake and spells "S-K-A-T", similarly to how Jake said it to him earlier.
Yutani then speaks about her explanation for Jake's uneven socks - evolving from aquatic bipeds (aquatic ape hypothesis). Tricky exclaims what relevance that has, but Jake cuts her off by saying how cool having webbed feet would be. Fresh ponders on Yutani's theory and doubts it, saying that he hates sea food. Jake then yells about his plan for a combo, saying he'll perform a fakie benihana, a superman and a sex change. Tricky warns Jake that he can't do that, but Jake persists as he's starving and needs cash. He makes an attempt, but fails when his board hits the edge of the deck. In a fit of rage, Jake breaks his skateboard and walks away. Tricky says how she doesn't think they evolve, but just end up becoming their parents, which makes Yutani bring up her theory of life evolving from microbial life. Fresh questions this, asking if she's suggesting they’re aliens, which Yutani confirms.
Jake returns and comments about how cool it would be to have your own UFO. He gives Fresh $5, where Fresh adds that having a sound system would make for a better experience. However, Yutani refutes this by informing that sound couldn't escape the antigravity field need to power a UFO. When her metal detector detects another piece of metal underneath a railroad track, Yutani assumes it's just another rusty can, but is shocked when the detector begins violently shaking and starts being dragged along the track. Jake runs and holds onto Yutani, trying to pull her away, but drags him along as well, the detector then stops, where various items and objects begin levitating in the air. Yutani's detector then starts getting pulled underground, with the track being pulled apart. Tricky and Fresh, watching from behind a fence, both jump in to stop Jake and Yutani getting pulled. However, they too end up being yanked underground. Suddenly, a blue beam shoots out from the hole left behind, where everyone gets shot back out, along with a strange device. Yutani, Jake, Tricky and Fresh approach the device, not knowing what it is. Footage of them, from behind, is then shown to be watched by two silhouettes, a man and a woman. The mysterious man, asks if they should confiscate the device, which he called a "turbine", where the woman says that they will just observe. For now.

Continuity
The graffiti art saying "JAZE" is confirmed in Jake's Dossier (Subway Surfers - Character Dossier - Jake) to be his art work.
Tricky, Jake and Fresh are all wearing their outfits from the game , except Yutani, who is wearing a slightly different alien suit to the one she wears in the game.
Tricky does ballet (also shown/mentioned in episode 3).
Tricky uses her phone (also seen in episode 3 and episode 5).
Jake says that he's starving (also seen in episode 11).
Yutani's metal detector has a magnet similar to the coin magnet (a power-up from the game).
Yutani wears an alien costume similar to the one from the game, with a couple of alterations.
The junkyard is located near railway tracks, where trains pass by (trains are an important feature in the game).
The Junkyard contains many abandoned train cars, which are also shown in the game.
This is the first time the junkyard appears in an episode.
This is the first episode to be fully set within the junkyard.
Yutani mentions life from other planets (aliens).
Yutani talks about antigravity (also seen in episode 10).
Yutani has a crush on Jake (also seen in episode 6).
This episode marks the first appearance of the turbine (also seen in episode 10).
Continuity error(s)
Errors and inconsistencies between shots, within the narrative and what is considered canon.
When Fresh fails his roast beef to a barley trick, his body changes positions between the two shots.
When Fresh falls, his skateboard lands in front of where Jake is standing. In the shot where Jake says "S-K-A-T", the skateboard is nowhere to be seen.
When Jake falls, and Fresh says "S-K-A-T", his mouth, when he says "K" and "A", doesn't match what he's saying.
When Jake does his fakie benihana, superman and "sex change" combo, in the shot where he gets back on his skateboard, for a split second, the grey shipping container, on the left with the white chair on top of it, is clean from any graffiti. In the shot where Jake stops sliding down the ramp, the graffiti has returned.
In the shot where the birds fly away, Tricky can be seen with her hands to her ears. In the next shot, however, her arms are lowered.
The hole that Yutani and Jake create in the fence, when crashing through it, is the exact same spot where the original hole in the fence, seen in the opening shot of the episode, was.
The railway track that Yutani and Jake are dragged along, is nowhere to be seen in the opening shot of the episode.

Busted
Busted is the second episode of Subway Surfers: The Animated Series .
It was the first time we ever got to see the home life of one of the characters and also the first time we saw a relative of a character. The episode also introduced Connie Bressler (Jake's mother), the first original character to be completely absent from the game , as well as the first time we saw The Guard and his dog .
This was also the first episode to be focused on only one character. It aired 21 days after episode one, on June 22th, 2018 .
Synopsis
The Inspector confronts Jake's mom about all the trespassing he's been committing. However, rather than dealing with the consequences, Jake sneaks out to meet with his friends.
Plot
Jake's mother (Connie) hears a bang on the front door to only realize it's The Inspector with her son . Upon opening the door, she confronts The Inspector with his dog , to Jake's satisfaction, telling him that he can't go around man-handling her son. The Inspector, however, asserts to her that Jake and his friends were making trouble in his subway yard, again, which Jake excuses, saying it was his first time on a hoverboard , but quickly reclarifies it as his new skateboard. The Inspector scolds Connie by telling her to "put him on a shorter leach", which causes Jake to retaliate to him, but is silenced by his mom, who tells Jake that she will handle this. She then turns around to Jake and yells at him to go into his room and think about what he's done, to the surprise of Jake, who then storms off into his bedroom and slams the door shut.
Connie then feels guilty, asking if she was too mean. She then assures The Inspector that Jake is "such a good kid" and "so sweet", which is somewhat opposed by a loud crash in his bedroom. The Inspector's dog then wanders off, while Connie talks to The Inspector about her personal life. Meanwhile, in his bedroom, Jake puts a blue hoodie over a pillow and places it in his bed, making it appear that it's him. He then finds a gone off ham and cheese sandwich from behind his bed and decides to put it in his jean pocket to take with him. Before leaving, he takes off his cap and places it on top of the pillow to make it seem more like him. Jake then grabs his skateboard and leaves through the window, jumping onto a pipe and swirling down it.
Jake takes out his phone and contacts Fresh, Tricky and Yutani. However, he then hides from the voice of his mother yelling from his bedroom. Holding the pillow with the hoodie on it, she shouts that he's in big trouble, before yanking the pillow inside, causing his cap to fall down. Jake, hiding behind a pile of garbage bags, picks up his cap and puts it on before coming out. He then hops on his skateboard and rides down the alley, but is stopped by The Inspector's dog. The dog growls at Jake, which he copies. Jake and the dog have a faceoff, where Jake tries to divert the dog's attention by commanding it to sit and yelling "cat". But the dog continues to eye Jake, until Jake pulls out his sandwich, which makes the dog excited. However, Jake also begins to feel hungry when looking at the sandwich, where he takes a bite from it. This angers the dog, who turns aggressive towards Jake once again. But Jake throws the sandwich behind him, which causes the dog to run after it and eat it.
Jake's stomach then rumbles, where he takes out his phone and tells his friends to forget the yard and meet him at Mully's because he’s starving. He then skateboards down the streets leaving the dog full.
Cast
Jake - Nicolas Roye
Connie - Sara Cravens
The Inspector - David Lodge
The Inspector's Dog - David Lodge
Continuity
Jake mentions a hoverboard, which is later seen in episode 10.
Jake got caught by The Inspector, which is later seen in episode 11.
The Inspector took Jake home to his mother, as he said he would in episode 11.
Jake refers to his skateboard as new (he broke his previous one in episode 1).
Jake has a red magnet on top of a cabinet in his bedroom, similar to the coin magnet (a power-up from the game).
Jake tells his friends to forget the yard and meet him at Mully's, which is seen by Fresh in episode 9.
The ham and cheese sandwich is from Skate Heaven.
Jake uses his phone (also seen in episode 5, episode 6, episode 7, episode 10 and episode 11).
Continuity error(s)
Errors and inconsistencies between shots, within the narrative and what is considered canon.
When Jake is walking to his room, The Inspector is standing on the right side of the door, in the next shot, he's standing on the left side.
Jake's piggy bank, on his bed, changes from gold to pink.
When Jake picks up the sandwich, the pink award badge on the wall is fully exposed, however, in the shot where Jake takes off his cap, it's behind by a skateboard.
In the shot where Jake puts his cap on the pillow, the clock on the wall and the clock on the white table show different times.
Jake was able to swirl down the pipe, despite the width between it and the wall being too small.
The pipe Jake slid down is shown to be in front of the garbage bags, but in the birds-eye view shot of Jake and the dog, it's suddenly behind the bags.
The distance between Jake and the dog changes throughout various shots.
Jake puts down his phone before he says "I'm starving", however, when Fresh sees it in episode 9, it managed to still record him saying it.

Callum
Callum  is a limited character from . They can be unlocked with  40. Their first outfit, the Changeling Outfit, can be unlocked with 75. In with in the shop , they got a new outfit called the Pink Punk Outfit, which costs 32,000 (Now 150 ).
Appearance
Default Outfit
Callum is a proper Scottish/British teenage person Oi punk from . They have red hair that they have in a buzz cut. They wear a leather jacket with buttons and "Sub Surf" written on the back. Underneath the jacket, they wear a black shirt with a green star on it. They also wear a blue, green and red tartan kilt, green socks, and black boots with yellow laces. Attached to the front of their kilt is a traditional Scottish pouch, called a Sporran. They have an eyebrow piercing, a septum piercing and a helix piercing. They wear a safety pin in their right ear and two earrings in the other. Callum is missing a tooth.
Changeling Outfit
Launched in , they disguise themself as a Changeling, a character from Scottish folk tales. Their skin is dark teal. They have a horn on their forehead that is yellow, some monster ears, and yellow hooves. They wear a ripped black and red shirt with a fishbone design, and ripped black pants.
Pink Punk Outfit
Launched in , their hair now changes to Lavender Rose buzz cut with Persian pink and dark pink spots and their eyebrows change to a medium red violet color. Their shirt is Paris green, jacket is vampire gray with a metallic silver zipper, they also wear a metallic gray chain collar, dark gray fingerless gloves on the left hand. Their pants are split into two parts, the left side is bashful pink with pastel magenta squares, and the right side is sap green with a paris green squares pattern. They wear dark grey boots with raspberry pink laces.
Trivia
Callum is the fourth new character of 2020 after Monkbot , Liu and Ming .
They are also the first character from 2020 not to come from the Chinese version.
Spike is their brother, according to the official post for Siblings Day.
They are the second character from the United Kingdom, the first being Jamie in , the third being Bonnie in , the fourth being George in , the fifth being Soul in , the sixth being Frutti in , the seventh being Lawrence in , the eighth being Vivienne in , the ninth being Finlay in , and the teenth being Ribbon in .
Unlike the others, they, Frutti , Finlay , and Ribbon is from Scotland instead of England.
Unlike the others, they, Frutti , Finlay , and Ribbon is from Scotland instead of England.
Callum, Nina and Punk board made a brief return in October 2020 as a sale. Callum could have been purchased for 4.49$.
Callum is the first Subway Surfers character that identifies with they/them pronouns, the second is Bob the Blob and the third is Charlie . In a SYBO TV video it stated that Callum is a boy, which Callum is in the Chinese Edition. It was later confirmed they were non-binary.

Candy Crash
Candy Crash is a hoverboard released in . Like any other hoverboard, it protects the character from crashing for 30 seconds. When crashed, it will need to recharge for a few seconds before it can be used again.
Appearance
A candy cane-inspired hoverboard with a light blue gradient base in a red and white striped frame. Two red spray cans are on the sides of the said frame, and at the back is a single large booster that releases a green flame.
Trivia
Candy Crash, Buck Lightdeer , Chill Out , and Mean Green Machine are the last boards released in 2025 .
It, Buck Lightdeer , Chill Out , and Mean Green Machine are the 50th, 51th, 52th, and 53th boards released in 2025 , after Hyper Viper , Lantern , Override , Fresh Love , Heartstopper , Dear Dart , Roarsome , Arara Board , Moongazer , Purple Spin , Cyan Note , Blue Riff , Eggscalibur , Bloomster , Edinburst , Guard Board , Trespasser , Mizu Dash , Zapline , Seven Seas , 13th Birthday , You Are Here , Freebird , Glitter Blaster , Float-Booster , Feeling Beachy , Street Style , Roll & Race , Midsummer , Business Time , Rabbit Racer , Circuit Bunny , E-Racer , Brainstormer , Principal's Nightmare , The De-lyre-ious , Moon Biter , 8 Ball , Piece Of Cake , Finish Line , Motor Mania , Fiesta , Shin Supreme , Galactic Peel , Charmer , Bias Boom , Four-leaf Flux , Gobble Trouble , and Pie Express .
It's the ninth  board, the first being Choo Choo , the second being Glacier , the third being Ginger Boom , the fourth being Flash Jet , the fifth being Wind-Up Rocket , the sixth being Snow Down , the seventh being Buck Lightdeer , the eighth being Chill Out , and the tenth being Mean Green Machine .
Candy Crash is the 19th Christmas -themed board, the 1st being Snowflake , the 2nd being Jingles , the 3rd being Rudy , the 4th being Choo Choo , the 5th being Glacier , the 6th being Sleigh , the 7th being Ginger Boom , the 8th being Ho Ho Hoverboard , the 9th being Snow Cloud , the 10th being Wrapped , the 11th being Wind-Up Rocket , the 12th being Snow Down , the 13th being Jingle Dingle , the 14th being Shiny Surprise , the 15th being Gadget Force , the 16th being Ice Cool , the 17th being Buck Lightdeer , the 18th being Chill Out , and the 20th being Mean Green Machine .
It is the 300th hoverboard in the Subway Surfers' history.
It's Festive Fresh 's board .
The board's name references a famous game called Candy Crush Saga .
Not just the name, but the striped frame on that board is also reference to the frame that was used for the app icon between 2012 and 2014 .

Captain Flash
Captain Flash is a limited character released in . He is the 174th character of the game.
Appearance
Captain Flash is a toy robot from Planet Electrobix . He is an electronic blue, green and white robot whose body is divided into segments. He has a blue head with a green area on top, white eyes (which turn blue) on a black screen, no eyebrows or mouth and white ears. The hands are white and the palms are blue and have three fingers each, the upper part of the body is green and the lower part is dark blue, the legs are blue and the knees are green, the feet are metallic white. He and Clockwork Johnny are partners and are the enemies of Zaraxtron .
History
* An exact date was found where he appeared in, otherwise, the edition release date is assumed.
Trivia
Captain Flash is the 6th surfer after Buddy , Malik , Festive Fresh , Clementine , and Gingerbot .
He is the 20th character released in 2023 after Rabbit , Soul , Tutti , Frutti , Spraybot , Catrine , Rain , Alfie , Bruno , Tainá , Yutani Harlequin Toad , Yuto , Hali , Thursday , Outatime Jake , Ji-Yeong , J Balvin , Lawrence , Vivienne and Clockwork Johnny .
He and Clockwork Johnny are the 11th and 12th robot characters after Tagbot , Boombot , Rabbot , Tankbot , Frankette , Spacebot , Pridebot, Gingerbot , Dummy and Spraybot .
He and Clockwork Johnny are the last characters of 2023 .
They also have the same animations .
They also have the same animations .
He had rim light and was the first surfer since Super Runner Jake to have rim light, until the v3.32.3 update, where he lost the effect along with every other surfer that had it.
He is the only 2023 surfer with the rim light effect, and the final new character overall to have rim light.
His eyes are blue in the character menu but they turn white while playing as him. Additionally his eyes can turn blue for a few moments in the home screen after he blinks.
Flash Jet is his board .
For unknown reasons, he didn't receive his 1st outfit in .
His last appearance in the files was .
He appears in the environment, along with Dinorange .
He is a 2024 surfer in the Chinese Version of the game.
He is the first character to be from a different planet, others being Clockwork Johnny and Glorgalax .

Carlos
Appearance
Default Outfit
Carlos is a Peruvian teenage boy from wearing a red and orange plaid tank top, light blue, rolled-up shorts, a scarlet helmet, a thick light green scarf, and black-and-white sneakers. He appears to be a mountain climber.
Inca Outfit
Launched in , he wears a gold headdress with a blue and green plume and three red feathers. He has turquoise earrings and wears an sinopia toga with a brown and gold belt. He has turquoise frills around his wrists and ankles and has blue sandals. He also holds a short gold staff.
Poncho Outfit
Launched in , he received the Poncho Outfit. He wears a blue and white beanie with a red pom-pom and flaps covering his ears. He also adorns a vandyke brown long-sleeved T-Shirt, khaki trousers, and maroon trainers. He also has a multi-colored patterned vest and he holds a whistle.
Trivia
He's the second male newcomer of 2016 . The first being Jaro .
His Inca Outfit strongly resembles the Emperor Kuzco from the Disney film The Emperor's New Groove .
His mouth in his in-game model is closed, but strangely, his win-screen model has a toothed smile. His scroll bar pose also has a closed mouth.
He is the fourth newcomer of 2016 , the first being Jenny , the second being Jaro , and the third being Aina .
He is the third South American surfer in the game, the first being Carmen , the second being Edison , the fourth being Sofia , the fifth being Tankbot , the sixth being Super Runner Fernando , the seventh being Bruno , the eighth being Tainá , the ninth being Yutani Harlequin Toad , the teenth being J Balvin , the eleventh being Hammy-Bee , the twelfth being Rebeca Roar , and the thirteenth being Gabriel .

Carmen
Carmen was launched as a limited character from , and was also the fourth limited character in Subway Surfers , the second in the World Tour series and the first ever female World Tour character. She costs 100,000. Both her Shake Outfit and Team Outfit can be bought for 75, respectively.
Appearance
Default Outfit
Carmen is a Brazilian young woman from . She has brown eyes and eyebrows along with blue eyeshadow and long black hair tied in a ponytail. Her headpiece has three red gems on it: two smaller ones on both sides of the one larger gem in the center. She also has black eyeliner. She wears a gold headpiece with blue and green feathers and a matching outfit, similar to that of those worn by samba dancer. She also wears yellow sandals.
Old Default
Before , She wore white sneakers with a blue tongue and orange laces. She also had - graphics. Carmen's clothes, makeup and shoes were changed significantly during the update, permanently replacing her old look.
Shake Outfit
Launched in , she wears a magenta skirt and top. Her sandals also change to pink and have purple flowers on them. Meanwhile, Carmen wears a magenta headband. On the left is a big purple blossom which hangs from the left of the headband, while in the middle and in the back of her head are a yellow flower and green leaves, respectively. Her earrings also get removed and her hair are no longer tied up in a bun, but this time are freely out. Her makeup changes from blue to yellow and she wears two bracelets. Finally, her leggings change from green to purple.
Team Outfit
Launched in , she wears a green zipped-up jacket with yellow details, a yellow skirt, green socks and blue trainers. She loses her Carnival headband and she wears a wig which is yellow and red at the tips.
History
* An exact date was found where she appeared in, otherwise, the edition release date is assumed.

Carnival
Carnival is a holiday that is celebrated in the Subway Surfers World Tour updates on February (40 days before Easter ).
Info
General Information
Main article: Wikipedia
This holiday has different traditions in different places of the world. The most famous of them, Rio de Janeiro Carnival and Venice Carnival , are celebrated in some Subway Surfers World Tour seasons.
Carnival in Rio
Main article: Wikipedia
Carnival in Venice
Main article: Wikipedia

Carp Diem
Carp Diem is a hoverboard from the update, it costs 210.
Appearance
It has the appearance of a red fish, with a brown head with an eye and a brown-tinged tail at the end, followed by white feathers. At the bottom, there are green tubes from which the fire comes.

Carp Diem is the first hoverboard of 2023 .

This is the second board, the first being Lunar Tiger .
In the update Carp Diem's fire trail is missing, this was fixed in .
The board's name is a pun on the phrase "carpe diem" that means literally "pluck the day".
Rabbit , Bonnie , George , Rabbot , and Festive Frank share this board.

Catalyst
Catalyst is a hoverboard released in . Like any other hoverboard, it protects your character from crashing for 30 seconds. When crashed, the board will explode and need to recharge for a few seconds before using it again. It costs 28.000 .
Appearance
It's a board with a cat theme. In the central part it is white with 2 reddish-pink cat paws, in the front part it has a black cat head with 2 yellow-green irises, and the back has a purple tin can wrapped with purple cords acting as an exhaust pipe and a reddish-pink spoiler.

Cathletic Ride
Cathletic Ride is a hoverboard released in . Like any other hoverboard, it protects the character from crashing for 30 seconds. When crashed, it will need to recharge for a few seconds before it can be used again.
Appearance
Mainly brown-colored, has a similar base to the Default Hoverboard but has a white pad held together with two nails each on the front and back sides. It has two paw designs on the middle, and a golden pet collar bell attached on the back.
Trivia

Cathy
Cathy is a limited character released in the update, where she could be unlocked in the Halloween Mega Bundle with Eddy , Pumpkin , Hexed and Noel for 100, or for 60 individually.
In the update, she could be obtained at Tier 20 in the Season Hunt (for 210 ).
Her first outfit, the Visual Kei Outfit, was released in , originally obtainable at Tier 30 of the Season Hunt, now 150.
Her second outfit, the Seaside Outfit, was released in , originally obtainable at stage 5 of the Spooky Sprint Challenge, 150 until , now 250,000.
Appearance
Default Outfit
Cathy is a mutant octopus-like creature from , with indigo skin, burgundy eyes and big black hair. It appears on her face that she has 5 tentacles. Slightly above her side tentacles, she has freckles. She wears a magenta headband, a schoolgirl outfit with a magenta tie and a magenta-coral plaid skirt, black and magenta socks and mostly small black converse sneakers with pink laces and soles. At the side where her ears are covered by her hair, she has her hair combed outward. Her head’s shape is like an octopus’. When she is in her animation, there is a locker beside her filled with purple tentacles. The suckers on them are yellow and the skin tone is similar to Cathy’s, just more light purple. The very bottom of her torso is exposed under her skirt and connects her legs together. This most likely implies her legs are tentacles since there is nothing there and explain her small sneakers and how her legs are smaller toward her feet and because she is based off of Cthulhu.
Visual Kei Outfit
Launched in , now her hair is pink, she has a spiked headband which is a slightly darker pink, she has a spiked bracelet on her right arm, she is wearing a dark gray jacket on the outside, on it she has 2 spikes, while inside she is pink, her skirt is now blue, she also wears dark blue pants under her skirt and has purple socks with black boots.
Seaside Outfit
Launched in , she wears white sunglasses with dark purple lens, a red handkerchief on her head, gold earrings, a gold bracelet on her right arm, a red swimsuit, and white heels.
History
* An exact date was found where she appeared in, otherwise, the edition release date is assumed.

Catrine
Catrine is a limited character released in . She is the 160th character in the game and the first Rival character in the game, being one of the four Rivals , and Jake 's rival. Her first outfit, the Trail Mix Outfit , costs 36,000 in .
Appearance
Default Outfit
Catrine is a 16-year-old Danish teenage girl and skateboarder from / . She has blonde hair which she wears in an undercut, she has cyan eyes. She wears a light gray cropped hoodie with an R on it on the chest area, she also wears black sweatpants with knee pads on, she also has fingerless gloves (similar to that of Jake 's Dark outfit) and has a coral jacket tied around her waist. She wears white socks with an orange stripe, and gray and black sneakers. Catrine holds a brown boba tea cup. She also has an unplayable blue skateboard displayed in her animation.
Trail Mix Outfit
Launched in , she now wears a green cap, wears a green with orange sweater, has black pants, and orange with black sneakers. She now holds a spicy latte. Her skateboard is now orange.

This is the 15th illustration portrait in 2026 .

Challenges (Events)
Challenge (Events) is a tab located at the bottom of the screen along with Me Tab, Missions Tab, and the Shop Tab. It contains various limited game modes of Subway Surfers. Events Tab was redesigned in version 2.33.2 .
All Challenges
Marathon Challenge
Tag Team/Timed Tag Team/Tag Time Attack
Play 2 Plant
Play 2 Plant is a special event of the ONG Ecologi that partnered with Subway Surfers in the 2.25.1 version of update started on November 4th, 2021 and it was created in the Marathon Challenge the Play 2 Plant event with the objective of coloring the gray scenery of New York by planting trees until you complete the 200,000 trees planted meter, at the end the scene reverts to its normal colors as before. This special event is a mix of the Marathon Challenge with the Tag Team, in the same format as the Tag Team the event needs to be played with selected boards, in the race, the score is only scored when the board is activated and while activated the board is essential for color the scenery with nature. In , there was also a Play 2 Plant challenge.
How To Play
Unlock rewards to help us plant real trees. Play to Plant !
Points are only earned while on hoverboards.
Your score is a total of ALL your runs. Every run counts!
Every unlocked reward makes the subway greener.
Event Cities & Boards
Trivia
This mode would later turn into a normal game mode as Hoverboard Challenge however the plant mechanic is removed.
Gallery
Gift Rush
Gift Rush is the second special event of the Marathon Challenge released on update, a Christmas special in very similar to Play 2 Plant event. (Both events are similar to the Hoverboard Challenge ) You only score points with the board activated, the snow covered scenery transforms by activating the board and spreading the Christmas magic, presents bounce from the board and Christmas trees grow on the scene, at the end after completing the challenges you will receive your Christmas rewards.
How To Play
Surf though festive to win awesome prizes!
Points are only earned while on hoverboards.
Your score is a total of ALL your runs. Every run counts!
Event Cities & Boards
Trivia
appears revamped from the 2020 version ( ), covered with snow and with the night sky appearing clearer and starry with a moon and a Santa Claus shadow on the sleigh appears in the sky, Saint Petersburg also gets a new full music remix.

Super Runner Challenge
Burger King Challenge
Burger King Challenge is a special event only in , , and , and created in collaboration with Burger King . It is 3 stages long and is a Tag Team variant similar to Super Runners, but much shorter, completing the challenge unlocks The Burger King . Unlike most events it only rewards regular coins and not event coins and is age restricted to players 16+.
How To Play
Get points by running with your crew.
All points are added up for your total score.
Your surfers need to rest after each run.
Switch surfers to keep on going and get bigger rewards!

Rivals Challenge
Rivals Challenge is a special challenge that is only available in the updates where the new Rivals Crew were released. First, this challenge was released in update 3.12.0 ( ) and released a new rival Catrine , for the 11th Anniversary of the Game , secondly it was in update 3.15.0 ( ) where the second rival Bruno was released, the third was in update 3.18.0 ( ) where the third rival Hali was released, and the fourth and last was in update 3.21.0 ( ) where the fourth and final rival Lawrence was released. Each Rivals update is released 2 updates after the last one.
How To Play
Pick up hourglasses to increase your time.
All points are added up for your total.
Your surfers need to rest after each run.
Switch surfers to keep on going and get bigger rewards!

Chameleon
Chameleon is the 37th limited hoverboard in Subway Surfers and a limited hoverboard exclusive to Like any other hoverboard, it protects you from crashing for 30 seconds and needs to recharge for 5 seconds before it can be reused. It costs 50,000, like most other limited hoverboards.
Appearance
It is a wooden board on which a sketch of a chameleon is drawn in order to reflect the theme of the update. The special thing about this board is its graphics and animation: the board changes its color in a constant rainbow pattern.

Champ
Champ is a hoverboard released in . It can be unlocked in the . The first upgrade, Double Jump , costs 60, and the second upgrade, Smooth Drift , costs 60 as well. Like any other hoverboard, it protects your character from any obstacles for 30 seconds. When crashed, it will explode and need a few seconds to recharge before it can be used again.
Appearance
It's a reddish red and beige champion-themed board, in the central part it has the number 1 and has a gold torch as a exhaust pipe.

Character Tokens
Character Tokens are items in Subway Surfers . They can be used to unlock Tricky , Fresh , Spike , Yutani , their outfits , and Jake 's Star Outfit. The player can get Character Tokens by opening mystery boxes , token boxes , and collecting Season Hunt prizes.
Festive Fresh , Tankbot , Pridebot , Phoenix , Clementine , Hasina , Charlie , Pink , George , Dummy , Pride Miss Maia , Moira , Zi Hao , Alia , Fantasma , Song Yi , Elf Jake , Rabbit , Soul , Tutti , Frutti , Spraybot , Rain , Alfie , Tainá , Guard King , El Primo , Rosie , Horse , Bunny Betty , Kaito , Ratak , Lestari , and Pierre also need hunt tokens to be unlocked.
List of Character Tokens

Characters
Characters (also known as Surfers) are playable characters that players can play as in Subway Surfers . Most characters in the game are teenagers (or in rare occasions, young adults/adults). Every player starts off with Jake , but they can unlock more with Coins , Event Coins , Keys , Character Tokens (Core Crew only), or Hunt Tokens from Season Hunts . There are two types of characters, which are non-limited and limited. Non-limited characters (such as Tricky and Fresh ) are always available and can be obtained at any time. Limited characters (such as Tony and Carmen ) can only be bought for a limited time before going off-sale for a while. Limited characters become non-limited to the people that own those characters.
Characters in Subway Surfers can have outfits . Some characters have no outfits, while others can have one or two outfits which will change their appearance.
As of 3.42.3, outfits could no longer be accessed through their specific character. This is known as Outfit Separation.
This update allowed surfers to have more than two outfits. The first time this happened was in ( Bonnie with her third outfit, Thumper).
This update allowed surfers to have more than two outfits. The first time this happened was in ( Bonnie with her third outfit, Thumper).
On the home screen, the selected character will vandalize a train by spray painting the specific edition's graffiti while occasionally grabbing an extra spray can from their black bag and waving at the player. When the screen is tapped, The Guard and his dog will chase that character down the tracks until they have ran into a train, barrier, etc.
During each first released editions (and some re-releases), at least 1 new surfer (or sometimes more) is added to the game (except and ). Here’s the list of every character and their release costs:
Show/Hide Character List

Charlie
Charlie is a limited character in . They are non-binary and use they/them pronouns. They require 210.
Appearance
Default Outfit
Charlie is a Catalan/Spanish non-binary child/person who originates from . Charlie goes by they/them pronouns since they are non-binary. They have beige skin with rounded almond shaped dark blue eyes, they also have bleach blonde spiked hair with thick arched bleach blonde brows. Charlie has slightly sucked in cheekbones and smile lines as well. Their attire is a tucked in short sleeved cyan T-shirt with baggy yellow wind breaker like pants, which have dark yellow straps at the sides that are seemingly supposedly to be on their shoulders, and two yellow stripes at the bottom as well, and a pair of blue and white high top shoes. Charlie is normally seen covered in magenta spray paint, considering that when you go to check out the character, the animation shows Charlie picking up a magenta and yellow colored spray paint bottle and shaking it vigorously before it explodes.
Trivia
Charlie is the third character released in 2022 , after Tiger , and Hasina .
Charlie is the second surfer, the first being Diego , the third being Tutti , the fourth being Berta , and the fifth being Costa .
They are the third confirmed non-binary character after Callum and Bob The Blob .
They are the 15th blond character.
They came back during in the Birthday Bonanza for .
Their idle animation is similar to Super Runner Fresh's idle animation.
Unlike Super Runner Fresh , Charlie's spray can explodes every time.
Unlike Super Runner Fresh , Charlie's spray can explodes every time.
According to the official X (formerly Twitter) account , they have a crush on Miss Maia .
Their character animations echo Miss Maia's character animations.
There is a glitch where if you leave the app or turn off your device and then re-enter the app while they are doing their animation before they get covered in spray paint, they remain without the spray paint.
For unknown reasons, they didn't receive their 1st outfit in or .

Charmer
Charmer is a hoverboard released in . Like any other hoverboard, it protects the character from crashing for 30 seconds. When crashed, it will need to recharge for a few seconds before it can be used again.
Appearance
It is a light blue rectangle board with purple up front and reddish pink underneath. At the back is a purple circle with a diamond and a yellow circle with a heart. Attached to the board is a string of 3 charms, a circle, a diamond, and a heart. Stay Low adds purple handles.
Trivia

It's Joo Won 's board .

Cherry
Cherry is the seventh limited hoverboard in Subway Surfers  and the second token board of the game. Like any other hoverboard , it protects you from crashing for 30 seconds. When crashed, the hoverboard will explode and need to recharge for a few seconds before using again. It was introduced in . In order to unlock the hoverboard, users had to collect 60 ( Japanese Keychains ) within a week at the final week of the Weekly Hunt .
Appearance
The board has a picture of a cherry blossom on a green and white striped background.
History
Cherry was added to the game on May 2nd, 2013 with the update. Players could unlock this by collecting 60 Japanese Keychains at the final week of the Weekly Hunt .
On 30 May 2014, it reappeared to the game as an event named "Cherry Comeback".
On 18 November 2015, it reappeared in a Wild Wednesdays event.
On 6 April 2017, it was available as a hunt prize at the second week of the Weekly Hunt for the edition. Players who already unlocked this board received 10 instead.
On a livestream, it appears as a promo code, BaliBlossom, the code is now expired.
Trivia
In the update, Cherry reappeared as a Hunt prize as an Easter 2017 special.
In the , update, Cherry reappeared as a Daily Login prize in the .
Cherry was re-released for in several updates after .
The same thing happened with Bamboo .
The same thing happened with Bamboo .
In and , it came back in the as a replacement for those who already own Kitty .
It is Harumi 's second board . Her first board is Kitty .
In the Chinese Version, it's called Cherry Blossoms (櫻花) and it's non-limited board.
This board share the mostly same name as Sakura in the Chinese Version, since Sakura board is called Cherry Blossom (樱之花) .
This board share the mostly same name as Sakura in the Chinese Version, since Sakura board is called Cherry Blossom (樱之花) .

Chicken Jake
Appearance
Chicken Jake is one of Jake 's variants, where he wears a white hoodie that shows the Chicken, the default character of Crossy Road , on top. Meanwhile, the back of the said hoodie shows the Crossy Road coin.
Trivia
He, Mallard Tricky , Ribbon and Finlay are the tenth, eleventh, twelfth and thirteenth surfers released in 2025 , after Snake , Tang Yuan , Valentina , Kaleo , Rebeca Roar , Gabriel , Dinorange , Rocky , and Rani .
He is from a collaboration with Crossy Road .
He and Mallard Tricky are the first collaboration surfers of 2025 .
Like Jake, the Chicken from Crossy Road is also the default and main character of their game.

Chicky
Chicky is the fourth limited hoverboard and the first token hoverboard in Subway Surfers . Originally, it could only be unlocked by collecting 100 eggs in 30 days at the Egg Hunt event during . Like any other hoverboard, it protects your character from crashing by any obstacles for 30 seconds. When crashed, it will explode and need a few seconds to recharge in order to use it again.
Appearance
It has the appearance of a rather cute chick in a full-sized view. Equipping the Feather Trail upgrade makes the tail feathers bigger. The Super Speed upgrade adds a pair of pilot goggles to the hoverboard and changes the shape of the wings.
History
Chicky is the first Easter Special board.
The Chicky board could be unlocked by collecting 100 Easter Eggs at the Egg Hunt during . This made it the first token hoverboard.
On April 8th 2015 , it reappeared in a Wild Wednesdays event and it cost $0.99.
On March 10th 2016 , the update gave the Chicky board two upgrades, called Feather Trail which cost 0 at the time, and Super Speed , which cost 110, now 55. The Feather Trail came back again as a free gift in .
This renamed the misnamed Egg Trail to " Feather Trail ". However, unlike its previous appearance in the other editions, it now costs 30.
On March 23rd 2016 , it reappeared in a Wild Wednesdays event.
On March 30th 2017 , it reappeared in the update and could be bought for $0.99.
On March 22nd 2018 , it reappeared in the update and could be bought for $0.99.
On March 26th 2020 , it reappeared in the update for .
On March 31st 2021 , it reappeared in the Season Hunt for 80 Eggs .
On April 4th 2022 , it reappeared in the update for 32,000. Its upgrades, Feather Trail and Super Speed each cost 21,000.
On March 11th 2024 , it reappeared in the update for 17,000.
Trivia
This was the first hoverboard that required tokens to be collected.
This was the second board to receive upgrades, the first being Jingles .
It is the first limited hoverboard not to be in the original hoverboard shape.
This board did not come back in because that version was not Easter theme.
For unknown reasons, it did not return in , , , and .

Chill Out
Chill Out is a hoverboard released in . Like any other hoverboard, it protects the character from crashing for 30 seconds. When crashed, it will need to recharge for a few seconds before it can be used again.
Appearance
A standard-shaped hoverboard that shares similarities with the other Birthday boards, as it is also wrapped in a ribbon. Chill Out's ribbon is blue-colored, and its base is painted in a green harlequin-diamond pattern.
Trivia
Chill Out, Buck Lightdeer , Candy Crash , and Mean Green Machine are the last boards released in 2025 .
It, Buck Lightdeer , Candy Crash , and Mean Green Machine are the 50th, 51th, 52th, and 53th boards released in 2025 , after Hyper Viper , Lantern , Override , Fresh Love , Heartstopper , Dear Dart , Roarsome , Arara Board , Moongazer , Purple Spin , Cyan Note , Blue Riff , Eggscalibur , Bloomster , Edinburst , Guard Board , Trespasser , Mizu Dash , Zapline , Seven Seas , 13th Birthday , You Are Here , Freebird , Glitter Blaster , Float-Booster , Feeling Beachy , Street Style , Roll & Race , Midsummer , Business Time , Rabbit Racer , Circuit Bunny , E-Racer , Brainstormer , Principal's Nightmare , The De-lyre-ious , Moon Biter , 8 Ball , Piece Of Cake , Finish Line , Motor Mania , Fiesta , Shin Supreme , Galactic Peel , Charmer , Bias Boom , Four-leaf Flux , Gobble Trouble , and Pie Express .
It's the eighth board, the first being Choo Choo , the second being Glacier , the third being Ginger Boom , the fourth being Flash Jet , the fifth being Wind-Up Rocket , the sixth being Snow Down , the seventh being Buck Lightdeer , the ninth being Candy Crash , and the tenth being Mean Green Machine .
Chill Out is the 18th Christmas -themed board, the 1st being Snowflake , the 2nd being Jingles , the 3rd being Rudy , the 4th being Choo Choo , the 5th being Glacier , the 6th being Sleigh , the 7th being Ginger Boom , the 8th being Ho Ho Hoverboard , the 9th being Snow Cloud , the 10th being Wrapped , the 11th being Wind-Up Rocket , the 12th being Snow Down , the 13th being Jingle Dingle , the 14th being Shiny Surprise , the 15th being Gadget Force , the 16th being Ice Cool , the 17th being Buck Lightdeer , the 19th being Candy Crash , and the 20th being Mean Green Machine .
It's Festive Jake 's board .

Christmas
Christmas is a holiday that is celebrated in the Subway Surfers World Tour updates on December 25th .
Info
Main article: Wikipedia
Christmas is an annual festival commemorating the birth of Jesus Christ, observed primarily on December 25 as a religious and cultural celebration among billions of people around the world. A liturgical feast central to Christianity, Christmas preparation begins on the First Sunday of Advent and it is followed by Christmastide, which historically in the West lasts twelve days and culminates on Twelfth Night. Christmas Day is a public holiday in many countries, is observed religiously by a majority of Christians, as well as celebrated culturally by many non-Christians, and forms an integral part of the annual holiday season.
Christmas special World Tour editions

Chuck
Chuck is a character released in . He is the 279th character in the game and the 17th surfer of 2026 .
Appearance
Default Outfit
Chuck is a male teenager wearing a hoodie featuring Chuck from Angry Birds , where the hood covers the upper half of his face. He is also wearing a pair of dark grey pants and grey shoes, which has yellow and maroon accents.
Trivia
He, Toaxx , Ratak , and Red are the 14th, 15th, 16th, and 17th surfers released in 2026 , after Frank Noir , Holly , Sean Snow , Mia , Rosalita , Lorcan , Horse , Vittorio , Enzo , Sprinkle , Bunny Betty , Tsuki Chan , and Kaito .
He is also the eighth male 2026 surfer, after Frank Noir , Sean Snow , Lorcan , Vittorio , Enzo , Kaito , Ratak , and Red
He is also the eighth male 2026 surfer, after Frank Noir , Sean Snow , Lorcan , Vittorio , Enzo , Kaito , Ratak , and Red
He is the second surfer, the first being Red .
He is the Subway Surfers counterpart of Chuck from Angry Birds .
He reuses Skye 's animations.
He is the 60th surfer to reuse animations. The previous surfers were Frankette , J Balvin , Vivienne , Captain Flash , Clockwork Johnny , Thunder , Azura , Astra , Lucky , Red Panda , Faiza , Electra , Riley , Glorgalax , Ventura , Leo , Ozzy , Billy Bean , Kedi , Ruhi , Pumpkin Pete , Leif , Demi Lovato , Kaleo , Rani , Finlay , Stevie , Berta , Costa , Rochelle Rebelle , Asher , White Rabbit , Peter , Henry , Tara , Sunny , Alma Brava , Mateo , Crewmate Jake , Crewmate Tricky , Crewmate Spike , Crewmate King , Crewmate Tasha , Crewmate Guard , Rosie , Ballerina Latticina , Holly , Sean Snow , Mia , Rosalita , Horse , Vittorio , Enzo , Bunny Betty , Tsuki Chan , Toaxx Ratak , and Red .
He's the 12th surfer to reuse animations from a Chinese Version character (although the animation is from the International version).
He is the 60th surfer to reuse animations. The previous surfers were Frankette , J Balvin , Vivienne , Captain Flash , Clockwork Johnny , Thunder , Azura , Astra , Lucky , Red Panda , Faiza , Electra , Riley , Glorgalax , Ventura , Leo , Ozzy , Billy Bean , Kedi , Ruhi , Pumpkin Pete , Leif , Demi Lovato , Kaleo , Rani , Finlay , Stevie , Berta , Costa , Rochelle Rebelle , Asher , White Rabbit , Peter , Henry , Tara , Sunny , Alma Brava , Mateo , Crewmate Jake , Crewmate Tricky , Crewmate Spike , Crewmate King , Crewmate Tasha , Crewmate Guard , Rosie , Ballerina Latticina , Holly , Sean Snow , Mia , Rosalita , Horse , Vittorio , Enzo , Bunny Betty , Tsuki Chan , Toaxx Ratak , and Red .
