Clementine
Clementine is a limited character from . She can be unlocked by completing the season hunt.
In she got her first outfit, the Frosty Outfit it could be unlocked by getting 400 during the season hunt (now it cost 100 ).
In she got her second outfit, the Hide and Sheep Outfit it could be unlocked for 400.
Appearance
Default Outfit
Clementine is a 12-year-old girl from the who wears a brown fluffy coat with a green outline on her hood and jingle bells on her red scarf, and with red antler ears coming out of the hood along with some reindeer ears on the side. She also wears some green and red stripped stockings and underneath some long fuzzy boots. If you look closely she wears red mittens. She also has blond hair , green eyes, and freckles.
Frosty Outfit
Launched in , her eyes change from green to blue. She appears to be wearing rubber boots leggings, a bright red skirt as well as blue and white stripped shirt with an orange jacket over top with blue and white detail on the arms she also appears to be wearing orange mittens and a blue and white tunic covering some of her face
Hide and Sheep Outfit
Launched in , she now wears a grey-green turtleneck sweater with a pixel sheep design on it, a black hood with sheep ears, some black leggings with holes on the right leg, black boots with green laces, and large black and green-ish headphones.
History
* An exact date was found where she appeared in, otherwise, the edition release date is assumed.

Cleo
Cleo is a limited character from . She can be unlocked with 25,000 . Her first outfit, the Heartbreaker Outfit could be unlocked with 34,000 in . Her second outfit, Blossom Queen Outfit could be unlocked by collecting 400 in . Now, she costs and her outfits each cost 150.
Appearance
Default Outfit
Cleo is an American teenage girl from she has pink hair with cyan, yellow, and blue spray cans as curlers. She has pale skin and black eyes. Both of her eyebrows have slits. She wears a black jacket over a cyan top that reads "Be Kind", a lavender bracelet, gray plaid shorts, and cyan boots with light blue laces.
Heartbreaker Outfit
Launched in , she now has darker pink hair with golden spray cans. She wears a purple jacket that back has hearts, she wears now yellow bracelet, long socks with the colors of the transgender flag, purple shorts, and darker pink boots with black laces.
Blossom Queen Outfit
Launched in her hair is now brown and has a flower crown on it. She has double piercings on one ear and a golden bracelet. She also wears a white shirt with a big pink flower pattern on it and purple shorts. She has socks that are white with a green stripe on them. She also has purple shoes.
Trivia
She is the second character to have a voice in the trailer, the first being Bonnie , the third being Super Runner Jake , the fourth being Fantasma , the fifth being Elf Jake , Elf Tricky , Elf Fresh , and Elf Yutani , the sixth being Soul , the seventh being Audrey , and the eighth being Billy Bean .
Unlike the rest, she and Audrey speak full sentences.
Unlike the rest, she and Audrey speak full sentences.
Her hairstyle, which uses spray cans as curlers, references Lady Gaga's hairstyle in the "Telephone" music video.
Her dance animation comes from the music video of Lady Gaga's "Marry the Night".
She is the eighth female American surfer after Jenny , Lauren , Alicia , Alba , Cathy , Morgan , and Lana .
She is the 24th character released in 2021 after Frankette , Spacebot , Ox , Rat , Qin , Hou , Zayn , Darryl , Lana , Bonnie , Buzz , Trym , Pridebot , Pride Jake , Pride Fresh , Pride Spike , Pride Tricky , Pride Yutani , Pride Frank , Parkour Rin , Alexandre , Akira , and Koral .

Queen of Hearts , Tagger , and Sunny Sailor are her boards .
Phoenix and Song Yi are her best friends and she is a fan of the Supernovas group ( Astra , Ji-Yeong and Stella ), according to the official posts in social media.

Clockwork Johnny
Clockwork Johnny is a limited character released in . He is the 175th and last 2023 character released in the game.
Appearance
Clockwork Johnny is a toy robot from Planet Electrobix . He is a clockwork red robot whose body is divided into segments. He has a clockwork device on his head, yellow eyes, metallic gray eyebrows and mouth, and large screw like ears on the sides of his head. Metallic gray hands with three fingers each, legs also metallic and gray, but above the foot are red knee pads and gray metallic feet. He and Captain Flash are partners and are the enemies of Zaraxtron .
History
* An exact date was found where he appeared in, otherwise, the edition release date is assumed.
Trivia
Clockwork Johnny is the 7th surfer after Buddy , Malik , Festive Fresh , Clementine , Gingerbot , and Captain Flash .
He is the 21st and final character released in 2023 after Rabbit , Soul , Tutti , Frutti , Spraybot , Catrine , Rain , Alfie , Bruno , Tainá , Yutani Harlequin Toad , Yuto , Hali , Thursday , Outatime Jake , Ji-Yeong , J Balvin , Lawrence , Vivienne and Captain Flash .
He and Captain Flash are the last characters of 2023 .
They also have the same animations .

He is the 12th robot character after Tagbot , Boombot , Rabbot , Tankbot , Frankette , Spacebot , Pridebot , Gingerbot , Dummy , Spraybot and Captain Flash .
He is the third surfer that can be unlocked from the , the first being Thursday and the second being Vivienne , and the fourth being Nick .
Wind-Up Rocket is his board .

Club Frame
The Club Frame is a frame released in the update. This frame could be unlocked as a Creator Club gift during .
Appearance
Similar to the Default Frame , but is colored in a light to dark pink gradient with drippings in the upper and lower border.
Trivia
This is the seventh frame to be released, after the Default Frame in for Top Run and for Player Profile , the Birthday Frame in , the Hollywood Frame in , the Summer Frame in , and the Plant and Lava Frames in .
This is the first ever frame that can be claimed through a link (as a Creator Club gift).

Cobra
Cobra is a limited hoverboard released in . Like any other hoverboard, it protects you from crashing for 30 seconds. When crashed, it will explode and recharge for a few seconds before it can be used again. Like most other limited hoverboards, it costs 50,000.
Appearance
It has the appearance of a green cobra snake. It has an oddly smiley face at the back of it's head.
Trivia
It is the first board, the second being Magic Carpet , the third being Camel , the fourth being Radiant Rider , the fifth being Tea Timer , and the sixth being Deli Vroom .

Coco
Coco is a limited character released during . She is also the seventh limited character in the World Tour series. She can be purchased with 95,000 , just like most limited characters that cost . Both her Art Outfit and Jester Outfit can be bought for 75, respectively. From until , she was a permanent character, along with her outfits (Art and Jester).
This character is not available for purchase in Train Riders .
Appearance
Default Outfit
Coco is a young French woman who appears to be a mime artist. She has shoulder-length navy blue hair and green eyes. She wears a red beret, regular mime makeup, a black and white striped shirt (called a " marinière " in French) that exposes her midriff, ends with brown suspenders at her hips along with black tights, black dress shoes, and a red neckerchief tied around her neck.
Art Outfit
Launched in , her beret changes to black, her shirt changes to plain white and has its sleeves rolled up. She has a paintbrush on her left ear, and she wears a gray-blue apron stained with green, pink, and yellow paint. She still wears black tights and black shoes. When she runs in the subway, the apron effect is gone.
Jester Outfit
Launched in , instead of a beret, she wears a tall white dune-cap-like hat with two purple balls in the middle and another on the top of the hat. Her hair is also designed differently; her hair is shaped in cone-shaped pigtails which are pointing out of the left and right of her head. She has a typical jester outfit which is multi-colored, as well as two black buttons in the middle. She, however, still wears black pants/leggings and brown shoes.
Trivia
She is also the second European character and the first female European character followed by Alex , then Jolien , the fourth being Freya , the fifth being Nina , the sixth being Bonnie , the Seventh being Moira , the eighth being Frutti and the latest being Vivienne .
She retains her makeup throughout her outfits.
She is the second female limited character to receive her outfit after her re-release.
Rose , Sweetheart and Paint Palette are her boards .
She got a new animation in the update. Prior to that, she did not have separate animations for her outfits, such as when she paints a heart, or leaps around in her Art and Jester outfits respectively.
She returns for Wild Wednesdays such as , , , , , and .
She gets a +5 Multiplier Bonus for Special Thursdays such as , , , , , and .
She is the first limited character so far who got +5 Multiplier Bonus in 2 consecutive updates ( and both in 2018).
This would later happen again with Roberto in & but with the Multiplier Bonus event instead.

Navigation

Coin
Coins (which look like this in the game) are the main currency in Subway Surfers . Coins can be obtained in many ways, for example, collecting them while in the subway or receiving them from mystery boxes . With enough coins, players can buy characters like King , Zoe and Prince K , or hoverboards like Panda , Hot Rod and Lowrider . However, some characters or hoverboards like Tricky , Yutani and Fresh use tokens instead of coins to be obtained. Coins are also used to upgrade and buy power-ups and skip missions .
Where to Find Coins?
Collecting them during a run
Opening Mystery Boxes (up to 100,000 coins (900,000 during the Terrific Tuesday event)), Super Mystery Boxes (up to 300,000 coins (1,500,000 during the Terrific Tuesday event)), and opening Mini Mystery Boxes (up to 2,000 coins).
Purchasing them in the Shop (up to 1.25M coins for $99.99)
Completing the 3rd and 4th days of the Word Hunt (previously Daily Challenge)
Obtaining them from friends (up to 25 runs)
Completing the week 1+2 weekly hunt ( only )
Obtain from tiers in the Season Hunt
Connecting to Facebook (5K coins)
Purchasing the Welcome Pack (one-time purchase, up to 45K coins)
How to Spend Coins?
Buying Mystery Boxes
Skipping missions in the shop
Buying characters , hoverboards & portraits
Buying power ups
Upgrading power ups
List of Coin Packs
Players can also buy coins with real money. The below table illustrates the prices of each "pack" of coins.
Trivia
If players are in need of coins, the Coin Magnet will help collect all the coins in all three lanes, making it a very useful power-up in collecting them.
The Jetpack is also good in collecting coins as they will appear in the air when flying, while the Super Sneakers help collect coins under them while jumping. The Pogo Stick gives players three lines of coins when jumping high in the sky.
The Jetpack is also good in collecting coins as they will appear in the air when flying, while the Super Sneakers help collect coins under them while jumping. The Pogo Stick gives players three lines of coins when jumping high in the sky.
Coins appear in 3 different types of trails, a normal straight trail, an arch trail (requires the player to jump) and a diagonal trail (requires the player to switch lanes).
The player cannot collect coins while using a Headstart .
Other ways of getting coins are buying them with in-app purchases (using real money) or when the player's Facebook/Game Center friend plays the game and had 25 runs.
There are also easier ways to get coins, like watching a sponsored video.
There is an in-app purchase where they can get double coins for every coin they collect while running for $4.99, making it easier to buy limited characters and hoverboards. Players can also temporarily do this by watching an ad (one for 45s, two for infinite) when Coin Doubler appears during a run.
Sometimes in-app purchases have sales which lets them buy a certain amount of coins in a much cheaper price.
A starter pack was also added during the edition that rewards the player 7,000 and some keys and hoverboards for $0.99.
There are also easier ways to get coins, like watching a sponsored video.
There is an in-app purchase where they can get double coins for every coin they collect while running for $4.99, making it easier to buy limited characters and hoverboards. Players can also temporarily do this by watching an ad (one for 45s, two for infinite) when Coin Doubler appears during a run.
Sometimes in-app purchases have sales which lets them buy a certain amount of coins in a much cheaper price.
A starter pack was also added during the edition that rewards the player 7,000 and some keys and hoverboards for $0.99.
Coins can also increase players' run score, which makes them essential in getting highscores.
The points gained from coins are counted in the following equation:
number of coins x score multiplier x 2.
A simpler way to look at it: if the player has a 30x multiplier, each coin is worth 60 points. If they only grab one coin in a run, then at the end of it they'll get 60 points added to your score. Meanwhile the score multiplier is at work boosting their score while they run.

So far, all limited characters that can be unlocked by coins cost 95,000 and limited hoverboards cost 50,000 (except Bamboo , costing 20,000).

Coin Doubler
Coin Doubler is an item that was released in .
Appearance
It's two golden coins with a star symbol in the center, accompanied by the "x2" Multiplier text.
History
Trivia
This is the fourth item that can be obtainable by ads, the first being Super Bubble , the second being Score Blast , and the three being Multiplier Bonus .
If you buy an " unlimited number of double coins ", then a cash doubler is not issued.

Coin Magnet
Coin Magnet is a power-up in Subway Surfers . When one is collected, the character grabs it and automatically collects every coin the character passes by, even if a coin is not in its path. This is the ideal power-up if they want to get many coins very quickly. The player can upgrade it until lasts 30 seconds.
Trivia
When the player collects a Jetpack while the coin magnet is active, the first few coins on the ground will be collected before reaching the sky.
It will collect all coins in the air when a Jetpack is active until it wears off.
However, they can't collect coins on the ground with a coin magnet when they're in the air. Instead, they only collect the coins in the air.
Similarly, they can't collect coins on the ground when on top of a big tunnel with coins.
They also can't attract coins on the ground when using a Pogo Stick .
They will start attracting the coins on the ground when you first touch the ground.
It will collect all coins in the air when a Jetpack is active until it wears off.
However, they can't collect coins on the ground with a coin magnet when they're in the air. Instead, they only collect the coins in the air.
Similarly, they can't collect coins on the ground when on top of a big tunnel with coins.
They also can't attract coins on the ground when using a Pogo Stick .
They will start attracting the coins on the ground when you first touch the ground.
They will start attracting the coins on the ground when you first touch the ground.
It is one of the more useful power-ups in the game.
Just like the Super Sneakers , if the player gets the coin magnet while the Guard is chasing them, the Guard will slow down. This does not happen if the Coin Magnet was already active.
It has the appearance of a horseshoe magnet, with golden tips.
Since coins contribute to the score, it's also an essential power-up in receiving high scores alongside the Score Booster and x2 Multiplier .
For unknown reasons, the Coin Magnet's hitbox was altered to be a little bigger in . This means when you are on the same level with it, you can't jump over it or roll under it when it is hovering above a train.
The same thing happened to the 2X Multiplier .

The new sound is actually the old sound speed up.
However in the V3.37.1 update, the sound effect was reverted to the old one.

Coin Meter
The Coin Meter is a feature added in 2.19.1 and is in the Daily Challenge tab on the events tab. If you get 500, 1000, and 1500 , you get rewards.
Trivia
During seasons, if you get 250, 500, 1000, 2000, 3000, 4000, or 5000 , you will get a reward for each of them.

Coin and Key Sales
Sales are common in Subway Surfers . Like normal sales in real life, their prices are either decreased or their result is increased. Even so, you still have to use real money for the purchases. You can find those sales at the Store.
Trivia
Sales are always titled "Special Deal" in the list.
Sometimes, the title is changed along the real time, such as the title "Black Friday Sale" given on the last Friday before Christmas.
Sometimes, the title is changed along the real time, such as the title "Black Friday Sale" given on the last Friday before Christmas.
Sales are always on the top of the list.
Priced sales are not decreased, but amount of or are increased instead.
There is always only 1 sale every time.
Their boxes change color according to the edition.

Collectables Box
Collectables Box are boxes which are only available on Subway Surfers+ , they are used to get free Characters and Hoverboards . They cost 18 .
When all Characters and Hoverboards are received, then this box starts giving fixed 15,000 coins, upon opening.

Collections
The Collections feature was introduced in the in the 3.12.1 update, released on May 22nd, 2023 . It was released on September 18th, 2023 in . The boards included on them are Cruiser and Flying Horse .
New UI of Collections was rolled out for some users in the 3.61.1 update. It entirely changed the UI of unlocking screen, rewarding items (including coins , keys and even multipliers ), etc. It rewards frames depending on the scores ( Template:Score ). (For example, if you reach 100 Template:Score , it rewards a Bronze I Collections Frame )
Collections 1.0
Limited Time
Collections 2.0 (v3.62.1 onwards)
Trivia
This feature was introduced in the update and was only available for some countries/regions.
As the feature was still being worked on and was not finalized, the Collections feature was not available for majority of players until .
The feature initially had a limited release for testing, before being released for everyone in .
The limited time Crew Bonus was first added to Collections in before being officially released in .
We can collect Characters and Hoverboards in the Collections feature to unlock various prizes.
The only two hoverboards that can be unlocked from the Collection Meter rewards are Cruiser and Flying Horse .
Before initial release for grind fest, the reward was 2x Multiplier which was changed to 3x Multiplier .
This is the first mechanic to make a prevoiusly limited board non-limited.
The background of the Collections title at the top shows Liu , Aina's Daisy Outfit , Spacebot , Frankette , Croc , and Secret Society . Before, the background showed Liu , Aina's Daisy Outfit , Rosa , Manny , Croc , and Prickly .
They are all from three separate bundles . The only board that is missing from one of the bundles is Spaceship .

Color Cloud
Color Cloud is a limited hoverboard released in .
Appearance
It has the appearance of a colorful cloud. Equipping the Speed Up upgrade adds a bunch of smaller clouds around the hoverboard. Zap Sideways makes the board change colors when the player switches lanes.

Color Splash
Color Splash is a power-up that is exclusive to the Color Cloud board . When equipped, it makes the hoverboard change colors whenever you move to a different lane (functionally identical to Zap Sideways , but with a color change effect). In the 3.49.0 update, it was renamed to Zap Sideways for unknown reasons.

Colors
"Colors" is a song in Subway Surfers sung by Rocky and Rani . It was released in , on March 10th, 2025 . It's available in the game's boombox as background music and also in music streaming services, like Spotify or Apple Music. The soundtrack ( Colors (Mumbai Holi) ) is based on this song, but it doesn't have lyrics, only vocalizing.

Connie
Connie Bressler is Jake's mother. She was voiced by Sara Cravens. She only appeared in Busted .
Appearance
Connie is a single mother. she has a light brown short bob hairstyle, black eyes, she wears a clock watch, dark blue shirt, yellow pants, she wears black shoes.
History
She was seen when The Guard had came back with her Son she talks with the Guard. during her chat with the guard he yells at her saying Jake should be put on a tighter lease (so he would stop vandalizing his trains). Jake tries to defend his Mom over the guard however Connie stops Jake before he can say more. She punishes and sends him to his room him she asks The Guard if she went to far and she had another chat with him off-screen. Later on when Jake placed a dummy in his bed she got ticked off.

Cook-Express
Cook-Express is a board introduced in . Like any other hoverboard, it protects you from crashing for 30 seconds. When crashed, the hoverboard will explode and need to recharge for a few seconds before using it again. It costs 26.000.
Appearance
It's in a shape of an avocado slice with a turquoise chef's hat behind it. When equipped with Double Jump, it has a spatula at the back, and when equipped with Smooth Drift, it has two mixers at the back.
Trivia
It, Chop-Chop Board , Moon Cake , and Veggie Velocity are the 36th, 37th, 38th and 39th boards released in 2024 after Skyrocket , Electro Shock , Bada-Bomb , Confetti Crush , Red Velvet , Roaring Heart , Lunar Scroll , Astro Tune , Interstellar , Shamrock Shebang , Megga Bite , Fast and Festive , Radiant Rider , Jak , Tea Timer , Deli-Vroom , Yellow Sub , Jelly Board , Koinobori , Mayo Mania , 12th Birthday , Pixel Hoverboard , Street Grace , Alarm On , Rock n' Riley , Sunny Sailor , Laser Flip , Glarx 3000 , Standing Ovation , Risky Ride , Sporty Summer , Heavy Metal , Champ , Arrow , Raggedy Runner , Turbo Stump , and Brass Whizz .
It's the 5th board, after Outback , Wave Rider , Ray , and Chop-Chop Board .
The fruit chosen on the board is an avocado .
In the Chinese Version, this board is 2024 board and called Avocado Chef (鳄梨厨神) and it's shape doesn't change.
It's Audrey 's board .
There was a glitch on this hoverboard where the ending animation would be bugged when the Double Jump upgrade was turned on. It was fixed in .
It's the 15th board in 2024 to cost , after Tea Timer , Deli-Vroom , Jelly Board , Yellow Sub , Pixel Hoverboard , Street Grace , Rock n' Riley , Sunny Sailor , Standing Ovation , Heavy Metal , Arrow , Raggedy Runner , Brass Whizz , and Chop-Chop Board .
It has the same upgrades as Rave Rider , Electro Shock , Champ , Brass Whizz , Couch Surfer , Fear Tractor , Lantern and The Green Flame .

Cookies
Cookies are the second of the four items that you needed to complete the Holiday Hunt during the update. You can get this by opening a Mystery Box , and had to get 8 cookies.

Coral
Coral is a limited hoverboard in Subway Surfers . It is a limited hoverboard exclusive to . Like any other hoverboard, it protects you from crashing for 30 seconds. When crashed, the hoverboard will explode and need to recharge for a few seconds before using again. Like most other limited hoverboards, it costs 50,000.
Appearance
It is a blue coral shaped hoverboard with coral growing on it, and there's also some yellow suckers growing all around the board.
Trivia
Coral is the seventh new board in 2020 after Jazz , Aero , Scroll , Roto , Punk , and Betty .
This is the second board, the first being Naga .

Costa
Costa is a character released in the update. He is the 224th character in the game and 19th surfer in 2025 .
Appearance
Default Outfit
Costa is a 16-year-old Catalan/Spanish teenage boy from . His odd hairstyle includes a lot of hair buns, which surrounds his a duck floatie and goggles that he used as a headband. He also wears a sleeveless multicolored shirt together with his orange-accented yellow pants. He also has blue flip-flops, a cord with several attachments wrapped around his waist, a beaded necklace bearing a white tassel, and a white line of face paint on both of his cheeks.
History
* An exact date was found where he appeared in, otherwise, the edition release date is assumed.
Trivia
He, Berta , and Yutani Tree Frog are the 18th, 19th, and 20th surfers released in 2025 , after Snake , Tang Yuan , Valentina , Kaleo , Rebeca Roar , Gabriel , Dinorange , Rocky , Rani , Finlay , Ribbon , Chicken Jake , Mallard Tricky , Oni Hime , Saru , LOC , and Stevie .
He is the fifth surfer, after Diego , Charlie , Tutti , and Berta .
He reuses Logan 's animations.
He is the 29th surfer to reuse animations after Frankette , J Balvin , Vivienne , Captain Flash , Clockwork Johnny , Thunder , Azura , Astra , Lucky , Red Panda , Faiza , Electra , Riley , Glorgalax , Ventura , Leo , Ozzy , Billy Bean , Kedi , Ruhi , Pumpkin Pete , Leif , Demi Lovato , Kaleo , Rani , Finlay , Stevie , and Berta .
He is the 29th surfer to reuse animations after Frankette , J Balvin , Vivienne , Captain Flash , Clockwork Johnny , Thunder , Azura , Astra , Lucky , Red Panda , Faiza , Electra , Riley , Glorgalax , Ventura , Leo , Ozzy , Billy Bean , Kedi , Ruhi , Pumpkin Pete , Leif , Demi Lovato , Kaleo , Rani , Finlay , Stevie , and Berta .
He is the sixth surfer of 2025 to cost real money, the others being Rebeca Roar , Rocky , Ribbon , Oni Hime , and LOC .
Float-Booster is his board .
He is the 15th surfer who is 16 years old, after Catrine , Bruno , Tainá , Hali , Lucky , Faiza , Electra , Ozzy , Kedi , Logan , Leif , Snake , Rebeca Roar , and LOC .
His zodiac sign is Sagittarius ♐️.
His birthday is between November 22 and December 21 (the exact date is unknown).
His birthday is between November 22 and December 21 (the exact date is unknown).
His last appearance in the files was .
In the Chinese Version, he is 2026 surfer.

Couch Surfer
Couch Surfer is a hoverboard released in . Like any other hoverboard, it protects you from crashing for 30 seconds. When crashed, the hoverboard will explode and need to recharge for a few seconds before using it again. It can be unlocked in the 5th stage of Back to School Challenge in .
Appearance
It's a red couch-shaped board, with a white eye and a pink pupil, 2 golden knots, on its sides they are purple and gray, it has 2 tires on the back and 1 tire on the front and finally it has the same visor in the front.
Trivia
It, Catalyst , and Flash of Flavor are the 40th, 41st and 42nd boards released in 2024 after Skyrocket , Electro Shock , Bada-Bomb , Confetti Crush , Red Velvet , Roaring Heart , Lunar Scroll , Astro Tune , Interstellar , Shamrock Shebang , Megga Bite , Fast and Festive , Radiant Rider , Jak , Tea Timer , Deli-Vroom , Yellow Sub , Jelly Board , Koinobori , Mayo Mania , 12th Birthday , Pixel Hoverboard , Street Grace , Alarm On , Rock n' Riley , Sunny Sailor , Laser Flip , Glarx 3000 , Standing Ovation , Risky Ride , Sporty Summer , Heavy Metal , Champ , Arrow , Raggedy Runner , Turbo Stump , Brass Whizz , Chop-Chop Board , Cook-Express , Moon Cake , and Veggie Velocity .
It's the first board, the second being Catalyst and the third being Flash of Flavor .
There was a glitch on this hoverboard where the ending animation would be bugged when the Double Jump upgrade was turned on. It was fixed in .
It's Ruhi 's board and Mala 's third board .
This is the second board to use the name surfer , the first being Super Surfer .
It has the same upgrades as Rave Rider , Electro Shock , Champ , Brass Whizz , Cook-Express , Fear Tractor , Lantern , and The Green Flame .
It's currently the only board to not return after its release yet.
In the Chinese Version, this board is (Sky City) board and called Cloud Wandering Immortal Bed (云游仙塌) .

Cozy Cruiser
Cozy Cruiser is a board released in . It costs 3.99. Its first upgrade, Super Speed , costs 60, while its second upgrade, Stay Low , costs 60. Like any other hoverboard, it protects your character from any obstacles for 30 seconds. When crashed, it will explode and need a few seconds to recharge before it can be used again. Super Jump is its default ability.
Appearance
It is a green futuristic-themed hoverboard with orange and yellow checkered patterns on it and it has four aerowheels underneath, each is connected on its sides.
Trivia
It, Icicle , and Suitcase Saga are the 50th, 51st, and 52nd boards released in 2024 after Skyrocket , Electro Shock , Bada-Bomb , Confetti Crush , Red Velvet , Roaring Heart , Lunar Scroll , Astro Tune , Interstellar , Shamrock Shebang , Megga Bite , Fast and Festive , Radiant Rider , Jak , Tea Timer , Deli-Vroom , Yellow Sub , Jelly Board , Koinobori , Mayo Mania , 12th Birthday , Pixel Hoverboard , Street Grace , Alarm On , Rock n' Riley , Sunny Sailor , Laser Flip , Glarx 3000 , Standing Ovation , Risky Ride , Sporty Summer , Heavy Metal , Champ , Arrow , Raggedy Runner , Turbo Stumb , Brass Whizz , Chop-Chop Board , Cook-Express , Moon Cake , Veggie Velocity , Couch Surfer , Catalyst , Flash of Flavor , Fear Tractor , Sci-Fly , Skeletuna , Pitch Dark , Fox Trail , Fall Speed , and Pathfinder .
It is the third board, the first being Big Blue , and the second being Boombastic .
It is Sindri 's board .
It's name (Not counting Cozy ) is similar to Cruiser .
It is the fourth board in 2024 to be released costing . The others being Koinobori , Fast and Festive and Moon Cake .
Koinobori is the first of these boards to return without costing .

This is the 13th board of 2024 that has a default ability, the 1st being Fast and Festive , the 2nd being Koinobori , the 3rd being Alarm On , the 4th being Street Grace , the 5th being Standing Ovation , the 6th being Glarx 3000 , the 7th being Heavy Metal , the 8th being Arrow , the 9th being Chop-Chop Board , the 10th being Sci-Fly , the 11th being Skeletuna , the 12th being Pathfinder , the 14th being Suitcase Saga , the 15th being Jingle Dingle , and the 16th being Shiny Surprise .
This is the seventh board to have a default ability with upgrades, the 1st being Street Grace , the 2nd being Alarm On , the 3rd being Glarx 3000 , the 4th being Heavy Metal , the 5th, being Arrow , and the 6th being Sci-Fly .
This is the fourth board to have 3 abilities, but it still has 2 upgrades, the first being Alarm On , the second being Heavy Metal , and the tgird being Sci-Fly .
It's the sixth board of 2024 to have Stay Low ability, after Interstellar , Megga Bite , Risky Ride , Heavy Metal , and Chop-Chop Board .

Crash Test
Crash Test is a hoverboard of the game launched in . Like any other hoverboard, it protects you from crashing for 30 seconds. When crashed, the hoverboard will explode and need to recharge for a few seconds before using again. It costs 210. It also has an upgrade, the Super Speed upgrade, that costs 20,000. Now, it costs 30.
Appearance
It appears to be an orange door with a shattered glass window, with a crash Test logo on it. Equipping the Super Speed upgrade adds a spoiler to the back.
Trivia
It is the sixth board of 2022 after Spring , Astronave , Lunar Tiger , Atomic Tile and Rolls Rabbit .
It is the first hoverboard of 2022 to have an upgrade.
It is the first hoverboard of 2022 to have an upgrade.
It is the second board, the first being Speeder .

In , it costs 11.000.

In the Chinese Version, it's called Speedometer (测速仪) , the Super Speed upgrade are replaced by +5 Score (exclusive upgrade) and also it got Double Jump upgrade.

Crew
Crew is a non-limited hoverboard , released with . Like any other hoverboard, it will protect you from crashing for 30 seconds. When crashed, the board will explode and recharge for a few seconds before it can be used again. It costs 60,000.
Appearance
It has the shape of a regular skateboard with the Subway Surfers logo spray painted in navy blue in the center of it. The underside contains a print of Jake , Tricky , & Fresh
Trivia
Crew is one of the 5 non-limited hoverboards launched in , the others being Crew Crush , Surf & Spray , Blue Ice , and Wild Style .

Crew Bonus
The Crew Bonus (officially started in ) is a section in the offers page in the shop that helps increase your multiplier during the season when any character/outfit/board in the crew bonus is owned. Since and , and after , now it could also help players earn rewards in Collections because the Crew Bonus was used as a limited crew in Collections . Most of these characters/outfits/boards can be unlocked for , , , , ads, in the Season Hunt , in other events or challenges .

Crew Crush
Crew Crush is a non-limited hoverboard , released with . Like any other hoverboard, it will protect you from crashing for 30 seconds. When crashed, the board will explode and recharge for a 5 seconds before it can be reused. It costs 60.
Appearance
It has a shape of a self-balancing scooter with a red, white, gray, and black design.
Trivia
Crew Crush is one of the 5 non-limited hoverboards launched in , the others being Crew , Surf & Spray , Blue Ice , and Wild Style .
It and Blue Ice are based on Subway Surfers themed "hoverboards" by Voyager you can buy in real life at Walmart or Target.
This and Blue Ice are the only non-limited hoverboards to cost .

Crewmate Guard
Crewmate Guard is a character released in on October 20th, 2025 .
Appearance
Crewmate Guard is a green Crewmate with Guard 's hat and mustache, which highlights him as Guard 's Among Us counterpart.
Trivia
He is a character from a collaboration with Among Us .
He and the other Crewmate Surfers reuse Buzz , Electra , and Glorgalax 's animations.
He and the other Crewmate Surfers are the 39th, 40th, 41st, 42nd, 43th, and 44th surfer to reuse animations after Frankette , J Balvin , Vivienne , Captain Flash , Clockwork Johnny , Thunder , Azura , Astra , Lucky , Red Panda , Faiza , Electra , Riley , Glorgalax , Ventura , Leo , Ozzy , Billy Bean , Kedi , Ruhi , Pumpkin Pete , Leif , Demi Lovato , Kaleo , Rani , Finlay , Stevie , Berta , Costa , Rochelle Rebelle , Asher , White Rabbit , Peter , Henry , Tara , Sunny , Alma Brava , and Mateo .
He and the other Crewmate Surfers are the 39th, 40th, 41st, 42nd, 43th, and 44th surfer to reuse animations after Frankette , J Balvin , Vivienne , Captain Flash , Clockwork Johnny , Thunder , Azura , Astra , Lucky , Red Panda , Faiza , Electra , Riley , Glorgalax , Ventura , Leo , Ozzy , Billy Bean , Kedi , Ruhi , Pumpkin Pete , Leif , Demi Lovato , Kaleo , Rani , Finlay , Stevie , Berta , Costa , Rochelle Rebelle , Asher , White Rabbit , Peter , Henry , Tara , Sunny , Alma Brava , and Mateo .
He is the only surfer where the Guard is a playable character.
He is the imposter during the .

Crewmate Jake
Crewmate Jake is a character released in on October 20th, 2025 .
Appearance
Crewmate Jake is a red Crewmate with a red cap, which highlights him as Jake 's Among Us counterpart.
Trivia
He is a character from a collaboration with Among Us .
He is the tenth limited variant of Jake , after Zombie Jake , Festive Jake , Pride Jake , Super Runner Jake , Elf Jake , Outatime Jake , Pixel Jake , Chicken Jake , and 8 Ball Jake .
He is also the third game collaboration variant of Jake , after Chicken Jake (for Crossy Road ) and 8 Ball Jake (for 8 Ball Pool ).
He is also the third game collaboration variant of Jake , after Chicken Jake (for Crossy Road ) and 8 Ball Jake (for 8 Ball Pool ).
He and the other Crewmate Surfers reuse Buzz , Electra , and Glorgalax 's animations.

Croc
Croc is the twenty-second limited hoverboard in Subway Surfers . Like any other hoverboard, it protects you from crashing for 30 seconds. When crashed, the hoverboard will explode and will need to recharge for a few seconds before using again. It was released with the edition.
Appearance
This board takes the look and shape of a normal green crocodile, with yellow eyes and it’s mostly used to represent the Nile River which crocodiles are the most popular animals inside it.
Trivia
In , it costs 20.
In , it costs 25,000.
In , it costs 25,000.
In , it costs 30.
In , it came back in a bundle called “Mother Nature’s Friends” along with Aina 's Daisy Outfit and Liu , full bundle costing 90,000.
In it came back in the same bundle from , but the bundle costs 150,000 instead.
In , it came back in the same bundle, but the bundle costs only.
In , it came back in the same bundle, but the bundle either costs or ads.
In and , it came back in the same bundle, but the bundle costs only.
In , it came back in the same bundle, but the bundle now costs 200.
Croc is the first board from Africa, the second being Woody , the third being Chameleon , the fourth being Camel , the fifth being Scarab , the sixth being Magic Carpet , the seventh being Camel , the eighth being Atomic Tile , the ninth being Radiant Rider , the tenth being Deli-Vroom , and the eleventh being Tea Timer .
Croc is the first board, the second being Scarab , and the third being Atomic Tile .
It did not return in or for unknown reasons.
"Croc" is short form of "Crocodile".
It's Jasmine 's first board . Her second board is Scarab .

Cruiser
Cruiser is the twenty-first limited hoverboard in Subway Surfers . It is a limited edition hoverboard exclusive to . It can be purchased with 50,000, just like most of others limited edition hoverboards. Since (for some users)/ , it is now a non-limited hoverboard and is available in the Collections .
Appearance
It has the appearance of a cruiser car.
History
On July 31st, 2014 , the Cruiser board released in .
In , it cost 50,000.
In , it cost .
In , it cost 25.
In , it cost 25.
Trivia
Before (for some users)/ , this board used to be limited. Now it is no longer limited and added to Collections .
It is the first limited hoverboard to have the appearance of a car, the second being Roller , the third being Chrome , the fourth being Speeder , the fifth being Yellow Cab , the sixth being Desert Racer , the seventh being Diablo , the eighth being Betty , the ninth being Rolls Rabbit , and the tenth being K-Dillac .
It is the first limited hoverboard to become non-limited a few years later (after 9 years).
This is the first and currently only  board.
It's Wayne 's board .

Gallery

Currencies
Currencies are the resources used to buy items in Subway Surfers .
Coin
Main Article: Coin
Coins (which look like ) are the main form of currency. They can be used for buying items such as characters , hoverboards , etc...
How to Obtain
Days 3 - 4 of the Word Hunt (previously Daily Challenge)
Opening Mystery Boxes (up to 100,000 coins)
Collecting coins in a run
Collecting coins from friends (up to 350 coins)
More...
Key
Main Article: Key
Keys (which look like ) are the secondary form of currency. They can be used for buying items such as character outfits , board upgrades , etc...
How to Obtain
Watching the Daily Video (3 keys)
Completing Spraycan Awards (up to 10 keys)
Opening Mystery Boxes (up to 3 keys)
Collecting keys in a run
More...
Event Coin
Main Article: Event Coin
The Event Coins (which look like ) are, along with the Coins , the main currency. It only lasts for each update. In each new one, it is reset. The event coin can be used to unlock characters, outfits, items and for Season Hunt tokens to multiply.
How to Obtain
Getting on the Marathon Challenge
Getting on the Mini Mystery Box
More..

Cyan Note
Cyan Note is a hoverboard released in . Like any other hoverboard, it protects the character from crashing for 30 seconds. When crashed, it will need to recharge for a few seconds before it can be used again.
Appearance
Trivia
It, Purple Spin , and Blue Riff are the 10th, 11th, and 12th boards released in 2025 , after Hyper Viper , Lantern , Override , Fresh Love , Heartstopper , Dear Dart , Roarsome , Arara Board , and Moongazer .
It is the sixth board, the first being Bengal , the second being Color Cloud , the third being Beach , the fourth being Aero Fish , and the fifth being Purple Spin .
It's Rani 's first board. Her second board is Freebird .

Daily Calendar
Daily Calendar is a mechanism to unlock exclusive items like characters , hoverboards , or keys . It was introduced in the update.
Trivia
Daily Calendar can unlock certain characters (until when Elf Jake was re-released) or hoverboards (since when 11th Birthday was released). Now, you could get more than 1 hoverboard from the calendar if you use time travel, but it can be risky sometimes because you could lose your progress and you would need to start over and try again to unlock it.
If you time travel too much, you’ll lose it, but you can get the items for , or .
It can last up to 10-20 days. Now, the calendar typically lasts for about 20 days.
You can get items like , , , , , , , and Season Hunt Tokens.

Daily Spin
Daily Spin is a new feature released in v3.64.1. It allows you to spin the wheel and win certain prizes. This feature contains Soul , coins , keys , boards , headstarts , score boosters , Mini Mystery Boxs , and mystery boxes .
Trivia
It was available for some users since v3.61.1.
Gallery

Daily Video
The Daily Video is a feature in Subway Surfers . This feature allows the player to watch a short video (mostly ads) to earn 2 or 1 , Headstarts , Score Boosters , and Hoverboards .
Daily Rewards
Since an unknown update, there is a section called Daily Rewards. You must to watch ads to get rewards. You have to watch them in order. The only one you can skip is the first one, but you do not have to watch ads in the first one.
Reward 1: Mini Mystery Box (no ads)
Reward 2: 3 keys
Reward 3: 1,500 coins
Reward 4: Super Mystery Box
Reward 5: 3 keys
List of Prizes
(up to 3)
(up to 10,000)
3 Hoverboards
1 Score Booster
1 Headstart
Mystery Box
Super Mystery Box
Mini Mystery Box
History
The Daily Video was added to the game as the Holiday Video on Nov 21st 2013 with the update.
On January 2nd 2014, the Holiday Video return but renamed as the Daily Video in the edition.
Trivia
In the update, the Holiday Video was added, allowing the player to receive 2 keys once they watch the whole video.
The edition brought this back, but this time as a Daily Video.
The edition brought this back, but this time as a Daily Video.
Their boxes change color according to the edition.

Dak
Dak (Dak Prescott)  is a limited edition character from . He can be unlocked with  50.
Appearance
Default Outfit
Dak is a 32 years old American man who is a football player from Sulphur, Louisiana. In the game, he wears a midnight blue jersey with the number "4" on it. He wears white pants, blue wristbands and blue sneakers.
History
Trivia
He is an NFL player from real life .

His birthday is July 29, 1993.

Dan Under is a character released in . He is the 282nd character in the game and the 20th surfer of 2026 .
Appearance
Default Outfit
Dan Under is a 14-year-old Australian teenage boy from who is dressed as an animal caretaker, accompanied by a yellow python on his shoulder and an eagle on his head. He has blue eyes, and over his brunette hair is a teal cork hat with golden corks. He also has a black top underneath his green sleeveless vest, a sage green Bermuda shorts, and a pair of brown chunky boots. A shell and animal tooth necklace are wrapped around his neck.

Danger Dasher
Danger Dasher is a limited hoverboard released in . It is the 1st Rivals board and the board of Catrine . It can be unlocked by completing Stage 3 of the Rivals Challenge .
Appearance
It looks very similar to the shape of Groovy with the only difference being that it's shorter than Groovy and has bars on the sides with red and white arrows in the middle. The board's shape would later served as the basic component of the other Rivals boards, Future Wave , Rave Rider , and Sharpeed .

Daredevil
Daredevil is a hoverboard that, like the others, protects from crashing for 30 seconds. When crashed, the hoverboard will explode and need to recharge for a few seconds before using again. It costs 85,000 and it was launched during the update.
Appearance
It's in the shape of a daredevil's rocket, hence the name (or by the intense speed of the hoverboard).
Special Power
Daredevil hoverboards will have the " Super Speed " ability. All Daredevil hoverboards will automatically make you surf faster. The Daredevil is the cheapest hoverboard in the game that comes with an ability pre-equipped.
Trivia
The board's name refers to the Marvel comic book character of the same name .
This hoverboard shares the same ability as the Hot Rod hoverboard.
This is the only hoverboard that does not wobble from side to side.
The speed of the Daredevil is the same as using a jetpack or the Hot Rod hoverboard.
The board's ability was originally called "Surf Faster" as seen in some of the older screenshots below.
Before it had an original animation and surfing pose before it was removed, however it was still possible to see before getting removed entirely in where it got the same animation as Hot Rod and had the default surf pose.
In the old versions of the game, for example on Wild Wednesdays had the board come back for Free, and then when Wild Wednesdays is over, it would go back unlocked.
In the Chinese Version, it's called Son Of The Wind (风之子) .
It is Ninja ’s board according to the old Subway Surfers website

Darryl
Darryl is a limited character released in update. He can be unlocked with  2.99. His Gonzo outfit can be unlocked for 22.000 in . When his new outfit was released, he could be unlocked in for 17.000.
Appearance
Default Outfit
Darryl is an Afro-American teenage boy from that has short black hair and brown eyes. Unlike most other surfers, he does not have eyebrows. He wears a blue bucket hat with the word "Yo" on it, a dark green hoodie with white stripes on the sleeves, a gold chain around his neck, dark blue skinny jeans, and white sneakers with green laces.
Gonzo Outfit
Launched in , he is shown wearing some sort of sun hat with some gold-rimmed sunglasses with dark brown lenses. He also wears a scarlet t-shirt underneath a cadet blue jacket. He wears some white jeans and some aqua sandals.
History

Darryl is the eighth character released in 2021 , after Frankette , Spacebot , Ox , Rat , Qin , Hou , and Zayn .
He's the second character to receive his first outfit in less than a year, the first being Lana .
Since he and Lana released, Surfers after them (except Bonnie and Super Runner Jake , and many others) have no visible nostrils.

Demi Lovato
Demi Lovato (Demetria Devonne Lovato) is a limited collaboration character released in , while she was unofficially available in . She is the 213th character in the game and the 38th surfer of 2024 . Demi Lovato is the second Superstar surfer.
Appearance
Default Outfit
Demi Lovato is a 33 year old American person/woman who is a pop/rock singer and actress who lives in Los Angeles, California, USA (born in Albuquerque, New Mexico). Her hair is brown, she has 2 earrings, she wears a red blouse with a black vest, she wears a gray chain, she has a belt, she wears black pants (she has a chain on her) and black heels.

Dino
Dino is a character introduced in the game during . They can be unlocked by adding friends .
Previously, from to , you had connect to to unlock them.
Appearance
Default Outfit
Dino is a person wearing a blue dinosaur suit with big eyes, three teeth and a pink belly with a zipper across its belly. They appear with a pale brown tower.
Limited Outfits (Variants)
Dinorange ( )
Trivia
Prior to , Dino was the only character that needed to connect to in order to be unlocked.
This would make them the second free character , the first being Jake .
They were also the only character to be unlocked via social media.
This would make them the second free character , the first being Jake .
They were also the only character to be unlocked via social media.
Dino is the second character in a suit, the first is Yutani , the third is Malik , George being the fourth and Red Panda being the fifth.
Dino is the first non-limited character that was introduced in game after a World Tour update. The second being Boombot and the third being Miss Maia .
They,  Boombot , and  Miss Maia are currently the only non-limited characters without outfits.
Dino, Jake , Tricky , Fresh , Spike , Frank , Yutani , Boombot , Rin , Miss Maia , King and Tasha are the only characters in the game who have limited edition counterparts, Zombie Jake ( Halloween update), Elf Tricky ( Christmas update), Festive Fresh ( update), Festive Jake , Festive Tricky , Festive Spike , Festive Frank and Festive Yutani ( update), Pride Jake , Pride Tricky , Pride Fresh , Pride Spike , Pride Yutani , Pride Frank and Pridebot ( update), Spacebot ( update), Gingerbot ( update), Parkour Rin ( update), and Super Runner Jake ( update), Pride Miss Maia and Super Runner Tricky ( ), Super Runner Fresh ( update), Super Runner Yutani ( update), Elf Jake , Elf Yutani and Elf Fresh ( update), Yutani Harlequin Toad ( update), Outatime Jake ( update), Pixel Jake , Ballerina Tricky and Guard King ( update), Dinorange ( update), Chicken Jake and Mallard Tricky ( update), 8 Ball Jake ( update), Crewmate Jake , Crewmate Tricky , Crewmate Spike , Crewmate King and Crewmate Tasha ( update), Frank Noir ( update).
They are the only character released in 2014 that has yet to receive any Outfits .
They are a reference of the dinosaur from the social network Facebook, a blue cartoon T-rex that is the "help guide" and mascot of the Privacy Policy for Facebook.
If the player would log into Facebook, they would get Dino. But, if they would log out afterwards, they would keep the gifts, but not Dino, until , where now the player will never lose it even though they add a friend and cancelled the friend invite later.
Formerly, if the player picked their age to be under 13, Dino wouldn't appear on the character grid, but since they are available to every player.
Excluding Fa n ma de s u r f e rs , they are the only character to retain Special instead of Surfer .
Prior to , they were the first character who required age. The second being The Burger King .
They're the only character to use - graphics.

Dog
The Guard's Dog , officially The Dog, or simply Dog , is the secondary antagonist of Subway Surfers. It’s a dog that belongs to the Guard (Ted Lutz). It is the first non-human NPC in the game.
Just like the Guard, its appearance also changes according to the edition. For example: during , it has the appearance of a living dog skeleton and during , it was dressed up as a reindeer.
Appearance
The Dog appears to be an beige bull terrier with a red spiked collar, brown feet, dark brown eyes, and a permanently angry expression.
Trivia
It is possible for the the Guard and his dog to be hit by a train. After bumping into an obstacle, run into a speeding train and it will collide with it.
Sometimes, it will run in place due to an animation bug.
Sometimes, it will run in place due to an animation bug.
It is a bull terrier in most editions, but it appears to be a German Shepherd in the and editions.
It also appears to be mentioned as a Pitbull (which is a breed of canine/dog) in the Subway Surfers description.
It also appears to be mentioned as a Pitbull (which is a breed of canine/dog) in the Subway Surfers description.
In , the dog and the Guard were replaced by robots.
It is the fourth character with an unknown gender.
It is unknown what its name is, hence it is referred as The Inspector's Dog , The Dog , or just Dog .
If the player were to bump into obstacles (such as trains, bushes, etc.), it will bark at the surfer that it is chasing.
In the very early version of the game not released to the public, the Guard had three dogs.
In , the image got a promo image of it biting breaking a TV. This was planned for a no ads promo, however, it was not used until , where the promo finally debuted with 5 ad tickets, 20 and 15 for $1.99 ( ).
There was a bug where the dog sometimes disappeared after a run, leaving only the guard to chase the surfer, however, by , it was fixed.
It and the Guard are absent in the game modes of  and '' Subway Showdown ''.
However, when often starting to play the Plant Invasion challenge, the Guard's dog is still heard barking, even if it doesn't appear.
In Subway Showdown , it and the Guard are totally absent in this mode.
However, when often starting to play the Plant Invasion challenge, the Guard's dog is still heard barking, even if it doesn't appear.
In Subway Showdown , it and the Guard are totally absent in this mode.

Double Coins
Unlimited Double Coins is a purchase that allows the player to collect two coins while actually collecting only one. For example, the player collects 500 coins, but it counts as 1000 coins (500 x 2 = 1000). It costs 4,99. Every Monday, it can be free for a short time from the Super Mysterizer . If you already have the double coins bundle and you get double coins from the Super Mysterizer or by watching ads, the number of coins will double again. For example, the player collects 500 coins (without double coins bundle or Super Mysterizer ), but it counts as 2000 coins with the both power-ups activated (500 x 4 = 2000).
Gallery

Double Jump
Double Jump is a hoverboard upgrade. When equipped, and with a hoverboard activated, it gives the character the ability to jump a second time when already in the middle of a previous jump.
This ability can also be randomly given to the player from a Super Mysterizer on Mystery Mondays.

Dr. Flyman
Dr. Flyman is a limited character released in . He’s the winner of the Monster Madness Craft-A-Character contest and was made by @nthepirate . He’s the 207th character of the game and the 32nd surfer of 2024 . He can be unlocked at the fifth stage of the Challenge in .
Appearance
Dr. Flyman is a giant mad scientist fly from . He has a round head with two antennas and two red compound eyes with 7 hexagons on each eye. He has a long mouth and two thin legs. He has two wings on his back like a fly. His clothes consist of a white lab coat with black buttons and no other clothing under it, two plum-colored gloves and small round glasses. His legs extend upward into his dark indigo torso which extends to a large round abdomen. His body is mostly green and dark indigo in color.

Dylan
Dylan is a limited edition character from . He is the forty-ninth limited character in Subway Surfers and the forty-seventh limited character in the World Tour series. He can be unlocked by purchasing with 100,000. His first outfit, the Lifeguard Outfit, can be unlocked by purchasing with 75. His second outfit, the Walkman Outfit was available for 25,000 in , currently 75.
Appearance
Default Outfit
Dylan is an American teenage boy and skater from with long blond hair and teal eyes. He wears a light green striped shirt with a blue long-sleeved undershirt underneath, ripped gray shorts with a black belt, white socks with blue stripes, red sneakers with yellow laces, and a blue-and-white durag on his forehead. He also carries a red skateboard with him.
Lifeguard Outfit
Launched in , Dylan's hair is tied up in a bun. He wears a blue whistle around his neck, a white tank top, red-orange-colored beach shorts and is barefoot.
Walkman Outfit
Launched in , in his Walkman he wears a burgundy t-shirt tucked in his peach colored shorts with white drawstrings. He sports some sunglasses with lime green lens. His hair seems a more yellow shade of blonde and it look like he has a tan. He has dark pink headphones which the wire go down to his neon green small portable radio. Like his Lifeguard outfit, he remains barefooted and has his hair tied up in a bun.

Dynamike
Dynamike is a character released during . He is the 247th character in the game and the 32nd surfer of 2025 .
Appearance
Dynamike is an old brawler who wears the typical miner outfit: a yellow mining helmet (with a little canary underneath), a red shirt with a deep neckline, a brown military belt, dark blue pants, black shoes, and brown gloves. He also carries a red barrel that stores loads of purple gems on the back.
Trivia
He, Piper , El Primo , Spike , Poco , and Max are the 29th, 30th, 31st, 32nd, 33rd, and 34th surfers released in 2025 , after Snake , Tang Yuan , Valentina , Kaleo , Rebeca Roar , Gabriel , Dinorange , Rocky , Rani , Finlay , Ribbon , Chicken Jake , Mallard Tricky , Oni Hime , Saru , LOC , Stevie , Berta , Costa , Yutani Tree Frog , Rochelle Rebelle , Asher , White Rabbit , Peter , Tara , Henry , Sunny , and 8 Ball Jake .
His character ability for the Brawl Stars Showdown event is called Big Barrel O' Boom , where his barrel clears obstacles and stumbles anyone it hits.
Him carrying a canary is based on a real thing coal miners used to do to detect toxic gas.
In Brawl Stars, his barrel carries dynamite instead of gems, hence his name.
On Subway Studio , Dynamike surfs on top of his barrel that is attached to some random board.
Also, his barrel stays below on boards with the Stay Low power-up.
Also, his barrel stays below on boards with the Stay Low power-up.

E-Racer
E-Racer is a limited hoverboard released in . Like any other hoverboard, it protects the character from crashing for 30 seconds. When crashed, it will need to recharge for a few seconds before it can be used again.
Appearance
A simple rectangular hoverboard that looks like an actual eraser with colors split into red and blue halves. It has a big E-Racer text pasted across the board, as well as metals on the sides and the back.
Trivia
It, Brainstormer , and Principal's Nightmare are the 33rd, 34th, and 35th boards released in 2025 , after Hyper Viper , Lantern , Override , Fresh Love , Heartstopper , Dear Dart , Roarsome , Arara Board , Moongazer , Purple Spin , Cyan Note , Blue Riff , Eggscalibur , Bloomster , Edinburst , Guard Board , Trespasser , Mizu Dash , Zapline , Seven Seas , 13th Birthday , You Are Here , Freebird , Glitter Blaster , Float-Booster , Feeling Beachy , Street Style , Roll & Race , Midsummer , Business Time , Rabbit Racer , and Circuit Bunny .
The name of this board is a word play of the word eraser .
It is Yuto 's second board . His first board is Sweet Chili .

E.Z.
E.Z. is a limited character who was released in . He is the forty-seventh limited edition character from Subway Surfers and the forty-fifth in the World Tour series. He can be unlocked with 95,000. Both his first outfit (the Touchdown Outfit) and second outfit (the Jive Outfit) can be purchased for 75 each.
Appearance
Default Outfit
E.Z. is an Afro-American teenage boy from who wears a red hoodie with the initials E.Z. on it. He wears black shorts and white sneakers. He also has a blue cap with the letter C on it that resembles a Chicago Cubs baseball cap.
Touchdown Outfit
Launched in , he wears a yellow shirt with the number 7 on it. He wears white trousers and trainers and has a baby blue helmet with a rack to protect his face. This outfit is similar to the uniforms of the Chicago Bears football team.
Jive Outfit
Launched in , he wears gold glasses, an orange cap, a turquoise t-shirt, gray pants with maroon and white suspenders and white tap shoes with brown ends at the soles. He also holds a trombone.
Trivia
He is the first newcomer in 2018 .
He returns for Wild Wednesdays such as .
He gets +5 Multiplier Bonus for Special Thursdays such as , and
In , his Touchdown Outfit was free.
He is the only limited surfer to have an outfit given away for free.
He is the only limited surfer to have an outfit given away for free.
He and Ox have the shortest names out of all the characters, being two letters long. However, it could just be a nickname or possibly his initials.
He is the first  surfer, the second being Spraybot .

He is the first surfer to have punctuation marks in his name, the second being Ji-Yeong , the third being Hammy-Bee and the fourth being Dr. Flyman .
He is the first surfer to have a period/fullstop in his name, the second being Dr. Flyman .
He is the 18th surfer to have animations reused for a new surfer ( Leif in ) after Rabbot , Prince K , Ramona , Maeko , Diego , Spike , Ace , Dino , Zi Hao , Buzz (x2), Catrine , Carlos , Hou , Nicolai , Manny , Dragon , Rin , and George .

Eagle
Eagle is the forty-sixth limited hoverboard in Subway Surfers , and a limited hoverboard released with . Like any other hoverboard, it protects you from crashing for 30 seconds. When crashed, the hoverboard will explode and recharge for a few seconds before you can use it again. It costs 50,000, like most of the other limited hoverboards.
Appearance
It has the shape and appearance of an eagle, which is America's national bird.
Trivia
The eagle represents for its native symbol.
This is the 1st and currently only board.

Earth Day Frame
The Earth Day Frame is a frame released in the update. This frame could be unlocked in the One Run Challenge event in during .
Appearance
A blue and green landscape-inspired frame. The background shows an empty sky and a hill that has a river that came from the back of it. For the actual frame, it has two clouds above and four tiny sprouts below, one of which is upside down.
Trivia
This and the Koi Frame are the 22nd and 23rd frames to be released, after the Default Frame in for Top Run and for Player Profile , the Birthday Frame in , the Hollywood Frame in , the Summer Frame in , the Plant and Lava Frames in , the Club Frame in , the Pride Frame in , the Oxford Green and Oxford Red Frames in , the Brawl Stars and Gems Frames in , the Pumpkin and Dia de los Muertos Frames in , the Candy Cane and Gingerbread Frames in , the Glorx and Cinema Frames in , the Winter Frame in , the Shamrock Frame in , and the Easter Egg Frame in .
This is the seventh frame released in 2026 , after Glorx Frame , Cinema Frame , Winter Frame , Shamrock Frame , Easter Egg Frame , and Koi Frame .

Easter Egg Frame
The Easter Egg Frame is a frame released in the update. This frame could be unlocked by collecting 210 in the Soda Rush event during .
Appearance
A frame with a mainly purple background and sides, "painted" with straight, zigzag, and squiggly lines of various colors of sky blue, dark purple, orange, and yellow. Some of the lines have been painted to look like splatters or dripping down.
Trivia
This is the 21st frame to be released, after the Default Frame in for Top Run and for Player Profile , the Birthday Frame in , the Hollywood Frame in , the Summer Frame in , the Plant and Lava Frames in , the Club Frame in , the Pride Frame in , the Oxford Green and Oxford Red Frames in , the Brawl Stars and Gems Frames in , the Pumpkin and Dia de los Muertos Frames in , the Candy Cane and Gingerbread Frames in , the Glorx and Cinema Frames in , the Winter Frame in , and the Shamrock Frame in .
This is the fifth frame released in 2026 , after Glorx Frame , Cinema Frame , Winter Frame , and Shamrock Frame .

Eddy
Appearance
Default Outfit
Eddy is an African American teenage boy from . He appears to be a magician. He wears a magician-like hat with a line across the bottom, and a skull and a red feather on top on the left side. He has brown skin with light brown skull paint around his nose, on the bottom of both of his eyes, on the nose to eyebrows and his forehead, probably from white makeup. He wears a red, yellow and purple 'jacket' and a skeleton-shirt in the inside. He has black pants and white and taupe shoes
Trick Outfit
During , he received the Trick Outfit, which now costs 75. With this outfit, his skull makeup is removed, the line on his hat turns red while the feather and skull on it are replaced with cards. His jacket also changed to black with an addition of a rose on it, his shirt changed to white with a red bow tie, and his gloves change to white.
Vampire Outfit
During , he received the Vampire Outfit. He now has fangs, a bright teal undercoat and a purple coat. He has deep pink pants and black shoes. His hat is removed and his hair is longer. It currently costs 75.
Trivia
He seems to be a reference to Dr. Facilier from the Princess and the Frog .
Not only that, the movie also takes place in New Orleans.
Dr. Facilier (and most likely Eddy) resemble Baron Samedi , the most famous Loa (Haitian voodoo spirit) of the Dead. Samedi is commonly portrayed as a skeleton or skull-faced man with a tailcoat and top hat, much like Eddy. Eddy may be a shortening of Samedi.
Not only that, the movie also takes place in New Orleans.

In the edition, there is a bug where his texture was replaced by Fresh 's, making his outfit look like Fresh's. This was soon fixed in the next update.

Edinburst
Edinburst is a hoverboard released in . Like any other hoverboard, it protects the character from crashing for 30 seconds. When crashed, it will need to recharge for a few seconds before it can be used again.
Appearance
Is a shield with a pink, striped top and an orange body, featuring a blue center with a symbol resembling an arrow. The shield has a pointed edge and a small circular knob on one side.
Trivia
It, Eggscalibur , Bloomster , and Guard Board are the 13th, 14th, 15th, and 16th boards released in 2025 , after Hyper Viper , Lantern , Override , Fresh Love , Heartstopper , Dear Dart , Roarsome , Arara Board , Moongazer , Purple Spin , Cyan Note , and Blue Riff .
It is the fifth board, the first being Punk , the second being I-Scream , the third being Eggscalibur , and the fourth being Bloomster .
It is Soul 's second board . His first and third boards are Ghastly Glider and Major Speed .
It is the third 2025 board to have no abilities, the first is Moongazer , and the second is Blue Riff .
It's name is a play on word of Edinburgh .
In the Chinese Version, this board is 2025 board and called Rabbit Knight (兔子骑士) .

Edison
Edison can be unlocked by purchasing with 100,000 and he was launched as a limited character from the edition. His first and only outfit, The Urban Outfit, costs 75. He seems to be a young soccer player from Brazil. He was also the eighteenth limited character in Subway Surfers, and the sixteenth limited character in the World Tour series.
Appearance
Default Outfit
Edison is an Afro-Brazilian teenage boy from who has curly dark brown hair, and wears a blue headband on his head, a white sleeveless shirt with pink and dark brown stripes, green, white and yellow shorts like Brody 's, which symbolizes the flag of Brazil and a pair of blue flip flops. He seems to own a white soccer ball.
Urban Outfit
Launched in , he also received the Urban Outfit, which costs 75 or 100,000. In this outfit , he has a blonde curly afro, a pair of dark brown glasses, black and white striped necklace, a multi-striped (white-dark brown-pink) shirt and red brown with dark brown and pink/bright red stripes shorts.
Trivia
His haircut changes according to his outfit, just like Fresh , Spike , Brody , Tasha , Lauren and Ella .
Edison is the second Brazilian character, with the first being Carmen , the being Super Runner Fernando , the fourth being Tainá , the fifth being Hammy-Bee , the sixth being Yutani Harlequin Toad , the seventh being Rebeca Roar , and the eighth being Gabriel .
He is currently the only surfer from .
So far, he has gone the longest without receiving his second outfit, making it 12 years since the release of his first outfit and not receiving his second outfit.
His shirt is a reference to São Paulo FC .
In his Urban Outfit, his shirt is a reference to the flag of the São Paulo state .
He is the third character to wear flip flops, the first being Brody , and the second being Kim .
Despite the Kiloo Games cover showing him carrying a soccer ball, he actually does not carry it in the real game while running, unlike Roberto 's Fan Outfit.
Edison is most likely named after the legendary Brazilian footballer Pelé (who died on December 29th, 2022), although his name is spelled as Edson, not Edison.
He is the first male character to receive his outfit right after being introduced to Subway Surfers .
He returns for Wild Wednesdays such as , , , and .

Egg Hunt
The  Egg Hunt was an Easter-themed event during the update, in which players had to collect Easter Eggs while they run. They had to collect 100 to unlock the limited edition Chicky hoverboard in 30 days. It did not come back in for unknown reasons, but came back now as the Weekly Hunt from onwards.

Eggscalibur
Eggscalibur is a hoverboard released in . Like any other hoverboard, it protects the character from crashing for 30 seconds. When crashed, it will need to recharge for a few seconds before it can be used again.
Appearance
Its a colorful hoverboard with a rounded bottom and a wide opening at the top. It features sections in yellow, pink, and blue, along with circular dots for decoration.
Trivia
It, Bloomster , Edinburst , and Guard Board are the 13th, 14th, 15th, and 16th boards released in 2025 , after Hyper Viper , Lantern , Override , Fresh Love , Heartstopper , Dear Dart , Roarsome , Arara Board , Moongazer , Purple Spin , Cyan Note , and Blue Riff .
It is the third board, the first being Punk , and the second being I-Scream .
The name of this board is a reference to Excalibur . It is a legendary sword belonging to King Arthur and is rumored to have magical powers.
It is Finlay 's board .
In , it costs either or in a bundle for 200.000.
In the Chinese Version, it's (Amusement Park) board, and it's called Easter Egg Sword (彩蛋之剑) and it's shape doesn't change in it's Double Jump upgrade.

El Primo
El Primo is a character released during . He is the 245th character in the game and the 30th surfer of 2025 .
Appearance
El Primo is a luchador (masked wrestler) who wears a blue mask with red eye sockets and yellow crescent on his forehead. He also has a pair of blue wristbands, pants, and high boots. A championship belt is wrapped on his waist, which has a claret strap and center plate that coincidentally looks the same with the Subway Surfers ' Coin .
Trivia
He, Piper , Spike , Dynamike , Poco , and Max are the 29th, 30th, 31st, 32nd, 33rd, and 34th surfers released in 2025 , after Snake , Tang Yuan , Valentina , Kaleo , Rebeca Roar , Gabriel , Dinorange , Rocky , Rani , Finlay , Ribbon , Chicken Jake , Mallard Tricky , Oni Hime , Saru , LOC , Stevie , Berta , Costa , Yutani Tree Frog , Rochelle Rebelle , Asher , White Rabbit , Peter , Tara , Henry , Sunny , and 8 Ball Jake .
He is the third masked wrestler in the game, after Manny (Luchador Outfit) and Fantasma .
El Primo means The Cousin in Spanish language.
His character ability for the Brawl Stars Showdown event is called Flying Elbow Drop , where he leaps forward and slam down an opponent to decrease their speed.
Because of his huge muscles, he is the largest and tallest character in the game. His height may be the same size as the Guard himself.
Finish Line is his board .
Navigation

El Primo Illustration Portrait

Appearance

Electra
Electra is a limited character released in the update. She is the 189th character in the game.
Appearance
Electra is a 16-year-old teenage girl from . She is a mix of a Jellyfish and a human. The top of her head is the top of the jellyfish part and she has purple tentacles flowing out. She wears a short orange sweater with pink in the middle. She has big green jacket sleeves and wears cut green gloves. Her skin is a pinkish tan color. Her shorts are black with blue ribbons. She wears blue/neon green/pink socks with purple/blue/pink shoes. She has turquoise-teal eyes.
History
* An exact date was found where she appeared in, otherwise, the edition release date is assumed.
Trivia
She and Finn are the 13th and 14th surfers released in 2024 after Thunder , Skye , Azura , Dragon , Stella , Astra , Lucky , Meggan , Red Panda , Hamza , Faiza , and Teabot .
She is the eighth female surfer released in 2024 after Skye , Azura , Stella , Astra , Meggan , Red Panda , and Faiza .
She has same animations as Buzz .
She is the 12th surfer to reuse animations after Frankette , J Balvin , Vivienne , Captain Flash , Clockwork Johnny , Thunder , Azura , Astra , Lucky , Red Panda , and Faiza .
She is the first character to use Buzz's animation, the second was Glorgalax
However, Electra is just walk-floating unlike Glorgalax .
She is the 12th surfer to reuse animations after Frankette , J Balvin , Vivienne , Captain Flash , Clockwork Johnny , Thunder , Azura , Astra , Lucky , Red Panda , and Faiza .
She is the first character to use Buzz's animation, the second was Glorgalax
However, Electra is just walk-floating unlike Glorgalax .
However, Electra is just walk-floating unlike Glorgalax .

She is the third surfer featured in after Red Panda and Teabot ,
She is the ninth surfer whose full name starts with 'E' after Ella , Elf Tricky , Eddy , Edison , E.Z. , Elf Jake , Elf Fresh , and Elf Yutani .
The blue ribbon on her shorts is quite similar to Lawrence 's suspenders.
Electra and Finn are the first and second characters .
She is the second character to have tentacles for hair, after Koral in her Tenta Queen Outfit.

In the trailer, Electra looks good quality, but in the game it is poor quality.
Jelly Board is her board .

Her zodiac sign is Aries ♈️.

Electro Shock
Electro Shock is a hoverboard released in . Like any other board, it protects you from crashing for 30 seconds. When crashed, the board will explode and need some time to recharge before using it.
Appearance
It is a racing themed board in grey, purple, black lines on it, the outline is grey, 2 green pipes and a large exhaust pipe on it.

It is the second board of 2024 , after Skyrocket .
It also has a trail, with a dark purple trail that includes lightning sparks.
It's Thunder 's first board. His second board is Zapline .
It has the same upgrades as Rave Rider , Champ , Brass Whizz , Cook-Express , Couch Surfer , Fear Tractor , Lantern , and The Green Flame .

Elf Fresh
Elf Fresh is a limited character from the update. He can be unlocked for 35,000.
Appearance
Default Outfit
Elf Fresh is basically Fresh , Except that he is wearing green overalls and a red shirt with white details on the sleeves, his socks are red and white, and he's also wearing green sneakers with gray details and a white sole.
History
* An exact date was found where he appeared in, otherwise, the edition release date is assumed.

Elf Fresh is the 20th character released in 2022 after Elf Yutani (preceded), Elf Jake , Super Runner Fernando , Song Yi , Fantasma , Alia , Zi Hao , Moira , The Burger King , Super Runner Yutani , Super Runner Fresh , Super Runner Tricky , Pride Miss Maia , Super Runner Jake , Dummy , George , Pink , Charlie , Tiger , and Hasina .

He is also the second surfer, the first being Elf Jake , and the third being Elf Yutani .
He is also the second surfer, the first being Elf Jake , and the third being Elf Yutani .
He has a red ribbon trail while running.
Wrapped , Snow Cloud , and Ho Ho Hoverboard is his boards
He, Elf Jake and Elf Yutani were the last surfers of 2022 .
Prior to Meggan , he was the last character to cost event coins in his first release.
So far, this is the latest variant for Fresh .

Elf Tricky
Elf Tricky is the second limited character on Subway Surfers and the first limited character that is female. She can most commonly be purchased in Christmas editions but requires an in-app purchase. She mostly return in Christmas themed editions (except for ), she can be unlocked by purchasing with 95,000, just like most other limited characters. In she received her first outfit called the Ice Outfit, which costs 30. In she received her second outfit called the Candy Outfit, which costs 30.
Appearance
Default Outfit
Elf Tricky is basically Tricky 's variant except that she is dressed in an elf outfit and wearing a Santa Claus hat. She still wears her original shoes and glasses. She also wears red and white striped leggings.
Ice Outfit
Launched in , her glasses are changed from black to cyan. She wears a cerulean elf suit with a large buckle, a hood, and blue shorts, and her shirt and sneakers change to pastel blue with cerulean shoelaces and soles.
Candy Outfit
Launched in , she wears a fuschia dress, socks, sneakers, glasses and a crown, a pink skirt, red gloves, and a Christmas cane on top of her crown.
History
* An exact date was found where she appeared in, otherwise, the edition release date is assumed.
Trivia
Elf Tricky is the second limited character to make a reappearance, the first being Zombie Jake .
She is the 17th character released in 2012 .
She is the second limited character of 2012 , the first being Zombie Jake .
She is the last character of 2012 .
She is the first Holiday character, the 2nd being Jamie , the 3rd being Buddy , the 4th being Malik , the 5th being Nicolai , the 6th being Festive Fresh , the 7th being Festive Jake , the 8th being Festive Tricky , the 9th being Festive Spike , the 10th being Festive Frank , the 11th being Festive Yutani , the 12th being Clementine , the 13th being Gingerbot , the 14th being Elf Jake , the 15th being Elf Fresh , the 16th being Elf Yutani , the 17th being Clockwork Johnny , the 18th being Snowy , and the 19th being Grand Juke .
Elf Tricky and Buddy  both have an outfit called Candy Outfit.
She is the first limited character to have blonde hair.
Elf Tricky is the first Tricky variant, the second being Festive Tricky , the third being Pride Tricky , the fourth being Super Runner Tricky , and the fifth being Ballerina Tricky .
In she got Tricky 's animations.
She is the first Tricky variation to change the animation to her original variation .
She is the first Tricky variation to change the animation to her original variation .
She is the first elf character that is a human, the second being Alfie .
She always come back every year besides in 2017 .
One of her old idle animations is very similar to Tony ’s animations.
She gets a +3 Multiplier Bonus in , and .
Her last appearance in the files was .
In the 3.42.3 version, her Ice and Candy Outfits become limited.
She, Alex , and Buddy are the only limited characters to not become permanent.
In the Korean Version, she's a surfer, and her name is Elpeu Teuliki (엘프 트리키) .
In the Chinese version, she's a surfer, she still have her old animations and pose and her Outfits gets little change since , to cover her middlriff and chest. This change applies to a lot of female characters.
