Ella
Ella (formerly known as Frizzy ) is a character that can be unlocked by purchasing with 150,000. Ella is the third-most expensive character and most expensive female character in the game . She is also the first most expensive character in Subway Surfers . Her first outfit, the Rasta Outfit, costs 30. Her second outfit, the Gold Outfit, costs 30.
Ella Harper might be her full name because of her being Fresh 's sister.
Appearance
Default Outfit
Ella is an African-American teenage girl with a brown Afro, big hoop earrings, brown eyes, a red and white striped jacket, red shoes, brown pants, and white socks with red stripes.
In the update, she received 2 new outfits, which are the Rasta Outfit and the Gold Outfit, they cost 15 and 25 respectively.
Rasta Outfit
In her Rasta Outfit, she wears a colorful hat over her dreadlocks and wears glasses with gold outlining. The line on her shirts' sleeve are now yellow. Her socks are also changed to green.
Gold Outfit
In her Gold Outfit, her hair changes. One roll of her hair is sticking upwards while the other sticks behind it, facing left and right. Her outfit turns darker; her shirt turns black while her pants are now darker in color, and the line on her sleeve is now gold, as well as the lines in the bottom of her shirt. The lines on her socks are now brown, though her shoes still remain unchanged.
Trivia
Her name used to be Frizzy, but it was changed in the update to honor the Black-American jazz musician Ella Fitzgerald, and Ella might be a reference to her.
SYBO said for the name change "Ella is like a nickname for an elephant (Not to be racist) Frizzy sounds good because she has frizzy hair".
SYBO said for the name change "Ella is like a nickname for an elephant (Not to be racist) Frizzy sounds good because she has frizzy hair".
Her hairstyle changes according to her outfit, just like Spike and Tasha .
She used to do the Update the App! promotions, but now it goes to Jake . She did them before the late update.
Fresh is her younger brother, according to her cameo in The Animated Series .
She gets +5 Multiplier Bonus for Special Thursdays such as: , , , , , and .
Ella means She in Spanish.
Ella was the first female African-American character to be playable, with her brother Fresh being the first male African-American character to be playable.
In , in The Best Deal of the year, she cost 99.
She costs 50 in Subway Surfers City .
In the Chinese Version, she's still called Frizzy, due to fact that update is not present there, and all the changes in this update is not applied there either.

For official pictures and screenshots, see Ella/Gallery .
For renders, see Ella/Render Gallery .

Ella (Subway Surfers City)
Ella is a revamped version of the Subway Surfers character Ella . Despite previously being a Subway Pass exclusive character, currently in Subway Surfers City , she can be unlocked as a jackpot in the Super Boxes.
Appearance
Power-ups
Bling Bling
Get coins when picking up power-ups.
In The Groove
Get additional multiplier when a power-up is active.
The Spotlight
Get all power-ups when you pick up a Secret Star.
Trivia
Ella is the 12th character in Subway Surfers City .
She is the 9th character who originally came from Subway Surfers. The first being Jake , second being Tricky , third being Fresh , fourth being Yutani , fifth being Miss Maia , sixth being Ninja One , seventh being Tagbot and eighth being Spike .
With the version 1.17 update, she became available for unlocking through Super Boxes. However, in version 1.18, she was once again restricted to the shop. Finally, she returned to the Super Boxes at the start of Season 6.
Her hoverboard is Vaunted .

Emergency Meeting Box
Emergency Meeting Box  is a new box released in . It contains the six crewmate characters: Crewmate Jake , Crewmate Tricky , Crewmate Spike , Crewmate King , Crewmate Tasha , and Crewmate Guard . You can get a free box from the start in the and after you claim it you will unlock Crewmate Jake . You need to collect Report Tokens ( ) in to get more boxes.

Endeavour
Endeavour is a limited hoverboard that was released on update. Like any other hoverboard, it protects you from crashing for 30 seconds. When crashed, the hoverboard will explode and need to recharge for a few seconds before using again. It costs 1.99. It could also be purchased in a bundle with Alba and Tankbot for 70 in .
Appearance
It's a deep dark blue and burgundy colored tech-looking hoverboard with a strange blue logo on the front, it has 2 fans on it and 2 rocket engines.
Trivia
It has the same logo as Roto and the other Space Boards.
It has the same shape as Secret Society and Discovery . The differences are just the color palette.
Endeavour is the third board released in 2021 , with the first being Secret Society and the second being Discovery .
It's the first board, the second being Secret Society , and the third being Discovery .

Enzo
Enzo is a character released in . He is the 271th character in the game and the 9th surfer of 2026 .
Appearance
Default Outfit
Enzo is a 14-year-old Italian teenage boy from who has a long dark blue hair and eyes wearing a red and orange-striped varsity sando above a white T-shirt. It shows the number 8. Additionally, he wears a dark blue shorts, black socks, and white sneakers in yellow laces and red tongue. He finishes the look off with two black piercings for both of his ears, a long, red armband on his left arm, and two wrist bands for his right arm in red and orange colors.
Gladiator Outfit
Launched in , Enzo now has a blue gladiator helmet with gigantic red and black feathers, as well as brown eyeplate with purple diamonds pasted on it. He also wears a red chiton with brown fabric wrapped from his left shoulder to waist, black pants, and white boots with two straps on them each. His full right arm is wrapped in bandage, while his left arm wears a small, blue hand shield.
History
* An exact date was found where he appeared in, otherwise, the edition release date is assumed.

He is also the fifth male 2026 surfer, after Frank Noir , Sean Snow , Lorcan , and Vittorio .
He is also the fifth male 2026 surfer, after Frank Noir , Sean Snow , Lorcan , and Vittorio .

He and Vittorio are released 13 years after Roberto , making it the longest time it has taken for a World Tour to receive a new surfer, surpassing and .

Event Coin
Event Coins (which could look like in the game) are one of the main currencies in Subway Surfers . It was released on June 18th, 2021 , in on every device.
If a player has Surfer Pass , Event Coins will no longer be used.
How to get Event Coins?
Collect in Season Hunt (until ) (gift tier since )
Getting in World Tour events
Getting in Mini Mystery Boxes (26% chance)
Trivia
The event coin is the 4th payment method on Subway Surfers game after the coin , the key and real money .
The colors of event coins can be changed for any update, pink event coins ( ) released in , gray event coins ( ) released in , blue event coins ( ) released in and red event coins ( ) released in .
Gold and violet event coin colors were seen in some promo images but hasn't released in any update yet.
Gold and violet event coin colors were seen in some promo images but hasn't released in any update yet.
The token boost was added in for 1,000 event coins (changed in to 2,500 event coins).
The Token Boost gives a ×2 multiplier for Season Hunt tokens for 24 hours.
The Token Boost gives a ×2 multiplier for Season Hunt tokens for 24 hours.
In , the event coins can be collected via Mini Mystery Box , with a 25% chance for get 100-500 event coins and a 1% chance for get 1,000 event coins.
The purple event coin 3D model was changed to a less bright color in .
Since , event coins are no longer a reward in the Season Hunt. This has come back in but is only available in the gift tier.

Gallery

Events
These are the special events that occur in Subway Surfers .
Wordy Weekend
Main Article: Wordy Weekend
Weekend Fun
The Weekend Fun Spraycan Award was introduced in the edition.
Weekend Champion
The Weekend Champion Spraycan Award was introduced in the edition.
Sales
Main Article: Coin and Key Sales
Sales are one of the most common events in Subway Surfers. When there is a sale, a certain in-app purchase's value will be increased. It happens in both Coin and Key in-app purchases.
Weekly Hunts
Main Article: Weekly Hunt
Weekly Hunts were perhaps the most popular event in Subway Surfers before being removed and replaced with Season Hunts during . Similar to the Word Hunt , the Weekly Hunt required the player to collect tokens (corresponding to the World Tour edition) to earn specific prizes (such as Score Boosters , Hoverboards , Keys , etc.).
Season Hunts
Main Article: Season Hunt
Season Hunts is an expanded version of Weekly Hunts. Instead of collecting tokens for each week, players have to collect tokens for the whole tour. Each Season Hunt contains one limited character with at least one of their outfits and at least one limited hoverboard . There are other prizes such as coins , keys , and mystery boxes .
Birthday Comeback
Main Article: Birthday Comeback
Birthday Comeback was an event that occured during . It lasted for 21 days/3 weeks. Every day 3 returning  characters  will be offered a  multiplier  bonus. In , this event came back, and there was a return of 3 characters per each year.
Reappearances
Main Article: Reappearances
Sometimes, old expired characters reappear in the game, like Zombie Jake, Elf Tricky etc. They can be bought in 24 hours for real money. The current reappearances are: Zombie Jake, Elf Tricky, Jamie, Jay, Nick, Mina, Tony, Rosa, Roberto, Olivia, Harumi, Carmen, Edison, Coco, Wayne and Sun. The latest character reappearance was on 19th November 2014.
Tryouts
Main Article: Hoverboard Tryouts
Some hoverboards have been able to be tried out for 24 hours. They include Hot Rod , Lowrider and Bouncer , and many more. For copyright and many other unknown reasons, the creators of the game removed the option of tryouts.
Mega Jackpot Event
Main Article: Jackpot
Occasionally, a Mega Jackpot event will be held in the game where the jackpots in Mystery Boxes and Super Mystery Boxes will be increased to a higher amount. The regular jackpots will have 900,000 coins, and the super jackpots will have 1,500,000 coins. You can try to earn a jackpot by buying as many Mystery Boxes as you can. This event is held on every Tuesday.
Starting in the edition, Mega Jackpots are held every Tuesdays.
Super Mystery Box Mania
Main Article: Super Mystery Box Mania .
Rather than completing missions or Daily Challenges, the player could collect Super Mystery Boxes in the game for free.
Starting in the edition, the Super Mystery Box Mania event was only every Friday.
However, for unknown reasons, the event did not show up on , but the mystery boxes still showed up.
Mystery Mondays
Main Article: Super Mysterizer .
Mystery Mondays were introduced in the edition. This event occurs every Monday and introduces the Super Mysterizer, which transforms into a random item when collected.
Wild Wednesdays
Main Article: Wild Wednesdays
Wild Wednesdays was introduced in the edition. This event occurs every Wednesday (hence it's name), and have currently re-introduced Mega Jackpots. During the update, SYBO had removed the event for unknown reasons.
Special Thursdays
Main Article: Special Thursdays
These Special Thursdays was introduced in the edition. During this event, if you are using a certain character, you automatically activate a Score Booster on your run. Also, this event will be helpful to get Top Run high scores and Gold medals. During the edition, the event was removed.
Multiplier Bonus
Main Article: Multiplier Bonus
Multiplier Bonus is an event that was introduced during the edition, and it replaces the Wild Wednesdays and Special Thursdays events. This events is on Wednesdays and Thursdays. Like the Special Thursdays it gave a multiplier to the character for those days, however instead of giving a 5x multiplier it gave a 3x multiplier.
Fabulous Friday
Fabulous Friday was introduced in the edition. It was similar to Wild Wednesdays , but with the event held on Friday instead. For unknown reasons, the event did not show on .
Terrific Tuesdays
Main Article: Terrific Tuesday
Terrific Tuesday was introduced in the edition. It is similar to Wild Wednesdays, but with the event held on Tuesday instead.
Trivia
Since edition, events have been occured on every Wednesday.
Every time an event is held (excluding Weekly Hunts and Sales), there will be a tiny yellow box with a stopwatch on the top right side of the menu, tapping on it will show you the event held and the remaining time.

Exclusive Deal
Exclusive Deal is a event released in the update. There is a bundle containing 1 character and 2 boards during each week. Everything costs . It is similar to the Collector's Exclusive .

Trivia

Faiza
Faiza is an limited character released in . She is the 186th character in the game.
Appearance
Faiza is a 16-year-old Moroccan teenage girl from . She has a unique haircut, with a yellow, white and pink shirt with a purplish-brownish backpack, she also has a red yellow striped short dress, she also has purple, blue and green pants, and last but not least black, gray and white shoes.
History
* An exact date was found where she appeared in, otherwise, the edition release date is assumed.
Trivia
She, Hamza and Teabot are the third, fourth and fifth surfers after Salma and Taha .
She, Hamza and Teabot are the 10th, 11th and 12th surfers released in 2024 after Thunder , Skye , Azura , Dragon , Stella , Astra , Lucky , Meggan and Red Panda . They also the first, second and third African surfers released in 2024 .
She is the seventh female surfer released in 2024 after Skye , Azura , Stella , Astra , Meggan and Red Panda .
She is the second surfer of 2024 who can be purchased with Event coins after Meggan .
She is the sixth female African surfer after Jasmine , Aina , Zuri , Hasina and Salma .
She is the fifth surfer started with 'F' after Frank , Frankette , Freya and Frutti .
She has same animations as Zi Hao .
Deli-Vroom is her board .
She, Hamza and Teabot were not available in Subway Studio until V3.33.1. This also happened with Alba , Carlos , Cathy , Lucky , Meggan and Red Panda .
She is the sixth surfer who is 16 years old, after Catrine , Bruno , Tainá , Hali and Lucky .
Her zodiac sign is Aries ♈️.
Her birthday is between March 21 and April 19 (the exact date is unknown).
Her birthday is between March 21 and April 19 (the exact date is unknown).
In the Chinese Version, she's a 2024 Surfer.
Her last appearance in the files was .
Her last "free" appearance was in for 99.000 in the Black Friday Sale .
Her last "free" appearance was in for 99.000 in the Black Friday Sale .
Navigation

Falcons
Falcons are tokens needed to be collected for the Weekly Hunt in the and edition.
Prizes
Week 1: Collect 10 to get 3
Week 2: Collect 20 to get 5
Week 3: Collect 25 to get 25
Week 1: Collect 10 to get 2
Week 2: Collect 20 to get 5
Week 3: Collect 25 to get 40
Trivia
It is the second token, the first is Scarabs ( ), and the third is Pyramids ( ).
For unknown reasons, this hunt token didn't reappear in and . Instead, it was replaced with Pyramids ( ).
Gallery

Fall Speed
Fall Speed is a board released in . It costs 22.000. It's 1st upgrade, the Super Speed costs 60.
Appearance
It is a brown hoverboard with a lighter shade of brown at the front, a zig-zagged line through the middle, and a darker shade of brown at the back, in the front there is a black piece nailed to it like the top of a skateboard, in the back, there are red, orange, and yellow leaves taped to it.
Trivia
It, Fox Trail , and Pathfinder are the 47th, 48th, and 49th boards released in 2024 after Skyrocket , Electro Shock , Bada-Bomb , Confetti Crush , Red Velvet , Roaring Heart , Lunar Scroll , Astro Tune , Interstellar , Shamrock Shebang , Megga Bite , Fast and Festive , Radiant Rider , Jak , Tea Timer , Deli-Vroom , Yellow Sub , Jelly Board , Koinobori , Mayo Mania , 12th Birthday , Pixel Hoverboard , Street Grace , Alarm On , Rock n' Riley , Sunny Sailor , Laser Flip , Glarx 3000 , Standing Ovation , Risky Ride , Sporty Summer , Heavy Metal , Champ , Arrow , Raggedy Runner , Turbo Stumb , Brass Whizz , Chop-Chop Board , Cook-Express , Moon Cake , Veggie Velocity , Couch Surfer , Catalyst , Flash of Flavor , Fear Tractor , Sci-Fly , Skeletuna , and Pitch Dark .
It's the 5th board, the 1st being Moose , the 2nd Maple Leaf , the 3rd being Spring , and the 4th being Fox Trail .
It's Alfie 's third board . His first, and second boards are Big Boss Board , and Roaring Heart .
It's name probably is a play-on-words of the phrase "full speed".

Fantasma
Fantasma is a limited character released in , he could be unlocked by completing all 5 stages in the ( Tag Time Attack ).
Appearance
Default Outfit
Fantasma is a Mexican male individual from who is dressed as a luchador, much like Manny 's second outfit with the same name. He has blue shorts on and a suit that has the purple, pink, and violet color scheme. His mask features his blue-colored diamond eyes, a pink nose, and a star on the top center of the mask. He has long purple boots with a lighter shade of laces. His epaulets are yellow and acts as a belt to their gold medal on his torso.
Carnaval Outfit
During , his suit is now black with a red vest and white diamond on it. He wears red gloves and boots in darker red accents. His face mask is yellow and red, topped with a black, red, and white feather headdress and a black eye mask.
History
* An exact date was found where he appeared in, otherwise, the edition release date is assumed
Trivia
Fantasma is the 16th character released in 2022 after Alia , Zi Hao , Moira , The Burger King , Super Runner Yutani , Super Runner Fresh , Super Runner Tricky , Pride Miss Maia , Super Runner Jake , Dummy , George , Pink , Charlie , Tiger , and Hasina .
He's the fourth / surfer. The first being Rosa , second being Manny , and third being Bob The Blob .
He is the 10th Halloween themed character after Zombie Jake , Eddy , Mike , Manny , Scarlett , Cathy , Noel , Morgan , and Bob The Blob .
Fantasma means "ghost" in Spanish, Portuguese and Italian.
He is the first character to appear on the app icon other than Jake (Not counting Jia on the Train Riders app icon).
This character has no pupils in his eyes.
He is the second 2022 -released surfer not to have his name revealed in the trailer video (but instead, the description), the first being Alia .
He is the fourth character who wears headgear covering his head, the first being Dino , the second being Buzz , third being George and the fifth being Red Panda .
He is known as "The Wrestler" in the game files .
He is the first character to have not seen skin.
He is the third character with a voice in the trailer, the first being Cleo , the second being Super Runner Jake , and the third being him.
In his animation, he only smiles once.
He is the first surfer to organize a competition between surfers, He organized the Fantasy Face-off which was organized to find the world's spookiest surfer. Fantasy Face-off was held in version. The winner was Bob The Blob .
In the Chinese Version of the game, his name is Hallucination (幻觉) and his mouth and nose are covered by his mask, the star on his head and the skull on his His belt was replaced by an eagle symbol.
Both Yuto and Eddy lost their skull on their outfits too because skulls are offensive in China.

Torito and Smoking Slime are his boards .

Fantasy Face-off
Fantasy Face-off is a competition that took place in the . Were organized by Fantasma to find out the ‘World’s Spookiest Surfer’. The winner was Bob The Blob .
Summary
First Round Winners : Subdivision 1 : Scarlett - Catrina Outfit Subdivision 2 : Moira Subdivision 3 : Manny - Mariachi Outfit Subdivision 4 : Bob The Blob .
Second Round Winners : Subdivision 1 : Scarlett - Catrina Outfit Subdivision 2 : Bob The Blob .
Final Round Winner : Subdivision 1 : Bob The Blob .
Trivia
The 8 Surfers who participated were Bob The Blob , Scarlett , Moira , Mike , Manny , Morgan , Noel , and Cathy .
The first round was divided into 4 subdivisions (8 surfers).
The second round was divided into 2 subdivisions (4 surfers).
The third or last round was divided into 1 subdivisions (2 surfers).
At last round, the winner was announced.
The fans nominated their favorite surfer in each subdivision.
The most surfer who gets the mire votes goes to the next round.
The Fantasy Face-off took place in online platforms such as X (formerly Twitter), Facebook and Instagram.
For some reason, Morgan had more votes than Manny and somehow lost to him still.
Moira was the only participate who did not release in a Halloween edition.

Fast Fur-ward
Fast Fur-ward is a hoverboard released in . Like any other hoverboard, it protects the character from crashing for 30 seconds. When crashed, it will need to recharge for a few seconds before it can be used again.
Appearance
A white and blue spaceship-shaped hoverboard that has red accents in the front, with its prominent features include a pair of wings on the sides and a pair of boosters at the back. At the rear in-between the boosters is a star symbol, and above it is a wide-eyed tuxedo cat loafing on a red cushion. The trail is yellow with stars and it's the same as the Starboard .
Trivia
It, Fox Trotter , and Cathletic Ride are the 16th, 17th, and 18th boards released in 2026 , after Road Rage , Frankmobile , Perfectoplasma , Fire Starter , Xtra Cool , Turbo Love , Gold Rush , The Green Flame , Turbo Love , Marbleous , Arena Rider , Major Speed , Sunny Side Up , Pixel Perfect , and Buzz BNY .
It is Tsuki Chan 's board .

In , he received the Fortune Outfit, which costed 150.
Appearance
Default Outfit
Festive Frank is basically  Frank  but he also wears a red scarf and red earmuffs.
Old Default Outfit
Before , he was just looks exactly same as Frank and he have the same graphics and wears the exact same clothes as him. Just the different thing is that he wears a red scarf and red earmuffs. But he got a redesign, either to match the other festive crew or to make his mask look better.
Anubis Outfit
Launched in , it's basically Frank but the head is based on the ancient Egyptian god of death called Anubis , the staff he’s holding is the ancient Egyptian symbol Ankh .
Fortune Outfit
Launched in , it's basically Frank but he wears a red suit instead of black, black shoes. He also has a black briefcase which he carries in his left hand while running, similar to Frank and his briefcase, and Fresh and his stereo/boombox.

Festive Fresh
Festive Fresh  is a special character released with the  update. He's the first prize of Weekly Hunt of the update and needs 30 to get unlocked. In , his Hoodie Outfit was release and could be unlocked from the Season Hunt by collecting 400. He now costs 75 in the Flash Deals .
Appearance
Default Outfit
Festive Fresh is basically  Fresh  except that he wears a Christmas jacket in black, red and green with a snow and Christmas cane print and a Christmas Tree behind the jacket, a dark blue blouse with a gold necklace, a red earring that represents an ornament, dark gray trousers with a gold belt, green socks, and red sneakers. His boombox is also wrapped like a Christmas gift with a red handle, dark blue wrapping paper, and a golden ribbon.
Hoodie Outfit
Launched in , Fresh wears a bright red hoodie, gray trousers, and red sneakers. He has also a red streak in his hair, probably dyed.
Snow Outfit
Launched in , Fresh wears his white full-body puffer jacket to pair with his snowman helmet and large red headphones. Under his jacket are a pair of maroon leggings and large red boots.

Fiesta
Fiesta is a limited hoverboard released in . Like any other hoverboard, it protects the character from crashing for 30 seconds. When crashed, it will need to recharge for a few seconds before it can be used again.
Appearance
This is a dark green and black board with a tan center stripe that is bordered with orange striping. There is an orange flower design at the top. The number 2 is located in the center of the board and is colored green. Two crossed orange stripes are strapped onto the board.
Trivia

It's the fifth / board, the first being Prickly , the second being Casket , the third being Torito , and the fourth being Smoking Slime .
In Spanish language, Fiesta means Party .
It is Alma Brava 's board .
It has the same abilities as Great White , Scarab , Jak , Aero , Tea Timer , Arrow , Guard Board , and Float-Booster .

Fingerboard Making Kit
The Fingerboard Making Kit , is a free gift from the 1st issue of the Subway Surfers Magazine . It contains 3 hoverboards , Jake , Fresh and Tricky . On Page 6, of the Magazine, a page titled 'Fab Fingerboard' tells you how to use the Fingerboard Making Kit.

Finlay
Finlay is a character released in . He is the 225th character in the game and tenth surfer of 2025 .
Appearance
Default Outfit
Finlay is a 14-year-old Scottish teenage boy from in a unicorn-themed armor. He has blonde hair under his unicorn helmet, and his overall outfit bears pastel colors. In his idle animation, he is holding a blue unicorn horn-shaped sword and a round shield, which has a purple frame, a blue and green background, and a golden star on the middle.
Merrymaker Outfit
Released in , Finlay's blonde hair is now more exposed, although he still wears a red beret at the back of his head. With that, he has a green scarf above his white cozy sweater with red and grey rectangle patterns, and below that is his red cargo pants. For footwear, he has a red and white pair of sneakers.
History
* An exact date was found where he appeared in, otherwise, the edition release date is assumed.

He is the fifth male surfer of 2025 , after Snake , Kaleo , Gabriel , and Rocky .

Unlike the others, he, Callum , Frutti , and Ribbon is from Scotland instead of England.

Flash Deals
Flash Deals is a feature in Subway Surfers, where the player has a chance to obtain some limited characters , boards , headstarts , score boosters , and season tokens for coins , keys or real money . The selection is currently randomized per player, and the flash deals will refresh daily with a minimum wait of 24 hours. If the player logs in some time after 24 hours since the last flash deal refresh, they will refresh at a later time.
Flash offers are updated every update after , and the flash deals were revamped since then.
Some characters in the coins or keys section may not show up in some editions.
From until , was removed from the flash deals.
In , was added from flash deals but only used in Characters and Outfits.
In , was removed from the flash deals again.
NOTE: FLASH DEALS WERE RANDOMIZED EVERY TIME THE SCREEN IS REFRESHED (between and )

Flux
Flux is the eleventh episode of Subway Surfers: The Animated Series .
It is the most recent episode of Subway Surfers , excluding the specials such as the rewinds.
Synopsis
Jake is chased by Guard and his Dog through the yard, but as Guard and Dog enter into the depths below to find him, they stumble upon an unsettling scene...
Plot
The episode starts off where the previous episode ended, with Jake being confronted by Guard and Dog. Jake takes off, and the 2 chase him through the yard. Frank, standing close-by, delivers intel on Jake through his phone. He then pulls out a strange circular device and begins following an arrow.
Meanwhile, Jake continues to evade Guard. Jake even contacts Fresh and shows him Guard trying in vain to catch him. Eventually, Jake is able to lose Guard and Dog by separating them with an oncoming train. Guard continues the chase, and Frank appears in the background, following his device and avoiding the trains without needing to move.
Guard chases Jake into a tunnel underground. He and Dog enter into an underground subway station. They hide as Frank appears, and he uses his device to unlock a panel in the wall underneath the strange symbol. Frank messes with the panel, and the symbol glows. A beam shoots across the tunnel from the symbol, and Frank looks at his device, which seems to be counting down to something. The beam begins to falter, and Frank looks across to another symbol, which is obscured by some of Jake's graffiti. Frank beams himself to the other side, and quickly tries to re-complete the symbol with some sort of laser spray can. However, he is unable to do so, and a strange vehicle passes by at an incredible speed. Frank attempts to reach out to it, but it passes by, disfiguring the tracks into the same symbol. Frank looks at the graffiti and his eyes shrink, presumably in anger. He reactivates his device.
Guard and Dog look at each other, and Jake walks into the tunnel behind them, only to look up to see debris floating in the air. Guard grabs Jake and threatens him with talking to his mother, and Jake asks about the phenomenon. Guard dismisses his concerns and walks off. Frank, meanwhile, adds Jake's name to "The List", along with 3 crossed-off names. He then follows his device elsewhere.
Characters
Major Characters
Jake - Nicolas Roye
The Guard - David Lodge
The Guard's Dog - David Lodge
Frank - N/A
Minor Characters
Fresh - Ogie Banks
Trivia
This episode, according to the SSAS "Real Order" video, comes before the second episode.
On Frank 's list, the crossed-off names are "Don K. Kong" (a reference to the video game character Donkey Kong), J. Connor (a refrence to John Connor, character from Terminator film saga) and B. Tanner (a reference to Biff Tanner, antagonist from the first two films from Back from the Future trilogy).
The Guard garbing Jake by his leg is a refence to the game where one of the guards possible caught animations is to grab the surfer by there left/right leg.
Connections
This episode occurs a day before busted .

Flying Horse
Flying Horse is a hoverboard in / update. It is a limited hoverboard exclusive to the Collections feature. Like any other hoverboard, it protects you from crashing for 30 seconds. When crashed, the hoverboard will explode and need to recharge for a few seconds before using again. It can be unlocked by scoring 4.5k points in the Collections feature.

Later in the update the function was improved and Flying Horse was released for everyone.

This is the first and currently only board.

The Football Frame is a frame released in the update. This frame could be unlocked by event during .
Appearance
A football-inspired blue frame that has a goal net as the background, a yellow whistle in the upper left of the frame, and a football/soccer ball at the lower right of the frame. The upper right and lower left of the frame features a red and baby blue lightning paints with little yellow triangles.
Trivia
This is the 28th frame to be released. The previous frames are the Default Frame in for Top Run and for Player Profile , the Birthday Frame in , the Hollywood Frame in , the Summer Frame in , the Plant and Lava Frames in , the Club Frame in , the Pride Frame in , the Oxford Green and Oxford Red Frames in , the Brawl Stars and Gems Frames in , the Pumpkin and Dia de los Muertos Frames in , the Candy Cane and Gingerbread Frames in , the Glorx and Cinema Frames in , the Winter Frame in , the Shamrock Frame in , the Easter Egg Frame in , the Earth Day and Koi Frames in , the Blob Frame in , the Wave Frame in , and the Midsummer Frame in .
This is the eleventh frame released in 2026 , after Glorx Frame , Cinema Frame , Winter Frame , Shamrock Frame , Easter Egg Frame , Earth Day Frame , Koi Frame , Blob Frame , Wave Frame , and Midsummer Frame .

Fortune
Fortune was the sixth limited hoverboard in Subway Surfers.
This was a limited edition hoverboard, which was introduced in . However, it was changed to the Kitty Hoverboard in the 1.10.3 version (also ). If you bought Fortune before the update, it still becomes the Kitty Hoverboard .
Appearance
The hoverboard has a picture of the Japanese flag (or flag of the rising sun) on it.
Trivia
This is the first item and so far only Hoverboard that has been removed from the game and to never come back again.
The flag shown is controversial in parts of East Asia due to the flag's significant usage as a symbol of Japanese imperialism during the Second World War, which is likely the reason for the removal of the board and the redesign of buildings with the flag design on them, going from red to blue, in the minor update for .
The hoverboard is actually a reference to a hoverboard from one of Griff Tannen's gang members from Back to the Future: Part II .
You can get this hoverboard if you download a 2013 APK and backup your data to it.
It's not known if this board was released in the Chinese Version and removed later like what happened in the Original Version or not, although this is very much impossible.
This board shares the same name as Festive Frank 's Fortune Outfit.
Gallery

Four-leaf Flux
Four-leaf Flux is a hoverboard released in . Like any other hoverboard, it protects the character from crashing for 30 seconds. When crashed, it will need to recharge for a few seconds before it can be used again.
Appearance
It is a silver board with 2 black circles and one of them has a red wire attached. There are 2 screens one is green, and the other displays a clover that is constantly spinning. On the underside, both the screens are green.
Trivia
It, Charmer , and Bias Boom are the 45th, 46th, and 47th boards released in 2025 , after Hyper Viper , Lantern , Override , Fresh Love , Heartstopper , Dear Dart , Roarsome , Arara Board , Moongazer , Purple Spin , Cyan Note , Blue Riff , Eggscalibur , Bloomster , Edinburst , Guard Board , Trespasser , Mizu Dash , Zapline , Seven Seas , 13th Birthday , You Are Here , Freebird , Glitter Blaster , Float-Booster , Feeling Beachy , Street Style , Roll & Race , Midsummer , Business Time , Rabbit Racer , Circuit Bunny , E-Racer , Brainstormer , Principal's Nightmare , The De-lyre-ious , Moon Biter , 8 Ball , Piece Of Cake , Finish Line , Motor Mania , Fiesta , Shin Supreme , and Galactic Peel .
It's the seventh board, the first being Bubblegum , the second being K-Dillac , the third being Retro Orange , the fourth being Neo-Seoul , the fifth being Charmer , and the sixth being Bias Boom .
It's Lucky 's second board . His first board is Shamrock Shebang .
For unknown reasons, this and Charmer are labelled as Special Board instead of Seoul Board .
For unknown reasons, the trailer shows off the underside of the board as opposed to the top side.

Fox Trotter
Fox Trotter is a hoverboard released in . Like any other hoverboard, it protects the character from crashing for 30 seconds. When crashed, it will need to recharge for a few seconds before it can be used again.
Appearance
A metallic hoverboard with an identical base to the Default hoverboard but has metal frames, a black base, and an orange and gray arrow-like design that points to the front. It also has a purple rubber pad and a yellow-and-black barrel on the back. The metal frame is raised on the left side, with the end being formed similar to a fox's (specifically, a Kitsune 's) tail.
Trivia
It, Fast Fur-ward , and Cathletic Ride are the 16th, 17th, and 18th boards released in 2026 , after Road Rage , Frankmobile , Perfectoplasma , Fire Starter , Xtra Cool , Turbo Love , Gold Rush , The Green Flame , Turbo Love , Marbleous , Arena Rider , Major Speed , Sunny Side Up , Pixel Perfect , and Buzz BNY .
It is Kaito 's second board . His first board is Cathletic Ride .

Frank
Frank (Franklin) is a character that can be unlocked by purchasing with 40,000. His first outfit, the Clown Outfit, costs 30. His second outfit, the Tiger Outfit, costs 30.
Appearance
Default Outfit
Frank is a person in a black suit, black shoes and a bunny mask which covers his entire face. He has some visible short styled brown hair behind his mask. His skin appears to be mildly tanned. Frank has a black briefcase which he carries in his left hand while running, similar to Fresh and his stereo/boombox.
In the animated series , Frank still looks the same, except he now has black gloves.
Clown Outfit
Frank received a new outfit in , the Clown Outfit, in which his mask is replaced with a clown's and he holds a red flower in his hand instead of his suitcase. His suit and shoes remain unchanged.
Tiger Outfit
He also received the Tiger Outfit during the edition. He now wears a tiger mask and his briefcase has a tiger tail sticking out of it. The rest remains the same.

Frank Noir
Frank Noir is a character released in . He is the 263rd character in the game and the 1st surfer of 2026 .
Appearance
Default Outfit
Frank Noir is basically monochromatic Frank inspired by Classic Hollywood , specifically film noir or black-and-white crime movies. This time in , he has a trench coat, a big hat with rabbit ears, lace up shoes, and carries a briefcase with two movie tape rolls as design.
History
* An exact date was found where he appeared in, otherwise, the edition release date is assumed.

He is the third limited variant of Frank , after Festive Frank and Pride Frank .
He is also the first Frank variant to cost .
He is also the first Frank variant to cost .

He is a reference to Spider-Man Noir from the movie Spider-Man: Beyond the Spider-Verse .
He has a unique running animation whenever you play as him in the game. This same trait also goes to Piper , El Primo , Spike , Dynamike , Poco , and Max .
His zodiac sign is Leo ♌️.
His birthday is between July 23 and August 22 (the exact date is unknown).

Frankmobile
Frankmobile is a hoverboard released in . Like any other hoverboard, it protects the character from crashing for 30 seconds. When crashed, it will need to recharge for a few seconds before it can be used again.
Appearance
It is a monochromatic vintage car-looking hoverboard that has its front stylized as Frank 's face (with the headlights as his eyes, and the metal designs being his mask's mustache and goatee). At the back, its license plate bears the word "NOIR". There is a booster below which releases a white flame.
Trivia
It, Road Rage , and Perfectoplasma are the first boards released in 2026 .
It's the fifth board, after Standing Ovation , Risky Ride , Glarx 3000 , and Road Rage .
It is Frank Noir 's board .
This board is labelled as a Special Board instead of Hollywood Board .

Freebird
Freebird is a hoverboard released in . Like any other hoverboard, it protects the character from crashing for 30 seconds. When crashed, it will need to recharge for a few seconds before it can be used again.
Appearance
It looks like a futuristic hoverboard with white with a red, rectangular platform in the center, bordered by purple accents. It has a sharp, pointed front and a raised section at the back, resembling a fin, with a red star emblem on a white background.
Trivia
It, 13th Birthday , You Are Here , and Seven Seas are the 20th, 21st, 22nd, and 23rd boards released in 2025 , after Hyper Viper , Lantern , Override , Fresh Love , Heartstopper , Dear Dart , Roarsome , Arara Board , Moongazer , Purple Spin , Cyan Note , Blue Riff , Eggscalibur , Bloomster , Edinburst , Guard Board , Trespasser , Mizu Dash , and Zapline .

Freestyler
Freestyler is a non-limited hoverboard released in Subway Surfers: Holiday . Like any other hoverboard, it protects players from crashing for up to 30 seconds. When crashed, the hoverboard will explode and need to recharge for a few seconds before using it again. It costs 45,000.
During the re-release, it received a new board upgrade, called Double Jump which costs 45.
During the re-release, it received a new board upgrade, called Super Jump which costs 55.
Appearance
It has the appearance of a yellow and red snowboard with black foot straps. The Double Jump upgrade adds a large yellow booster to the back and two hoses. Equipping the Super Jump upgrade adds a yellow booster to the front with the Super Jump logo on it and also recolors the foot straps to resemble a pair of Super Sneakers .
Trivia
This is the first and only hoverboard to have foot straps.
It most likely resembles a snowboard due to being longer than other hoverboards and having those foot straps.
It most likely resembles a snowboard due to being longer than other hoverboards and having those foot straps.
This board makes you jump the highest out of all others for now.
This board (with all upgrades) is the best option for the Straight Ahead achievement.
Ice Cool shares the same shape.
In the Chinese Version, it's a board, and it's called Street Skateboard (街头滑板) .

Fresh
"Music savant and connoisseur of all things 80s. Fresh is highly intelligent and perceptive, but speaks mostly through his boombox music. He's a deep thinker but prone to cynicism – his songs tell it like it really is. Fresh is the glue that holds the Surfers together."
Source: Subway Surfers Official Website
Fresh is a character in Subway Surfers . He can be unlocked by collecting 50 Fresh's Stereos ( ) tokens.
Jeffrey Harper is full real name since his parents are listed as Mr. Harper and Mrs. Harper.
Appearance
Default Outfit
Fresh is an African-American teenage boy with 80s styled high top fade, slightly dark brown skin and brown eyes. He wears thick glasses similar to Tricky , a green tank top, red shorts, pale blue, gray and red sneakers, and white socks with two different colored stripes. He is also holding a boombox wherever he goes.
During the update, Fresh was given 2 new outfits which are the Funk Outfit and the Sport Outfit edition, they cost 150 and 300 respectively.
Funk Outfit
In his Funk Outfit, he gains purple shorts and a green T-shirt with patterns on it. His boombox also turns gray.
Before the update, His boombox was black and green.
Sport Outfit
In his Sport Outfit, he gains a cordovan headband, vest with the kit number "1" and shorts. He also carries a basketball instead of his boombox.
Limited Outfits (Variants)
Festive Fresh ( )
Pride Fresh ( )
Super Runner Fresh ( )
Elf Fresh ( )
Trivia
He keeps his radio in his Funk Outfit, just in a different color, while he holds a basketball instead in his Sport Outfit.
He, Frank , Dylan (in his Lifeguard Outfit), and Roberto (in his Fan Outfit) are the only characters to carry an item throughout the gameplay (Fresh carrying his stereo 'Boomie', Frank carrying his top secret briefcase, Dylan carrying his float device, and Roberto carrying his soccer ball).
In the update, his animation changed and he no longer carries his boombox during gameplay. This was later reverted in and soon later, he got a custom animation for spraying the train.
Ella happens to be his older sister, according to her cameo in The Animated Series .
This make Fresh and Ella to be first surfers to be siblings, the others were Spike & Callum , Lucy & Tasha and Tutti & Frutti .
This make Fresh and Ella to be first surfers to be siblings, the others were Spike & Callum , Lucy & Tasha and Tutti & Frutti .
Fresh says he hates seafood, as seen in episode 1 of The Animated Series .
Fresh has custom animations when playing as him during the title screen.
He gets +5 Multiplier Bonus for Special Thursdays such as: , , , , , , and .
Fresh is the first African-American boy, with Ella being the first African-American girl.
George uses his boombox in the trailer.
Fresh, Jake , Tricky , Spike , Frank , Yutani , Boombot , Rin , Miss Maia , King , Dino and Tasha are the only characters in the game who have limited edition counterparts, Zombie Jake ( Halloween update), Elf Tricky ( Christmas update), Festive Fresh ( update), Festive Jake , Festive Tricky , Festive Spike , Festive Frank and Festive Yutani ( update), Pride Jake , Pride Tricky , Pride Fresh , Pride Spike , Pride Yutani , Pride Frank and Pridebot ( update), Spacebot ( update), Gingerbot ( update), Parkour Rin ( update), Super Runner Jake ( update), Pride Miss Maia and Super Runner Tricky ( ), Super Runner Fresh ( update), Super Runner Yutani ( update), and Elf Jake , Elf Yutani and Elf Fresh ( update), Yutani Harlequin Toad ( update), Outatime Jake ( update), Pixel Jake , Ballerina Tricky , and Guard King ( update), Dinorange ( update), Chicken Jake and Mallard Tricky ( update), 8 Ball Jake ( update), Crewmate Jake , Crewmate Tricky , Crewmate Spike , Crewmate King and Crewmate Tasha ( update), Frank Noir ( update).
Super Runner Fresh is his super runner variant.
Hali is his rival .
In the Chinese Version, his Outfits are still cost keys instead of Tokens.

Fresh Love
Fresh Love is a hoverboard released in . Like any other hoverboard, it protects the character from crashing for 30 seconds. When crashed, it will need to recharge for a few seconds before it can be used again.
Appearance
It is designed in a cartoonish and vibrant style. The predominant colors are purple, lime green, and hot pink, arranged in an abstract, organic pattern reminiscent of paint splatters or a psychedelic design. It includes pink circles on the main surface, adding to its playful and casual aesthetic. At the top is an additional element that looks like a propeller with a dark green color attached to a pink spray can.
Trivia
It, Heartstopper , and Dear Dart are the fourth, fifth, and sixth boards released in 2025 , after Hyper Viper , Lantern , and Override .
It is the fourth board, the first being Tiki , the second being Ukulele , and the third being Rave Rider .
Its shape is similar to Jingle Dingle .
It is Valentina 's board .
In , it came back in the One Run Challenge in .
In the Chinese Version, this board is (Sky City) board and called Love Parade (沐爱巡游) .
In , it costs .

Freya
Appearance
Default Outfit
Freya is a Danish teenage girl from with light skin, freckles and blonde hair with a small braid. She also has blue eyes and orange-pink lipstick. She wears a light blue sweater with navy zigzag stripes, a navy leather jacket, blue ripped skinny jeans, and black boots. She appears to be an opera singer.
Viking Outfit
Launched in , she wears a metal Viking helmet with two white wings sticking out on each side. She wears a short blue dress with green overlay with large gold medallions, along with a gold armlet on her right arm. She wears brown, furry boots. Her hair is now tied back in a braid.
Winter Magic Outfit
Launched in , she wears a red and yellow pointed witch-like hat with a black ribbon on the back and a white rim/border. She wears a white long sleeved tank top with two gold medallions near the openings of the sleeves and one near her chest. On the back of the tank top is a small red cape with two gold medallions in a vertical line to the left of the cape. She has wears red high waist shorts with yellow stars on it. She also has black, furry boots with one medallion on each boot.

Navigation

Friends
Until , you could invite friends who played the game from your Game Center account (For iOS only) or from your account. After inviting them, they would be sent into your leaderboard and would be listed by highscore in descending order. Not only that, if your friends ran for more than 25 times in the game, you could get coin bonuses up to 350 (now ). There was no limit in the amount of friends you can get (now 100), so you could invite as many friends as you want.
In , it changed. Now players without need to use can go to Top Run section, then to Friends tab and add friends with their code or their QR code. Players can see their progress.
Trivia
As of , there's a bug which you can't accept the player's 100th friend request. But this wasn't fixed yet.

Frutti
Frutti is a limited character in the update. She’s the 158th character in the game.
Appearance
Frutti is a 14-year-old invisible Scottish/British teenage girl from , and is similar to her brother, Tutti . She wears teal circular glasses with a pink cap and dark purple headphones. She also wears white gloves, and she wears a shirt that has a pink strawberry with one sleeve thats cyan and another thats pink. Her shorts are cyan with her socks being white with a pink stripe and her slippers are tan. She also rides a scooter very similar to that of her brother Tutti .

Gabriel
Gabriel is a character released in . He is the 221st character in the game and sixth surfer of 2025 .
Appearance
Default Outfit
Gabriel is a 15-year-old Brazilian teenage boy from known for having large expressive blue eyes and a friendly smile. His outfit symbolizes a Macaw , from his red, feather-like hair that has a giant yellow streak, to his green and yellow cape top that's also shaped like feathers. He also has a blue loose, layered pants, as well as white shoes with purple soles, fingerless gloves, and a cross belt around his waist, adding to the playful appearance.
Rad in Red Outfit
Released in , his hair is now entirely red and down. His overall outfit is composed of a red hoodie with green and yellow vest, green cargo pants, dark brown shoes with white soles, and long, white fingerless gloves. He still have his right piercing, yet his eye color changed from blue to brown.
History

Appearance
It is a stylized golden key with an elongated design with a red inlay in the center, surrounded by green and gold details with a pattern reminiscent of armor or a tribal design.

Galactic Peel
Galactic Peel is a limited hoverboard released in . Like any other hoverboard, it protects the character from crashing for 30 seconds. When crashed, it will need to recharge for a few seconds before it can be used again.
Appearance
Is a blue board that has a banana peel on the top. The front part has red and white striped patterns and a blue circular component.
Trivia
It, Fiesta , and Shin Supreme are the 42nd, 43rd, and 44th boards released in 2025 , after Hyper Viper , Lantern , Override , Fresh Love , Heartstopper , Dear Dart , Roarsome , Arara Board , Moongazer , Purple Spin , Cyan Note , Blue Riff , Eggscalibur , Bloomster , Edinburst , Guard Board , Trespasser , Mizu Dash , Zapline , Seven Seas , 13th Birthday , You Are Here , Freebird , Glitter Blaster , Float-Booster , Feeling Beachy , Street Style , Roll & Race , Midsummer , Business Time , Rabbit Racer , Circuit Bunny , E-Racer , Brainstormer , Principal's Nightmare , The De-lyre-ious , Moon Biter , 8 Ball , Piece Of Cake , Finish Line , and Motor Mania .
It's the seventh / board, the first being Prickly , the second being Casket , the third being Torito , the fourth being Smoking Slime , the fifth being Fiesta , and the sixth being Shin Supreme .

George
George is a limited character from the update. He costs 300.
Appearance
Default Outfit
George is a British teenage boy from in a gray and white bunny suit with teal shorts and shoes. The strings and shoelaces are both white.
Moonbun Outfit
Launched in , he wears a white bunny suit instead of gray and white, with red shorts and shoes instead of teal. He has red streaks for eyebrow and blush on him now. The strings are black. The shoelaces are yellow.
Eggstravaganza Outfit
Launched in , he now wears a pink bunny suit with egg themed ears, and a belly with eggs on it, he also has blue shorts and shoes. The blush eyebrow marks are now a more pink color, the strings are and laces are yellow.

Ginger
Ginger is a limited character released in . She is the 209th character of the game and the 34th surfer of 2024 . She can be unlocked at the 5th stage of in .
Appearance
Ginger is a 13-year-old Canadian teenage girl from . She has orange hair that's dip dyed white to look like fox tails, purple eyes, and light skin. She wears a long yellow jacket with a fox eared hood and 4 pockets. She also wears reddish-purple gloves, a skirt with dark red and reddish-purple stripes, long orange and purple striped stockings, and finally purple boots with orange and beige edges.
History
* An exact date was found where she appeared in, otherwise, the edition release date is assumed.
Trivia
She and Logan are the 34th and 35th surfers released in 2024 after Thunder , Skye , Azura , Dragon , Stella , Astra , Lucky , Meggan , Red Panda , Hamza , Faiza , Teabot , Finn , Electra , Hammy-Bee , Ballerina Tricky , Pixel Jake , Guard King , Riley , Lily , Glorgalax , Ventura , Rudy Rascal , Hélène , Leo , Pins , Ozzy , Audrey , Billy Bean , Kedi , Ruhi , Dr. Flyman and Pumpkin Pete .
She is the fourth surfer, the first being Olivia , the second being Mala , the third being Pink , and the fifth being Logan .
She is the 15th female surfers released in 2024 after Skye , Azura , Stella , Astra , Meggan , Red Panda , Faiza , Electra , Ballerina Tricky , Lily , Ventura , Hélène , Audrey , and Kedi .
She's also the fifth North American female surfers released in 2024 after Stella , Astra , Lily , and Ventura .

Ginger Boom
Ginger Boom is a limited hoverboard in Subway Surfers . It is the special board for . This hoverboard has no special powers as seen in the trailer. It can be obtained through the Season Hunt .
Appearance
This hoverboard is simply just the head of Gingerbot except that it has a bitten piece on the corner.
Trivia
It is the third board, the first being Choo Choo , the second being Glacier , the fourth being Flash Jet , the fifth being Wind-Up Rocket , the sixth being Snow Down , the seventh being Buck Lightdeer , the eighth being Chill Out , the ninth being Candy Crash , and the tenth being Mean Green Machine .
It is the 19th board of 2021 after Secret Society , Endeavour , Discovery , Crane , Buddy Bear , Uprock , Bunny , Shuttle , 9th Birthday , Viking , Dragon Boat , Paint Palette , Sakura , Beach , Queen of Hearts , Camel , Torito , Maple Leaf , and Beach Pop .
Ginger Boom is the seventh Christmas -themed board, the first being Snowflake , the second being Jingles , the third being Rudy , the fourth being Choo Choo , the fifth being Glacier , the sixth being Sleigh , the eighth being Ho Ho Hoverboard , the ninth being Snow Cloud , the teenth being Wrapped , the eleventh being Wind-Up Rocket , the twelfth being Snow Down , the thirteenth being Jingle Dingle , the fourteenth being Shiny Surprise , the 15th being Gadget Force , the 16th being Ice Cool , the 17th being Buck Lightdeer , the 18th being Chill Out , the 19th being Candy Crash , and the 20th being Mean Green Machine .
In the trailer, Ginger Boom is bigger than it is in game.
In , , and , it could be bought with Buddy and his Candy Outfit for .
In , it could be bought with Buddy and his Candy Outfit for 450.000.
This is the second board that changes size in the trailer, the first being Queen of Hearts .
It is the last board of 2021 .
Clementine and Gingerbot share this board .
In the Chinese version, it is called Gingerbread (姜饼) and is upgradable with Double Jump and Smooth Drift

Gingerbot
Gingerbot is a surfer from . They can be unlocked by logging in 10 times. Their 1st outfit, the Wrapper Outfit can be unlocked by completing 5 stages of the Wrapped Challenge in . Now it costs 150, just like almost every other outfit from 2023 and 2024 .
Appearance
Default Outfit
Gingerbot is basically Boombot but as a gingerbread man from . Both of their eyes are jelly beans with one being red, and the other being green. They have color-coded jellybeans on the side of their hands. They wear a red little jacket and is outlined with frosting, as is the rest of their body.
Wrapper Outfit
Launched in , it's basically Boombot but is holding a red gift box adorned with a green bow and wearing stylish round sunglasses.
History
* An exact date was found where they appeared in, otherwise, the edition release date is assumed.
Trivia
Gingerbot is the 30th character released in 2021 , after Frankette , Spacebot , Ox , Rat , Qin , Hou , Zayn , Darryl , Lana , Bonnie , Buzz , Trym , Pridebot , Pride Jake , Pride Fresh , Pride Spike , Pride Tricky , Pride Yutani , Pride Frank , Parkour Rin , Alexandre , Akira , Koral , Cleo , Taha , Bob the Blob , Mala , Phoenix , and Clementine .
Gingerbot is the 3rd variation for Boombot after Spacebot and Pridebot .
Gingerbot is the first character in the game to have a name where the letter G is the initial, the second is George , the third is Guard King , the fourth is Glorgalax , the fifth is Ginger , the sixth is Grand Juke , and the seventh is Gabriel .
They are the only character to be made out of an edible food.
It was originally planned to be the first outfit for Spacebot .
Gingerbot and Clementine are the last characters of 2021 .
They're the fifth surfer. The first being Buddy , second being Malik , third being Festive Fresh , fourth being Clementine , sixth being Captain Flash , and seventh being Clockwork Johnny .
Ginger Boom and Shiny Surprise are their boards .
Gingerbot is the 22nd surfer to receive a new outfit in 2024 (Wrapper in ) after Alfie , Ji-Yeong , Moira , George , Hasina , Cathy , Koral , Cleo , Vivienne , Tainá , Phoenix , Pink , Morgan , Taha , Rain , Zi Hao , Mala , Thursday , Dummy , Catrine , and Clementine .
They are the 4th character not from 2023 to receive first new outfit in 2024 after Morgan , Zi Hao , and Dummy .
They are the 4th character not from 2023 to receive first new outfit in 2024 after Morgan , Zi Hao , and Dummy .
Gingerbot is the first variant of Boombot to receive an outfit.
They, Tagbot , Rabbot , Tankbot , and Dummy are the only robots to have outfits.
In the Chinese Version, it's name is Jiang Bo (姜博) .
In the 3.42.3 version, its Wrapped Outfit became limited.
So far, they're the latest character debuted with high quality texture (512x512) to get a new outfit.

Gingerbread Frame
The Gingerbread Frame is a frame released in the update. This frame could be unlocked in the One Run Challenge event in during .
Appearance
A frame made of gingerbread borders and a red gradient background, finished with a single mistletoe on its top border.
Trivia

Glacier
Glacier is a limited hoverboard released with . It is the 47th limited hoverboard in Subway Surfers . Like any other hoverboard, it will protect you from crashing for 30 seconds. When crashed, the board will explode and recharge for a few seconds before it can be used again. It has no special ability. Like most of the other hoverboards, it was released for 50,000.
Appearance
It takes the shape of an ice shard.
History
During the , the Glacier returned, but it cost 30.
In , it cost 20.
It returned in with Malik and his Tusk Outfit for 150.
In , it came back in Xmas Challenge and can be unlocked by completing the 3rd stage.
In , it came back in Season Hunt .
In , it came back for either or in a bundle for .
Trivia
Glacier is the 5th Christmas -themed board, the 1st being Snowflake , the 2nd being Jingles , the 3rd being Rudy , the 4th being Choo Choo , the 6th being Sleigh , the 7th being Ginger Boom , the 8th being Ho Ho Hoverboard , the 9th being Snow Cloud , the 10th being Wrapped , the 11th being Wind-Up Rocket , the 12th being Snow Down , the 13th being Jingle Dingle , the 14th being Shiny Surprise , the 15th being Gadget Force , the 16th being Ice Cool , the 17th being Buck Lightdeer , the 18th being Chill Out , the 19th being Candy Crash , and the 20th being Mean Green Machine .
Glacier and Bjarki were used in the trailer , even though they were not new at the time.
It's Malik 's 2nd board . His 1st board is Jingles .
According to the Season Hunt , bundles , events , and other images/videos, Malik , Elf Tricky , Festive Fresh , Carlos , Alex , Clementine , and Freya all share this board.
It is the last board of 2016 .

Glitches
These are glitches that can be encountered in Subway Surfers .
Please keep in mind that some of the glitches listed here may not work due to game updates; and also that it's possible that not every glitch is here.
Disclaimer
The Subway Surfers Wiki cannot be held responsible for a corruption or change to one's copy of Subway Surfers in which results in the change or corruption of one's game/save files for the game. Please attempt these glitches at your own risk. It may be harmful or harmless depending on what glitch you have.
Any forms of exploits that can provide an apparent advantage over other players (e.g. getting characters which should not be obtainable, tampering with currency values, etc) will not be documented here.
Jetpack-Jump
Jetpack-Jump is a glitch using a jetpack where you can jump really high if you jump at the right moment.
Steps
Pick up a Jetpack.
Right after the jetpack runs out of fuel, swipe up quickly.
See if your character jumps in mid air.
Note: Swipe up quickly after you get the last coin.
Another Note: This glitch may also land you on top of the trains .
Backwards Run
Backwards Run is a rather funny glitch that allows your character to run backwards.
Steps
Collect a  Headstart .
Start playing and purposefully fail in a few seconds after you start the game.
Just as you fail, activate your headstart. You will fly back forward.
Note: This glitch is difficult to do, so keep in mind that it may take more then one try.
Another Note: When you try to trigger this event, it may end up occurring the "Moving Smoke" glitch.
Another Note: If you have a version of the game from before the Rio update, you should use a regular Headstart instead.
Steps
Get Super Sneakers power-up (It can be easier to find if the Super Sneakers is upgraded).
Find a jetpack, with the Super Sneaker power still in effect.
As you collect coins, you should receive two coins per single coin.
Tip: Upgrade the Super Sneakers  and Jetpack for the cheat to be easier.
Hover-Mixture
Hover-Mixture is a glitch which the jetpack will act like a hoverboard. This is a crazy glitch that doesn't affect anything, also to active this glitch the hoverboard is supposed to end perfectly while picking up a jetpack at the same time, which is almost impossible to occur.
Steps
Activate a hoverboard.
Wait until the hoverboard timer ends.
This is the hard part: When the hoverboard timer ends, pick up a jetpack at the same time.
Moving Smoke
Mid-Air Smoke is a glitch when the Jetpack's "colored" smoke will go to other directions, other than the jetpack itself. You need the Bouncer hoverboard for this glitch.
Steps
Buy and activate the Bouncer hoverboard.
This is the slightly hard part: Pick up a jetpack at the same time the Bouncer is still activated.
Note: The cheat might not work.
Another Note: Upgrade your jetpack for longer durability.
Third Note: Sometimes you don't need the Bouncer, and this occurs when you do the "Back Forward Run" glitch.
Invisi-Board
Invisi-Board is a glitch that will make the hoverboard invisible while surfing. This glitch occurs when you try to do the "Backwards Run" glitch, but this glitch will happen instead.
Steps
Start playing and lose on purpose.
Just as you lose, click on your mega headstart to activate it. You will fly back forward.
When you land, activate your hoverboard, and if it's invisible, you will have performed the glitch.
Note: Sometimes it's doesn't work, so try again, but save some hoverboards and mega headstarts.
Frozen Flyer
Start your run and fail on purpose.
Use a Mega Headstart right after you fail.
This may cause you to get a jetpack and fly in the same position as when you failed. But if you move you will regain the ability to move.
Infinite Jetpack
This glitch allows you to have an infinite jetpack .
Steps
Start a run.
Collide with a train and activate a Headstart at the same time.
Continue the game using a Key .
NoClip
This glitch allows you to go through obstacles.
Steps
Get a board with Smooth Drift or a Super Jump board.
Get a Pogo Stick at the start of the map and activate your board and activate Headstart at the same time.
When you land, You will now be able to NoClip.
Note: This glitch was patched later.
Fall through the world
Get at the front of a train that is in the middle lane with precise timing.
Move left or right and you can get stuck in the side of the train.
Move to the far lane twice.
You should now infinitely fall out of the world.
Left/Right run
This glitch is exclusive to 2013-2015 editions 3.0.1 and 3.1.0.
Steps for 2013 - 2015 version
Bump into the side of a train.
Quit the game.
The surfer should be running to the left or right but remain running to the in the lane.
Steps for 3.0.1 and 3.1.0
Switch lanes.
Quit the game before the surfer touches the lane.
The surfer again should be running to the left or right but remain in the same lane.
Unlike the 2013-2015 version, switching lanes will end the glitch.
Camera Glitch
This glitch is only in 3.0.1.
Use a headstart or get a jetpack and.
Leave the game.
The camera should be moving in similar mater to the double jump power up.
Broken Mission Glitch
This glitch makes prevent you from skipping a mission nor doing it.
Broken Jump Glitch
Start a run.
Find a Pogo Stick anywhere in the run.
Roll immediately.
Now your jump will be broken.
Frozen Guard Glitch
Note: This glitch is temporary
Start a run.
Find a Pogo Stick anywhere.
Obtain a powerup in the left and right lanes (except the middle lane) (optional)
While obtaining it, stumble in any specific lane.
And the guard will freeze except his dog (don't swipe anywhere until the glitch stops.)
Jump 3x
Start a or game.
Make sure you have Double Jump hoverboards.
Make sure they are safe.
Jump or Roll on the vines or lava.
Swipe up.
Equip your hoverboard.
Swipe up 1 more time.
Double Ghost
Start a game on any event.
Find 2 tall barriers (You need hard or legendary on No Floor Challenge Series).
Swipe Left or Right when you get close to them.
Cancelled Lilliput
Start a game.
Have a Double Jump or Super Jump Hoverboard .
Find a usable tunnel.
Jump at the right height.
Lucky Double Power Up
Make sure you have at least 1-3 Headstart’s .
Start the game.
Equip the Headstart’s .
Swipe Left or Right Quickly to get Lucky.
Hoverboard switcher
Make sure it’s a Super Mysterizer day (If it’s not just time travel to a Monday).
Start the game.
Equip the board you have.
Find a Super Mysterizer (And it says Random Board).
Crash or wait 10 seconds.
This hoverboard will reappear.

Glitter Blaster
Glitter Blaster is a hoverboard released in . Like any other hoverboard, it protects the character from crashing for 30 seconds. When crashed, it will need to recharge for a few seconds before it can be used again.
Appearance
A neon-colored board with pink front, purple center, and blue rear that looks like a pair of tailpipes. It also has two wheels on the side, a real pipe underneath, and a purple sparkle design with gold outline in front. When equipped with Super Jump , the blue rear will have its yellow extensions, the wheels change colors from blue to gold, and the outline of the sparkle design in front will be three-dimensional and have eight points instead of four.
Trivia
It, Float Booster , and Feeling Beachy are the 24th, 25th, and 26th boards released in 2025 , after Hyper Viper , Lantern , Override , Fresh Love , Heartstopper , Dear Dart , Roarsome , Arara Board , Moongazer , Purple Spin , Cyan Note , Blue Riff , Eggscalibur , Bloomster , Edinburst , Guard Board , Trespasser , Mizu Dash , Zapline , Seven Seas , 13th Birthday , You Are Here , and Freebird .
It is the fifth board after Mosaic , Stallion , Astronave , and Fan-tastic .
It is Berta 's first board . Her second board is Feeling Beachy .
In , it costs .
In the Chinese Version, this board is 2026 board.

Glorgalax
Glorgalax is a limited character released in . He is the 196th character of the game.
Appearance
Default Outfit
Glorgalax is an 1367-year-old American alien from Planet Glärkaglobs. He wears a green spacesuit and in the helmet, he has a floating head that looks like a brain.
History
* An exact date was found where he appeared in, otherwise, the edition release date is assumed.
Trivia
He, Rudy Rascal and Ventura are the 21st, 22nd and 23rd surfers released in 2024 after Thunder , Skye , Azura , Dragon , Stella , Astra , Lucky , Meggan , Red Panda , Hamza , Faiza , Teabot , Finn , Electra , Hammy-Bee , Ballerina Tricky , Pixel Jake , Guard King , Riley , and Lily .
They are also 5th, 6th and 7th US surfers released in 2024 after Stella , Astra , Riley and Lily .
They are also 5th, 6th and 7th US surfers released in 2024 after Stella , Astra , Riley and Lily .
He is the third  surfer, the first being Rudy Rascal , the second being Ventura , the fourth being Holly , and the fifth being Frank Noir .
For unknown reasons, he didn't receive his 1st outfit in .
He is the fourth character to release with no expressions, others being Hali (who was fixed in 3.18.1), Super Runner Tricky and Dylan .
He is the 3rd character to wear spacesuit after Amy and Buzz .
He is named Glorgalax in the game, but in the trailer, his name is Glorglax. This is likely a typo.
He is the 4th surfer started with G after Gingerbot , George , and Guard King .
He and Rudy Rascal are 8th and 9th male surfers released in 2024 after Thunder , Dragon , Lucky , Hamza , Finn , Pixel Jake and Guard King .
Glarx 3000 is his board .
He and Ventura has same animations with Carlos and Buzz . They were the 14th and 15th surfers to reuse animations after Frankette , J Balvin , Vivienne , Captain Flash , Clockwork Johnny , Thunder , Azura , Astra , Lucky , Red Panda , Faiza , Electra and Riley .
He is the second surfer to reuse Buzz 's animation after Electra .
Unlike Electra , he uses all of Buzz 's animations.

Unlike Electra , he uses all of Buzz 's animations.
He is one of the only adults in the game, teaming up with J Balvin , Saquon , Patrick , Odell , Tom , Lamar , Dak , Guard , and Demi Lovato .
He is also the ninth adult male in the game, the first being Guard , the second being Saquon , the third being Patrick , the fourth being Odell , the fifth being Tom , the sixth being Lamar , the seventh being Dak , and the eighth being J Balvin .
Not counting collaborations, Glorgalax is the first and so far only the playable character that is an adult.
He is also the ninth adult male in the game, the first being Guard , the second being Saquon , the third being Patrick , the fourth being Odell , the fifth being Tom , the sixth being Lamar , the seventh being Dak , and the eighth being J Balvin .
Not counting collaborations, Glorgalax is the first and so far only the playable character that is an adult.
He is the 3rd alien surfer in the game after Yutani and Alba and the first male alien.
He is the 4th character to have a floating head, 1st being Tagbot , 2nd being Rabbot , and 3rd being Frankette .
He is the first and currently only surfer to have a zodiac sign that doesn't exist according to Western Astrology.
This makes sense because he's from Planet Glarkaglobs and they probably don't have zodiac constellations from Earth.

He's the first character to speak alien language, as shown in a UFO day post on X.
He is the oldest surfer in 2024 .
At the age of 1367 years old, he's the 2nd oldest character, surpassing Tom and J Balvin , the oldest being Vittorio (2316 years old).
He is the first surfer who is both over 100 years old and over 1000 years old, the second being Vittorio .
He is the third character to be from a different planet, others being Captain Flash and Clockwork Johnny .

Gobble Trouble
Gobble Trouble is a hoverboard released in . Like any other hoverboard, it protects the character from crashing for 30 seconds. When crashed, it will need to recharge for a few seconds before it can be used again.
Appearance
A brown hoverboard that has an appearance of a turkey . Equipping Smooth Drift will expose its wings (gliders) on its sides, while Super Speed will add blue feathers on its tail.
Trivia
It and Pie Express are the 48th and 49th boards released in 2025 , after Hyper Viper , Lantern , Override , Fresh Love , Heartstopper , Dear Dart , Roarsome , Arara Board , Moongazer , Purple Spin , Cyan Note , Blue Riff , Eggscalibur , Bloomster , Edinburst , Guard Board , Trespasser , Mizu Dash , Zapline , Seven Seas , 13th Birthday , You Are Here , Freebird , Glitter Blaster , Float-Booster , Feeling Beachy , Street Style , Roll & Race , Midsummer , Business Time , Rabbit Racer , Circuit Bunny , E-Racer , Brainstormer , Principal's Nightmare , The De-lyre-ious , Moon Biter , 8 Ball , Piece Of Cake , Finish Line , Motor Mania , Fiesta , Shin Supreme , Galactic Peel , Charmer , Bias Boom , and Four-leaf Flux .

It is Mr. Gobbles 's board .

Golden Guardian
Golden Guardian is a character released in . He is the 280th character in the game and the 18th surfer of 2026 .
Appearance
Default Outfit
Golden Guardian is a 14-year-old Indonesian teenage boy from who wears an outfit inspired by the Lion dance . His outfit features a prominent lion headpiece, adorned with bright orange, yellow, and white accents. He wears a matching yellow jacket with orange trim, chunky yellow and black sneakers and below, he has black shorts with striking yellow and orange geometric patterns.
Trivia
He and Lestari are the 18th, and 19th surfers released in 2026 , after Frank Noir , Holly , Sean Snow , Mia , Rosalita , Lorcan , Horse , Vittorio , Enzo , Sprinkle , Bunny Betty , Tsuki Chan , Kaito , Toaxx , Ratak , Red , and Chuck .

He is currently the only male surfer.

Grand Juke
Grand Juke is a character released in . He is the 215th character in the game and 40th surfer of 2024 .
Appearance
Default Outfit
Grand Juke is a 15-year-old Austrian teenage boy from . He wears a brown, green and yellow nutcracker hat with a red flower, he has black hair with a star-shaped piercing in his left ear, wears a red, yellow and light red nutcracker costume, green pants with stripes yellow and red shoes.

Great White
Great White is a non-limited hoverboard that protects you from crashing for 30 seconds. When crashed, the board will explode and recharge for a few seconds before it can be used again. It can be unlocked by purchasing it with 20,000. It was launched during the update.
During the update, it received a new board upgrade, called Speed Up (now Super Speed) which costs 50.
During the update, it received a new board upgrade, called Smooth Drift which costs 60.
Appearance
This hoverboard has the shape of a great white shark . Equipping the Super Speed upgrade adds swim goggles and a propeller to the hoverboard. The Smooth Drift upgrade makes the fins of the shark bigger.
Trivia
This is the only hoverboard to resemble a shark.
Its Smooth Drift upgrade was the most expensive board upgrade in the game as of the update.
This board uses the same surfing animation as the surfboard hoverboards , most likely because it has a similar shape to them and sharks live in the water.
In , it could be purchased for 80 or upgraded with Super Speed and Smooth Drift along with Kim and her Dive Outfit for .
In , it could be purchased for its original price or .
In , it could be purchased for its original price or 150 with Kim and her Dive Outfit.
It is the first fish styled hoverboard , the second being Ray , the third being Big Blue , the fourth being Carp Diem , the fifth being Viperfish and the sixth being Jamanta .
Brody and Kim most likely use this board.
The board appears on the map, but it did not return for a different cost and was not used in any bundle .
It has the same abilities as Scarab , Aero , Jak , Tea Timer , Arrow , Guard Board , Float-Booster , and Fiesta .
In the Chinese Version, it's called Great White Shark (大白鲨) .

Groovy
Groovy is the thirty-fifth limited  hoverboard in Subway Surfers and it was released with . Like any other hoverboard, it protects you from crashing for 30 seconds. When crashed, the hoverboard will explode and will need to recharge for a few seconds before being used again. Like most of the others limited hoverboards, it costs 50,000.
During the update, a new upgrade, called Flower Trail , was released to the Groovy hoverboard. It costs 30.
Appearance
It takes the shape of a white hoverboard with rainbow patterns painted on it, on top of the pattern is the peace sign with pink, blue, and yellow flowers.
Trivia
Groovy is the third limited board to get an upgrade the first is Jingles , the second is Phantom and the fourth is Old Dusty .
It is the first board, the second being Pixel Heart , the third being Trickster , the fourth being Rock n' Riley , the fifth being Laser Flip , and the sixth being Sunny Sailor .
Its shape were identical to Danger Dasher , a Rivals board. The only differences between the two boards is the latter had shorter length, bars on sides and white-red arrows on the middle. It would later being the basis shape of the remaining group's boards ( Future Wave , Rave Rider and Sharpeed ).

Guard
The Guard (whose real name is Ted Lutz ) is the main antagonist of Subway Surfers . At the beginning of every run, he and his dog will look for trespassers around the subway.
Whenever he catches a character spraying graffiti on one of the trains (vandalizing), he will chase them down the tracks until that character hits an obstacle.
If the character has only slightly bumped once into an obstacle , the guard will appear on the screen, gaining on them and will yell "Halt!" ; if the character crashes into an obstacle or bumps twice into an obstacle or when he is present in the screen, they will be caught by the inspector, ending their run unless the player uses s or watches an ad to continue.
Appearance
The Guard appears to be a middle aged overweight train inspector. He wears an olive green patrol jacket and a hat the same color. He also wears dark brown khakis with a visible black belt black shoes, and also has a brown mustache. His eyes are not seen open at all (due to his big hat). Throughout the holiday and world tour editions, he would receive different outfits.

Trivia
It is possible for the Guard to be hit by a train. After bumping into an obstacle, run into a speeding train and he will collide with it, along with his dog.
Sometimes, he, and/or his dog will run in place due to an animation bug.
Sometimes, he, and/or his dog will run in place due to an animation bug.
Strangely, when getting caught, the Guard will land at the character from the air. Something similar happens when the character "bumps" on the side after they either finished the Jetpack or the Pogo Stick .
No matter how long players run, the Guard will always chase them until the end.
He is the only character in the game that is unplayable (excluding his dog).

Despite his weight, he is extremely fast.
He has the most outfits in the game.

Guard Board
Guard Board is a hoverboard released in . Like any other hoverboard, it protects the character from crashing for 30 seconds. When crashed, it will need to recharge for a few seconds before it can be used again.
Appearance
It takes the appearance of the Guard in a cardboard.
Trivia
This board, along with Eggscalibur , Bloomster , and Edinburst are the 13th, 14th, 15th, and 16th boards released in 2025 , after Hyper Viper , Lantern , Override , Fresh Love , Heartstopper , Dear Dart , Roarsome , Arara Board , Moongazer , Purple Spin , Cyan Note , and Blue Riff .
This is the second board that resembles a cardboard cutout, the first being Jak .
This is the second hoverboard that has no changes when selecting an upgrade, the others being Jak and the hoverboards introduced in afterwards (same with exclusive hoverboards in the Chinese Version).
Its name may be a play on "cardboard," as it is made of the material.
In the Chinese Version, this board is 2025 board, and its name is Paper Security (纸片保安) .
