Guard King
Guard King is a limited character released in . He is the the 193rd character in the game. He can be unlocked in the Season Hunt for 400.
Appearance
Guard King is basically King , but he is now dressed up as The Guard . He wears an Olive Green patrol uniform, and a hat with the same color and with a yellow badge. He also wears a green tie, dark brown pants, black belt with a flashlight and black boots. He also wears a fake moustache on his face, glued on with some tapes. He has a picture of the dog on the back of his uniform.
History
* An exact date was found where he appeared in, otherwise, the edition release date is assumed.
Trivia
He, Hammy-Bee , Ballerina Tricky and Pixel Jake are the 15th, 16th, 17th and 18th surfers released in 2024 after Thunder , Skye , Azura , Dragon , Stella , Astra , Lucky , Meggan , Red Panda , Hamza , Faiza , Teabot , Finn , and Electra .
He's the third surfer to use the word "King" in the name, the first being King and the second being The Burger King .
He and Pixel Jake are the sixth and seventh male surfers released in 2024 after Thunder , Dragon , Lucky , Hamza , and Finn .
Guard King is the 21st surfer after Jake , Tricky , Fresh , Spike , Yutani , Frank , Ella , King , Lucy , Ninja , Tagbot , Tasha , Zoe , Brody , Prince K , Zombie Jake , Elf Tricky , Hammy-Bee , Pixel Jake , and Ballerina Tricky .
Guard King is the third surfer starting with the letter G after Gingerbot and George .
He is the fourth confirmed child surfer in the game, the first being King , the second being Clementine , and the third being Teabot .
Unlike Teabot , he is a human.
Unlike Teabot , he is a human.
He is the first and currently only special birthday surfer for King .
His version in his promo picture has a different design than in game. For example, he lacks ear detail, nostrils, an eyelid shine, and his design doesn’t have much shading. His skin is oddly darker too. In the game though, his colors are more saturated, his clothes have more detail, and he has ear detail, nostrils, an eyelid shine darker hair that is more like his original version. His skin matches more towards his original version too.

Hali
Hali is a limited character released in the update. She is the 167th character in the game and the 3rd Rival character in the game, being one of the 4 Rivals and Fresh ’s rival.
Appearance
Default Outfit
Hali is a 16-year-old dark-skinned American teenage girl and DJ from . She has hazel eyes and black hair with the tips being pink and two strands tied in a yellow ribbon, there is a coral flower in the front of her hair, and she wears purple headphones with the Rivals logo. She has a piercing on her right eyebrow and a heart on her cheek. On her right hand she has one bracelet pink and the other light green, on the left a raspberry ribbon. She wears a long purple t-shirt with pastel yellow flowers and dark blue pants, black with pink ribbon bumbag, long lavender socks and black and white sneakers, with salmon laces on her right and chartreuse laces on her left.
Gummy Bear Outfit
Released in , Hali wears a hot pink onesie with violet hearts stitched on both of its knee areas. She also has a violet key necklace, as well as a pair of white shoes and headphones with light green accents. Her hairstyle are heart-shaped spacebuns with seemingly violet pigtails on the back. A pink heart sticker is located in her right cheek, a light green bracelet on her left hand, and she still has her gold right eyebrow piercing.

Hammer
Hammer is a limited hoverboard released in update. Like any other hoverboard, it protects you from crashing for 30 seconds. When crashed, it will explode and recharge for a few seconds before it can be used again. This board costs 50,000, like most of others limited hoverboards. When landing, thunders are shown as visual effects.
Appearance
It has the appearance of a golden hammer.
Trivia
For unknown reasons, Hammer did not make a reappearance on .
This is first board. The second being Viking , the third being Super Surfer , the fourth being Danger Dasher , the fifth being You Are Here , the sixth being Freebird , the seventh being Seven Seas , the eighth being Sewer Surfer , and the ninth being Rat Trap .
It's Freya 's second board . Her first and third boards are 8th Birthday and Viking .
In , it costs 9.000.
For unknown reasons, this board never made a single reappearance in , even though they were both birthday items, neither did Viking .
This board was not used in 2024 for unknown reasons.
In and , it came back in the . The replacement is Danger Dasher .
In and , it came back in the for those who already had Freebird .

Hammy-Bee
Hammy-Bee is a limited character released on the 12th anniversary of Subway Surfers in , the gamer themed character was the winner of the character drawing contest made by Sarah Bucksey (AKA @ghostdog.s ). He is the 190th character of the game. She can be unlocked on stage 5 of in .
Appearance
Hammy-Bee is a 19-year-old Brazilian young adult/teenager from . They are a gender-fluid gamer from Salvador, Brazil who uses any pronouns. They wear a white T-shirt with a pink cat game controller print, gray sweatpants with white stripes on the sides and hamburger slippers. Hammy Bee has blue dyed hair and wears pink headphones with a microphone. She also wears blue-and-blue virtual reality glasses with pink kitty ears. They also have blue eyes which can only be seen in some official images and animations.

Hamza
Hamza is a limited character released in . He is the 185th character of the game.
Appearance
Hamza is a 14-year-old Moroccan teenage boy from . He has dark-brown bangs covering his eyes, similar to Yuto . His eyes were slightly visible beneath it. Hamza wears a Moroccan straw hat and a red robe with white sleeves, as well as black arm-gloves. He also wears a brown sash with a rhaita , a picnic mat sleeved into his shirt and black long-shorts, plus white sneakers with neon-green leather.

Harumi
Harumi can be unlocked by purchasing with 100,000, and was launched as a limited character in . She was also the seventh limited character in Subway Surfers , and the fifth limited character in the World Tour series. Both of her outfits can be purchased for  75 each.
Appearance
Default Outfit
Harumi is a Japanese teenage highschool girl from who wears a school dress with blue and white stripe details, striped pink tights, a red bow, has two midnight blue ponytails tied with pink bands and has her hair with bangs at the front, a navy-blue pleated skirt, brown-black loafers, and brown eyes.
Meow Outfit
Launched in , her first outfit is the Meow outfit. Her face is painted to resemble a cat, with whiskers and a nose. Her uniform changes to black, but with the white stripe details remaining the same. She is wearing 2 armbands of the same color as her school uniform, with a pink bow each. Her tights change to blue, and her red bow is replaced by a bigger pink bow, with a pink choker with a silver bell in the center, resembling a cat's collar. She wears an azure wig stylized in a short bob with bangs as well as some pink cat ears.
Fury Outfit
Launched in , her second outfit is the Fury Outfit. She wears a white wig in a short bob. She wears a black mask and dress, a red vest, and high black boots over red leggings.
History
* An exact date was found where she appeared in, otherwise, the edition release date is assumed.
Flash Deals
She had appeared in some updates from 2022-2023 costing 95,000. From mid-2023 (presumably ) onward, she was no longer in the flash deals.
Trivia
Harumi is the first female limited character that received her outfit after her re-release.
Harumi is the first surfer, with the 2nd being Akira the 3rd being Yuto , the 4th being Tsuki-Chan , and the 5th being Kaito .
Harumi is the first female  surfer, with the 2nd being Tsuki-Chan .
Harumi is the first female  surfer, with the 2nd being Tsuki-Chan .
She is the second Japanese character. The first being Yutani (half American), the third being Akira , the fourth being Yuto , the fifth being Oni Hime , and the sixth being Saru .
Kitty and Cherry are her boards .
Her school dress is known as a Seifuku, which is the school uniform several Japanese students wear.
Her Meow Outfit is a reference to Cosplay , a hobby practiced often in Japan .
In the Chinese version , her name is Shallow (浅浅) and she's non-limited.
Originally, in the Chinese Version, she was released first time in with completely different clothes (for celebrating the Lunar New Year). However, after the original Harumi was released in , the old Chinese Version of her turned into a Variant.

Hasina
Hasina is a limited character from . Her 1st outfit, the Championship Outfit can be bought for 300 in , now 100.
In , she got her 2nd outfit, the Holiday Outfit, which can be bought for Tier 30 in , now 150.
Appearance
Default Outfit
Hasina is an Egyptian teenage girl from she wears a blue long sleeved turtle-neck shirt with a short orange and blue jacket over it. She also has jewels over her neck and and right arm. blue sweatpants with orange and white sneakers with cyan laces on them. She has golden eyes and if you look close enough she has a nose piercing. Her hijab is also blue with a lighter shade on the upper half, with an orange headscarf under the blue hijab. She also holds a soccer ball. She also wears red lipstick with black eye-shadow.
Championship Outfit
Launched in , she wears a soccer uniform and most of her color pallet including her hijab has switched to maroon and red colors. Her makeup remains the same and she wears blue and pink cleats with long black socks. The soccer ball she holds is now the default color for a regular soccer ball.
Holiday Outfit
Launched in , she wears a light blue jacket and a white undershirt with with a golden and red necklace. Her hijab is wider and blue, her headscarf becomes light blue like her jacket, she also wears red sunglasses on her head. She wears red pants with blue patterns in the bottom of them, she wears brown sandals. Her nose piercing remains the same. In her animation instead of holding a soccer ball, she holds a beach ball.
History
* An exact date was found where she appeared in, otherwise, the edition release date is assumed.
Trivia
Hasina is the 1st character released in 2022 .
Hasina is the second surfer after Jasmine .
Hasina is the first Hijabi girl character to be in Subway Surfers .
Hasina is a Muslim.
After Lucy , Amira , Aina , and Callum , she's the fifth character to have a nose piercing in their default outfits.
She’s the third football/soccer player character after Roberto and Edison
Unlike the other two, she is a girl.

Headstart
Headstart (previously known as Mega Headstart ) is the upgraded version of the old Headstart power-up. The power-up will let the player zoom through the sky a tad longer than the normal headstart available on early editions of the game . Players can buy them at the shop for 2,000.
Trivia
It used to be able to be used to perform a glitch known as "Backward Running".
The Headstart is a prize from the Mystery Box and the Super Mystery Box .
It can also be obtained from the Weekly Hunt and Season Hunt .
It can also be obtained from the Weekly Hunt and Season Hunt .
The Headstart, the Score Booster , and the old Headstart are the only power-ups in the game that can be used at the start of the game just by tapping them once.
The hoverboard is also usable at the start of the game but requires the player to tap on the screen twice.
The hoverboard is also usable at the start of the game but requires the player to tap on the screen twice.
Unlike the Jetpack , using it to zoom through the sky won't let the players collect any coins .
Their character's running speed will also be maintained after landing.
Their character's running speed will also be maintained after landing.
The Headstart icon has 3 arrows while the old Headstart icon had 2 arrows.
changed the appearance of the Mega Headstart. It also allowed players to use it 3 times.
Using it along with the Score Booster can complete missions such as Coin Counter, etc.
It is the only way to get power-ups without completing the Word Hunt .
In 3.0.1, it was updated to emit red and yellow smoke with a new appearance of a yellow and red Jetpack .
It and the Jetpack are the only power-ups to change from the appearance or a part of the item.
Sometimes there will be an event where you can get 20 headstarts by watching 10 ads.
Like the Jetpack , if you equip a Super Speed hoverboard just as you're about to equip a headstart, you will go faster.
In , the colors and smokes of both Jetpack and Headstart have changed (the realistic smoke emitted from the jetpacks became a 2D animation).

Headstart 1000
Headstart 1000 was released in , however Headstart 1000 was replaced by the normal Headstart in .
Usage
Each Headstart 1000 costed 2,000. Players can use one to skip ahead 1000 meters at the beginning of a run.
History
The Headstart 1000 was available with Subway Surfers's softlaunch.
On September 8st, 2014 during , the Headstart 1000 was removed and replaced with the Headstart .
Trivia
If the player had any Headstart 250 before the update, they would be upgraded to Headstart 1000 when the player updates to .
Navigation

Headstart 250
Headstart 250 was a removed power-up that used to be available until the update. This power-up would let the player zoom through the sky for about thirty seconds in the beginning of the game, avoiding everything underneath, including obstacles .
Usage
Each headstart costed 400 to use and players could use up to 3 to skip ahead and start running at the higher speed. At the end, there are also three power-ups, one on each lane, which are Coin Magnet , 2X Multiplier and Super Sneakers , let players start with a power-up too.
History
The Headstart was available with Subway Surfers' softlaunch.
On 31st January, 2013 , During the the regular Headstart was removed and was replaced with the Score Booster .
Trivia
Unlike the Jetpack , coins will not spawn in the sky.
Jetpack and Pogo Stick don't spawn at the end, because the player is already in the sky.
Their character's running speed will also be maintained after landing.
Before the update, players could get these from Super Mystery Boxes or the Mystery Box as a prize, or buy them for 400 .
Its slot on their prizes screen was replaced by the Score Booster after the Rio update.
Its slot on their prizes screen was replaced by the Score Booster after the Rio update.
Players couldn't upgrade these to the Mega Headstart from the Old Headstart.
The Headstart icon had 2 arrows while the Mega Headstart icon has 3.
They can also combine the Headstart with the 2X Multiplier for a speed boost.
As of 2013 , it is the only power-up to be permanently removed from the game.

Heartstopper
Heartstopper is a hoverboard released in . Like any other hoverboard, it protects the character from crashing for 30 seconds. When crashed, it will need to recharge for a few seconds before it can be used again.
Appearance
Is a sled with a playful and romantic design. Its main color is a vibrant pink, and it features hearts of different sizes and colors as decoration. There's a small hint of lime green near the top, adding a contrast to the predominantly pink palette.
Trivia
It, Fresh Love , and Dear Dart are the fourth, fifth, and sixth boards released in 2025 , after Hyper Viper , Lantern , and Override .
It is the fifth board, the first being Tiki , the second being Ukulele , the third being Rave Rider , and the fourth being Fresh Love .
It is Kaleo 's first board . His second board is Dear Dart .
This is the ninth board to have a default ability with upgrades, the first being Street Grace , the second being Alarm On , the third being Glarx 3000 , the fourth being Heavy Metal , the fifth, being Arrow , the sixth being Sci-Fly , the seventh being Cozy Cruiser , and the eighth being Jingle Dingle .
This is the sixth board to have 3 abilities, but it still has 2 upgrades, the first being Alarm On , the second being Heavy Metal , the third being Sci-Fly , the fourth being Cozy Cruiser , and the fifth being Jingle Dingle .
It has the same abilities as Alarm On , Sci-Fly , and Jingle Dingle .
In , it costs in Offer Trails .
In the Chinese Version, this board is (Shenzhen 2025) board and called Heartbeat (砰然心动) and it has Smooth Drift Upgrade only.

Heavy Metal
Heavy Metal is a hoverboard released in . It can be unlocked with 16,000. Its first upgrade, Super Speed , costs 60, while its second upgrade, Stay Low , costs 60. Like any other hoverboard, it protects your character from any obstacles for 30 seconds. When crashed, it will explode and need a few seconds to recharge before it can be used again. Super Jump is its default ability.
Appearance
It is a black, white and orange metal board with gray edges and two exhaust pipes. On the front, it is shaped like weights. The top part is red while the bottom part is blue.
Trivia
It, Sporty Summer , Arrow and Champ are the 29th, 30th, 31st and 32nd boards released in 2024 after Skyrocket , Electro Shock , Bada-Bomb , Confetti Crush , Red Velvet , Roaring Heart , Lunar Scroll , Astro Tune , Interstellar , Shamrock Shebang , Megga Bite , Fast and Festive , Radiant Rider , Jak , Tea Timer , Deli-Vroom , Yellow Sub , Jelly Board , Koinobori , Mayo Mania , 12th Birthday , Pixel Hoverboard , Street Grace , Alarm On , Rock n' Riley , Sunny Sailor , Laser Flip , Glarx 3000 , Standing Ovation , and Risky Ride .
It is the sixth board, after Rose , Sweetheart , Paint Palette , Parasol , and Sporty Summer .
It is Hélène 's board.
It is the fourth board to have a default ability with upgrades, the first being Street Grace , the second being Alarm On and the third being Glarx 3000 .
This is the second board to have 3 abilities, but it still has 2 upgrades, the first being Alarm On .
It is the tenth board in 2024 to cost , after Tea Timer , Deli-Vroom , Jelly Board , Yellow Sub , Pixel Hoverboard , Street Grace , Rock n' Riley , Sunny Sailor , and Standing Ovation .
This is the 7th board of 2024 that has a default ability, the 1st being Fast and Festive , the 2nd being Koinobori , the 3rd being Alarm On , the 4th being Street Grace , the 5th being Standing Ovation , the 6th being Glarx 3000 , the 8th being Arrow , the 9th being Chop-Chop Board , the 10th being Sci-Fly , the 11th being Skeletuna , the 12th being Pathfinder , the 13th being Cozy Cruiser , the 14th being Suitcase Saga , the 15th being Jingle Dingle , and the 16th being Shiny Surprise .
It has the same abilities as Cozy Cruiser .
It is not the only the board that its name means a music genre . Others (or some of others) are Punk and Jazz .

Heirloom
Heirloom is the third episode of Subway Surfers: The Animated Series .
Synopsis
It’s the day of Tricky ’s big ballet recital, but all she wants to do is meet up with her friends to skate. Tricky’s secret double life is nearly exposed, though, when her snooty mother insists she wears the family heirloom to impress the recital judge.

Henry
Henry is a character released during . He is the 241st character in the game and the 26th surfer of 2025 .
Appearance
Default Outfit
Henry is a 15-year-old British teenage boy who studies at the Castle Academy of Science on . He notably wears an all-teal attire; from his teal undercut, white polo shirt with yellow-accented teal vest, teal grid pants, and a pair of white and teal sneakers.
Sporty Sunday Outfit
Also released in , Henry now wears a more casual sporting outfit, possibly worn during a cricket match. He has an amber-teal backwards cap to pair with his white high-neck shirt, and yellow and green argyle sweater vest. This outfit is finished off with a pair of yellow-striped green knee socks and green sneakers.
History

Holi
Holi is a holiday that is celebrated in the Subway Surfers World Tour updates on March .
Main article: Wikipedia
Holi is a major Hindu festival celebrated as the Festival of Colors, Love, and Spring. It celebrates the eternal and divine love of the deities Radha and Krishna. Additionally, the day signifies the triumph of good over evil, as it commemorates the victory of Vishnu as Narasimha over Hiranyakashipu. Holi originated and is predominantly celebrated in the Indian subcontinent, but has also spread to other regions of Asia and parts of the Western world through the Indian diaspora.
Holi also celebrates the arrival of spring in India, the end of winter, and the blossoming of love. It is also an invocation for a good spring harvest season. It lasts for a night and a day, starting on the evening of the Purnima (full moon day) falling on the Hindu calendar month of Phalguna, which falls around the middle of March in the Gregorian calendar.
Holi special World Tour editions
Trivia
is currently the only Holi update to be released in June .
is currently the only update where Holi update doesn't take place in as the main update.

Holly
Holly is a character released in . She is the 264th character in the game and the 2nd surfer of 2026 .
Appearance
Default Outfit
Holly is a 12-year-old Black American girl from who has a messy bun, gray watch, and pink spherical earrings. She wears a purple polo blouse and denim shorts paired with gray sneakers with neon yellow accents on the sides.
Blobbuster Outfit
Launched in , Holly now wears a Ghostbusters -inspired costume: a full dark gray boilersuit with goggles, long orange gloves, and a pair of platform boots that has green blob on both soles. She also has a large backpack (that could capture blobs, just like in the aforementioned movie) and a single piercing on her left ear.
Trivia
She and Frank Noir are the first two surfers released in 2026 .
She is the first female surfer of 2026 .
She is the first female surfer of 2026 .
She is the fifth surfer, after Rudy Rascal , Ventura , Glorgalax , and Frank Noir .
Her name is a shortened term of the word " HOLLYWOOD ", referring to the destination where she came from.
Her Blobbuster Outfit refers to the movie Ghostbusters .
Just like in Ghostbusters where the main characters hunt the ghosts, this indicates that Holly hunts creatures made of blob (like Bob The Blob ).
Just like in Ghostbusters where the main characters hunt the ghosts, this indicates that Holly hunts creatures made of blob (like Bob The Blob ).

Home Screens
The Home Screen is what every player sees after loading up the game. On the home screen until the player taps the screen the player's selected character will spray the train while waving at the player or grabbing a extra spraycan from their bag, until the player taps on the screen where the character is caught and chased by the guard, starting the run. The home screen changes in most re-releases.
This page contains images of all the home screens.
Trivia
In , the animation was updated with the new blinking added and eye movement.
Some editions are missing the train rail (such as ) making it look as if your character's leg is floating in the air.

Horse
Horse is a character released in . She is the 268th character in the game and the 7th surfer of 2026 .
Appearance
Default Outfit
Horse is a 15-year-old Chinese teenage girl from who represents the Horse in the Chinese zodiac , known for her golden horse mask and red tang suit dress in golden accents. She has a high bubble ponytail with sidebangs, and a pair of long maroon stockings to match with her white puffy socks and brown sandals.
Trivia
She and Lorcan are the sixth and seventh surfers released in 2026 , after Frank Noir , Holly , Sean Snow , Mia , and Rosalita .
She is the fourth female 2026 surfer, after Holly , Mia , and Rosalita .
She is the fourth female 2026 surfer, after Holly , Mia , and Rosalita .
She is the seventh character of the 12-animal Chinese calendar. Those before this are Rat , Ox , Tiger , Rabbit , Dragon , and Snake .
She reuses Ninja 's animations.
She is the 51st surfer to reuse animations after Frankette , J Balvin , Vivienne , Captain Flash , Clockwork Johnny , Thunder , Azura , Astra , Lucky , Red Panda , Faiza , Electra , Riley , Glorgalax , Ventura , Leo , Ozzy , Billy Bean , Kedi , Ruhi , Pumpkin Pete , Leif , Demi Lovato , Kaleo , Rani , Finlay , Stevie , Berta , Costa , Rochelle Rebelle , Asher , White Rabbit , Peter , Henry , Tara , Sunny , Alma Brava , Mateo , Crewmate Jake , Crewmate Tricky , Crewmate Spike , Crewmate King , Crewmate Tasha , Crewmate Guard , Rosie , Ballerina Latticina , Holly , Sean Snow , Mia , and Rosalita .
She is also the first Chinese zodiac surfer to reuse animations from other surfer.
She is the 51st surfer to reuse animations after Frankette , J Balvin , Vivienne , Captain Flash , Clockwork Johnny , Thunder , Azura , Astra , Lucky , Red Panda , Faiza , Electra , Riley , Glorgalax , Ventura , Leo , Ozzy , Billy Bean , Kedi , Ruhi , Pumpkin Pete , Leif , Demi Lovato , Kaleo , Rani , Finlay , Stevie , Berta , Costa , Rochelle Rebelle , Asher , White Rabbit , Peter , Henry , Tara , Sunny , Alma Brava , Mateo , Crewmate Jake , Crewmate Tricky , Crewmate Spike , Crewmate King , Crewmate Tasha , Crewmate Guard , Rosie , Ballerina Latticina , Holly , Sean Snow , Mia , and Rosalita .
She is also the first Chinese zodiac surfer to reuse animations from other surfer.
She is the 11th surfer who is 15 years old, after Riley , Hélène , Snowy , Grand Juke , Kaleo , Gabriel , Rocky , Asher , Henry , and Mateo .

Hot Rod
Hot Rod is a non-limited hoverboard that was first introduced in . Its special power is to speed up, much like the Daredevil hoverboard. However, this board is not a special edition hoverboard.
Appearance
Its appearance is one of the most deluxe of all the other hoverboards. It resembles a red hot rod car (hence its name) with an engine, exhaust pipes, and a flame design on the front.
Trivia
This is the first board with a special ability to be introduced in the game after an update.
This hoverboard was able to be tried out for free for 24 hours in the edition, and also in the and updates.
Hot Rod was added to the game on May 30, 2013 with the update
It and Bouncer are currently the third most expensive boards, costing 280,000 each, with the second being Lowrider , costing 320,000 and Windglider costing 360,000.
It and Splash are only boards that can make the character vibes when surfing on. Street Grace , Cook-Express , Couch Surfer , Fear Tractor , Fall Speed , and Lantern are glitched in the hoverboard menu, not during gameplay.
In the Chinese Version, it's called Fanaticism (狂热) .
It is Spike ’s board according to the old Subway Surfers website

Hou
Hou  is a limited edition character from . He can be unlocked with  40.
His first outfit, the Archer Outfit, can be unlocked with 30. Now, it costs 75.
Appearance
Default Outfit
Hou is a Chinese teenage boy from (in the Chinese version). He has long pitch-black hair tied in a manbun. He wears traditional Chinese clothing that consists of a white robe over a dark mint green tunic with a cordovan sash and a red cincture belt across his waist and cordovan shoes.
Archer Outfit
Launched in / , he wears traditional Chinese armor with a pastel red scarf as an accessory.

Hourglass
Hourglass is an item used in Tag Time Attack (Formerly Timed Tag Team ), which adds 10 seconds to the timer.
Trivia
This power-up adds five seconds to the timer upon obtaining it in .
This power-up was added in 3.1.1.
The player must keep collecting this power-up while playing Tag Time Attack to add more time to the timer. The run will end if the 1 minute timer runs out.
From onward, it adds 10 seconds.
This is the first power-up that was added in the 3.0 version of the game.
So far its the only power-up that you can only get on one event ( Tag Time Attack ).

Navigation

Hoverboard
Hoverboard is the default hoverboard in the game which is available by default when playing the game for the first time. Like any other hoverboard, it protects you from crashing for 30 seconds. When crashed, it will explode and needs to recharge for a few seconds before it can be used again. It was introduced during the release of the game (in ).
Appearance
The default hoverboard is a red striped skateboard with a golden border around it. On the bottom is a green field with white neon strips.
Trivia
It is the first free hoverboard in the game, the others being Starboard , The Bir th day bo ar ds , and Wrapped .
It is Jake ’s board.

Navigation

Hoverboard Challenge
Hoverboard Challenge is a challenge that where you have to be on a board to get points. It was added in . This is the 2nd new game mode of 2023 after Mystery Hurdles . It became available in update 3.8.0 ( ). In order to collect points, you need to surf on the selected board. This game mode was removed after  for unknown reasons.
Releases
How To Play
Points are only earned while on hoverboards.
All points are added up for your total score.
Boards need to cooldown every run.
Switch hoverboards to keep on going and get bigger rewards!
Trivia
This is the only game mode that has been removed and hasn't returned until now for unknown reasons.

Hoverboard Reappearances
Sometimes, old expired  hoverboards  reappear in the  game , like Rose , Cruiser etc. They can be bought in 24 hours for real money. The latest hoverboard that reappeared was Beelzebook which was on 30 December 2020 .
History
Hoverboard Reappearances were added to the game on 5/29/2014 with the with the first reappeared board, Cherry .

Hoverboard Tryouts
Sometimes during an edition, hoverboards could be tried out for 24 hours. These hoverboards are the ones that have special powers. They include Daredevil , Bouncer , Lowrider , and Hot Rod . For copyright and many other unknown reasons, Kiloo removed the option of tryouts.
Trivia
Hoverboard Tryouts were introduced in the edition with the first tried-out board, Daredevil .
Bouncer was first tried out in the edition.
Lowrider was first tried out in the edition.
Hot Rod was first tried out in the edition.
Windglider was first tried out in the edition.
Teleporter was first tried out in the edition.
Gallery

Hoverboards
The hoverboard is an item in Subway Surfers that protects the player from crashing for 30 seconds. When crashed, the hoverboard explodes and clear the area where you crashed, and then needs to recharge for 5 seconds before being used again. Players can activate a hoverboard by double tapping on the screen. Each hoverboard has their very own unique design (of course some hoverboards have the same/similar shape, like  Sweetheart  -  Snow Cloud , etc.).
The hoverboards in Subway Surfers can have upgrades . Some hoverboards have no upgrades, while others can have one or two upgrades which add special powers and abilities like Super Speed , Smooth Drift , Double Jump , etc. Some hoverboards even have upgrades as a default ability.
During each edition, at least 1 new hoverboard is added to the game (except ). Here is a list of all the current hoverboards and their costs (strikethrough = removed boards):
Show/Hide Hoverboard List
Board Upgrades
Trivia
If you surf trains with a hoverboard, your character will automatically "grind" on the top of the train, like (most) skaters do on top of trains.
If a  Jetpack is picked up while riding a hoverboard, the time limit for the hoverboard will stop until the Jetpack's time limit has worn out, just like the Super Sneakers .
Most World Tour editions include, at least a new special board. However, and some re-released editions didn't release a new board (but instead used an already existing board as the main hoverboard of the update).
is the only edition to not include a new special hoverboard in its first release.
is the only edition to not include a new special hoverboard in its first release.
All World Tour boards are limited in the stores, like all limited characters.
When you switch lanes, jump or roll, you will have different ways to perform these actions during the use of a hoverboard. It is a similar trait to the way your character jumps normally.
After the hoverboard wears out (or explodes), its time limit will flash as cooltime.
When was released, the sound effect of hoverboards’ landing on trains was removed. In , it was added back.
Hoverboards are the cheapest thing to unlock with coins, costing 300 coins to get another hoverboard (not meaning the types of hoverboards that can be unlocked in the game).
During a short period in , hoverboards cost 900 instead of 300.
During a short period in , hoverboards cost 900 instead of 300.
Roarsome , Alarm On , Heartstopper , Sci-Fly and Heavy Metal are the most powerful boards in the game, each with four powers plus the trail that comes with them.
The only thing that needs to be unlocked with boards is Jak .
Mean Green Machine has the most longest name out of all hoverboards. (16 characters long).

Hugo
Hugo is a limited character from . He can be purchased with ​​ 95,000, just like any other limited character. Both his first outfit, the Mountain Outfit, and second outfit, the Pirate Outfit can be bought for 75, respectively.
Appearance
Default Outfit
Hugo is a Swiss teenage boy from who has light skin, blonde hair and blue eyes. He wears a brown leather helmet with unique goggles, a sand blue T-shirt, a red puffy vest, brown shorts, teal socks, brown boots and a turquoise watch on his left arm.
Mountain Outfit
Launched in , he wears a black hat with an orange flower, a gray shirt with a black vest, brown shorts, gray long socks and black leather shoes.
Pirate Outfit
Launched in , he wears a typical steampunk-themed pirate costume. His wooden leg is a screwdriver, he has a mechanical arm similar to that of Monkbot and Sun , a hatchet of tools on his belt, and instead of an eye patch, he has a mechanical eye. He also has a robot parrot on his arm.

Hyper Viper
Hyper Viper is a hoverboard released in . Like any other hoverboard, it protects the character from crashing for 30 seconds. When crashed, it will need to recharge for a few seconds before it can be used again.
Appearance
It has the shape of a snake, predominantly in vibrant orange. Its body coils in a sinuous manner, emphasizing gentle curves and turns that create a dynamic sense of movement. The head is rounded, with a subtle suggestion of facial features, including a wide mouth and a single eye.
Trivia
Hyper Viper, Lantern , and Override are the first boards released in 2025 .
It is the second board, the first being Night Lute .

Hélène
Hélène is a limited character released in . She is the 199th character in the game.
Appearance
Hélène is a 15-year-old French teenage girl and weightlifter from . She has scruffy blonde hair with shaven streaks on the side. She has peircings on her eyebrow, ears, and nose. She wears a blue shirt with black sleeves and white and orange fire and blue shorts. She has white socks with blue stripes and red trainers with white laces.
History
* An exact date was found where they appeared in, otherwise, the edition release date is assumed.

I'll Always Win
I'll Always Win is a song in Subway Surfers sung by Saru . It was released in , on April 23rd, 2025 . It's available in the game's boombox as background music and also in music streaming services, like Spotify or Apple Music. The soundtrack ( I'll Always Win (Osaka) ) is based on this song, but it doesn't have lyrics, only vocalizing, and shorter (excluded 2nd couplet, immediately after 1st couplet goes 3rd couplet).

I-Scream
I-Scream (formerly Iscream ) is a limited hoverboard released in update.
Appearance
I-Scream is a pink ice cream-styled hoverboard that has been cut in half with the actual pink ice cream at the corner and also some sprinkles, those include blue, green, and purple sprinkles. The Sprinkles are scattered during the run while the hoverboard is activated.
Trivia
It is the fifth hoverboard released in 2023 after Viperfish , Fan-tastic , Ghastly Glider , and Carp Diem .
It is the second hoverboard after Punk .
It is the fifth food board, the first being Banana , the second Hotdog and the third Ginger Boom .

Appearance
Is a green snowboard with a white edge and green/red foot straps.

Invention
Invention is the sixth episode of Subway Surfers: The Animated Series .
Synopsis
While live-streaming her “maker” show, Yutani reveals her newest invention, a low-orbit weather machine. But when the satellite gets stuck on the rooftop launch pad, Yutani is forced to enlist her reluctant father to try and salvage the situation.

Izzy
Izzy  was launched as a limited character in  . He was the 24th limited character in  Subway Surfers , and the 22nd limited character in the World Tour series. He can be purchased with 100,000. Both his 1st outfit, the Aloha Outfit and 2nd outfit, the Laki Outfit can be purchased for 75, respectively.
Appearance
Default Outfit
Izzy is a Hawaiian teenage boy from who wears a hula skirt, leaf wristbands and a grass crown on his head. He has tribal marking on his body. He has almost no clothes, and behind the crown hides a black Mohawk, which is shown in the Aloha outfit.
Aloha Outfit
Launched in , he wears an aqua open shirt and red shorts with yellow designs on it. The markings on his body and face is removed, as well as his grass crown. Instead, a black mohawk is his hairstyle.
Laki Outfit
Launched in , his entire face is covered with a purple and blue tiki mask. A flower could be seen on the left side of the mask. He wears a burgundy dress and a ring on his left leg. His mohawk can still be seen.
Trivia
He is the first surfer, the second being Hali , the third being Valentina , and the fourth being Kaleo .
He is the first character to run barefooted, the second being Jay (Blue Outfit only), the third being Amira and the fourth being Zuri . He is barefoot in all his outfits.
Tiki and Ukulele are his boards .
He is the first limited character of 2016 .
He is the second newcomer of 2015 after Rex .
On March 11th 2015, he made a return, though unlike his original appearance he now costs $0.99.

J Balvin
J Balvin (José Álvaro Osorio Balvín) is a limited collaboration character released in . He is the 171st character in the game.
Appearance
J Balvin is a 41 year old Colombian man who is a rapper and singer from Medellin/ . His hair is dyed pastel green, while his eyebrows are brown and have incisions. His beard is also brown, and he has a piercing in his right ear. The appearance of his entire suit is emerald green and he has black shoes.
History
* An exact date was found where he appeared in, otherwise, the edition release date is assumed.
Trivia
He is 16th character released in 2023 after Rabbit , Soul , Tutti , Frutti , Spraybot , Catrine , Rain , Alfie , Bruno , Tainá , Yutani Harlequin Toad , Yuto , Hali , Thursday , Outatime Jake and Ji-Yeong
He is the eighth character based on a real-life person . Others being Saquon , Patrick , Odell , Tom , Lamar , Dak , and Super Runner Fernando .
He was accidentally revealed by SYBO before the update .
He is called Superstar Surfer instead of Seoul Surfer .
He is the second Superstar surfer in the game, the second being Demi Lovato .
Superstar is his board .
He has the same idle animation as Prince K , making him the second character to reuse an animation after Frankette .
J Balvin is the tenth character with a confirmed age (41) after Clementine , Catrine , Rain , Alfie , Bruno , Tainá , Yuto , Hali , and Thursday .
He is the 1st surfer who is 41 years old (making him the third oldest surfer with a known age in Subway Surfers , the second being Tom aged 48 and the first being Glorgalax aged 1367).
He's also the oldest surfer released in 2023 .
He is the 1st surfer who is 41 years old (making him the third oldest surfer with a known age in Subway Surfers , the second being Tom aged 48 and the first being Glorgalax aged 1367).
He's also the oldest surfer released in 2023 .
He is the second surfer of 2023 to be released costing , the first being Outatime Jake .
He is the sixth surfer with a zodiac sign, the first being Moira (Virgo ♍), the second being Tainá (Leo ♌), the third being Yuto (Libra ♎), the fourth being Hali (Libra ♎), and the fifth being Thursday (Libra ♎).
His birthday is May 7, 1985.
He is the first surfer whose zodiac sign is Taurus ♉.
He is the first surfer whose zodiac sign is Taurus ♉.
He is the seventh surfer with a known date of birth.
He is currently the only surfer from Colombia.
He is one of the only adults in the game, teaming up with Saquon , Patrick , Odell , Tom , Lamar , Dak , Glorgalax , Guard , and Demi Lovato .
He is also the eighth adult male in the game, the first being Guard , the second being Saquon , the third being Patrick , the fourth being Odell , the fifth being Tom , the sixth being Lamar , the seventh being Dak , and the ninth being Glorgalax .
He is also the eighth adult male in the game, the first being Guard , the second being Saquon , the third being Patrick , the fourth being Odell , the fifth being Tom , the sixth being Lamar , the seventh being Dak , and the ninth being Glorgalax .
He and Lucky both wear green making it their favorite color.
He is the ninth South American surfer in the game, the first being Carmen , the second being Edison , the third being Carlos , the fourth being Sofia , the fifth being Tankbot , the sixth being Super Runner Fernando , the seventh being Bruno , the eighth being Tainá , the eleventh being Hammy-Bee , the twelfth being Rebeca Roar , and the thirteenth being Gabriel .
He is also the third and final South American surfer released in 2023 after Bruno and Tainá .

Jack
Jack is a limited character from . He can be unlocked with 95,000. His first outfit, Dapper Outfit cost 30.
Appearance
Default Outfit
Jack is an American teenage light-skinned boy from with an alice blue button-up shirt that's tucked in with a red tie. He wears a red, yellow, and blue cap with "W" on it, which most likely stands for "Walmart", with brown shoes and blue rolled-up jeans with a brown belt.
Dapper Outfit
Launched in , Jack has shorter hair. He wears a blue and white striped button-up shirt, with an orange and pale yellow plaid suit overlapping it. He also wears a red tie (Same as the Original Outfit) , blue jeans, yellow shoes, and a watch. He also carries an apple in his hand.
History
* An exact date was found where he appeared in, otherwise, the edition release date is assumed.
Trivia
The "W" on his hat stands for Walmart .

In the Chinese version, his name is Locke (洛克) .
His Outfit is called the Suit Outfit in the Chinese Version of Subway Surfers.
He is currently the only surfer from .
He returns for Wild Wednesdays such as .
Jack's 3D Object Files show that his name should have been Sam, which is probably a reference to Walmart Founder Sam Walton, but the name was changed in the final version for unknown reasons.

His name was originally going to be Sam, but it was changed for unknown reasons.

Jackpot
The Jackpot is the rarest prize players can win from the Mystery Box at a 0.01% rate (or Super Jackpot from the Super Mystery Box at a 0.08% rate). Normally they'll win 100,000 , but during the Mega Jackpot event they can win 900,000 . As for Super Jackpots they'll win 300,000 , but during the Mega Jackpot event they can win 1,500,000 .

Jaewoo
Jaewoo is a character exclusive to Subway Surfers City . Despite previously being a Subway Pass exclusive character, he can be unlocked as a jackpot in the Super Boxes .
Appearance
Jaewoo is a korean boy with straight platinum blond hair and dark brown eyes. He wears red and black headphones, a red T-shirt with a white tiger print over a white long-sleeve shirt, and a gold chain with the letter "J”. He also has blue jeans, red, white and black sporty sneakers, and a golden radio attached to his belt.
Power-ups
K-Pop It
Get extra coins when a bubblegum pops.
G-Stripes
Chance of getting a bubblegum when picking a magnet.
K-Rismatic
Magnets pull in power-ups, coins sacks, and keys.
Trivia
Jaewoo is the 16th character in Subway Surfers City .
He is the 6th character exclusive to Subway Surfers City . With the first being Rosalita , second being Billy , third being Jay , fourth being Lilah and fifth being Zara .
He is the fourth korean character in the Subway Surfers franchise. With the first being Mina , second being Rin and the third being Ji-Yeong .
Unlike them, he is a boy.
Unlike them, he is a boy.
He appears to be a k-pop idol, being the second one in the Subway Surfers franchise after Ji-Yeong .
Jaewoo’s upgrade animation is reused from Tricky and Fresh . However, it’s most likely a placeholder.
He has 2 exclusive animations in game.
Both of them can be found in the menu : his intro and breathe animations.
Both of them can be found in the menu : his intro and breathe animations.
His power-ups are focused on Bubblegums and Magnets .
His hoverboard is G-Tiger .

Jake
Jacob "Jake" Bressler is the main character in Subway Surfers and one of the game's main mascots. He is unlocked by default when playing the game for the first time. His first outfit, the Dark Outfit, is free. His second outfit, the Star Outfit, costs 150.
Appearance
Default Outfit
Jake is a teenage boy with pale skin, brown hair, and brown eyes. He wears a light blue denim vest, a white hoodie sweatshirt with a red undershirt, a cap with a red brim and a white front panel with the words "Sub Surf" on it in the style of the old Subway Surfers logo, green and red shoes, and light blue jeans.
Dark Outfit
Jake's Dark Outfit was added in the update and can be unlocked for free. His jacket is navy blue, the hoodie is dark-grey with white stripes on the arms, and the brim of his cap is black. His shoes are black and red and he wears navy blue trousers and sunglasses, along with dark fingerless gloves.
Before , the white front panel on his cap was also black and the brim was not changed.
Star Outfit
Jake's Star Outfit was also introduced in the update and costs 150. He now wears golden headphones, a star chain necklace, and a wristwatch. His hoodie, trousers, and shoes are red and light brown, and the shoelaces and his cap's brim are yellow.
This outfit originally cost 30. Before , the shoelaces were orange and the cap's brim was not changed.
History
Jake was added with the soft launch of Subway Surfers on 24 May 2012 .
During the , two new outfits were added for him. They are called the Dark Outfit and Star Outfit.

Trivia
Jake and Tricky are the only characters to appear on the old version of the loading screen, and along with Fresh are the main characters of the game.
According to the Animated Series, he appears to be friends with Tricky , Fresh , and Yutani .
In the animated series , Jake has a single mom named Connie Bressler , so his father, Mr. Bressler remains unknown.
Jake and Tricky were the first characters in which outfits were implemented for.
In , he gets a new standing pose and new animations + a remake of one of his old animations.
His Dark Outfit is currently the only outfit in the game to be given out permanently for free.
In the Chinese Version, his Dark Outfit is not Free anymore.

In the Chinese Version, his Dark Outfit is not Free anymore.

Jake, Tricky , Fresh , Spike , Frank , Yutani , Boombot , Rin , Miss Maia , King , Dino and Tasha are the only characters in the game who have limited edition counterparts, Zombie Jake ( Halloween update), Elf Tricky ( Christmas update), Festive Fresh ( update), Festive Jake , Festive Tricky , Festive Spike , Festive Frank and Festive Yutani ( update), Pride Jake , Pride Tricky , Pride Fresh , Pride Spike , Pride Yutani , Pride Frank and Pridebot ( update), Spacebot ( update), Gingerbot ( update), Parkour Rin ( update), Super Runner Jake ( update), Pride Miss Maia and Super Runner Tricky ( ), Super Runner Fresh ( update), Super Runner Yutani ( update), Elf Jake , Elf Yutani and Elf Fresh ( update), Yutani Harlequin Toad ( update), Outatime Jake ( update), Pixel Jake , Ballerina Tricky and Guard King ( update), Dinorange ( update), Chicken Jake and Mallard Tricky ( update), 8 Ball Jake ( update), Crewmate Jake , Crewmate Tricky , Crewmate Spike , Crewmate King and Crewmate Tasha ( update), Frank Noir ( update).

In an teaser, he was in a book called "Jake and the Chocolate Factory".
He is the first Subway Surfers character in history with many more to follow.
Currently, Jake is the only character who is free. He's free once you begin the game.
Jake’s name was originally going to be "Slick", but was later changed. In older versions of the game (pre 2.0), there are still references to this name in the game's files and code.
Jake has the most remake characters with 6 in total.

Jake's Spray Can
Jake's Spray Can is a character token needed to unlock Jake 's Star Outfit. It can be obtained within the Token Box , Mystery Box , or Super Mystery Box .
Unlockable
Gallery

Jake (Subway Surfers City)
Jake is a revamped version of the Subway Surfers character Jake . He is unlocked by default in Subway Surfers City when playing the game for the first time.
Appearance
Jake is a teenage boy with pale skin, brown hair, and brown eyes. He wears a light-blue denim vest, a white hoodie sweatshirt with a red undershirt, a cap with a red brim and a white front panel with his name on it in stylized graffiti, green and red shoes, and light-blue jeans.
Power-ups
Magnetic Personality
Get a magnet when you activate a board.
Wheelhead
Get board charge by picking up coins.
Ready to Go
Start runs with a board already.
Trivia
Jake is the 1st character in Subway Surfers City .
He is the 1st character who originally came from Subway Surfers .
He is one of the revamped characters that most resembles the Subway Surfers counterpart. The only differences are the sleeves of his denim vest, the rip on his jeans and the graffiti on his cap and denim vest.
His hoverboard is Trasher .

Jamanta
Jamanta is a board released in for 80 in the Season Hunt .
Appearance
It has the appearance of a manta ray. Equipping the Smooth Drift upgrade adds some grey details to the hoverboard.
Trivia
It is the 13th board of 2023 , after Future Wave , Big Boss Board , Color Shift , Flying Horse , 11th Birthday , Danger Dasher , Tagger , I-Scream , Viperfish , Fan-tastic , Ghastly Glider , and Carp Diem .
It's the 5th board after Toucan , Birdie , Medal , and Rocket .
This board is similar to Ray but with a wider head and a smaller tail.
In "Sybo info about this update" this board is usually called "Manta Ray". "Jamanta" is a Portuguese word for a type of manta ray.
It is the 5th fish styled hoverboard , the first being Great White , the second being Ray , the third being Big Blue , and the fourth being Carp Diem .
In the Chinese version, this board is a (Suzhou) board, and it's called Manta Ray (蝠鲼) and it don't have upgrades.
Both it and Ray shares the same name in the Chinese Version, which is Manta Ray .
Both it and Ray shares the same name in the Chinese Version, which is Manta Ray .
This board appears as a magnet on the fridge in Audrey 's kitchen in thumbnail and trailer.

Jamie
Appearance
Default Outfit
Jamie is a British young man from who wears a red jacket inside a green vest. He also wears a green hat with a fuzzy, red bobble. He has a buzz cut with blond hair under his hat, and green eyes. He seems to be wearing tight black sweats and white shoes with black laces. He also holds a camera. Unlike many of the other characters, he appears to be more of a young adult rather than a teenager or child.
Old Default
Prior to , he had blue eyes and wore a pair of sunglasses with a gold frame. He had a camera with a neck strap. His green hat also didn't have the red pom-pom.
Top Hat Outfit
This outfit was launched in . In his Top Hat outfit, he wears a white shirt and red tie with a yellow and red striped undercoat. He wears brown trousers, smart black shoes and a green suit jacket with holly pinned on the left side. He wears white gloves and a brown top hat and has an old camera with a stand.
Hatter Outfit
This outfit was launched in . In his Hatter outfit, he now has a hat with a card with a rabbit on it, he has a grayish-blue bowtie, a darker cream-blue shirt, a yellow jacket, gray pants, and green shoes with gold soles.

Jaro
Appearance
Default Outfit
Jaro is a Czech teenage boy from who most likely appears to be an adventurer. His outfit is a viridian tunic with a brown belt, purple edges and a white shirt and pants. He also wears a set of brown fingerless gloves, buckled similarly to his belt, and brown fringed boots. His brown tricorn hat is adorned with a large puce feather, and his mouth is covered by a plum bandana. His eyes are green and his hair is brown. The staff in his idle animation is a plain stick.
Joker Outfit
Launched in , he wears an ornate medieval jester costume, styled in black and purple with gold highlights. He now wears a white full face mask with purple makeup patterns. His staff is now spiral-striped in black and white, with a purple/black jester head identical to his mask on top.

Jasmine
Appearance
Default Outfit
Jasmine is an Egyptian teenage princess girl from who has blue eyes and black hair (with gold beads) and she wears traditional Egyptian clothing, snake headpiece, white dress with gold designs, gold snake bangles, black leggings and turquoise sandals. Her makeup consists of turquoise eyeshadow and red lipstick.
Safari Outfit
Launched in , she also received the Safari Outfit, which costs 30. In this outfit, she wears a safari hat with sunglasses, and wears a turquoise scarf with binoculars on her neck. She receives a lime polo, and some khaki shorts. She receives an armband of the same color as her scarf on her left hand, and her sandals are replaced by beige colored sneakers (which resembles Tasha 's sneakers) with her leggings left unchanged.
Ankh Outfit
The re-release gave her the Ankh Outfit. The outfit is inspired from the “Egyptian key of life” that is called Ankh . Her sandals change to gold, she wears a black dress, the dress seems to be a darker version of her default outfit’s dress with a turquoise band and the Ankh sign around it. She wears turquoise and gold bangles around her hands, she also wears golden earrings, for makeup she wears black lipstick and turquoise eyeshadow with black kohl that is inspired from the Eye of Horus around her eyes. Her hair is an ancient Egyptian hairstyle where she wears a long golden cylinder headband.
Trivia
According to the update description, she seems to be an 'adventurous princess'.
Jasmine bears a similarity to the Elizabeth Taylor version of Cleopatra in the 1963 film of the same name .
Two of her idle animations are references to dances from Walk Like An Egyptian and Remember the Time . Both videos/dances are references to Egypt.
Her Ankh outfit is inspired from an ancient Egyptian symbol called “ Ankh ” or “ Key of Life ”
She is the third "royal" character. The others being King and Prince K .
Unlike the other two, she is a limited character and she is a girl.
Unlike the other two, she is a limited character and she is a girl.

Jay
Appearance
Default Outfit
Jay is an Indian teenage boy marathon runner from with a white tank top, green short pants, green sport shoes and short black hairstyle. He wears a gold medal on his neck and has blue wristbands. He also seems to be very fit and athletic.
Old Default Outfit
During , and , he had a white tank top, white short pants, blue sport shoes and a man bun. He also wore a gold medal on his neck, which is the same medal he wears on the new version of the outfit. He had black wristbands. Also, the number '171' was written on a piece of paper stuck on his shirt. However, this default outfit for Jay was removed in .
Blue Outfit
Launched in , he uses the same outfit he currently has, and has received the Blue Outfit, which costs 75. In this outfit, he wears a blue turban, red baggy trousers and a white sherwani. His shoes, medal and wristbands have been removed.
Color Master Outfit
Launched in , his shirt is removed, and has paint all over his arms and face. It costs 75. His hair is also designed differently.
Trivia
Jay is the first character whose appearance has been updated permanently, with the second being Carmen , the third being Kim , the fourth being Jamie , and the firth being Koral .
He is the first surfer, the second being Koral , the third being Alia , the fourth being Rocky , and the fifth being Rani .
The name Jay means "victory" in Sanskrit.
Jay is the first sports/athlete character, the others being Fresh , (Sport Outfit), Tony (Game Outfit), Edison , Noon , Kim (Dive Outfit) Bjarki (Power Outfit), Philip , Dylan , the NFLPA surfers, Phoenix , Dummy , Tainá , Hélène and Leo .
Jay is the first limited character of 2014 . The others being Mina , Rosa , Olivia , Edison , Wayne , Jasmine , Noon and Buddy .
Jay (Blue Outfit and Color Master outfit only) is the second character to run barefooted. The first being Izzy (Default, Aloha and Laki Outfit only), the third being Amira (Default Outfit only), the fourth being Zuri (Default Outfit only), the fifth being Noon (Siam Outfit only), the sixth being Salma (Nomad Outfit only), the seventh being Dylan (Lifeguard Outfit and Walkman Outfit only), and the eight being Brandon (Kung Fu Outfit only).
His Blue Outfit is a type of traditional Indian clothing.

Jay (Subway Surfers City)
Jay is a character exclusive to Subway Surfers City . He can be unlocked as a jackpot in Super Boxes.
Appearance
Jay is a teenager with long blonde hair and brown eyes. He wears a violet t-shirt, ripped purple jeans with a silver chain, violet sneakers with white laces, a cast with a purple skull and a yellow star on his arm, a dark blue sweatband and a violet-and-white durag on his forehead. He also wears band-aids in his cheek and both of his elbows.
Power-ups
Daredevil
Jay gets a power-up and bonus score when crashing with a board.
Energy Drink
Jay gets extra board charges from buried caches.
Brash and Broken
Jay’s board fills and drains faster.
Trivia
He shares the same name with a character previously introduced in Subway Surfers , Jay .
This is the first time in any Subway Surfers media a character has the same exact name as another.
He also looks similar to Dylan , since both of them wear a durag and have long blond hair.
Jay made his first and only appearance so far in Subway Surfers City .
He was originally named Cali , then renamed to Nicky and then finally Jay .
His hoverboard is not released yet.

Jazz
Jazz  is a limited  hoverboard  released in update. It costs with a bundle.
Appearance
It is a board that has a Jazz Piano on its design, it also has some golden musical notes. When the Speed Up upgrade is applied, it gains a horn on the front which creates a Music Trail . Equipping Super Jump adds two saxophones to the front.
Trivia
It has the same upgrades as the Monster , Smoking Slime , Sharpeed , Yellow Sub , Mayo Mania , Veggie Velocity , Bloomster , Bias boom and Fast fur-ward hoverboards.
It's the first new board in 2020 .
This is the last board so far to use the original hoverboard model with a different paint job.
It's the second board, the first being Hotdog and third being Tagger .
It's the second hoverboard to have writing on it (saying the word "Jazz" on the bottom of the hoverboard). The first being Bubblegum (saying the word "Pop"), the third being Punk (saying the word "Punk" on the bottom of the hoverboard), the fourth being Superhero (saying the word "Bam") and the fifth being Sharpeed (saying the word "Rivals").

Je T'aime
Je T'aime is a hoverboard released in . Like any other hoverboard, it protects the character from crashing for 30 seconds. When crashed, it will need to recharge for a few seconds before it can be used again.
Appearance
Trivia

Jenny
Jennifer Zhen is her real name but, the crew calls her "Jenny".
Appearance
Default Outfit
Jenny is a Chinese-American teenage girl from . Given San Francisco's association with both hipsters and hippies, Jenny may be either or both, though the overall theme of the San Francisco update implies she is a hippie. In all her outfits, Jenny wears large round white glasses and has black hair with pink gradient. Her default outfit consists of a black crop top, dark purple yoga pants with some kind of paisley pattern, and white flip flops. Her hair is done in a mess bob, held by a multicolored woven headband. She also wears a turquoise necklace with a feather and turquoise bangles.
Party Outfit
Launched in , her Party Outfit has an ornate yellow and red qipao over matching sneakers and blue jeans. Her hair is instead done in two thick pigtails with two pink rose hair pins. This outfit is to celebrate the Chinese New Year 2016 of People's Republic of China .
Pixel Outfit
Launched in , she wears a white shirt with pink sleeves and a blue collar with a pink pixel pattern. She wears an indigo and purple bracelet. She wears indigo shorts with pink embroidering and knee-high indigo and pink gradients along with blue, pink and white shoes. Her glasses change to a cyan and indigo pixel patterned frame and she also gains a white cap with cyan and pink accents. She carries a video game console on her waist attached to a cyan belt. Her hair returns to the original style from her original outfit.
History
* An exact date was found where she appeared in, otherwise, the edition release date is assumed.

Jenny (Subway Surfers City)
Jenny is a revamped version of the Subway Surfers character Jenny . She is a Subway Surfers City character who can be unlocked by purchasing the Season 8 Subway Pass.
Appearance
Jenny is a Chinese-American teenage girl from San Francisco. She has a black messy hair with pink gradient styled in pigtails, dark pink woven headband, dark brown eyes and white large round glasses with yellow tinted lenses with pink gradient. She wears a brown crop top, a turquoise necklace with a grey circle and a white feather, olive green jacket, black belt, purplish pink yoga pants with a paisley pattern and lines and brown boots. She also wears a white and turquoise bangles in her left arm and her nails are painted lilac.
Power-ups
Lift of Faith
Get extra coins and board charges when triggering steam vents.
Flow of Power
Chance of getting a random power-up when one expires.
Fearless Flyer
50% chance of getting a random power-up when triggering steam vents.
Trivia
Jenny is the 18th character in Subway Surfers City .
She is the 11th character who originally came from Subway Surfers . the first being Jake , second being Tricky , third being Fresh , fourth being Yutani , fifth being Miss Maia , sixth being Ninja One , seventh being Tagbot , eight being Spike , the ninth being Ella and the tenth being Tasha .
Unlike them, she's a limited character and not from the core crew like the others.
So far, she is the only limited character who comes from the original Subway Surfers to be added in the Sequel Version .

Jetpack
Jetpack is a power-up in Subway Surfers . When collected, the character goes flying high into the air and is invincible to everything. The player can also stack up on coins that are up in the sky called bonus coins. Like other power-ups, they can upgrade the Jetpack in the shop for a longer duration time, which means they can collect more coins if they time it correctly.
Trivia
The player cannot duck or jump while using a Jetpack, or even lose the game, nor can they activate any hoverboards.
However, they can still pause and exit the game as usual.
However, they can still pause and exit the game as usual.
In the first version, the Jetpack used to be blue while it being shown as a powerup only on the subway, but it was eventually changed to green in a later update.
If you use a Coin Magnet while the Jetpack is active, the Coin Magnet will do its job, which is to collect coins, but the process will take place in the sky.
It will still collect the first few coins on the ground before reaching the sky.
You can complete the mission which requires you to stay in the same lane for a few seconds with this strategy.
Using a 2X Multiplier and/or a 10+ multiplier when a Jetpack is active is also a good strategy as a Jetpack can let you collect lots of points without any disturbances.
It will still collect the first few coins on the ground before reaching the sky.
You can complete the mission which requires you to stay in the same lane for a few seconds with this strategy.
Using a 2X Multiplier and/or a 10+ multiplier when a Jetpack is active is also a good strategy as a Jetpack can let you collect lots of points without any disturbances.
If you use the Super Sneakers and/or a Hoverboard while the Jetpack is active, their time limits will be paused or not until you land.
There is a possibility that the jetpack can be made out of flames.
They are similar to the 'flames' that appear when you crash while on a Hoverboard.
They are similar to the 'flames' that appear when you crash while on a Hoverboard.
A few glitches can be achieved with the Jetpack, check the Glitches for more info.
The Jetpack is focused on collecting coins, like the Coin Magnet, with the exception that you do not have to worry about any obstacles . But the bad thing is that you'll miss any 'valuable' stuff that might appear while you're in the air, such as a Key or a Mystery Box .
The Jetpack also has a purpose for achieving high scores, as the score multiplier is increased temporarily while one is in use.
However, the value of the increased score multiplier is not shown, so it appears as if the player's score is increasing faster even though the score multiplier is the same.
However, the value of the increased score multiplier is not shown, so it appears as if the player's score is increasing faster even though the score multiplier is the same.
The coin rows are very much longer and closer to each other than on land.
Using a Mega Headstart or a Headstart is similar to using the Jetpack, but with no coins in the air.
When the Jetpack is about to wear out, its time limit will flash until you collect the last coin.
The hoverboard's time limit also flashes, but only after the board wears out as cooldown time.
The cooldown time was removed in the update, making the Jetpack end almost instantly as you collect the last coin.

There is a similar reference to the Jetpack in the Subway Surfers Animated Series .
In , the pitch for coin collecting while in a Jetpack was slightly lowered.
When you die, find a Jetpack extremely close to you, equip a headstart , you will have the Jetpack for an extremely short duration of time and have the headstart thing by you for the rest of the run. (plus you will get powerups)
It is shaped like spray cans and the trail is mimicing the spray paint coming out.
If you get a Speed Up hoverboard just as your about to get a Jetpack or Headstart you can go extra fast.
In , the colors and smokes of both Jetpack and Headstart have changed (the realistic smoke emitted from the jetpacks became a 2D animation).

Jewelled
Jewelled is the forty-ninth limited hoverboard in Subway Surfers released in . Like any other board, it can be activated for 30 seconds by double tapping and needs to recharge before it can be used again. It could initially be unlocked by purchasing with  50,000, like most other limited hoverboards.
Appearance
This hoverboard looks like a more deluxe version of the default hoverboard. It has a gold border with coloured gems all over it. The inside has red pillows.
Trivia

Ji-Yeong
Ji-Yeong is a limited character released in . Ji-Yeong is the 170th character in the game. She got a new outfit, the Celestial Outfit in , costing 400 in (Now 150).
Appearance
Default Outfit
Ji-Yeong is an 18-year-old South Korean young woman/teenager from . She has short black hair with a pink streak and wears a pink bow. She wears a gold piercing on her right ear, She wears a white tank top with purple and brown stripes and pink lettering "지영" on her chest. She also wears a black skirt and black shoes with white knee length socks with pink hearts on them.
Celestial Outfit
Launched in , her hair is now purple with a streak of pale pink, in addition to having pigtails with mint bows, she has a cloud and a yellow star on her head, she wears lime green glasses with hot pink lens, she wears a lime green blouse in which there are large dark green circles, she wears pink pants with red star shapes in addition to wearing suspenders at the waist, her left arm is covered in purple, she wears a star-shaped earring in her left ear and finally she wears white, orange, yellow, mint and black boots.

Jia
Jia is a limited edition character from . She is the 34th limited character in Subway Surfers , and the 32nd limited character in the World Tour series. She can be purchased for 95,000 during her release, like any other limited character that costs coins. Both her first outfit, the Wild Outfit and her second outfit, the Unicorn Outfit can be bought for 75, respectively.
Appearance
Default Outfit
Jia is a Singaporean teenage girl from with short brown hair, brown eyes, and wears a white shirt with a black cat on it, a teal jacket, denim shorts, brown sneakers, an orange cap facing backwards, and pink headphones around her neck. She might be a street skater.
Wild Outfit
Launched in , not to be mistaken with Frank 's Tiger Outfit, Jia's Wild Outfit has Jia wearing a Tiger costume with a blue bag and blue sneakers. She also gains facepaint in the appearance of whiskers and an animal nose.
Unicorn Outfit
Launched in , Jia received a new Unicorn Outfit. In this Outfit, she wears a purple dress, blue belt, purple necklace, rainbow shoes, and a unicorn jacket with red, green, and purple stripes on each side. She has pink eyeshadow and lipstick.

Jingle Dingle
Jingle Dingle is a limited hoverboard released in . Like any other hoverboard, it protects you from crashing for 30 seconds. When crashed, the hoverboard will explode and need to recharge for a few seconds before using it again. It costs 19.000.
Appearance
Is a Christmas sock stylized like a skateboard. The sock is red and teal, with a wavy design. It has two golden bells at the top and three white pom-poms at the bottom. The style is colorful and playful, evoking the joy and festivity of Christmas.
Trivia
Jingle Dingle, Shiny Surprise , Gadget Force , and Ice Cool are the last boards released in 2024 .
It, Shiny Surprise , Gadget Force , and Ice Cool are the 53rd, 54th, 55th, and 56th boards released in 2024 after Skyrocket , Electro Shock , Bada-Bomb , Confetti Crush , Red Velvet , Roaring Heart , Lunar Scroll , Astro Tune , Interstellar , Shamrock Shebang , Megga Bite , Fast and Festive , Radiant Rider , Jak , Tea Timer , Deli-Vroom , Yellow Sub , Jelly Board , Koinobori , Mayo Mania , 12th Birthday , Pixel Hoverboard , Street Grace , Alarm On , Rock n' Riley , Sunny Sailor , Laser Flip , Glarx 3000 , Standing Ovation , Risky Ride , Sporty Summer , Heavy Metal , Champ , Arrow , Raggedy Runner , Turbo Stumb , Brass Whizz , Chop-Chop Board , Cook-Express , Moon Cake , Veggie Velocity , Couch Surfer , Catalyst , Flash of Flavor , Fear Tractor , Sci-Fly , Skeletuna , Pitch Dark , Fox Trail , Fall Speed , Pathfinder , Cozy Cruiser , Icicle , and Suitcase Saga .

Jingles
Jingles is the fifteenth limited Hoverboard in Subway Surfers, released in . Like any other hoverboard , it protects your character from any obstacles for 30 seconds. When crashed, it will explode and need a few seconds to recharge before it can be used again.
It could only be unlocked by collecting 60 in Week 5 & 6 at the London Weekly Hunt , 25 in Week 2 & 3 at the North Pole Weekly Hunt, 40 Snowflakes in Week 1 & 2 at the Weekly Hunt , and during its reappearance during the and editions. It was actually a secret holiday gift for anyone who managed to collect all 60 Trees in two weeks.
Appearance
It has the appearance and shape of a sleigh with a bell tied up with two leaves. Equipping the Snow Trail upgrade adds two jets to the back. The Super Jump upgrade adds four gold squares to the sides and also adds Christmas lights all around the board.
Trivia
During the Weekly Hunt at the edition, it was written differently according to the date.
Before it was time for receiving it, it was written as a "Secret Holiday Gift" with a picture of a present.
During the time to receive it, it was written as a "Limited Hoverboard" . It was later rewritten as board, even though it was released in .
It is the second board released in a edition, the first being Snowflake , the third being Rudy , the fourth being Sharpeed , and the fifth being Fauxpunx .
It will then be the same even after receiving it or failing to get it before the deadline.
The Jingles board technically isn't a board, as it's appearance is a sleigh.
It has a similar appearance to the Sleigh board.
Unlike other limited board, Jingles is a token board.
Jingles is the first board to get a special power, the second being Phantom , the third being Groovy , and the fourth being Old Dusty .
It returned for Wild Wednesdays such as , and .
It returned in as a hunt prize. The update gave it two upgrades called Snow Trail and Super Jump . However, unlike , which required 60 tokens, it only required 25. Players who already unlocked this board received 10 instead.
It returned in as a hunt prize. Players who already unlocked this board received 10 instead.

In , it returned in the Season Hunt for 80.
In , it returned for free as a Christmas gift.
In , it returned for either or in a bundle for 200.000.

Joo Won
Joo Won (주원) is a character released in . He is the 258th character in the game and the 43rd surfer of 2025 .
Appearance
Default Outfit
Joo Won is a 14-year-old South Korean teenage boy and idol from who is a member of the group R3VIVE. For his usual idol outfit, his navy blue hair is styled in a mullet and he wears a nose piercing. His blue sleeveless shirt is worn with a blue-pink gradient cross strap to match with his long, brown undersleeve and pair of wristbands. Meanwhile, his black pants is held by a chained belt, and he's also wearing a pair of black platform boots with blue, cyan, to purple gradient accents.
Aegyo Outfit
Launched in , this outfit embodies cuteness as it's leaning into a soft and colorful theme. Joo Won's hair is now dyed purple but still with navy blue roots, and styled with a pair of heart hairbuns on the back. His tricolored shirt is worn under his blue padded jacket with mint and purple on its ends, paired with pink cargo pants and multicolored sneakers. He still wears his nose piercing.
Trivia
He and Si Woo are the 43th and 44th surfers released in 2025 , after Snake , Tang Yuan , Valentina , Kaleo , Rebeca Roar , Gabriel , Dinorange , Rocky , Rani , Finlay , Ribbon , Chicken Jake , Mallard Tricky , Oni Hime , Saru , LOC , Stevie , Berta , Costa , Yutani Tree Frog , Rochelle Rebelle , Asher , White Rabbit , Peter , Tara , Henry , Sunny , 8 Ball Jake , Piper , El Primo , Spike , Dynamike , Poco , Max , Alma Brava , Mateo , Crewmate Jake , Crewmate Tricky , Crewmate Spike , Crewmate King , Crewmate Tasha , and Crewmate Guard .
He is the fourth surfer, after Mina , Rin , and Ji-Yeong .
He and Si Woo are the first and second male South Koreans surfers in the game.
He and Si Woo are the first and second male South Koreans surfers in the game.
He, Si Woo , and Lucky are members of the idol group R3VIVE .
He is the youngest character from the R3VIVE group.
He is the youngest character from the R3VIVE group.
The name of his first outfit, Aegyo , means " cute " or " attractiveness " in Korean language (specifically, Aegyo refers to " acting cute " which is common in K-Pop culture).
Charmer is his board .
He's the 17th surfer who is 14 years old, after Yuto , Azura , Hamza , Finn , Lily , Ventura , Rudy Rascal , Leo , Sindri , Tang Yuan , Rani , Finlay , Oni Hime , Saru , Stevie , and Peter .
His zodiac sign is Libra ♎️.
His birthday is between September 23 and October 22 (the exact date is unknown).

Juju
Juju (JuJu Smith-Schuster) is an unused character from , he would have appeared alongside the other 6 NFLPA surfers, but didn't for unknown reasons. Despite this, he is in the game files, but has never been obtainable normally. Like the other NFLPA surfers, he also would have had his own board, Schuster , but this is also unused.
Appearance
Juju is a 29 years old American football player from real life. In the game, he wears a gray jersey with the number "19" on it. He wears yellow pants, gray gloves and gray sneakers.
Trivia
He is based on a real NFLPA player .
He is the first character to go unused, the second being Mala , who was originally an unused character from but was added 11 months later in , the third being Dinorange who also was originally an unused character from but it was added 10 month later in as a special prize for team takeover challenge (if the player have all characters of the winner team already), this makes him the only character not currently used.
His outfit represents the Pittsburgh Steelers but he is now apart of the New England Patriots , making his outfit outdated.
His nickname is spelled as "Juju" in the game but in real life his nickname is "JuJu" with both J letters capitalized.
He, Diego (Chivalry Outfit), Odell , and The Burger King are the only characters with mustaches.
Schuster is his board .
For unknown reasons, he has many different idle animations, when characters only usually have two, they are all different from all the other NFLPA surfers' animations, which all use the same animation of throwing a football to the ground and dabbing.
He does not count as a character in the Player Profile .

Kaito
Kaito is a character released in . He is the 275th character in the game and the 13th surfer of 2026 .
Appearance
Default Outfit
Kaito is a 16-year-old Japanese teenage boy from wearing a uniform similar to a Gakuran (standard Japanese male uniform; consists of a collared black blazer with noticeable buttons and a pair of black pants), though instead of the usual school shoes, he wears two red-and-white running sneakers. He also has a blue-tinted black hair in a bowl-cut, and a massive, thick-framed round glasses.
Haya Kitsune Outfit
Released in , Kaito's hair is now blonde and voluminous, being held and wrapped with a thick black cloth. His glasses have been replaced with a two-lined facepaint on his right cheek. As for the top, he has a black baggy jacket with a gray line in the middle, resembling a zipper. Over that is a thick gray scarf which has an orange tip on the both ends. Two handkerchiefs, a darker orange and a blue one, are strapped at the waist part of his black-strapped orange pants, resembling ties and has a star design. The thick soles of his monochromatic platform boots are painted to look like it has spikes.
Trivia
He and Tsuki Chan are the 12th and 13th surfers released in 2026 , after Frank Noir , Holly , Sean Snow , Mia , Rosalita , Lorcan , Horse , Vittorio , and Enzo , Sprinkle , and Bunny Betty .
He is also the sixth male 2026 surfer, after Frank Noir , Sean Snow , Lorcan , Vittorio , and Enzo .
He is also the second 2026 character as well as the second male character with original animations after Lorcan .
He is also the sixth male 2026 surfer, after Frank Noir , Sean Snow , Lorcan , Vittorio , and Enzo .
He is also the second 2026 character as well as the second male character with original animations after Lorcan .
He is the fifth surfer, after Harumi , Akira , Yuto , and Tsuki Chan .
His Default Outfit references Okarun from Dandadan , and his Haya Kitsune Outfit is a reference to Naruto .
He is the 24th surfer who is 16 years old, after Catrine , Bruno , Tainá , Hali , Lucky , Faiza , Electra , Ozzy , Kedi , Logan , Leif , Snake , Rebeca Roar , LOC , Costa , Rochelle Rebelle , Tara , Sunny , Alma Brava , Si Woo , Mr. Gobbles , Sean Snow , Lorcan , and Tsuki Chan .
