Key
Keys (which look like this in the game) are a currency that were introduced in update. They are the secondary currency in the game. Most importantly, keys are used to revive your character 1 key, and the cost doubles every time this feature is used. Keys are also used to unlock special outfits for many characters , and/or powers for hoverboards. There are many ways to obtain Keys. For example, they can be found while running in the Subway, opening a Mystery Box , or from the Weekly Hunt or Season Hunt . You can also buy different amounts of keys from the Shop, though it costs real money. As for the appearance of the key, it is light blue with a white outline, and has a star-shaped keyhole.
Where to Find Keys?
Watching the Daily Video for the first and fourth time of the day (3 each).
Watching the Daily Video for the fifth time or more (up to 1 on random).
Obtain from the Mini Mystery Box / Mystery Box (up to 1 (can be doubled), rare).
Collect during a run (1+ , found in the same places where Power-Ups lie, rare).
Inside special offers or bundles
Obtain from the Super Mystery Box (up to 3 (can be doubled (1/2 only)}, rare).
Obtain from the Weekly Hunt (mostly week 1).
Obtain from tiers in the Season Hunt (from 2 (tier 0/5/10 only) (can be doubled (tier 0 and 5 only)) and 5 (tier 15/20/25/30/31 only)).
Obtain from the Token Box (up to 6 , only if the player purchased all tokens).
Connect to Facebook (10 along with other gifts).
Introduction alert (5 , this was only available during the update).
Get them in the Daily Calendar
Obtain from the Season Quests' rewards (5 for 3500 Sneakers, 10 for 4000 Sneakers alongside Event Coins )
Get them from Daily High Score (3 in tier for 1,000,000 points on certain days).
Get them from Ranked Rewards in Mystery Hurdles (Top 10% score - 2 , Top 1% Score - 6 )
Obtain them from collection milestones (5 for 2,700 points, 7,400 points, 13,100 points, 18,500 points, 25,700 points, and 31,025 points each)
Obtain them for completing core collections (30 for The Originals , 15 for Alter Egos )
Buy in the shop with real money (up to 800 for $99.99 USD ).
How to Spend Keys?
Revive after a run (1st revive costs 1 ; consecutive revives double in cost over time).
Buy characters and boards. Additionally, players can pay with keys instead of paying for them with Event Coins .
Buy certain outfits for characters.
Buy special powers and styles for hoverboards.
Buy Token Boxes in the store.
Collect Daily/Season Quest sneakers (up to 3/6 (Daily Quests only) and up to 50 (Season Quests only)).
Buy special offers and bundles.
Skip rewards in the Season Hunt .
Buy portraits in the store.

You are given a limited amount of time to decide if you want to revive after a crash.
You can skip this by tapping outside the box when the timer has reached approximately 5/8ths.
You can skip this by tapping outside the box when the timer has reached approximately 5/8ths.
The key, the Headstart , the Jetpack and the Hoverboard are the only things in the game that can prevent you from losing, with the exception of the Super Sneakers and Power Jumper , which might save you and/or cause you to lose.

Kick-Off
Kick-Off is the third limited hoverboard in Subway Surfers , which was introduced in . Like any other hoverboard, it protects you from crashing for 30 seconds. When crashed, the hoverboard will explode and needs to recharge for 5 seconds before being reused. It was released for 50,000.

Kiloo
Kiloo was a game development company located in Aarhus, Denmark. They and SYBO Games are also the creators of the popular game, Subway Surfers . As of early February 2020, Kiloo no longer works on Subway Surfers with SYBO Games, and as of July 2023, the company is now defunct.
History
Kiloo was founded in 2000 by Jacob and Simon Moller. In 2002, Kiloo turned into a private company and in the same year won the Nokia Mobile Challenge in the games category with their game, Popstar .
Later on, Kiloo co-operated with other gaming companies such as THQ Wireless and ITE on games like Worms and Hugo . From 2006 to 2009, Kiloo had the exclusive moblie rights for LEGO and Whac-a-Mole worldwide.
Since then, Kiloo has released numerous games such as Frisbee Forever , Subway Surfers , Smash Champs and Stormblades .
In June 2023, Kiloo laid off all their employees and shut down a month later in July 2023.

Kim
Kim was launched as a limited character from . She was the sixth limited character in Subway Surfers and the fourth limited character in the World Tour series. She could be unlocked by purchasing with 100,000. Her first outfit, the Dive Outfit, can be purchased for 75. Her second outfit, the Coast Outfit, can be unlocked with 75. Since , her default and Dive Outfit are non-limited, but her Coast outfit is still limited.
Appearance
Default Outfit
Kim is an Australian teenage girl from who has light brown hair, which is messy and wild. She has blue-gray eyes, freckles, and tanned skin. She wears a green and blue tank top with a surfer-styled wave/spiral on it, jeans shorts, and white sandals. Her accessories include a shell necklace on a string, leaf earrings, sweat bands on her wrists, and a green ankle bracelet.
Old Default
Before , her hair was kept in a loose bun tied with a red hairband. Her freckles were also less defined. She also had - graphics.
Dive Outfit
Launched in , she is wearing a white wetsuit with aquamarine sleeves and a wave pattern, a yellow diving mask, and black flats and sandals. This time her hair is completely tied up in a tight bun.
Coast Outfit
Launched in , she is wearing a gray cowgirl hat, with a lavender shirt, a burgundy vest, dark gray shorts with stripes, and blue and white cowgirl boots. Her hair is all under the hat.
History
* An exact date was found where she appeared in, otherwise, the edition release date is assumed.

King
King (Maurice Kingo Erikson) is a character that can be unlocked by purchasing with 80,000. His first outfit, the Count Outfit, can be bought for 30. His second outfit, the Royal Outfit, can be bought for 30.
Appearance
Default Outfit
King is a boy wearing a large cardboard crown. He also wears a faded blue shirt with the words "I'm #1" written on it, red shorts, red, white, and blue shoes, and a red and beige cape.
Count Outfit
He has 2 outfits, with the first outfit being the Count Outfit. The Count Outfit is a Halloween-themed outfit and released in the edition. He has a black cape and a black shirt. He isn't wearing his paper crown and has vampire teeth. The words on his shirt are also written in yellow. The rest looks like the default outfit. Starting from , The words written on his shirt switches to a suit. It costs 15.
Royal Outfit
He also received the Royal Outfit which changes his paper crown with an actual golden crown, changed his shirt from faded blue to dark red, and remove his red cape. King received this second outfit, which costs 25, during the edition.

Trivia
King and Prince K are both 'royals', due to King's crown and cape and Prince K's shiny gold wear.
Judging from his animations, he seems to like receiving attention.
King is also the first character with bad social skills, according to his dossier.

Koi Frame
The Koi Frame is a frame released in the update. This frame could be unlocked by collecting 210 in the event during .
Appearance
A reddish-orange Koi fish frame that has a darker hue in its background. From the inside, the blob Koi patterns are orange colored, while it becomes white with textured scales on the outside or on the actual frame.
Trivia
This and the Earth Day Frame are the 22nd and 23rd frames to be released, after the Default Frame in for Top Run and for Player Profile , the Birthday Frame in , the Hollywood Frame in , the Summer Frame in , the Plant and Lava Frames in , the Club Frame in , the Pride Frame in , the Oxford Green and Oxford Red Frames in , the Brawl Stars and Gems Frames in , the Pumpkin and Dia de los Muertos Frames in , the Candy Cane and Gingerbread Frames in , the Glorx and Cinema Frames in , the Winter Frame in , the Shamrock Frame in , and the Easter Egg Frame in .
This is the sixth frame released in 2026 , after Glorx Frame , Cinema Frame , Winter Frame , Shamrock Frame , and Easter Egg Frame .

Koinobori
Koinobori is a limited board released in . Like any other hoverboard, it protects your character from any obstacles for 30 seconds. When crashed, it will explode and need a few seconds to recharge before it can be used again. Its ability is the Smooth Drift .
Appearance
This board resembles a Koi fish with a hook in its mouth.
Trivia
It, Yellow Sub , Jelly Board and Mayo Mania are the 16th, 17th, 18th and 19th boards to released in 2024 after Skyrocket , Electro Shock , Bada-Bomb , Confetti Crush , Red Velvet , Roaring Heart , Lunar Scroll , Astro Tune , Interstellar , Shamrock Shebang , Megga Bite , Fast and Festive , Radiant Rider , Jak , Tea Timer , and Deli-Vroom .
It is the fourth board, the first being Viperfish , the second being Yellow Sub , and the third being Jelly Board .
This board is inspired on Koinobori for celebrate the Children's Day (子供の日) in Japan (part of the Golden Week)
It is the fifth Japanese board after Kitty , Cherry , Sakura and Sweet Chili . It is also the first and only Japanese board released outside and .
The shape of this board is little bit similar to another board from the Chinese Version called Koi (From )
It's Cathy 's third board . Her first board is Beelzebook , and her second board is Sweet Chili .
It is the sixth Asian board released in 2024 after Electro Shock , Skyrocket , Bada-Bomb , Lunar Scroll , and Fast and Festive .
During and , it came back for free in the .
In , it can be unlocked in the Season Hunt .
It never returned in  for unknown reasons, even though  used Koi ( ) as the Season Hunt tokens.
It is the second board of 2024 to be released costing , the first being Fast and Festive , the third being Moon Cake , and the fourth being Cozy Cruiser .
This is the 2nd board of 2024 that has a default ability, the 1st being Fast and Festive , the 3rd being Alarm On , the 4th being Street Grace , the 5th being Standing Ovation , the 6th being Glarx 3000 , the 7th being Heavy Metal , the 8th being Arrow , the 9th being Chop-Chop Board , the 10th being Sci-Fly , the 11th being Skeletuna , the 12th being Pathfinder , the 13th being Cozy Cruiser , the 14th being Suitcase Saga , the 15th being Jingle Dingle , and the 16th being Shiny Surprise .
In the Chinese Version, it's called Lucky Koi (好运锦鲤) , and it doesn't have Smooth Drift upgrade.

Koral
Koral is a limited character who is released in . She costs 25.000.
Appearance
Default Outfit
Koral is a blue mermaid from . She has grayish-blue skin (now bright blue since ). Her hair is light blue in color and shaped like ocean waves. Her eyes are yellow and under them she has light blue markings (which the blue markings replaced with pink markings for her new design). On the extremities of her limbs she has purple scales. She can transform her legs for a mermaid tail, which is grayish-blue in color, (now bright blue with lots of visible scales and a purple end of the tail in ) the fins at the end are grayish-purple. She has purple ears (now more blue since ), her fins behind her ears of the same color. She wears an orange sleeveless sweater with a pink fish print. When she swaps her mermaid tail for her legs, she wears beige shorts with blue wave prints. She wears a green fish brooch (more like a leaf) on the corner of her forehead.
Tenta Queen Outfit
Launched in , now her hair has tentacles. The top of them are purple, the bottom is white, and the suckers are fuschia. Her skin, fins, and ears are now emerald green and her hands have a gradient of pink and purple, her mermaid tail is dark forest green at top with scales, and at the end is dark violet. Her eyes are now fuschia with a much more thin pupil. She now has a necklace that has a pink seashell on it. Her shirt is now much shorter and has a cave streak like design.
Sub Explorer Outfit
Launched in , she wears copper-colored diver swimsuit and only her face and ears are visible.
History
* An exact date was found where she appeared in, otherwise, the edition release date is assumed.
Trivia
Koral is the second Fan-made character, the first being Tankbot , the third being Bob The Blob , the fourth being Super Runner Fernando , the fifth being Spraybot , the sixth being Hammy-Bee , the seventh being Dr. Flyman , the eighth being Snowy , the ninth being Valentina , the tenth being Berta , and the eleventh being Bunny Betty .
She was the winner for 9th birthday contest, who was drawn by @Tenshigrace .
She is the second surfer, the first being Jay , the third being Alia , the fourth being Rocky , and the fifth being Rani .
Koral has the same pronunciation as Coral with the only difference being Koral having a "K" instead of "C".
Koral is the 23rd character released in 2021 , after Frankette , Spacebot , Ox , Rat , Qin , Hou , Zayn , Darryl , Lana , Bonnie , Buzz , Trym , Pridebot , Pride Jake , Pride Fresh , Pride Spike , Pride Tricky , Pride Yutani , Pride Frank , Parkour Rin , Alexandre , and Akira .

In the concept art, her name is Coral but in the game she is called Koral. This is due to the Coral board having the same name as her name in the Concept Art.
Koral almost always smiles in her animations, but when you play as her, she has no expression at all, this also occured to Spike , Song Yi , Mala , Bruno , Yuto , Zi Hao , Thursday , Skye , Stella , Astra , Finn , and Electra .

LOC
LOC is a character released in . He is the 231st character in the game and 16th surfer of 2025 .
Appearance
Default Outfit
LOC is a 16-year-old Danish teenage boy from who is dressed as a personified red location indicator. Aside from that, he also got his black oversized T-shirt, turquoise jeans, and lime-strapped black shoes.
History
* An exact date was found where he appeared in, otherwise, the edition release date is assumed.
Trivia
He and Stevie are the 16th and 17th surfers released in 2025 , after Snake , Tang Yuan , Valentina , Kaleo , Rebeca Roar , Gabriel , Dinorange , Rocky , Rani , Finlay , Ribbon , Chicken Jake , Mallard Tricky , Oni Hime , and Saru .
He and Stevie are the eighth and ninth male surfers of 2025 after Snake , Kaleo , Gabriel , Rocky , Finlay , Chicken Jake , and Saru .
He and Stevie are the eighth and ninth male surfers of 2025 after Snake , Kaleo , Gabriel , Rocky , Finlay , Chicken Jake , and Saru .
He is the fifth surfer, after Freya , Trym , Super Runner Jake , and Catrine .
He is the 13th surfer whose name starts with L after Lucy , Lauren , Lee , Liu , Lamar , Lana , Lawrence , Lucky , Lily , Leo , Logan , and Leif .
He is the second character whose name is in all caps, he was preceded by E.Z.
He is the fifth 2025 surfer to cost , after Rebeca Roar , Rocky , Ribbon , and Oni Hime .
His name indicates that it is a nickname or shortened term for LOCATION.
The outfit he is wearing is a location indicator, often used in navigation or map applications like Apple Maps, Google Maps, Waze, AllTrails, Citymapper, and others.

Lamar
Lamar (Lamar Jackson)  is a limited edition character from . He can be unlocked with  50.
Appearance
Default Outfit
Lamar is a 29 years old American man who is a football player from Pompano Beach, Florida. In the game, he wears a blue jersey with the number "8" on it. He wears white pants, white wristbands and blue sneakers.
History
Trivia
He is a NFLPA player from real life .
He, Patrick , Saquon , Odell , Tom and Dak are the NFLPA players/group.
He and Saquon are also the youngests characters from the NFLPA players/group.
He and Saquon are also the youngests characters from the NFLPA players/group.
He the 5th character based on a real-life person . Others being Saquon , Patrick , Odell , Tom , J Balvin , Dak , and Super Runner Fernando .
His birthday is January 7, 1997.
His zodiac sign is Capricorn ♑.
His zodiac sign is Capricorn ♑.
He is the 5th surfer with a known date of birthday.
He is the 1st surfer who is 29 years old, the first being Saquon .
He is the 1st surfer who is 29 years old, the first being Saquon .
He is one of the only adults in the game, teaming up with J Balvin , Saquon , Patrick , Odell , Tom , Dak , Glorgalax , Guard , and Demi Lovato .
He is also the sixth adult male in the game, the first being Guard , the second being Saquon , the third being Patrick , the fourth being Odell , the fifth being Tom , the seventh being Dak , the eighth being J Balvin , and the ninth being Glorgalax .
He is also the sixth adult male in the game, the first being Guard , the second being Saquon , the third being Patrick , the fourth being Odell , the fifth being Tom , the seventh being Dak , the eighth being J Balvin , and the ninth being Glorgalax .
Lamar is the 7th new character from 2020 , the others being Liu , Ming , Monkbot , Callum , Jack , and Dak .
He and the other NFLPA surfers are the rarest characters, not returning in 4 years since .

Lana
Lana is a limited edition character from . She can be unlocked with 2.99$. Her 1st and only outfit, the Nordic Outfit, can be unlocked with 100.
Appearance
Default Outfit
Lana is an Afro-American teenage girl from who has black hair in cornrows and brown eyes. She wears a brown hoodie, with the hood having white fur on it. Under her hoodie she wears a green top exposing her midriff. She also wears blue jeans with a green stripe on the sides, a big belt, gold hoop earrings, a gold brass knuckle ring and white shoes with green laces.
Nordic Outfit
Launched in , she wears a red gown with a brown belt striped on and blue jeans. She also wears pink shoes and has the same gold hoop earrings as her default outfit.
History
* An exact date was found where she appeared in, otherwise, the edition release date is assumed.

Lana is the ninth character released in 2021 , after Frankette , Spacebot , Ox , Rat , Qin , Hou , Zayn , and Darryl .
She is the first character to have a new outfit in less than 10 months (8 weeks).
She is also the first 2021 character to get an outfit.

Lantern
Lantern is a limited hoverboard released in . Like any other hoverboard, it will protect you from crashing for 30 seconds. When crashed, the board will explode and recharge for a few seconds before it can be used again. It costs 12.000
Appearance
Is a vibrant, stylized lantern. Its structure is elongated and features a rich, red exterior adorned with geometric patterns. The centerpiece glows with shades of yellow, creating a warm and inviting glow that contrasts with the bold red. The top of the lantern is capped with a purple accent, adding an additional pop of color.
Trivia
Lantern, Hyper Viper , and Override are the first boards released in 2025 .
It is the third board, the first being Night Lute , and the second being Hyper Viper .
It is Tang Yuan 's board and Song Yi 's second board . Song Yi 's first and third boards are Night Lute and Lucky Fish .
It has the same upgrades as Rave Rider , Electro Shock , Champ , Brass Whizz , Cook-Express , Couch Surfer , Fear Tractor , and The Green Flame .
There was a glitch on this hoverboard where the ending animation would be bugged when the Double Jump upgrade was turned on. It was fixed in .
In , it costs in Offer Trails .

Lauren
Lauren is a limited character that was released in . She is the 37th limited character in Subway Surfers and the 35th character in the World Tour series. Both her 1st outfit, the Tally Outfit and her 2nd outfit, the Pilot Outfit, can be purchased for 75.
Appearance
Default Outfit
Lauren is an African American teenage girl from with dark hair with pigtails, and wears an orange midriff top, denim shorts, a pink choker, a gold chain necklace, red, white, and blue socks, red and white sneakers, a dark green military jacket, gold hoop earrings, a red and blue badge with a white star, and dark lipstick.
Tally Outfit
Launched in , her hair turns into some dreadlocks, and is worn under an American red-white-blue patriotic hat with white stars. She also wears a dress with a predominantly white top (which has red and blue accents on the bottom) and a red-and-white striped skirt. Her socks and sneakers are replaced with red flats. She also wears purple lipstick.
Pilot Outfit
Launched in , she adds a pilot hat with pilot goggles, a red blouse, a brown zip-up, yellow gloves, pale brown trousers and high black boots. She does not wear any lipstick in this outfit and her hair is covered up.

Lawrence
Lawrence is a limited character released in the  update. Lawrence is the 172nd character in the game and the 4th and last Rival character in the game, being one of the four Rivals, and the Rival of Tricky .
Appearance
Default Outfit
Lawrence is a 17-year-old British non-binary teenager, performance artist, and poet from . They wear a light black jacket with a yellow collar and yellow sleeves. They have dark black pants on their legs with the suspenders down in the back with the Rivals (®️) logo on them, the right leg is torn at the knee. They have red socks and black and white sneakers with red laces. Their hair is shoulder length, red, and with a squared haircut, their eyebrows are the same color, their eyes are green. They have a dark green beanie on their head and a single piercing on their left ear (similar to Catrine's ). And they also have a notebook and a red pen.
Snowballer Outfit
Launched in , they now wear a blue jacket with a red collar and red sleeves, and some parts are white and they have a Christmas Tree drawing on it. They now wear brown pants and brown sneakers. They are wearing a green Christmas hat with white lines and have a snowball at the top. And their notebook and the red pen are the same.

Leaf
Leaf  is a limited  Hoverboard  released in  . Like any other hoverboard, it protects you from crashing for 30 seconds. When crashed, the hoverboard will explode and will need to recharge for a few seconds before being used again. Like most of the other limited hoverboards, it has the ability of Smooth Drift and costs 1.99.
Appearance
It has the appearance of an Autumn orange leaf.
Trivia

Lee
Lee is a limited character from . He is the forty-third limited character in Subway Surfers and the forty-first limited character in the World Tour series. He can be unlocked by purchasing with 95,000, just like all other limited characters. His outfits , the Silk Outfit and the Wudang Outfit, each cost 75. In , His Wudang Outfit can be unlocked for 30,000. Now it costs 75.
Appearance
Default Outfit
Lee is a Chinese teenage boy from with black hair and brown eyes. He wears a white tank top, a green jacket, ripped black pants, light blue sneakers, and a blue baseball cap. His jacket also has badges. And he has a blue juggling ball.
Silk Outfit
Launched in , he wears a Chinese robe and pants. His sneakers are replaced by slippers, his juggling ball came red, and his cap replaced by a red Chinese top. His hair came longer with a braid.
Wudang Outfit
Launched in , he wears a black cap backwards, with some orange pants rolled up, white socks, a gray vest, and his juggling ball is red-orange.

He is coincidentally somewhat similar to Huang Lee from Grand Theft Auto: Chinatown Wars; they both wear green jackets and a white tank top, are Chinese, and happen to have "Lee" in their name.

Leif
Leif is a character released in . He is the 211th character in the game and 36th surfer of 2024 .
Appearance
Default Outfit
Leif is a 16-year-old Icelandic teenage boy from . He has a bright blue spiky hair, eyes, and eyebrows. His bright blue jacket has white buttons on the sleeves and an image of a mountain on the back, layered over his white T-shirt that is imprinted with the words "SUB SURF" in a navy blue font. He is also wearing a white, chained baggy pants and beige winter boots.
Firebird Outfit
Released in , Leif is now wearing a red, small-framed rectangular sunglasses, his eyebrows are dyed orange, and his flame-like hair is dyed in a yellow-orange gradient. Below his black and maroon-gradiented long coat is a red waistcoat, and underneath that is a white shirt. His baggy pants is now dark purple, chained with a yellow strapped belt. This finishes off with two yellow chunky boots with black soles and flame designs on the sides.

Leo
Leo is a limited character released in . He’s the 200th character of the game.
Appearance
Default Outfit
Leo is a 14-year-old Italian teenage boy and archer from . he wears a white, green, and red cap over black scruffy hair. He wears a brown jacket with short sleeves over a yellow shirt with white cloud patterns over a black shirt with short sleeves, an orange and maroon chest-guard over all, black socks, a green fingerless glove on his right hand, and dark purple shoes with foam orange soles. He also holds a white bow with a brown arrow. He also seems to have a faint black stubble.

Lesson
Lesson is the eighth episode of the Subway Surfers: The Animated Series .
Synopsis
While Tricky gives Yutani her first skateboarding lesson, Jake and Fresh assume the role of sports commentators. But with Tricky losing her patience and Jake unable to control his hunger, will Yutani actually learn anything?
Plot
Cast
Jake - Nicolas Roye
Tricky - Karen Strassman
Fresh - Ogie Banks
Yutani - Cindy Robinson
Trivia
This is the eighth animated episode created by SYBO TV's YouTube channel.

Lestari
Lestari is a character released in . She is the 281st character in the game and the 19th surfer of 2026 .
Appearance
Default Outfit
Lestari is a 15-year-old Indonesian teenage girl from who wears a light, pale green long-sleeved top. Over this, a folded and tied sash of darker green fabric around her waist, wide-legged green pants, a matching green belt cinches the waist of her pants, and a prominent green leaf-shaped ornament in her dark hair. A delicate yellow flower is nestled within the green hair adornment.
Hot Spot Outfit
Launched in , she has dominant fiery color scheme of oranges and reds around her outfit. She wears a striking headpiece that resembles the fire, goggles with green lenses perched on her forehead, a short-sleeved tunic with a geometric pattern that also resembles the fire, and simple shorts in shade of orange. On her feet, she wears sandals with thick soles.

Liberty
Liberty is a limited-edition hoverboard in . It is also the first limited hoverboard that was added to Subway Surfers . Like any other hoverboard, it will protect you from crashing for 30 seconds. When crashed, the board will explode and recharge for a few seconds before it can be used again. It has no special ability. It also came back during the re-released New York edition. It received a restyling during the edition.

Lilah
Lilah is a character exclusive to Subway Surfers City . Despite previously being a Subway Pass exclusive character, she can be unlocked as a jackpot in the Super Boxes .
Appearance
Lilah is a girl has long brown hair styled in two braids, accessorized with purple bands, and wears an orange headband with a geometric pattern. Her outfit includes a light brown vest over a white shirt, green cargo pants and stylish sneakers with zebra-striped details. She has a turquoise bracelet, silver earrings and carries a camera. A feather accessory is attached to her brown backpack.
Power-ups
Picture Perfect
Lilah gets a coin sack when picking up board charges.
Depth of Focus
Lilah has a chance of getting a coin doubler from a coin sack.
Mirror Lens
Coin doublers also double board charges.
Trivia
Lilah is the 14th character in Subway Surfers City .
She is the 4th character exclusive to Subway Surfers City . With the first being Rosalita , second being Billy and third being Jay .
She has a light resemblance to Mala from Subway Surfers , however both are entirely different characters.
Her hoverboard is Aquiline .

Lily
Lily is a limited character released in . She is the 195th character in the game. She can be unlocked in the fifth stage of in .
Appearance
Default Outfit
Lily is a 14-year-old teenage American girl from . She has blonde hair, blue eyes, and light skin. She wears a sea lion costume with a hood and tail, as well as a purple shirt, beige shorts, and yellow rain boots. She also wears a yellow, green, and red bum bag around her waist.
Kangarumi Outfit
Launched in , Lily wears a gigantic orange and brown Kangaroo suit, with her eyes being completely hidden beneath her longer blonde hair; shifting her overall vibes from the Default Outfit. Aside from orange skin and dark purple sunglasses, her suit also has brown ears, snout, hands, arms, and feet.
History
* An exact date was found where she appeared in, otherwise, the edition release date is assumed.
Trivia
She and Riley are the 19th and 20th surfers released in 2024 after Thunder , Skye , Azura , Dragon , Stella , Astra , Lucky , Meggan , Red Panda , Hamza , Faiza , Teabot , Finn , Electra , Hammy-Bee , Ballerina Tricky , Pixel Jake and Guard King .
She is the tenth female surfer released in 2024 after Skye , Azura , Stella , Astra , Meggan , Red Panda , Faiza , Electra , and Ballerina Tricky .
The duo were also 3rd and 4th USA surfers of 2024 after Stella and Astra .
She is the tenth female surfer released in 2024 after Skye , Azura , Stella , Astra , Meggan , Red Panda , Faiza , Electra , and Ballerina Tricky .
The duo were also 3rd and 4th USA surfers of 2024 after Stella and Astra .
She's the sixth surfer after Jenny , Miss Maia , Pride Miss Maia , Super Runner Tricky , and Riley .
She is the ninth surfer started with L after Lucy , Lauren , Lee , Liu , Lamar , Lana , Lawrence and Lucky .
She gets +3 Multiplier Bonus for Multiplier Bonus in and she costs in a new bundle offer.
Her animation was slightly changed in .
Lily is the seventh 2024 surfer to get an outfit , the first being Stella ( ), the second being Thunder ( ), the third being Lucky ( ), the fourth being Leif ( ), the fifth being Skye ( ), and the sixth being Riley ( ).
She is the fifth surfer who is 14 years old, after Yuto , Azura , Hamza , and Finn .
Her zodiac sign is Pisces ♓️.
Her birthday is between February 19 and March 20 (the exact date is unknown).
Her birthday is between February 19 and March 20 (the exact date is unknown).
Sunny Sailor and Roo Rush are her boards .
Her last appearance in the files was .
In the Chinese Version, she is a surfer.

Lily Portrait
Lily Portrait is a limited portrait released in the update. This portrait can be unlocked for 50.
Appearance
Trivia
This is the 14th portrait released in the game, after Jake Portrait , Tricky Portrait , Fresh Portrait , Spike Portrait , Yutani Portrait , Tagbot Portrait , King Portrait , Ella Portrait , Dino Portrait , Boombot Portrait , Hammy-Bee Portrait , Pixel Jake Portrait , and Ballerina Tricky Portrait .
This is the 4th limited portrait released in the game, after Hammy-Bee Portrait , Pixel Jake Portrait , and Ballerina Tricky Portrait .

Lion
Lion is the 40th limited hoverboard in Subway Surfers , released with . Like any other hoverboard, it protects you from crashing for 30 seconds. When crashed, the hoverboard will explode and need to recharge for a few seconds before using again. It costs  50,000, like most of the other limited hoverboards.
Appearance
It has the appearance of a water drop with a picture of light-blue lion with dark-blue frame on the corners which is the symbol of Singapore.
Trivia
Lion is the sixth new board in 2016 , the others being Groovy ,  Jouster ,  Chameleon ,  Ray , and Tumi .
Despite the World Tour ending early, Lion still remained as a limited hoverboard during the update, but only for a few days.
It is the first board, the second being Retro Wave .
In , it returned in the Season Hunt , for 180.
In , it cost 50,000.
In , it came back for 7,500.
In , it came back for 10.000.
Its last appearance was in .
It never returned in 2024 for unknown reasons.
It's Jia 's board .

List of Icons, Splash Screens, Logos and City Icons
This is a list of app icons, loading screens (also known as splash screens), logos & city icons.
Icons
In every icon before , a yellow border will be seen with Jake holding a colored spraycan. The color of the spray can and the background changes depending on the edition.
Unused/Replaced Icons
Trivia
Starting from update, the yellow frame that has been used has been removed.
After the update, Jake's colored spraycan that he holds gets a letter "S" starts in app icon (except for the first and app icons).
In The update the icon of the game is changed to a new default permanent icon That Features - Tracks except for the (2 icons). After the city themed icons is back.
Jake doesn't hold the spraycan in the and first icons, this is until a update changed the icons
Loading Screens
Unused/Replaced Loading Screens
Trivia
Every loading screen until has Jake and Tricky holding a hoverboard. The hoverboard and background change depending on the edition. On the Christmas update loading screens, Tricky was replaced by Elf Tricky - Ice Outfit (except for , and update).
In with the new update the game will have a single initial screen "loading" that was used in the all updates, from to . In , the loading screen is with limited characters until now. Before it even has a blue home screen with the name "Subway Surfers" in white, the last old screen is during its 10th anniversary.
The , , and updates were supposed to have a loading screen in the old format (revealed on Play Store), but this was not used.

Trivia
In the Apple Arcade game Subway Surfers+ , all character variants and outfits (that were available up to or ) were grouped as outfits for a single character. For example, Pride Miss Maia is the Miss Maia second outfit, while Jake and his variants ( Zombie , Festive , Elf , Pride and others) are additional outfits for original surfer. Unlike the original version, Jake 's Dark Outfit costs 4,000 instead of it being free.
Some city variants/updates are simply updates to the original city, as was the case with and , which had the Pride Month map as the official map instead of the original map. Meanwhile, some variant cities exist alongside the original city, such as and , and .

Liu
Liu is a Chinese special character released in for $3.99.
Her 1st outfit, the Birdwatcher Outfit, costs 30.
Appearance
Default Outfit
Liu is a brown-haired Chinese teenage girl from with dark brown eyes who wears traditional Chinese clothing, such as a straw hat and a robe. She wears burgundy shoes with cerise pants that have a gold flower design. She wears a violet and gold robe with a cerise cloth around her waist. She wears a cerise flower with a yellow dot. Her straw hat has a strap which keeps her hat from falling off.
Birdwatcher Outfit
Launched in / , she wears a similar big straw hat as her default outfit, her hairstyle changes slightly. She wears a outfit consisting of a cadet blue shirt with a dark purple dress over it and brown boots. She also has a camera attached onto a strap.
History
Trivia
Liu comes from the Chinese version, from (Guilin) 2018 , an exclusive destination, and her name in the Chinese version is Liu Sanjie (刘三姐) .
In the Chinese version, she was released on April 25th, 2018 .
In the Chinese version, her main outfit is actually her second outfit, the Lijiang Outfit, while her Birdwatcher Outfit is her main outfit.

Logan
Logan is a character released in . Logan is the 210th character in the game and 35th surfer of 2024 . He can be unlocked at the 5th stage of the Season Challenge in .
Appearance
Logan is a 16-year-old Canadian teenage boy from . He has light skin, blond hair, and blue eyes. He wears a cap with yellow back panels, a picture of green mountains on the front panel, and a flat green bill. He also wears large black ear gauges, a red gingham shirt with a blue overcoat, a black wristband on his left wrist, tan shorts, and brown boots with yellow laces.
History
* An exact date was found where he appeared in, otherwise, the edition release date is assumed.
Trivia
He and Ginger are the 34th and 35th surfers released in 2024 after Thunder , Skye , Azura , Dragon , Stella , Astra , Lucky , Meggan , Red Panda , Hamza , Faiza , Teabot , Finn , Electra , Hammy-Bee , Ballerina Tricky , Pixel Jake , Guard King , Riley , Lily , Glorgalax , Ventura , Rudy Rascal , Hélène , Leo , Pins , Ozzy , Audrey , Billy Bean , Kedi , Ruhi , Dr. Flyman , and Pumpkin Pete .
He is the fifth surfer, the first being Olivia , the second being Mala , the third being Pink , and the fourth being Ginger .
Currently, Logan is the only male surfer.
He is the first male Canadian surfer in the game, the second being Sean Snow . Both of them are also 16 years old.
He is the first male Canadian surfer in the game, the second being Sean Snow . Both of them are also 16 years old.
He and Ginger are the 1st  surfers to debut with low quality texture (256x256).
He shares the exact same name as Logan, the child who created Spraybot .
He is the 16th male surfer released in 2024 after Thunder , Dragon , Lucky , Hamza , Finn , Pixel Jake , Guard King , Glorgalax , Rudy Rascal , Leo , Ozzy , Billy Bean , Ruhi , Dr. Flyman , and Pumpkin Pete .
He's also the fourth North American male surfers released in 2024 after Glorgalax , Rudy Rascal and Ozzy .
He's also the fourth North American male surfers released in 2024 after Glorgalax , Rudy Rascal and Ozzy .
He is the 11th surfer whose name starts with an L after Lucy , Lauren , Lee , Liu , Lamar , Lana , Lawrence , Lucky , Lily , and Leo .
Pathfinder is his board .
He is the 10th surfer who is 16 years old, after Catrine , Bruno , Tainá , Hali , Lucky , Faiza , Electra , Ozzy , and Kedi .
He's also the fourth male surfer who is 16 years old, after Bruno , Lucky , and Ozzy .
He's also the fourth male surfer who is 16 years old, after Bruno , Lucky , and Ozzy .
He reuses The Burger King 's expressions, this means he was going to reuse The Burger King 's idle, but instead, he got a unique animation.
He's the first character to have a unique animation and reused expressions from another character.
He's the first character to have a unique animation and reused expressions from another character.
His zodiac sign is Capricorn ♑️.
His birthday is between December 22 and January 19 (the exact date is unknown).
His birthday is between December 22 and January 19 (the exact date is unknown).
He is currently the only character from Season Challenge to not return for .
In the Chinese Version, he's an surfer.
He is the 23rd surfer to have animations reused for a new surfer ( Costa in and Holly in ) after Rabbot , Prince K , Ramona , Maeko (x3), Diego , Spike , Ace , Dino , Zi Hao , Buzz (x2), Catrine , Carlos , Hou , Nicolai , Manny (x2), Dragon , Rin , George , E.Z. , Nina , Liu , Trym , and Hamza .
He is the fourth character to have 2 (or more) characters using his animations ( Costa and Holly ), after Buzz ( Electra and Glorgalax ), Maeko ( Thunder , Kaleo , and Alma Brava ), and Alia ( White Rabbit and Tara ).

Lorcan
Lorcan is a character released in . He is the 267th character in the game and the 6th surfer of 2026 .
Appearance
Default Outfit
Lorcan is a 16-year-old British teenage boy from wearing a brown and green layered jacket with sleeves having two triangular studs each, which is being paired with a purple shirt and one-sided "wing." His brown trousers has a blue and green patches on both knee sides, and is being held upon by a brown spiky belt. He also wears two large brown chunky boots with green laces, two long fingerless gloves, and piercings on his both ears. Meanwhile, his distinct facial features include his yellow eyes, thick eyebrows, pale lips, and freckles; and above his thick, voluminous teal hair is his gecko sidekick that he always brings with.

Lowrider
Lowrider is a non-limited hoverboard released in Subway Surfers: Holiday . Like any other hoverboard, it protects players from crashing for up to 30 seconds. When crashed, it will explode and will recharge for a few seconds before being able to be used again. It's the second most expensive hoverboard in the game, topped only by the Windglider .
It allows players to stay low as the name suggests, so they can easily pass through the tallest and medium barriers without requiring them to roll.
Appearance
It has a unique design with two handles at the left and right sides of the board for the characters to hold on to.
Trivia
This hoverboard slightly resembles a bobsled. This makes sense as it was added in the Holiday edition.
It's the second most expensive hoverboard in the game, costing 320,000, topped only by the Windglider .
If you want to try to complete the No Acrobatics Award, try using the Lowrider board.
On the 10th of December in 2013, during the edition, the Lowrider board was available to be tried out for free for 24 hours.
On the 26th of March in 2014, the Lowrider board was available to be tried out once again, as a Wild Wednesdays event.
This and Bouncer are the first hoverboards to have an ability in the game.
Also, it is the first board with the Stay Low ability.
For unknown reasons, in the promo, scrollbar pose and in the events, this board have little bit different appearance.
The Chinese Version also have this problem.
The Chinese Version also have this problem.
In the Chinese Version, it's a board, and it's called Sleeping Board (卧板) .
It is Ella ’s board according to the old Subway Surfers website

Lucky
Lucky is a limited character released in . He is the 182nd character of the game.
Appearance
Default Outfit
Lucky is a 16-year-old Irish teenage boy from who has amber eyes, auburn eyebrows, and green hair. He wears a gold necklace with the shape of a four leaf clover, with a black shirt and green jacket. He has a golden earring in his right ear. He also wears a watch on his left arm. He wears a backpack with the appearance of a coin. He also has green pants and green & white shoes.
Haeng-un Outfit
Released in , Lucky is now wearing the usual idol outfit, his dark makeup adding to his spiky hair that is dyed yellow and only a streak of green is left. His long sleeved, apple green-colored shirt has a black collar, overlays and sleeves that is worn with a gray baggy pants. For footwear, he has black shoes and for his accessories, he has wide silver rings.

Lucy
Lucy is a non-limited character launched in . She can be unlocked by purchasing her with 7,000 being also the cheapest character to buy with coins . She has got two outfits , the first outfit being The Goth Outfit, and the second one being The Steam Outfit.
Appearance
Default Outfit
Lucy is a teenage girl who probably has a punk look. She has dark green eyes and shoulder-length hair dyed in a gradient of blue and pink. She wears a black nose ring, a spiky bracelet, high black boots, blue striped stocking/leggings/tights, a white dress with a dark red corset and a large red bow on its back. Her head is shaved from the other side which gives it a fun, edgy and punk look.
During the update, She received two new outfits , which are the Goth Outfit and the Steam Outfit. Both outfits costs 15 and 30 respectively. They change her image to two other alternative subcultures - Goth and Steam .
Goth Outfit
In her Goth Outfit, her dress becomes black and red. She wears more makeup than in her casual version. Her makeup includes a black lipstick, pink-red eye shadows and a black eyeliner. It also includes gradually thinning stripes that go down from the center of each of her eyes. She also changes from blue to black and red stockings. From onwards her skin becomes more pale.
Steam Outfit
In her Steam Outfit, her dress is white and green instead of plain black and white. She also has green-and-brown goggles and a brown steampunk hat adorned with a clock and a green ribbon. Her striped leggings become green, and her black boots have a yellow and orange front.
Trivia
Lucy is the cheapest buyable character in the game, as she can be unlocked by purchasing her with 7,000.
She is the first character to have dyed hair.
Her hairstyle, corset, back dress bow and spiked bracelet remain unchanged throughout her outfits, unlike most, if not all of her other features.
Lucy's natural hair color appears to be black because the color of her eyebrows and the shaved part of her hair.
Lucy has a tomboyish style.
Tasha is her sister, according to the official post for Siblings Day.
In Subway Surfers City , she wears her Goth Outfit.
Her alter ego is the Steam Outfit, implying that she might be interested in steampunk.
Gallery
For official pictures and screenshots, see Lucy/Gallery .
For renders, see Lucy/Render Gallery .

Lumberjack
Lumberjack is a hoverboard that protects from crashing for 30 seconds. When crashed, it will explode and will recharge for a few seconds before using again. It is the cheapest hoverboard in the game, not even beaten only by Superhero ( 8,000). Lumberjack costs 4,000.
During the update, it received a new board upgrade, called Double Jump which costs 45.
During the update, it received a new board upgrade, called Stay Low which costs 55.
Appearance
The Lumberjack is mostly made of wood with a blue border around it. The Double Jump upgrade adds two wooden boosters on each side. Equipping Stay Low adds a large round section to the front (making it look like a carved tree) as well as adding two handles on each side.
Trivia
It has the same abilities as Danger Dasher , and Arara Board .

Maeko
Maeko  is a special limited character released in for . Her first outfit, the Hostess Outfit, can be unlocked with 75. Her second outfit, the Street Outfit, can be unlocked with 75.
Appearance
Default Outfit
Maeko is a Chinese teenage girl from / , who has naturally black hair, the lower part of which has been dip-dyed pink. She has dark eyes, and a suntanned complexion.
Maeko’s original outfit comprises a long hoodie in yellow and teal, which she wears over fire-colored leggings. The outfit is completed by a deep orange baseball cap which she wears backwards, and is accessorised with gold shell earrings. She wears bright yellow sneakers with white soles and orange fish on the tongues.
Hostess Outfit
Launched in / , Maeko’s first outfit is an air hostess uniform, perhaps linked to the fact Sanya (where she's from) is a famous resort town in China.
Her uniform comprises a purple jacket with gold edging worn over a white skirt and red tights. Her hair is tied back in a professional manner, and she wears a hat which matches her jacket. She wears small silver earrings and flat black shoes. She has a yellow suitcase, suggesting she is employed on long-haul flights which require her to stay away from home overnight.
Street Outfit
Launched in , she has blue hair and wears a white cap. She has pink earrings, a black shirt, white gloves, a blue apron, and black pants. She wears pink and black sneakers.

This is the first board.

Mala
Mala is a surfer from . She costs 25,000. Her 1st outfit (Lunar Outfit) costs 300 in . Now it costs 100, just like Rin's Lunar Outfit . Her 2nd outfit (Miss Mosaic Outfit) costs 400 in . Now it costs 150, just like almost every other outfit from 2023 and 2024 .
Appearance
Default Outfit
Mala is a Canadian-American teenage girl and environmentalist from . She has tanned skin, hazel eyes, and brown hair braided with orange pigtails. She wears a beige t-shirt with a black belt on top and blue shorts. She wears beige tights with brown and gray boots. She wears a blue scarf on her head and wears gold sunglasses. She has a brown and blue backpack and a cat on her back. A pink butterfly follows her.
Lunar Outfit
Launched in , not much has really changed in her Lunar Outfit. Her beige t-shirt and blue scarf turns red with yellow decorations on it. Her blue shorts turn maroon. The rest of her outfit stays the same as her default. The pet inside her backpack turns into a tiny baby tiger. Her butterfly is now orange.
Miss Mosaic Outfit
Launched in , now her scarf on her head is light blue, She has brown hair with dark red and beige braids. She wears blue glasses, a blue, brown, orange, and beige t-shirt, a colored sweater white inside, long white pants, and brown flip flops. The pet inside her backpack turns into a cat-shaped figure and finally her nails are light blue. Her butterfly is now brown.
History
* An exact date was found where she appeared in, otherwise, the edition release date is assumed.
Trivia
Mala is the 27th character released in 2021 , after Frankette , Spacebot , Ox , Rat , Qin , Hou , Zayn , Darryl , Lana , Bonnie , Buzz , Trym , Pridebot , Pride Jake , Pride Fresh , Pride Spike , Pride Tricky , Pride Yutani , Pride Frank , Parkour Rin , Alexandre , Akira , Koral , Cleo , Taha , and Bob the Blob .
Mala would initially be a surfer, but she wasn't released for unknown reasons, she was going to be in a bundle with Roto , the bundle was released in but Mala was replaced by Nina , some players managed to get her by getting into the game files where she had the appearance of Kim and a single walking animation (the walk animation that she has actually), until she was released a year later in .
Mala is the 3rd character to have a pet. The first being Bjarki , the second being Mimi , and the fourth being Moira .
Her pet name is sprout as of SYBO’s livestream.
Mala and Rin both have got an outfit called Lunar .
Maple Leaf , Lunar Tiger , and Couch Surfer are her boards .
Her pet in her backpack turns into a baby tiger in her Lunar Outfit.
Her pet in her backpack turns into a cat-shaped figure in her Miss Mosaic Outfit.
She is the 2nd surfer with the 1st being Olivia the 3rd being Pink , the 4th being Ginger , and the 5th being Logan .
She came back during in the Birthday Bonanza for .
For unknown reasons, she did not receive her second outfit during the update, probably because she got her first outfit in (two updates before ) and it was too soon for her to receive another outfit. She later got her second outfit in (two updates before ).
Due to her unreleased status from , she is placed in between Andy and Festive Jake instead of being between Bob The Blob and Phoenix .
She has 3 unused or secret items. These include a recycling bin, a plastic bag, and a pair of binoculars.
She has an unused animation where a plastic bag flies into her face, she is most likely frustrated about this due to her tense movements in that animation when she firmly throws the plastic bag into where a recycling bin would probably be at.
In her scrollbar pose and animation, she is usually smiling and seems very happy, but when you select and play as her, she has a serious looking expression, similar to Song Yi , Spike , Bruno , Yuto , Skye , Zi Hao , Thursday , Stella , Astra , Finn , and Electra .
She is the first limited character to get leaked with another character 's body.
In the Chinese Version, she's a (Hohhot) surfer, and her name is Ulan (乌兰) .
Also, her Lunar Outfit is called New Year Outfit .
Also, her Lunar Outfit is called New Year Outfit .
In the Taiwanese version, she's a Surfer.
She and Zi Hao are the 16th and 17th surfers to receive a new outfit in 2024 (Vanilla Strawberry and Miss Mosaic in ) after Alfie , Ji-Yeong , Moira , George , Hasina , Cathy , Koral , Cleo , Vivienne , Tainá , Phoenix , Pink , Morgan , Taha , and Rain .
She is the 10th surfer to receive the full set of outfit in 2024 after Moira , George , Hasina , Cathy , Koral , Cleo , Phoenix , Pink , and Taha .

Malik
Malik is a limited character that is released in . He can be unlocked by purchasing with 95,000, just like most of others limited characters. Both of his outfits can be purchased for 30, respectively.
Appearance
Default Outfit
Malik is a teenage boy from / , with brown eyes and a polar bear suit.
Tusk Outfit
In his Tusk outfit (released in ), he wears a walrus outfit.
Penguin Outfit
In his Penguin outfit (released in ), he wears a penguin mascot outfit with a big red bow tie.
History
* An exact date was found where it appeared in, otherwise, the edition release date is assumed.
Trivia
He is the second surfer, the first being Buddy , third being Festive Fresh , fourth being Clementine , fifth being Gingerbot , sixth being Captain Flash , and seventh being Clockwork Johnny .
Malik is the third character to wear a mascot costume, after Yutani and Dino .
He is the final limited character of 2016 .
He is also the final male newcomer of 2016 .
Malik means "King/Owner"(مالك) in Arabic.
Even though his name means "King (or Owner)," he's not a royal character.
Even though his name means "King (or Owner)," he's not a royal character.
His face texture is the same as Jay .
Jingles and Glacier are his boards .
His last outfit's name is similar to the Penguins token.
In the 3.42.3 version, his Tusk and Penguin Outfits became limited.
He gets a 3+ Multiplier Bonus in .
His zodiac sign is Taurus ♉️.
His birthday is between April 20 and May 20 (the exact date is unknown).

Mallard Tricky
Mallard Tricky is a character released in .
Appearance
Mallard Tricky is very similar to the original version of Tricky , but now she is wearing a brown long sleeve shirt and a hat that resembles the Mallard, one of the main characters in Crossy Road .
Trivia
She, Chicken Jake , Ribbon and Finlay are the tenth, eleventh, twelfth and thirteenth surfers released in 2025 , after Snak e , Tang Yuan , Valentina , Kaleo , Rebeca Roar , Gabriel , Dinorange , Rocky , and Rani .
She is from a collaboration with Crossy Road .
She and Chicken Jake are the first collab surfers of 2025 .
Like Tricky, the Mallard is also the secondary main character of their game, since the Mallard is Player 2 in Crossy Road 's multiplayer mode and is a default character in the game Crossy Road Castle .
She and Chicken Jake are the first collab surfers of 2025 .
Like Tricky, the Mallard is also the secondary main character of their game, since the Mallard is Player 2 in Crossy Road 's multiplayer mode and is a default character in the game Crossy Road Castle .
She is the sixth limited variant of Tricky , after Elf Tricky , Festive Tricky , Pride Tricky , Super Runner Tricky , and Ballerina Tricky .

Manny
Manny  is a limited edition character that was released in edition. He is the forty-fifth limited character in  Subway Surfers and the forty-third limited character in the World Tour series. He costs 95,000 .
Appearance
Default Outfit
He is a male Mexican skeleton from / , he wears an indigo colored vest with a skull sticker on its lower right portion, on top of a seafoam colored t-shirt. He also has sky-blue ripped shorts, and color matching sneakers and cap.
Mariachi Outfit
Launched in , he is simply wearing the clothes usually worn by Mariachis but instead, now colored violet, he has a Sombrero that has yellow-outlined wave like designs, both ends of his jacket and pants are doodled on with neon blue, and yellow scribbles, and he now appears without gloves. His skull is also designed with green, pink and yellow neon colored scribbles, which include star and flower designs which resembles a sugar skull for Day of the Dead.
Luchador Outfit
Launched in , he wears a pink wrestling outfit with accents of turquoise and yellow. Specifically, his face is face-painted magenta with yellow marked around the areas of his eyes and mouth. There’s turquoise water-drop-like details and yellow flower-like details apart of the face-paint. He wears a magenta tank top with turquoise rims and a short cape behind him, a large but fake gold wrestling-award belt around his waist, magenta shorts with turquoise bottom rims and a yellow flower detail on the right side, magenta diamond-textured knee-guards with turquoise rims and yellow shielding, magenta, turquoise, and yellow wristbands, turquoise socks, and magenta and yellow boots with turquoise soles.
Trivia
He is the seventh character in the game who isn't a human after Zoe , Tagbot , Boombot , Buddy , Rabbot and Tankbot .
He is the seventh (In total) and fourth newcomer of 2017 after Lee , Diego , Philip .

Maple Leaf
Maple Leaf is a limited hoverboard in Subway Surfers . It is the special board for . This hoverboard has two special powers, the 1st being Smooth Drift for 15,000 (Now 30) and the 2nd being Super Jump for 15,000 (Now 55). It costs 20 during .
Appearance
It's a cardboard cut-out in the shape of a maple leaf colored orange on the inside.
Trivia
It is the second board after Moose . The third being Spring , the fourth being Fox Trail , the fifth being Fall Speed , and the sixth being Pathfinder .
It is the second Autumn board after Leaf .
This is the first and the only board from 2021 to receive ability upgrades.
It is the 17th board of 2021 after Secret Society , Endeavour , Discovery , Crane , Buddy Bear , Uprock , Bunny , Shuttle , 9th Birthday , Viking , Dragon Boat , Paint Palette , Sakura , Beach , Queen of Hearts , Camel , and Torito .
In the Chinese version, this is a (Hohhot) board, it's shape with Super Speed upgrade is it's default shape, while it's Super Speed Upgrade are replaced by +5 Score (exclusive upgrade).

In , it cost 35,000. Its upgrades both cost 30,000 each.

It is Mala 's first board and Alicia 's second board. Alicia ’s first board is Scratchy , while Mala 's second board is Lunar Tiger .
Its name is similar to the Maple Leaves token.
This board and name (Not counting Maple ) is similar to Leaf .

Marathon
`Marathon Challenge is a limited game mode of Subway Surfers located in the Daily Challenge/Daily Event tab officially released on September 6th, 2021 in version 2.22.2 of the game. The Marathon Challenge is very similar to the Daily Challenge where you need to run and reach a high score marked to collect the prizes, but you can do this in other cities randomly selected, during the Marathon Challenge the chosen city is available for the challenges and for the race normally, after completing the challenges you return to the World Tour City to collect the prizes and the Marathon Challenge City is available to travel for regular races. On October 15, 2021, Subway Surfers released a video on Instagram in which they said that instead of their being one city for Marathon Challenge, there would be two.
How To Play
Set high scores for prizes.
Grab your rewards before a new event starts!

Subway Surfers+

In , this challenge has been unseen until , due to Classic Mode .
is the only update to have three Marathon event locations.
The minimum required score to complete the event is usually 2.3M (if you are at 30 or higher) and the One Run Challenge , which is similar, usually requires a minimum score of 4M (if you are at 30 or higher).

Marbleous
Marbleous is a hoverboard released in . Like any other hoverboard, it protects the character from crashing for 30 seconds. When crashed, it will need to recharge for a few seconds before it can be used again.
Appearance
A white and brownish-grey hoverboard that has a base and design similar to the Roman and Greek pillars. Long boosters can also be seen on both of its sides.
Trivia
It, Arena Rider , and Major Speed are the 10th, 11th, and 12th boards released in 2026 , after Road Rage , Frankmobile , Perfectoplasma , Fire Starter , Xtra Cool , Turbo Love , Gold Rush , The Green Flame , and Lucky Fish .
It's the second board, after Kick-Off .
It has the same abilities as Skull Fire , Future Wave , Skyrocket , Roaring Heart , Astro Tune , Street Grace , and You Are Here .
It is Vittorio 's board .

Marco
Appearance
Default Outfit
Marco is an Italian teenage boy from with brown hair, thick dark brown eyebrows and black eyes. He wears a red and white striped shirt, blue jeans, brown shoes and a skin-colored hat that's trimmed black.
Mask Outfit
Released in , Marco's entire face covered with a white and gold mask. He wears a black-gold trimmed hat with a large red feather poking out in the middle. He wears a long-sleeved blue shirt with sections of white around his sleeves and collar. He also wears a purple shirt and pants, along with white leggings and brown shoes.
Noble Outfit
Released in , Marco wear a pink turban with a blue feather, a tightly buttoned navy overcoat with puffy white and burgundy sleeves, navy tight trousers with puffy white and burgundy bits up to the knee and black slippers, his golden mask is removed.

Mateo
Mateo is a character released in . He is the 251st character in the game and the 36th surfer of 2025 .
Appearance
Default Outfit
Mateo is a 15-year-old Mexican teenage boy from who wears a black sweater with neon blue and pink ribcage design and accents. He wears it with his navy blue shorts embellished with the same colored wavy patterns at the cuffs, as well as with an off-white sneakers, three wristbands, and a single skull earring on his right ear.
Santo Campo Outfit
Launched in , his face is painted with a typical sugar skull colored in white, green, and red; a traditional symbol of the Dia de los Muertos celebration in Mexico. He now also has a monochromatic pair of skeleton shirt and shorts, paired with a pair of green sneakers and white socks with a single stripe on red on the top. His skull earring is now colored in green.
History
* An exact date was found where he appeared in, otherwise, the edition release date is assumed.
Trivia
He and Alma Brava are the 35th and 36th surfers released in 2025 , after Snake , Tang Yuan , Valentina , Kaleo , Rebeca Roar , Gabriel , Dinorange , Rocky , Rani , Finlay , Ribbon , Chicken Jake , Mallard Tricky , Oni Hime , Saru , LOC , Stevie , Berta , Costa , Yutani Tree Frog , Rochelle Rebelle , Asher , White Rabbit , Peter , Tara , Henry , Sunny , 8 Ball Jake , Piper , El Primo , Spike , Dynamike , Poco , and Max .
He is the sixth / surfer, after Rosa , Manny , Bob The Blob , Fantasma , and Alma Brava .
He’s the fourth football/soccer player character, after Roberto , Edison , and Hasina .
He reuses Edison 's animations.
He is the 38th surfer to reuse animations after Frankette , J Balvin , Vivienne , Captain Flash , Clockwork Johnny , Thunder , Azura , Astra , Lucky , Red Panda , Faiza , Electra , Riley , Glorgalax , Ventura , Leo , Ozzy , Billy Bean , Kedi , Ruhi , Pumpkin Pete , Leif , Demi Lovato , Kaleo , Rani , Finlay , Stevie , Berta , Costa , Rochelle Rebelle , Asher , White Rabbit , Peter , Henry , Tara , Sunny , and Alma Brava .
He is the 38th surfer to reuse animations after Frankette , J Balvin , Vivienne , Captain Flash , Clockwork Johnny , Thunder , Azura , Astra , Lucky , Red Panda , Faiza , Electra , Riley , Glorgalax , Ventura , Leo , Ozzy , Billy Bean , Kedi , Ruhi , Pumpkin Pete , Leif , Demi Lovato , Kaleo , Rani , Finlay , Stevie , Berta , Costa , Rochelle Rebelle , Asher , White Rabbit , Peter , Henry , Tara , Sunny , and Alma Brava .
He is the 15th Halloween special surfer after Zombie Jake , Eddy , Mike , Manny , Scarlett , Cathy , Noel , Morgan , Bob The Blob , Fantasma , Thursday , Dr. Flyman , Pumpkin Pete , and Alma Brava .
In the Character selection menu, he is placed very far down in-between Mei , Marco , and other legacy characters instead of at the top in order of newer surfers from Tankbot onwards (excluding Mala ).
The name of his first outfit, Santo Campo , is a word for " cemetery/graveyard " in Spanish.
The correct spelling is actually Campo Santo .

Mathias Gredal Nørvig
Mathias Gredal Nørvig is a Danish author and speaker. Since May 2017, he is the CEO (Chief Executive Officer) of SYBO Games .
Gredal Nørvig is also member of The Business Councel of Copenhagen Municipality and acts as ad hoc advisor to the Danish government on creative businesses and growth.
Previously, from May 2014 to April 2017, he was the Managing Director of SYBO.

Max
Max is a character released during . She is the 249th character in the game and the 34th surfer of 2025 .
Appearance
Max is a female superhero brawler who has a red and yellow-colored suit, helmet, and blaster on her right arm. The visor on her helmet has the same shape as her eyes, the collar on her neck has a lightning pendant, and she's also wearing a pair of yellow fingerless gloves with red arrows, dark red boots, and a gunmetal-colored military belt.
Trivia
She, Piper , El Primo , Spike , Dynamike , and Poco are the 29th, 30th, 31st, 32nd, 33rd, and 34th surfers released in 2025 , after Snake , Tang Yuan , Valentina , Kaleo , Rebeca Roar , Gabriel , Dinorange , Rocky , Rani , Finlay , Ribbon , Chicken Jake , Mallard Tricky , Oni Hime , Saru , LOC , Stevie , Berta , Costa , Yutani Tree Frog , Rochelle Rebelle , Asher , White Rabbit , Peter , Tara , Henry , Sunny , and 8 Ball Jake .
Her character ability for the Brawl Stars Showdown event is called Let's Go , where she uses a temporary speed boost and makes the player invincible to other players.

Mayo Mania
Mayo Mania is a limited board released in . It can be unlocked in the . It's first upgrade, Super Speed can be unlocked with 60. It's second upgrade, Super Jump can be unlocked with 60.
Appearance
This board appears to be a stuffed sandwich, probably Jake’s sub sandwich. It also has a mayonnaise trail. This sandwich is probably Italian because the submarine sandwich originated in Italy.

It and Yellow Sub have same upgrades as Monster , Smoking Slime , Jazz , Sharpeed , Veggie Velocity , Bloomster The De-lyre-ious , and Bias Boom .

Medal
Medal is the sixth limited hoverboard to get by the Weekly Hunt in Subway Surfers , and was the forty-second limited hoverboard released. It could only be unlocked by collecting  40 ( Torches ) during the first and second weeks of the update. It has the form of a golden medal.
Appearance
It's a golden Olympic medal with leaves coming from the sides and the number "1" on the middle. It also has a trail which comes by default, and can't be turned off. The colors of the trail (left to right) are blue, yellow, green, and orange, as seen both on the Hoverboard menu and in gameplay.
History
Medal was added to the game on August 4, 2016 . Players could unlock this by collecting 40 torches at the first and second weeks of the Weekly Hunt .
Trivia
It was inspired by Olympic Medals at Summer Olympics 2016 in Rio de Janeiro.
It is the first Olympic Special board, the second is Sporty Summer , and the third is Champ .
It's the 6th token hoverboard. The others being Chicky , Cherry , Dragon , Jingles and Rudy .
In , it returned for 1.99.
In , it was on sale for 1.99.
In , it cost 60, it later cost .
In , it came back in the Season Hunt for 80.
In and , it can be unlocked in the . The replacement is Scratchy .
It is the third board, the first being Toucan , the second being Birdie , the fourth being Rocket , the fifth being Jamanta , the sixth being Kite , the seventh being Roarsome , the eighth being Arara Board , and the ninth being Moongazer .
It has a similar appearance to Tumi and Mosaic .
It's the last Weekly Hunt board.
It's Carmen 's third board. Her 1st board is Toucan , her second board is Birdie , and her fourth board is Rocket .
In the Chinese Version, it's called Gold Medal (金牌) .

An Eggstra surfer! -Website description

Meggan is a 13-year-old Irish teenage girl from . She has half of a cracked Easter egg on the top of a light blue helmet on her head and platinum blonde hair and bright green eyes. She also has a red, green and blue shirt and green pants with a red-pink carrot waist accessory. She also has a blue belt, and blue shoes.

Mei
Mei  is a limited character released on . She can be purchased with 95,000. Her 1st outfit, the Islander Outfit, costs  75, as well as her 2nd outfit, the Bumi Outfit.
Appearance
Default Outfit
Mei is an Indonesian teenage girl from she has a pale but suntanned complexion, and with rosy cheeks. She has long dark hair and brown eyes, she also has loose-fitting pink shorts and a white shirt tied at the front; with a pale blue paisley pattern summer jacket and a wide-brimmed straw hat. On her feet, she wears colorful surfer sandals. Accessories include a pink necklace and wristbands which tone with her pink shorts.
Islander Outfit
Launched in , she wears a pink, purple and gold bandeau dress with jade green shoes. Accessories include gold wrist bands; and a dragon mask in gold, pink, purple and jade green.
Bumi Outfit
Launched in , she wears a green Kebaya with yellow & pink ribbons. On her feet, she wears pink sandals, with a jasmine flower decoration on both sandals. Her hair is now shorter and has jasmine flowers in the back of her hair. She also wears multiple wristbands on her right arm, colored pink and yellow. In this outfit, she doesn't wear pink lipstick and has slightly darker skin than default.
History
* An exact date was found where she appeared in, otherwise, the edition release date is assumed.
Trivia
Mei's Islander Outfit is a reference to an Indonesian myth, which states that people wearing dragon masks will be lucky for four years.
She is the fourth newcomer of 2019 .
She is also the fifth female newcomer of 2019 . The first being Alicia , second being Miss Maia , third being Rabbot , fourth being Rin , sixth being Mimi , seventh being Maeko , eight being Alba , and ninth being Amy .
She is also the fifth female newcomer of 2019 . The first being Alicia , second being Miss Maia , third being Rabbot , fourth being Rin , sixth being Mimi , seventh being Maeko , eight being Alba , and ninth being Amy .
If you do Top Run as Mei in her original outfit, her hand bug's through her hat.
If you play as Mei in her Islander Outfit, she will be wearing her mask.
She is the first surfer, also being the first surfer from Indonesia, the second being Golden Guardian , and the third being Lestari .
She gets +5 Multiplier Bonus for Special Thursdays such as , and .
She gets +3 Multiplier Bonus for Multiplier Bonus in and .
She is the fifth character that has a mask that covers the entirety of their face (Islander outfit only), The first being Frank , second being Izzy (Laki outfit only), third being Marco (Mask outfit only), fourth being Jaro (Joker outfit only), sixth being Ox , seventh being Rat , eighth being Pride Frank , ninth being Tiger , tenth being Rabbit , and the eleventh being Dragon .
In both Chinese and Taiwanese Versions of the game, she's missing her Bumi Outfit.
In the Chinese Version, her name is Plum (梅) .
Naga and Coral are her boards .
In the 3.42.3 version, her Islander and Bumi Outfits became limited.

Mia
Mia is a character released in . She is the 266th character in the game and the 4th surfer of 2026 .
Appearance
Default Outfit
Mia is a 13-year-old American teenage girl from Aspen, wearing green-striped turtleneck romper above her black loose pants. Black snow goggles are also worn over her blue bonnet hat and brunette pigtails. Other parts of her outfit include a crossbody bag around her waist, gloves, and snow shoes.
Alpine Amour Outfit
Released in , Mia's hair became more structured and has pink tips on both her pigtails and side hairs, accompanied by flower-shaped pink mufflers. Her pink jacket and loose pants are both colored in black to the right side, with the latter having white heart designs on the bottom left. She also wears a pair of purple sunglasses, black belt, and pink winter boots that is designed with bows.
Trivia
She, Sean Snow , and Rosalita are the third, fourth, and fifth surfers released in 2026 , after Frank Noir and Holly .
She is the second female surfer of 2026 , after Holly .
She is the second female surfer of 2026 , after Holly .
She is the fourth surfer, after Snowy , Grand Juke , and Sean Snow .
According to her Meet the Crew biography, she is from Aspen, Colorado, USA , though she was launched in (Vienna).
According to her Meet the Crew biography, she is from Aspen, Colorado, USA , though she was launched in (Vienna).
She reuses Sofia 's animations.

Midsummer
Midsummer is a hoverboard released in . Like any other hoverboard, it protects the character from crashing for 30 seconds. When crashed, it will need to recharge for a few seconds before it can be used again.
Appearance
The base resembles a sturdy plant stem with small leaves that is modified into the shape of a usual hoverboard . Its design is composed of red, blue, and yellow flowers pasted on the sides, and ribbons that are tied in the middle for support.
Trivia
It, Street Style , and Roll & Race are the 27th, 28th, and 29th boards released in 2025 , after Hyper Viper , Lantern , Override , Fresh Love , Heartstopper , Dear Dart , Roarsome , Arara Board , Moongazer , Purple Spin , Cyan Note , Blue Riff , Eggscalibur , Bloomster , Edinburst , Guard Board , Trespasser , Mizu Dash , Zapline , Seven Seas , 13th Birthday , You Are Here , Freebird , Glitter Blaster , Float-Booster , and Feeling Beachy .

Midsummer Frame
The Midsummer Frame is a frame released in the update. This frame could be unlocked by collecting 210 in the Football Rush event during .
Appearance
A Midsummer-inspired plant frame with three leaf silhouettes in the background, and two wreath borders at the upper left and lower right. The upper left wreath has a gigantic yellow flower, accompanied with smaller pink and purple ones; while the lower right wreath has a big red and small baby blue flowers.
Trivia
This is the 27th frame to be released. The previous frames are the Default Frame in for Top Run and for Player Profile , the Birthday Frame in , the Hollywood Frame in , the Summer Frame in , the Plant and Lava Frames in , the Club Frame in , the Pride Frame in , the Oxford Green and Oxford Red Frames in , the Brawl Stars and Gems Frames in , the Pumpkin and Dia de los Muertos Frames in , the Candy Cane and Gingerbread Frames in , the Glorx and Cinema Frames in , the Winter Frame in , the Shamrock Frame in , the Easter Egg Frame in , the Earth Day and Koi Frames in , the Blob Frame in , and the Wave Frame in .
This is the tenth frame released in 2026 , after Glorx Frame , Cinema Frame , Winter Frame , Shamrock Frame , Easter Egg Frame , Earth Day Frame , Koi Frame , Blob Frame , and Wave Frame .

Mike
Appearance
Default Outfit
Mike is a Romanian teenage supernatural boy from who is most definitely a werewolf, with messy dark brown hair, as well as hair which goes down both sides of his head and on his hands. He has yellow sclerae, large canine teeth, and obvious doglike ears. He wears a purple and yellow letterman jacket and blue skinny jeans, complete with viridian shoes with gray shoelaces. He also holds a spider on a web with his right hand.
Howl Outfit
Launched in , he wears a red and maroon coat with a turned up collar, red tight pants and black sneakers.
Jäger Outfit
Launched in , he wears a large hat with a gold buckle, a red shirt, a black undercoat and a flowing brown overcoat. He also wears black pants and black shoes.
Trivia
His default outfit is probably a reference to the 1985 movie Teen Wolf .
His Main & Howl Outfits are a reference based off of Michael Jackson's Thriller . This might be why his name is Mike, because it is a common nickname for the name, Michael, or in Romanian, Mihai, where he comes from.

Appearance
Default Outfit
Mina is a South Korean teenage girl from with curly messy brown hair with bangs, brown eyes, blue ball earrings, turquoise and white converse shoes, blue sweatpants with two lighter blue stripes on each side, a yellow belly shirt and a turquoise sweatband on her right arm.
Robo Outfit
Launched in , her hair becomes midnight green, shirt change to black and white, boots become white, and her pants is dark brown. She wears red face make-up across her eyes (more like an eye mask).
Pop Outfit
Launched in , her outfit resembles the outfit that SNSD (Girls' Generation) wears in their "Genie" music video except that the color of the clothes are pink, as well as her receiving black leggings. In this outfit, she also resembles an air-hostess or a pilot.

Ming
Ming is a Chinese special character released in and costs .
Her first outfit, the White Snake Outfit, costs 75.
Appearance
Default Outfit
Ming is a Chinese teenage girl from (in the Chinese version). She has pale skin, hazel eyes and long black hair.
Ming’s original outfit is a traditional Chinese silk cheongsam dress in a cyan color with pink flowers and blue trim around the neck and arms. She accessories the dress with red elbow length gloves, lace-up red and teal ankle boots which are visible to her toes, with blue soles, to match the dress and gloves, and a red parasol. In this outfit she wears her hair in a simple ponytail, and wears mint green eyeshadow to match her dress, and red lipstick to match her gloves.
White Snake Outfit
Launched in / , she uses a empress outfit, with a long pale blue dress and a blue top with golden details and white snake designs, dark green earrings and wristbands, her hair is longer and tied in a big bun with a silver snake tiara and her umbrella that was red changes to light blue.
Trivia

In the Chinese version, she was released on July 19th, 2019 .
In the Chinese version, her main outfit is actually her second outfit, the Cheongsam outfit, while her White Snake outfit is her main outfit.

Mini Mystery Box
Mini Mystery Box (which look like in the game) is a type of prize box that can be collected for free every 4 hours, or sometimes appear after watching Daily Videos.
Mini Mystery Boxes cannot be collected during the normal run, instead can be earned in the following ways:
Completing day 1 and day 2 of Word Hunt .
Collected for free every 4 hours in the shop.
One of the possible rewards for watching ads.
Mystery Box Mania (1 Mini Mystery Box, 1 Mystery Box , 1 Super Mystery Box ), awarded for every 10 ads watched in the game .
Prizes
Some of the prizes can be multiplied by watching an ad.

Miss Maia
Miss Maia is a character released in . She is the eighteenth non-limited character in Subway Surfers .
Maria Diaz is her real name but, the crew calls her "Miss Maia".
Appearance
Default Outfit
Miss Maia is a teenage girl from with short dark brown hair fading to a vibrant magenta on the tips, black eyebrows, and green eyes. One of her most prominent features is a respirator-type breathing mask with a purple and grayish color. She wears an amber hoodie with a pink graffiti stain and her hoodie exposes a small portion of her skin and midriff. Her pants are periwinkle with yellow knee pads that have 3x3 blocks. She also wears a livid-colored belt. Her shoes are colored magenta, and her shoelace color is about the same color as her pants. She also carries a purple graffiti spray in her right hand. She might be an agent from San-Francisco.
Limited Outfits (Variants)

The pansexual pride flag colors version.

She is the second character to wear a mask. The first being Jaro , the third being Zayn , the fourth being Akira , the fifth being Pink , the sixth being Super Runner Tricky , the seventh being Pride Miss Maia and the eighth being Thunder .
Miss Maia is also the first female character to wear a mask.
She is the only Core Crew character to cost keys.

Appearance
