Trivia
This is the 19th portrait released in 2025 , after Akira Illustration Portrait , Noodlebox Graffiti Portrait , Valentina Illustration Portrait , Pink Guard Graffiti Portrait , Rebeca Roar Illustration Portrait , Fantasma Graffiti Portrait , Yutani Graffiti Portrait , Rocky Illustration Portrait , Astra Graffiti Portrait , Chicken Jake Illustration Portrait , Soul Illustration Portrait , Meggan Graffiti Portrait , Oni Hime Illustration Portrait , Dog Graffiti Portrait , Stevie Illustration Portrait , Tricky Graffiti Portrait , Berta Illustration Portrait , and Fresh Graffiti Portrait .

Missions
Missions are challenges that require the player to complete to increase their multiplier or to get a Super Mystery Box (only when multiplier has reached x30). You can find it at the top-left part of your screen when not playing. Pausing your game can also lead you to it. Each mission set has 3 missions. When all 3 missions have been completed, your multiplier will be increased by 1. When your multiplier has reached its max, the reward will be replaced with a Super Mystery Box . The further you progress through the missions, the harder they become. As well they'll cost more time to accomplish. Also it's possible to skip a mission by paying with collected coins or watching an ad.
Types of Missions
There are different types of missions in the game.
Some require the user to collect exactly a certain amount of coins or over in either a single run or multiple runs.
Some require the user to earn a certain amount of points in a single run or multiple runs.
Some require the user to collect over a certain amount of a power-up or maybe all of them.
Some require the user to use a certain amount of hoverboards in a single run or multiple runs.
There are also some missions that require the user to collect a certain amount of mystery boxes .
Some require the user to collect a certain amount of keys in a single run or multiple runs.
Others require the user's character to stumble for an certain amount of times in a single run or multiple runs.
Some missions need the user's character to stumble into a certain obstacle in a single run or multiple runs.
There are other missions that need the user to get caught in a limited time, like 10 seconds. Missions like that can be easily completed by just swiping your character towards a train, stumbling him/her and getting caught.
Some missions need the user's character to stumble into a certain obstacle in a single run or multiple runs.
There are other missions that need the user to get caught in a limited time, like 10 seconds. Missions like that can be easily completed by just swiping your character towards a train, stumbling him/her and getting caught.
There is also a mission that can be found somewhere at the first 10 mission sets that requires the user to beat a friend's score.
This mission may look easy but it is actually hard especially for people who don't have any friends in the game or being the top score among his friends, forcing them to skip it with coins.
This mission may look easy but it is actually hard especially for people who don't have any friends in the game or being the top score among his friends, forcing them to skip it with coins.
Another mission that can be found after reaching max at your multiplier which requires the user to skip a mission.
A smart way to complete it is to skip another mission in the mission set and you get to complete 2 missions with the price of 1.
A smart way to complete it is to skip another mission in the mission set and you get to complete 2 missions with the price of 1.
Other missions include running on the same lane for a few seconds, collecting a certain amount of coins using a certain power-up etc.
Some require the user to roll a certain number of times on a certain lane.
Some require to collect certain amount of word token .
Trivia
The missions, the 2X Multiplier , Super Mysterizer (+10 Multiplier) and the Score Booster are the only things in the game that can increase the player's multiplier.
The total amount of missions in the whole game is currently unknown. For obvious reasons.

Moira
Moira is a limited character released in the update. Her appearance resembles that of Medusa, a mythical creature from Greek mythology. Her original cost during was 210 . Her first outfit, the Tourist Outfit released in originally costing 30,000, now 150. In , she got her second outfit called Holi Outfit. It now costs 150.
Appearance
Default Outfit
Moira is a Greek teenage girl from who is based on the mythical creature Medusa . She has dark green snakes as her hair with multiple gold jewelry. The jewelry consists of gold metal around her waist, 3 gold bracelets on each wrist, and gold circle earrings. She has a white crop top and some black shorts, with long sandals on. Her skin is jade-colored and she has bushy eyebrows. The sclera of her eyes are yellow and her irises are dark red. Her jade skin has random spots of dark jade spots.
The Tourist Outfit
Launched in , her skin color changes to red, her snakes also change to red, she has a bandana on her snakes, she wears a shirt that says "I ❤️ NY" (meaning “I love New York”), she wears purple pants, she has purple glasses, she wears shoes with yellow, purple and white colors.
Holi Outfit
Launched in , her skin color changes to purple, so do the snakes. She has 3 golden flowers on her head. She also wears blue, orange, yellow and pink. She has Lime Green, Blue, Purple, and Pink arms, and she also has a yellow and dark purple shirts. She also wears pink and blacks shorts. She wears black Flip-Flops, just like her default outfit.

He also has a round gold and silver head, has 3 fingers on each hand, and has one green eye.

Monster
Monster is a type of hoverboard in Subway Surfers . It costs 30,000.
During the edition, it received a new upgrade, called Speed Up (now Super Speed) which costs 50.
During the edition, it received a new upgrade, called Super Jump which costs 55.
This hoverboard is not available for purchase in Train Riders .
Appearance
It has an appearance of a green Frankenstein's Monster's eyes at the upper-side of the board and its mouth at the bottom-side. Equipping the Super Speed upgrade adds twin engines on each side. The Super Jump upgrade adds two boosters to the bottom.
History
The Monster board was added to the game on January 3, 2013 .
On November 6, 2014 , the gave it a new upgrade called " Super Speed " (Previously Speed Up).
On January 1, 2015 , the gave it a new upgrade called " Super Jump ".
Trivia
It have same upgrades as Smoking Slime , Sharpeed , Yellow Sub , Mayo Mania , Veggie Velocity , Bloomster , The De-lyre-ious , and Bias Boom .
It is Zoe ’s board according to the old Subway Surfers website

Morgan
Morgan  is a limited character  from . She can be unlocked in the Spooky Trio sale with Manny and the Casket board for 80. She can also be unlocked for 75 during her release in . Her Swamp Mystery Outfit (released in ), costs stage 5 of Back to School Challenge in , now it costs 150.
Appearance
Default Outfit
Morgan is a dark teal female monster from with two mint-colored eyes and many olive green eyes that cover her face and short dark purple hair with a teal streak on the left. Scattered throughout her face, she has a few slightly faint freckles. She wears a dark purple vest with a white dress shirt and a dark purple tie underneath, a dark purple skirt with two pink stripes and black tights underneath as well as turquoise socks and black boots with yellow soles. She also coughs, opening her big monstrous mouth. Her inside of mouth is red with lots of tan-white colored teeth scattered in her mouth. Her neck is hard to see.
Swamp Mystery Outfit
Launched in , her skin is now darker and her hair is lime green styled in a bob cut. She wears a dark green sweater with different shades of green towards the end of the sleeves with a blue gem on her chest, brown shorts with brown suspenders, darker brown leggings, dark brown boots and a olive green hat with a tiny stem.
Trivia
Morgan is the 14th new character from 2020 , following Liu , Ming , Monkbot , Callum , Jack , Dak , Lamar , Tom , Odell , Patrick , Saquon , Tankbot , and Cathy .
Morgan is the 7th halloween surfer after Zombie Jake , Eddy , Mike , Manny , Scarlett , and Cathy .
Morgan, Cathy , and Noel are known as the Scream Team.
She returns for Wild Wednesdays such as and .

Mosaic is a limited hoverboard released with . Like any other hoverboard, it protects you from crashing for 30 seconds. When crashed, it will explode and recharge for a few seconds before it can be used again. Like most of others limited hoverboards, it costs 50,000.

Motor Mania
Motor Mania is a limited hoverboard released in . Like any other hoverboard, it protects the character from crashing for 30 seconds. When crashed, it will need to recharge for a few seconds before it can be used again.
Appearance
A brown to orange-wooden hoverboard plank that has a white arrow in a black outline painted in the middle. It has a black and yellow-striped tape on the back, placed in front of the tall exhaust pipe. The pair of handlebars on its sides also has the warning stripes.
Trivia
It, Piece Of Cake , and Finish Line are the 39th, 40th, and 41st boards released in 2025 , after Hyper Viper , Lantern , Override , Fresh Love , Heartstopper , Dear Dart , Roarsome , Arara Board , Moongazer , Purple Spin , Cyan Note , Blue Riff , Eggscalibur , Bloomster , Edinburst , Guard Board , Trespasser , Mizu Dash , Zapline , Seven Seas , 13th Birthday , You Are Here , Freebird , Glitter Blaster , Float-Booster , Feeling Beachy , Street Style , Roll & Race , Midsummer , Business Time , Rabbit Racer , Circuit Bunny , E-Racer , Brainstormer , Principal's Nightmare , The De-lyre-ious , Moon Biter , and 8 Ball .
It's Dynamike 's board .

Mr. Gobbles
Mr. Gobbles is a character released in . He is the 260th character in the game and the 45th surfer of 2025 .
Appearance
Default Outfit
Mr. Gobbles is a 16-year-old American teenage boy from who wears a turkey hoodie together with ripped blue shorts, red socks and leggings, and a pair of orange sneakers.
Trivia
He, Rosie and Ballerina Latticina are the 45th, 46th and 47th surfers released in 2025 , after Snake , Tang Yuan , Valentina , Kaleo , Rebeca Roar , Gabriel , Dinorange , Rocky , Rani , Finlay , Ribbon , Chicken Jake , Mallard Tricky , Oni Hime , Saru , LOC , Stevie , Berta , Costa , Yutani Tree Frog , Rochelle Rebelle , Asher , White Rabbit , Peter , Tara , Henry , Sunny , 8 Ball Jake , Piper , El Primo , Spike , Dynamike , Poco , Max , Alma Brava , Mateo , Crewmate Jake , Crewmate Tricky , Crewmate Spike , Crewmate King , Crewmate Tasha , Crewmate Guard , Joo Won , and Si Woo .
He is the fifth surfer, after Tony , Darryl , Lana , and Rain . The following characters are Rosie and Ballerina Latticina .
According to the official website , he is a theatre-kid.
He is the 20th surfer who is 16 years old, after Catrine , Bruno , Tainá , Hali , Lucky , Faiza , Electra , Ozzy , Kedi , Logan , Leif , Snake , Rebeca Roar , LOC , Costa , Rochelle Rebelle , Tara , Sunny , Alma Brava , and Si Woo .
His zodiac sign is Scorpio ♏️.
His birthday is between October 23 and November 21 (the exact date is unknown).
His birthday is between October 23 and November 21 (the exact date is unknown).

Multiplier
Multipliers are essential in getting high scores in Subway Surfers . They can be increased permanently by completing a set of 3 Missions . The higher your multiplier, the easier it is to get highscores. For example, it is easier to get a certain score with a 10x multiplier than a 5x multiplier. Although the multiplier's max is 30x (34x with Collections ), add more it can still be increased with the Score Booster , the Super Mysterizer , the 2X Multiplier and the Multiplier Bonus event. With them, you can get your multiplier all the way to 120x! However, this effect is only temporarily.
Trivia
The multiplier is normally yellow in color, But when you are using the 2X Multiplier, your multiplier will turn to green sometimes be doubled depending on whether or not your version is hacked. While using a Score Booster will turn your multiplier to blue and will increase it by +5. A Super Mysterizer can also increase the multiplier by +10 and can change it to purple only when it changes to "+10 Multiplier".
The Score Booster , the 2X Multiplier , the Super Mysterizer and the Missions are the only available things in the game to increase your multiplier.(other than just beating missions)
During the edition, a new event was introduced: Special Thursday. On this day and every subsequent Thursday, the multiplier will increase 5x when you're playing with any character with their name on the event name.
This also applies to its to its replacement: Multiplier Bonus although the multiplier only increases by 3x
This also applies to its to its replacement: Multiplier Bonus although the multiplier only increases by 3x
In , they got a more iconic look and have a crew bonus added too.

Multiplier Bonus (Event)
Multiplier Bonus is an event that replaces the Wild Wednesdays and Special Thursdays . The event is on Wednesdays and Thursdays. It was introduced during the edition. This event gives a certain character +3 Score Booster on their run. This makes it easier and possibly to make it to 100x.

Multiplier Bonus (Power-up)
Multiplier Bonus is a power-up released in , that gives you 2 score multipliers by watching 1 ad, or alternatively 5 of them by watching 2 ads.
It was released on June 24th, 2024.
Appearance
It is a green variant of the multiplier star for the Missions icon.
History
Trivia
This power-up has the same name as the event Multiplier Bonus .
This is the first time a power-up has the same name as an event.
It is of the three power-ups obtainable by ads, the others being Super Bubble and Score Blast .
It is one of the two ad obtained power-ups that you can get more if the same icon pops up during a run, the other being Score Blast .
Depending on how many ads you watch, you can get between a +6, +9, +12, or +15 multipliers if you get this three times. (the maximum amount of pop-ups per run)
Depending on how many ads you watch, you can get between a +6, +9, +12, or +15 multipliers if you get this three times. (the maximum amount of pop-ups per run)
When the power-up is activated, the multiplier will become green for the rest of that run until you receive a game over.

Mystery Barriers
Mystery Barriers are an obstacle in Subway Surfers . It's a mysterious obstacle so the player doesn’t know what obstacle they're facing, and will be revealed when it's right in front of the player. It was released on January 17th, 2023 . They will either drop with a Barrier in its place or it will malfunction and not drop. Mystery Barriers are only exclusive to Mystery Hurdles .
Hint: The real barrier is red and flashes red, while the fake barrier is gray and flashes red.
Gallery

Mystery Box
Mystery Box , when opened, gives players a random item (see the list of items that you can obtain from the Mystery Box below). There's also an upgraded version of the Mystery Box, which is called the Super Mystery Box .
Mystery Boxes can be earned in the following ways:
Collecting them during the normal run.
Buying from the shop for 500.
One of the possible rewards of Season Hunt .
Mystery Box Mania (1 Mini Mystery Box , 1 Mystery Box, 1 Super Mystery Box ), awarded for every 10 ads watched in the game .
Items
Some of the prizes can be multiplied by watching an ad.
Trivia
It is possible to get multiple Mystery Boxes per run, most likely 2 or 3.
Whenever you receive Hoverboards from a Mystery Box, you have to get at least 1, which can be doubled up by watching an advertisement, making it 2 Hoverboards. This means that you can usually get at least 2 Hoverboards for only 500 coins as opposed to 600 (300 coins for each), if you just bought the Hoverboards normally.

Mystery Box Mania
Mystery Box Mania is an event that can give you 3 types of Mystery Boxes, Mini Mystery Box , Normal Mystery Box and Super Mystery Box . It was added in either in .
Trivia
You have to watch 10 ads to get the 3 rewards.
If you watch more than 10 ads but didn’t get the rewards yet, the notification will not appear.

Mystery Hurdles
Mystery Hurdles is a limited game mode of Subway Surfers located in the Events tab released for some users on January 16/17 with version 3.6.1 and 3.6.2 and then globally on January 24th 2023 in version 3.6.3 ( ) of the game. You can do the run in other cities randomly selected, during the Mystery Hurdles, the chosen city is available for the challenges and for the race normally, after completing the challenges you return to the World Tour City to collect the prizes and the Mystery Hurdle City is available to travel for regular races.
How To Play
The players will have to dodge Mystery Barriers to score points alongside dodging trains, bushes and trash cans. There are 4 levels of difficulty indicated by the Dog expression in the upper left corner. The game speeds up as the levels progress, alongside new mechanics introduced:
Easy, Level 1 Mystery Barriers that open up when far away, no moving trains, bushes and trash cans.
Intermediate, Level 2 Mystery Barriers that open up when approached, lots of moving trains, pillar sections.
Advanced, Level 3 Mystery Barriers that open up when close to them, moving trains, lots of pillar sections.
Expert, Fake Level 4 Mystery Barriers and Level 3 Mystery Barriers, with occasional Level 2 Mystery Barriers. Lots of moving trains, pillar sections, bushes and trash cans.
In-game description
Dodging Mystery Hurdles is the only way to gain points!
Set highscores for prizes.
Grab your rewards before a new event starts!

But later was removed in 3.8.2 ( ), added again in 3.12.1 and now works properly, it stores a score now rather than resetting it.
In mid-update (3.18.1), a new power-up similar to the 2X Multiplier was added. But instead of being temporary, it is permanent and doubles your original score during that run when it is used. It can be unlocked by reaching the score next to the last milestone (depending on your multiplier, usually 960K if you are at 30 or higher) and claiming the last milestone in the Mystery Hurdles event and you also unlock Ranked Rewards, which was also released in . It is similar to the Daily High Score Ranked Rewards (minimum required score is either 750K, 1M, or 1.5M if you are at 30 or higher), but you can also earn if you get the top 10% or the top 1% score.
Also starting from mid-update (3.18.1), the game music speeds up with each increasing difficulty, just like in the and game modes.

In Chinese Version, this challenge called Mystery Obstacle and released in (May 25th, 2023).

Mexico City (Non-Halloween) , São Paulo , Los Angeles , Kenya , and Wuhan , Hohhot , Suzhou , Loulan , Chinatown , Amusement Park , Shenzhen 2025 (from chinese version), Sky City and Bear Ridge do not exist in the map files at the moment, however, they can still be added, since Vancouver and Greece did not exist in the files before being released in the new game model.
The cities Chengdu , Xi'an , Guangzhou , Sanya , Guilin , Harbin , Macau , Hangzhou and Gansu from the Chinese version of Subway Surfers exist as names in the game's map files, when it was initially possible to travel between the cities through the game "Train Riders" the names of these cities appeared on the map, but so far none of them have officially come to the game and it is not known if they may come in the future, but the name exists in the files.
During the update, it was possible to access, from the game's internal files, cities that had not yet been released, such as Venice Beach (2018 map) , Cairo (2020 map) , Barcelona (2019 map) , ​​ Monaco (2018 map) , San Francisco (2019 map) , Iceland (2020 map) , Chicago (2020 map) , Buenos Aires (2020 map) , Rio (2019 map) , Hawaii (2017 map) , Seoul (2019 map) , and Sydney (2016 map) . It also revealed maps that have not yet been released, such as Arabia (2017 map) , Hong Kong (2018 map) , Bangkok (2019 map) , Miami (2019 map) , Moscow (2019 map) , and Beijing (2020 map) .
Just like in the update, it was possible to access some unreleased cities and maps in game like Arabia , Bangkok , and Hong Kong . Some cities even appeared before their official release in the new model, such as Mexico (possibly 2019 map) and the North Pole (possibly Winter Holiday 2019 map) , but only with the city icons in the season hunt, similar to Shanghai (2017 map) and Madagascar (2016 map) , where it wasn't possible to access the maps but the city name and icon appeared in the season hunt.

New Year
New Year is a holiday that is celebrated in the Subway Surfers World Tour updates on January 1st .
Info
Main article: Wikipedia
New Year special World Tour editions
Trivia
was released after the holiday, but it's also dedicated to the beginning of the 2013 year, which introduced the World Tour .
Also this may be related to a play on words, because "New York" sounds similar to "New Year" .
Also this may be related to a play on words, because "New York" sounds similar to "New Year" .
Starting with 2021 , there are no New Year special World Tour editions anymore, it's because the Christmas updates last not three, but four weeks, and a part of them always falls at the beginning of the next year (January).
But there are some New Year special promotions, bundles, sales, etc. Also released Captain Flash and Flash Jet , which are Christmas special surfer and board, but actually a New Year special too, since they were released on December 26th, 2023 , in the New Year Challenge .
But there are some New Year special promotions, bundles, sales, etc. Also released Captain Flash and Flash Jet , which are Christmas special surfer and board, but actually a New Year special too, since they were released on December 26th, 2023 , in the New Year Challenge .
In there was a special event for the New Year — the New Year Challenge (Tag Time Attack) in with Flash Jet and Captain Flash as the rewards. In it released again with map and Stella as the reward.

Nick
Nick can be unlocked by purchasing with  100,000, and was launched as a limited character in  . He was also the eighth limited character in Subway Surfers and the sixth limited character in the World Tour series. Both of his outfits can be purchased for 75, respectively.
Appearance
Default Outfit
Nick is a suntanned Floridian hipster teenage boy from who has green iris eyes and blond hair. He wears a purple tank top with a lightning symbol on it, blue-gray shorts, white, and green cap with the words "Sub Surf" on it, similar to Jake 's and Tagbot 's, red glasses on his cap, arm and knee caps, fingerless gloves, gold necklace, purple and aquamarine shoes.
Speed Outfit
During the edition, he came back with a new outfit called the Speed Outfit that now costs 75. All the purple parts of his clothes, except the lightning symbol on his shirt, change to indigo, and his cap and glasses are replaced by a white and blue shark fin helmet. This also made him the first limited character to receive a different outfit to wear.
Neon Outfit
In , Nick had the Neon Outfit. He wears a white rolled-up jacket revealing his magenta shirt which has the thunder removed. He also wears a light-blue shorts and lime fingerless gloves. His shoes are now purple. It now costs   75.

Nikos
Nikos was launched as a limited character during . He was the 27th limited character in the World Tour series, and the 29th in total. He can be unlocked with 100,000, just like some characters. His first outfit, the Hero Outfit, costs 75. His second outfit, the Hopper Outfit costs 30,000 during . Now, it costs 100.
Appearance
Default Outfit
Nikos is a Greek teenage boy from who wears an Ancient Greek outfit, including a white toga with a blue sash and brown sandals. He has black hair with a green wreath wrapped around his back and both sides of his head, brown eyes & eyebrows, brown Greek sandals and holds a lightning bolt in his hand.
Hero Outfit
Launched in , his first outfit gives him a maroon, red and gold Greek warrior outfit. This includes a helmet, armor, sword, and bracelets.
Hopper Outfit
Launched in , he is dressed as a Greek minotaur. He wears a black shirt with a vest over it, jeans, sneakers, and has the horns, ears, and nose ring of the minotaur, He also holds a flute in his hand.
Trivia
His Hero Outfit pays a resemblance to that of what a Spartan would wear in battle.
He somewhat resembles Zeus , a character in Greek mythology who is said to be able to control the weather.

Nina
Nina is a limited character from . Nina costs 40, unlike the other limited characters who are unlocked through coins. Both her 1st outfit, the Cyberpunk outfit, and her 2nd outfit, the White Night outfit, can be bought for 75, respectively. She is the 50th limited character in Subway Surfers, and the 48th limited character in the World Tour series.
Appearance
Default Outfit
Nina is a German teenage girl from who has short-shaved dark purple hair, silver earrings, dark pink lipstick, dark brown eyes, a black spiked choker and a silver necklace. She wears a garnet blouse with black stripes, short ruffled dark purple shorts and blue tights. She also wears red sneakers. She is holding a microphone.
Cyberpunk Outfit
Launched in , she has a long, green wig with purple decorated welding glasses on the top of her head, as well as green eyeshadow and purple lipstick. She wears a purple dress with a wide black corset, green-and-black striped tights and large black boots with purple laces. She also wears purple-and-green fingerless gloves of some sort. She still wears her choker and necklace, but her choker is purple.
White Night Outfit
Launched in , she has short-shaved cyan hair, cyan goggles and dark pink lipstick. She wears an oversized shirt with a black belt in the middle. Underneath the oversized shirt is a orange striped long-sleeve shirt. She also has red and gray striped pants with a rip on the left pant leg and black boots.
Trivia
She is a reference to the singer Nina Hagen .

Ninja
Ninja is a character that can be unlocked by purchasing with 20,000.
Appearance
Default Outfit
Ninja appears as a man who wears black fingerless gloves that have black-colored wrappings around his forearms and the bottom half of his legs, along with a black suit and a mask that covers all but his brown eyes and black eyebrows - this outfit is known as a shinobi shozoku and is commonly depicted on ninjas. He is also wearing a red belt and a pair of red two-teeth geta sandals.
Yang Outfit
In his Yang Outfit, which costs 30, his silhouette remains entirely the same with the only changes being his color scheme. His black outfit is now entirely white save for his socks, gloves, and arms which remain the same color. His belt changes to be the same color as his gloves and socks, but his entirely red sandals change to a new brown color with black straps.
Flame Outfit
In his Flame Outfit, which costs 30, the sleeves to his black outfit have been removed, his sandals have been changed out for a pair of red and white sneakers, and his black mask now has a red patch with an orange flame symbol placed on the forehead. His belt, gloves, arm wrappings, and leg wrappings have also been switched to white while his pants are now a bright blue with a flame pattern coming up from the bottom.
Trivia
He, Noon ,  Sun , and  Brandon are martial artists.
Unlike them, he is a non-limited character.
Unlike them, he is a non-limited character.
He is the last Core Crew character to receive an Outfit .
Like Sun and before , Jamie and Ninja has always had Jake 's scrollbar poses.
In the 2.0 version of the game (from to 2.39) whenever a character failed to load a silhouette of him was shown.
In 3.0.1 this was changed where Jake is now the silhouette surfer instead of Ninja.
In 3.0.1 this was changed where Jake is now the silhouette surfer instead of Ninja.
Not counting his intro idle, he's the first character to have only 1 idle.
His face texture is the same as Yutani 's old look (from to ).
He is the 36th surfer to have animations reused for a new surfer ( Horse in ).

No Floor Challenge: Floor Is Lava
Subway Surfers No Floor Challenge: Floor Is Lava is a game mode (a type of the Marathon Challenge ) released in (before it was available in the game files as a beta test in ). It always has 5 stages, after completing each other which you could get a character as a reward. This challenge can only be played with certain characters .
The gameplay is the same as : the player has to run while collecting coins and power ups, but cannot touch the ground. The only difference is the visual style. This game mode uses map, but it's different — this time the city isn't overrun with dangerous plants, but now it's filled with hot lava! Also now (unlike ) the game has Guard and Dog — they wear firefighting suits. If you fall on the floor, the lava will become hotter (will become lighter in color) and you will jump up, if you fall on the light lava, you will be caught.
The city was filled with lava because of Yutani 's experiment — a candy volcano, which she demonstrated to visitors at the science fair in . It goes awry again after the mixture turns violent and dangerous, flooding the floor section. She was disqualified after being caught responsible for this disaster.
How to Play?
Avoid the ground , the lava is dangerous!
Don't forget to try the hoverboards !
All points are added up for your total score.
The Dialogue
Yutani : My candy volcano was disqualified at the science fair.
Yutani : I thought volcanoes were SUPPOSED to be dangerous!
Yutani : The eruption should be over soon, I think. But until then...
DON'T TOUCH THE FLOOR!!
Releases
Trivia
This is the second game mode in the No Floor Challenge series, the first being .
This is the second time Yutani had caused a disaster, the first being , where her botanical experiment goes wrong and the mutated plants invaded .
This is also the third game mode with three different stage difficulties, others being Mystery Hurdles and Plant Invasion .
The background music speeds up with each increasing difficulty.
This is the first appearance of the Guard in the firefighting suit.
This is the first new game mode of 2024 .
The thumb up image of the challenge always has an image of the surfer , which is the prize in this edition.
Red Panda is dedicated to it.
In there were Avocado tokens of the Veggie Hunt as rewards
In there were Bell tokens of the Holiday Hunt as rewards
In and , the color of the coins are Red .
In , there is a new glitch. After crashing a hoverboard, you may instantly get caught by the Guard . This was fixed in one of the minor updates.

No Floor Challenge: Plant Invasion
Subway Surfers No Floor Challenge: Plant Invasion is a game mode (a type of the Marathon Challenge ) released in for some users, where was only 3 stages and no characters or boards as rewards (as well as later in ). In , this game mode was officially released and had 5 stages, after completing each of which you could get a character and/or a board as a reward. This challenge can only be played with certain characters .
The player has to run while collecting coins and power ups, but cannot touch the ground. This game mode uses map, but it's different — the city is overrun by dangerous vines. There's no Guard , but instead of him the player can be caught by vines. If you fall on the floor, the vines will become covered with thorns and you will jump up, if you fall on a vine with thorns, you will be caught.
The vines take over the city because Yutani tries to grow new plants at her father's garden using the new growth serum she had recently created, but she accidentally ends up mutating them all. Unbeknownst to her, it's already contaminated before she can apply it. Jake entrusts her to distract the plants while she tries find a way to fix it.
How to Play?
Avoid the ground , the vines are dangerous!
Don't forget to try the hoverboards !
All points are added up for your total score.
The Dialogue
Yutani : Uh oh... I tried my new growth serum in Dad's garden! But it did not go as planned.. And now crazy vines are taking over everything!
Yutani : Can you district the vines, so I can find a way to stop them??
Pleaaaaase?
Yutani : Just run! And whatever you do...
DON'T TOUCH THE FLOOR!!
Releases
Trivia
This game mode was initially released for some users in 3.18.1 update.
This is the second game mode with four difficulty stages after Mystery Hurdles .
In and this game mode was replaced with , however in it reappeared again and then re-appears in every update (except in , and ).
This is the first game mode of No Floor Challenge series, the second being .
When often starting to play the Plant Invasion challenge, the Guard's dog is still heard barking, even if it doesn't appear.
This is the second event to have a custom Background Music , the first being (Gift Rush) in .
The background music speeds up with each increasing difficulty.
The thumb up image of the challenge always has an image of the rewards that can be obtained. , and have special render images and all the rest are just images of a character or a board .
In and , the color of the coins are Green .
In , there is a new glitch. After crashing a hoverboard, you may instantly get caught by the Guard . This was fixed in one of the minor updates.

Noel
Noel  is a limited character from . He costs 60. In , his 1st outfit, the Deep Blue outfit costs 29,000, now 150.
Appearance
Default Outfit
Noel is a green swamp monster from who wears a yellow swim cap with swimming goggles and also wears a red and white striped one-piece swimsuit. On both sides of his head, he has cerulean fins and his eyes are brown while the background of his eyes are cyan. His arms have cerulean fins on them. He has teal legs and feet with his feet being webbed with visible brown pointy nails on them. He has midnight green eyebrows on his head. His neck is much visible to the player.
Deep Blue Outfit
Launched in , his skin color changes to violet with some cyan strokes under his now yellow-orange eyes. His pupils are much more thin. He now wears a belt with a black t-shirt that has a blue star. His fins color change to purple. His fins on his arms are now spikey and you can see fins on his head. His goggles are more big. His arms and legs have blue spots on his skin.

Noon
Noon was launched as a limited character in . She can be purchased with 100,000, just like some of other characters. She was also the 21st limited character in Subway Surfers, and the 19th limited character in the World Tour series. Both her 1st outfit, the Pink Outfit, and her 2nd outfit, the Siam Outfit, can be purchased for 75, respectively.
Appearance
Default Outfit
Noon is a Thai teenage brown-skinned girl from who wears pink shorts, a sleeveless shirt, a green belt, blue boxing gloves and a white line under the left eye. Her normal outfit shows her wearing a high ponytail.
Pink Outfit
Launched in , her hair becomes loose and she now wears a pink dress, a bracelet on both arms, a necklace and a large orchid on her head. The white line under her eye has disappeared. She also wears sand yellow sandals.
Siam Outfit
Launched in , she wears a gold hat with a golden spike on the top of it, as well as a low ponytail. Her dress is colored dark red with gold accents. Her hair is also decorated with a beautiful flower. She also has red lipstick.

Obstacles
Obstacles are objects that try to stop players from progressing in this game. The game would be extremely easy without them and won't give any challenge during gameplay.
Trains
Main article: Trains
Some trains move opposing the direction the player runs while most trains stay stationary. They cannot run through them, roll under them nor jump over them. (unless they have the Super Sneakers or the Pogo Stick ) But some of the trains have ramps on where players can run up them to have a better view of what's to come, and have a chance to collect coins , power-ups or even tokens for the season hunts .
Barriers
There are now 4 types of barriers in the game (1 is only available in ), each barrier requires different actions to dodge them.
The first barrier allows the character to jump over them or roll under them.
The second barrier has the bottom part blocked, so the character can't roll under them, but the player can jump over them.
The third barrier has the top part blocked, so the character can't jump over them, (unless they have the Super Sneaker or if they use a board with Super Jump ) but they can roll under them.
The fourth barrier (only in ) is completely blocked, so the character can't roll under them or jump over them, (unless they have the Super Sneaker or if they use a board with Super Jump ). This barrier can also be found while playing Subway Surfers City along with the first 3 barriers.
They only appear on the ground, but in the , they can also be dropped onto trains .
Bush (with electricity box)
Bushes only appear before and after 'stations'. Players can dodge them by jumping over them. But if they fail to dodge them, their character will stumble and the inspector will start to catch up.
Light Signals
Light Signals only appear between lanes. If they (unluckily) hit them, your character will stumble and the inspector will catch up. These are also essential for completing some missions.
Large garbage bin
Like bushes, garbage bins only appear before and after 'stations'. They can dodge them by jumping over them. However, if they fail to dodge them, their character will fall and the inspector will catch them, ending their run.
Station Lanes
Although they are just as normal as the lanes they run on (the ground), if they don't jump when they reach them, their character will fall and the inspector will catch them, ending their run.
Pillars and Walls
Pillars only appear at middle lanes while walls appear anytime with 1 or 2 tunnels. Bumping into them will end their run. They can avoid pillars by staying at the 2 side lanes, but they must watch out for trains. When walls appear, they must just go through the tunnels, but they must act fast! A train will most probably hit them if they don't change lanes quick enough. There are also some walls which appear way on top of the tracks and will cause their character to fall if they jump towards them.
Trivia
The walls outside the game area also count as obstacles, because if players swipe to go towards them, their character will stumble.
However, when using a Jetpack or a Mega Headstart , swiping their character to the walls won't affect their run.
However, when using a Jetpack or a Mega Headstart , swiping their character to the walls won't affect their run.
The Lowrider board is made specially to avoid tallest barriers (third barrier).
It doesn't make sense on why all of the trains move from the opposing direction the player is running.
Besides that, sometimes on a certain lane they see a non-moving train, and at that same lane a train is moving towards the opposite direction the player is running. If this occurrence happens in real life, who knows how many accidents would had occurred.
Besides that, sometimes on a certain lane they see a non-moving train, and at that same lane a train is moving towards the opposite direction the player is running. If this occurrence happens in real life, who knows how many accidents would had occurred.
During the and edition, the bushes' color changed to yellowish-orange.
During Christmas editions (I.E and ), snow can be seen on top of bushes.
During the , and edition, the bushes' color changed to cherry-blossom pink.
During the edition, the bushes are heart shaped.

Odell
Odell (Odell Beckham Jr.)  is a limited character  from . He can be unlocked with  50.
Appearance
Default Outfit
Odell is a 33 years old American man who is a football player from Baton Rouge, Louisiana. In the game, he wears a brown jersey with the number "13" on it. He wears brown gloves and brown sneakers.
History
Trivia
He is a NFLPA player from real life .
He, Patrick , Saquon , Tom , Lamar and Dak are the NFLPA players/group.
He the 3rd character based on a real-life person . Others being Prince K , Saquon , Patrick , Tom , Lamar , J Balvin , Dak , and Super Runner Fernando .
He's the first surfer to have a beard.
His birthday is November 5, 1992.
His zodiac sign is Scorpio ♏.
His zodiac sign is Scorpio ♏.
He is the 3rd surfer with a known date of birthday.
He is the 2nd surfer who is 33 years old, the first being Demi Lovato .
He is the 2nd surfer who is 33 years old, the first being Demi Lovato .
He is one of the only adults in the game, teaming up with J Balvin , Saquon , Patrick , Tom , Lamar , Dak , Glorgalax , Guard , and Demi Lovato .
He is also the fourth adult male in the game, the first being Guard , the second being Saquon , the third being Patrick , the fifth being Tom , the sixth being Lamar , the seventh being Dak , the eighth being J Balvin , and the ninth being Glorgalax .
He is also the fourth adult male in the game, the first being Guard , the second being Saquon , the third being Patrick , the fifth being Tom , the sixth being Lamar , the seventh being Dak , the eighth being J Balvin , and the ninth being Glorgalax .
Odell is the 9th new character from 2020 , following Liu , Ming , Monkbot , Callum , Jack , Dak , Lamar , and Tom .
He and the other NFLPA surfers are the rarest characters, not returning in 4 years since .
Odell, Jasmine , Miss Maia and Pride Miss Maia are the only characters to fall from the sky in their animations.
His board is Beckham Jr. .

Off-Road Ranger
Off-Road Ranger is a hoverboard released in . Like any other hoverboard, it protects the character from crashing for 30 seconds. When crashed, it will need to recharge for a few seconds before it can be used again.
Appearance
A hoverboard that has a broad front and a narrow rear, which has an orange-white gradiented base with four black triangular design on the sides, resembling a tiger's skin. On the front is a green grill with a frog head, and on the back is a pair of teal-colored binoculars with a yellow and blue macaw riding on it.
Trivia
It, Bay Drifter , and Roo Rush are the 26th, 27th, and 28th boards released in 2026 . The other 2026 boards are Road Rage , Frankmobile , Perfectoplasma , Fire Starter , Xtra Cool , Turbo Love , Gold Rush , The Green Flame , Turbo Love , Marbleous , Arena Rider , Major Speed , Sunny Side Up , Pixel Perfect , Buzz BNY , Fast Fur-ward , Cathletic Ride , Fox Trotter , Sewer Surfer , Rat Trap , 14th Birthday , Bomb-Bastic , Temple Rush , Firefly5 , and Bloom Boom .
It is the eighth board, after Outback , Wave Rider , Ray , Chop-Chop Board , Cook-Express , Moon Cake , and Veggie Velocity .
It is Dan Under 's board .

Old Dusty
Old Dusty is the twenty-seventh limited hoverboard in Subway Surfers and a limited hoverboard from and was re-released during . Like any other board it is activated by 30 seconds by double tapping. It's unlocked by purchasing with 50,000, like most of others limited hoverboards.
During the , it received a new upgrade, Dust Trail, which costed 60, now it costs 30. It also could be bought for real money while Jewelled could be bought for coins.
Appearance
The board is a stereotypical magical flying carpet.
Trivia
This board seems to be the only board that is consistently animated.
It is re-released in .

In the loading screens of Arabia (except the 2017 edition), Tricky (who normally shows off the current exclusive board in her hands) holds Old Dusty in an unseen rolled-up form. This rolled-form does not exist in the files, and was most likely created because the unfurled Old Dusty is too big for her to hold normally.
Flying carpets are normally associated with Arabia due to their use in Aladdin and its earlier appearance in 1001 Arabian Nights.
In the third release of , Old Dusty made an appearance, but it cost 0,99.
Old Dusty is the fourth limited board to get special power. The first is Jingles , the second is Phantom , and the third is Groovy .

Olivia
Appearance
Default Outfit
Olivia is a Canadian teenage girl from who is seen wearing a girl scout's uniform and a furry cap with a bear's paw mark, olive green shorts, red and white striped socks and brown shoes with yellow laces. She has short blonde hair and green eyes.
Skate Outfit
Launched in , she also received the Skate Outfit . In this outfit, her shirt is replaced with a white one, and the red tie, the badges, and her belt are replaced by red stripes with a number 88 on the front and back sides. Her shorts change to black, and her furry cap is replaced by a red backwards ball-cap. She also has some black ice skates dangling from her right shoulder. Her outfit resembles a Canadian hockey fan. Her shoes remain the same from the default outfit.

One Run Challenge
One Run Challenge is not a brand new challenge/game mode in 2023 . It is mechanically the same as the Marathon Challenge, released in update 3.21.0 ( ), but in order to collect the rewards you must score a certain number of points (with the top prize typically requiring 4 million points), and if you fail to reach the points for the award and give up, then your progress for the award will be reset to zero and since , you must wait for 8 hours before you can try again (although the cooldown period can be skipped with ads for up to a certain amount of times per day).
Releases
Trivia
In and , this challenge was held only for a few days.
In , this challenge came back for the first time in 2024 and was available for the whole season. Some of the challenges after were only available during half of the season such as during , and during .
Since , this challenge always uses the surfer that becomes a reward from Tier 30 of Season Hunt .

Oni Hime
Oni Hime is a character released on . She is the 229th character in the game and 14th surfer of 2025 .
Appearance
Default Outfit
Oni Hime is a 14-year-old Japanese teenage girl from who has a long, dark hair in high twin ponytails with orange tips. She wears a green mask, as well as a sleeveless dark top and pink loose pants. Her outfit has various accessories, including a belt with a green clasp and black boots.
Chill Bill Outfit
Released in , she wears a costume referencing the film Kill Bill , which is a dandelion yellow jumpsuit with black vertical stripes and built-in waist belt. Her mask also has the same color, and her hair is now dyed blonde and cut short. She has white and gray sneakers with red lines, and also a pink headband with a large bow on the side.
History
* An exact date was found where it appeared in, otherwise, the edition release date is assumed.
Trivia
She and Saru are the 14th and 15th surfers released in 2025 , after Snake , Tang Yuan , Valentina , Kaleo , Rebeca Roar , Gabriel , Dinorange , Rocky , Rani , Finlay , Ribbon , Chicken Jake , and Mallard Tricky .
She and Saru are the first and second surfers.
She is the fifth Japanese character. The first being Yutani (half American), the second being Harumi , the third being Akira , the fourth being Yuto , and the sixth being Saru .
Her name and design are references to Nezuko Kamado from Demon Slayer .
In Japanese, " Oni " (鬼) means " demon " and " Hime " (姫) means " princess ."
In Japanese, " Oni " (鬼) means " demon " and " Hime " (姫) means " princess ."
She's the fourth 2025 surfer to cost , after Rebeca Roar , Rocky , and Ribbon .
She is the first character to get an outfit in 2026 .
She is also the first surfer from 2025 to get a second outfit released in 2026 .
She is also the first surfer from 2025 to get a second outfit released in 2026 .
Her Chill Bill outfit refers to the movie Kill Bill .
She is the 13th surfer who is 14 years old, after Yuto , Azura , Hamza , Finn , Lily , Ventura , Rudy Rascal , Leo , Sindri , Tang Yuan , Rani , and Finlay .
Her zodiac sign is Gemini ♊️.
Her birthday is between May 21 and June 20 (the exact date is unknown).
Her birthday is between May 21 and June 20 (the exact date is unknown).
Trespasser and Road Rage are her boards .
Her last appearance in the files was .
In the Chinese Version, she is (Suzhou 2025) surfer and her name is You Ying (幽影) .

Online Save
Online Save is a feature added in the that saves your progress on your iCloud/Game Center ( iOS ) or your Google Play Games account ( Android ). But if you aren't 13 or above, you won't be able to use this feature. You can also sign in through Apple if you have an iOS device.
Since the update, you can also save your progress with . Until , the first time you connect with Facebook would unlock Dino . This was changed during the Friends update mid-season in .
Gallery
Trivia
On the new update, you can now use to save your progress.
You can transfer your progress from Android to iOS and from iOS to Android, with .
Some people have a bug which their progress can be lost after they transfer it to another device.

Orni
Orni is the forty-first limited hoverboard in Subway Surfers , and a limited hoverboard exclusive to . Like any other hoverboard, it protects you from crashing for 30 seconds. When crashed, the hoverboard will explode and need to recharge for a few seconds before using again. Like most of others limited hoverboards, Orni costs 50,000.
At the same time of its release, it received a new upgrade, called Smooth Drift , which costs 150, now 60.
Appearance
It's the exact replica of the the Ornithopter . Equipping Smooth Drift will make the wings spread out.
Trivia
Orni is the first limited hoverboard to receive an upgrade right after being introduced.
However, Jingles and Chicky received upgrades too, but they were re-released boards at that time.
However, Jingles and Chicky received upgrades too, but they were re-released boards at that time.
Orni is the reference to the ornithopter , which is an invention of Leonardo da Vinci (an Italian) .
This is the fourth hoverboard which was only released in a re-released edition, with the first being  Birdie , the second being Wave Rider and the third being Ray .
Orni is the second board, the first being Gondola .
It replaced the Gondola in .
This is the third limited hoverboard to receive an upgrade.

Outback
Outback is the fifth limited hoverboard in Subway Surfers, exclusive to . It has a picture of red and brown swirls with white dots on it which represents native Australian art. Just like any other limited hoverboard, Outback costs 50,000.
Appearance
This board is red with a brown and tan pattern on the top of the board. It also has a brown and tan stripe pattern on the bottom.
History
On April 4th, 2013 , the Outback board released in .
It returned in for 50,000.
It returned in for 50,000.
It returned in for 40.
It returned in for 50,000.
Trivia
This hoverboard did not make a reappearance in any re-releases. Instead, it was replaced with Wave Rider and Ray .
Outback is the fifth limited hoverboard released in 2013 , after Liberty , Toucan , Kick-Off , and Chicky .
This board is named after the Australian Outback , the vast, remote, and arid area of Australia.
The Outback's design is likely to resemble native Australian aboriginal art.
Outback is a vastly rare board in the game, but it is not the only rare board in the game. Many rare boards were not used or reused since 2021 when the flash deals had almost every board.
It is the 1st board, the others that follow are Wave Rider , Ray , Chop-Chop Board , Cook-Express , and Veggie Velocity .
It’s Kim ’s 1st board. Her 2nd board is Wave Rider , and her 3rd board is Ray .
For some people who already had the Snowflake from the Daily Calendar in , Outback appeared instead for those who did not have Outback, but had Snowflake previously.
During and , it was used in the Daily Calendar for every player who does not have that board.

Outfits
Outfits are alternate unlockable clothes given to characters (They were normally only given to non-limited characters until ). They change the appearance of a certain character. All outfits except the Dark Outfit (which is FREE) costs either , event coins or tokens. They were added into the game during the edition to be given for Jake and Tricky . In every edition afterwards, outfits are added for other characters like Frank , Lucy and Tagbot . The table below shows the outfits each character has.
Dino , Boombot , Miss Maia , Monkbot , Tom , Lamar , Odell , Dak , Patrick , Saquon , Festive Spike , Frankette , Spacebot , Ox , Rat , Buzz , Pridebot , Pride Jake , Pride Fresh , Pride Spike , Pride Tricky , Pride Yutani , Pride Frank , Parkour Rin , Tiger , Charlie , Super Runner Jake , Super Runner Tricky , Pride Miss Maia , Super Runner Fresh , Super Runner Yutani , The Burger King , Elf Jake , Elf Fresh , Elf Yutani , Rabbit , Tutti , Frutti , Spraybot , Bruno , Yutani Harlequin Toad , Outatime Jake , J Balvin , Captain Flash , Clockwork Johnny , Azura , Dragon , Astra , Meggan , Red Panda , Hamza , Faiza , Teabot , Finn , Electra , Hammy-Bee , Pixel Jake , Ballerina Tricky , Guard King , Rudy Rascal , Ventura , Glorgalax , Hélène , Leo , Pins , Ozzy , Audrey , Billy Bean , Kedi , Ruhi , Dr. Flyman , Pumpkin Pete , Ginger , Logan , Sindri , Demi Lovato , Snowy , Grand Juke , Snake , Tang Yuan , Rocky , Ribbon , Chicken Jake , Mallard Tricky , LOC , Costa , Yutani Tree Frog , Rochelle Rebelle , White Rabbit , Tara , Sunny , 8 Ball Jake , Piper , El Primo , Spike , Dynamike , Poco , Max , Alma Brava , Crewmate Jake , Crewmate Tricky , Crewmate Spike , Crewmate King , Crewmate Tasha , Crewmate Guard , Mr. Gobbles , Ballerina Latticina , Frank Noir , Sean Snow , Rosalita , Lorcan , Horse , Vittorio , Sprinkle , Tsuki Chan , Toaxx , Red , Chuck , Golden Guardian , Dan Under , and Marie Macaron currently have no outfits.
Yutani , Zombie Jake , Alex , Edison , Zuri , Jaro , Brandon , Rabbot , Rin , Kareem , Ace , Mimi , Amy , Liu , Ming , Jack , Tankbot , Morgan , Noel , Festive Jake , Festive Yutani , Qin , Hou , Darryl , Lana , Trym , Alexandre , Akira , Gingerbot , Dummy , Zi Hao , Alia , Fantasma , Super Runner Fernando , Soul , Catrine , Rain , Tainá , Yuto , Hali , Ji-Yeong , Lawrence , Thunder , Skye , Stella , Lucky , Riley , Leif , Valentina , Kaleo , Rebeca Roar , Gabriel , Rani , Finlay , Oni Hime , Saru , Stevie , Berta , Asher , Peter , Henry , Mateo , Joo Won , Si Woo Rosie , Holly , Mia , Enzo , Bunny Betty , Kaito , Ratak , Lestari , Sandy , Lily , and Pierre currently have 1 outfit.
From to , they were separated from the surfer's original outfit. This means that when purchasing an outfit, you would only get that outfit, and not the surfer along with it. You were able to wear this outfit, even if you didn't have the original surfer. In Subway Studio , only outfits after to were separated. Since 3.54.1, they are no longer separated and appear again with the surfer's original outfit.

Release History
Trivia
Prior to 2025 , no character could have more than two outfits, when they received in rare exceptions they saw a second character, limited to 3 clothes like the originals, these were the case of Zombie Jake who would be Jake 's other clothes, Elf Tricky who would be Tricky 's other clothes and Festive Fresh which would be Fresh's fourth outfit.
Jake 's Dark Outfit is currently the only FREE GIFT outfit in the game. (Costing 0 )
Dummy 's Skelly Outfit and Gingerbot 's Wrapper Outfit is currently the most expensive outfit in the game, costing 300 .
Nick is the first limited character to receive an outfit.
Mina is the first limited character to receive an outfit right after her release.
However, Edison was the first male limited character to do so.
She is also the first limited character to receive two outfits.
Mina is the first limited character to receive an outfit right after her release.
However, Edison was the first male limited character to do so.
However, Edison was the first male limited character to do so.
She is also the first limited character to receive two outfits.
Yutani is currently the latest token character to receive an outfit and it is called the Gadget outfit.
Miss Maia , Dino and Boombot and are currently the only outfitless non-limited characters .
Sometimes, outfits would fit the current theme of the game. King's Count Outfit fits the Halloween theme, and it was released in New Orleans, which also fits the theme. Another thematic outfit is Eddy's Trick Outfit or Mike's Jäger Outfit.
Nick was the first character to reappear in a character reappearance along with his outfit.
Amy , Ming and Liu are the only special characters of the Chinese version that have their second outfit as original, their second costumes in the original version of the game are actually their original outfits in the Chinese version.
Some characters change their animation in certain outfits. Mei's Islander outfit is an example.
Some characters have a outfit that change their skin color. Amira's Genie Outfit is an example.
Some characters have a outfit that changes their eyes color. Clementine's Frosty Outfit is an example.
Maeko is the first character to receive a new outfit in less than 9 months. The others being Maeko , Amy , Liu , Ming , Festive Tricky , Lana , Bonnie , Darryl , Mala , Clementine , Alfie , Ji-Yeong , Valentina , Gabriel , Rani , and Finlay .

Ox is a limited character from . She can be unlocked for 60.
Appearance
Default Outfit
Ox is a Chinese girl from Asia. Who wears a large ox mask and a long red Chinese robe (which also has a gold cloud pattern on the ribbon tied around her waist; she also has some sort of gold attachment onto it). She also has long dark lustrous hair with a small bun in the back. She also wears white tights with black, flat shoes.

Ozzy
Ozzy is a limited character released in . He is the 202nd character in the game.
Appearance
Ozzy is a 16-year-old American teenage boy and jazz performer from who wears a red and purple jacket with a yellow plaid pattern, with a purple vest, yellow shirt, and red tie under eachother, yellow pants, black rectangular sunglasses, red shoes, and a yellow hat with purple ribbon. His hair is braided in the back and he holds a black and gold clarinet as a prop.

Parkour Rin
Parkour Rin is a limited surfer from . She costs 12,000.
Appearance
Default Outfit
Parkour Rin is basically Rin except she has straight, dyed hair in black color and hazel eyes. As for the clothing, she wears a brown hat with a zipper design, a blue tank top, revealing the midriff, and red dungarees with two black buttons and sneakers.
History
* An exact date was found where she appeared in, otherwise, the edition release date is assumed.
Trivia
This surfer is an alternative version of Rin , making Rin the first limited surfer to have a variant.
Parkour Rin is the third Surfer, the first being Coco , the second being Alexandre and the fourth being Hélène .
Parkour Rin is the 21st character released in 2021 , after Frankette , Spacebot , Ox , Rat , Qin , Hou , Zayn , Darryl , Lana , Bonnie , Buzz , Trym , Pridebot , Pride Jake , Pride Fresh , Pride Spike , Pride Tricky , Pride Yutani , Pride Frank , and Alexandre .
In the Chinese Version, her name is Mia (米娅) (not to be confused with Mia from ) and her textures and graphics changed.
She is the final character to be in the old style, and not the and onward style.
Parkour Rin is the cheapest character you could ever unlock for Event Coins .

So far, she is one of the few surfers to be used once a year.

Appearance
Default Outfit
Patrick is a 30 years old American man who is a football player from Tyler, Texas. In the game, he wears a red jersey with the number "15" on it. He wears white and red pants, white wristbands, red sneakers, and a red bandana.
History
Trivia

He is also the third adult male in the game, the first being Guard , the second being Saquon , the fourth being Odell , the fifth being Tom , the sixth being Lamar , the seventh being Dak , the eighth being J Balvin , and the ninth being Glorgalax .

Peter is a character released during . He is the 239th character in the game and the 24th surfer of 2025 .
Appearance
Default Outfit
Peter is a 14-year-old teenage boy from who has a long blonde hair and a mole on his left cheek. He wears a black shirt over his orange hoodie, to be paired with his white sneakers bearing black and orange accents. Along with that, he also has a green beanie, green shorts, and yellow socks.

Phantom
Phantom is a limited edition hoverboard exclusive to . It is the thirty-third limited hoverboard in Subway Surfers . Like any other hoverboard, it will protect you from crashing for 30 seconds. When crashed, the board will explode and recharge for a few seconds before it can be used again. Like most of others limited hoverboards, it costs 50,000.

It takes the shape of a black cloak. It has two black hands floating on each side of the board.

Philip
Appearance
Default Outfit
Philip is a Monegasque teenage boy from who appears to be a tennis player that has blond hair and blue eyes. He wears a salmon shirt with a gold crown, turquoise shorts, white socks, beige sneakers with salmon laces and teal soles, a gold watch, and turquoise sunglasses. He also carries a tennis racket that has a red brim and a turquoise handle.
Racer Outfit
Launched in , he wears a red racing helmet with the eye cover open. He has a red, long sleeved racing tee with a white stripe going over it diagonally, red trousers and white trainers, he also now carries a trophy instead of a tennis racket.
Captain Outfit
Launched in , he dons a sailors hat. He wears a white shirt with a peacock blue tie, a white undercoat and a midnight blue coat. He wears white gloves, pale brown shorts and peacock blue trainers with high white socks, he also now carries a monocular instead of a tennis racket.

Phoenix
Phoenix is a limited character from . He can be unlocked by collecting 400 or 75. His first outfit, the Party Business Outfit can be bought for 150 ( 29,000 in ) and the Summer Outfit can be bought for 150 (Tier 30 in ).
Appearance
Default Outfit
Phoenix is an African-American teenage dark-skinned boy from with a blonde 80’s style high-top fade. He also sports a white t-shirt with a small vermilion sleeveless basketball jersey with the number 23 on it, the shorts that he wears are white with vermilion stripes on the sides. He wears long socks with vermilion and blue stripes on them, he has some blue roller skates with a black base and orange wheels. He has almond eyes with a blue wristband on his left arm and one singular small gold earring on his right ear.
Party Business Outfit
Launched in , he received his Party Business outfit, in this outfit his hair becomes longer and he wears indigo sunglasses with dark pink lenses, he wears a zipper jacket with indigo, pink and yellow colors with a white shirt behind it. He has indigo sleeves and his blonde hair looks a little darker. He also has long pink socks and rollers in red and yellow colors, the wheels look a little darker as well as their holding part.
Summer Outfit
Launched in , his hair is now curly and black with golden highlights, a white, dull blue and dull red sweater, gray shorts, white socks with dark red, his roller skates are black with red wheels and he has 2 golden piercings in his right ear.
History
* An exact date was found where he appeared in, otherwise, the edition release date is assumed.

Pie Express
Pie Express is a hoverboard released in . Like any other hoverboard, it protects the character from crashing for 30 seconds. When crashed, it will need to recharge for a few seconds before it can be used again.
Appearance
It is shaped like the standard hoverboard but has the design of an Apple pie . When Double Jump is added, it have an apple at the back and a green booster underneath.
Trivia
It and Gobble Trouble are the 48th and 49th boards released in 2025 , after Hyper Viper , Lantern , Override , Fresh Love , Heartstopper , Dear Dart , Roarsome , Arara Board , Moongazer , Purple Spin , Cyan Note , Blue Riff , Eggscalibur , Bloomster , Edinburst , Guard Board , Trespasser , Mizu Dash , Zapline , Seven Seas , 13th Birthday , You Are Here , Freebird , Glitter Blaster , Float-Booster , Feeling Beachy , Street Style , Roll & Race , Midsummer , Business Time , Rabbit Racer , Circuit Bunny , E-Racer , Brainstormer , Principal's Nightmare , The De-lyre-ious , Moon Biter , 8 Ball , Piece Of Cake , Finish Line , Motor Mania , Fiesta , Shin Supreme , Galactic Peel , Charmer , Bias Boom , and Four-leaf Flux .
It is the sixth board, the first being Liberty , the second being Yellow Cab , the third being Uprock , the fourth being Color Shift , and the fifth being Gobble Trouble .
It is Rosie 's board .
There was a glitch on this hoverboard where the ending animation would be bugged when the Double Jump upgrade was turned on. It was fixed in .
In the Chinese Version, it's 2026 board and it's called Delivery Express (派送速递) .

Piece Of Cake
Piece Of Cake is a limited hoverboard released in . Like any other hoverboard, it protects the character from crashing for 30 seconds. When crashed, it will need to recharge for a few seconds before it can be used again.
Appearance
It is a simple blue hoverboard that has a rectangular-shaped edge on the front and round-shaped edge on the back. It has a black-and-white checkered design on the front, next to a wavy pattern. The rear side has a pink cushion and two pipes.
Trivia
It, Finish Line , and Motor Mania are the 39th, 40th, and 41st boards released in 2025 , after Hyper Viper , Lantern , Override , Fresh Love , Heartstopper , Dear Dart , Roarsome , Arara Board , Moongazer , Purple Spin , Cyan Note , Blue Riff , Eggscalibur , Bloomster , Edinburst , Guard Board , Trespasser , Mizu Dash , Zapline , Seven Seas , 13th Birthday , You Are Here , Freebird , Glitter Blaster , Float-Booster , Feeling Beachy , Street Style , Roll & Race , Midsummer , Business Time , Rabbit Racer , Circuit Bunny , E-Racer , Brainstormer , Principal's Nightmare , The De-lyre-ious , Moon Biter , and 8 Ball .

Pink
Pink is a limited character from , where she costed 210 . Her first outfit, the Spellcaster Outfit, was released in costing 35,000 (now costing 150). Her second outfit, the Witchcap Outfit, was released in as part of Season Hunt and could be unlocked by collecting 400 (now costing 150).
Appearance
Default Outfit
Pink is an African-Canadian teenage girl from , with blue eyes and blonde hair with pink and cyan highlights. She has pink eyebrows, earrings, a skirt, cuffs, shoes, and a collar. She wears a yellow sleeved shirt tucked into her skirt with a cyan bow on the top center and another yellow bow on her shoes. Her leggings are white with a pink tint to them with hearts. Lastly, she has a white mask on her face.
Spellcaster Outfit
Launched in the update, she wears a white shirt with a black and a turquoise scarf and a turquoise tie. Her skirt is black plaid in color and her leggings are black but a bit open at her knees. Both her shoes and spray can are turquoise. She also wears a brown witch hat with gold and turquoise glasses.
Witchcap Outfit
Launched in , her hair now has pink ends, she wears a black face mask with pink straps going across it, black and pink mushroom hat with a white skull and two spots on it, pink sweatshirt with long puffy sleeves, brown necklace with white teeth, black dress with leaves on it, pink pouch with brown strings, black and pink striped leggings with black boots. Lastly she has a black and pink spray can and her nails are painted black.

She is the second character to be named after a color, the first being Rosa , which is a color in Portuguese and Spanish.

Pins
Pins is a limited character released in . It is the 201st character of the game.
Appearance
Pins is a voodoo doll from Louisiana with a cornflower blue face, dark blue eyebrows, charcoal body, brown and cornflower blue limbs, and claret and emerald hair. It also has one red eye and a black button eye. Its mouth is stitched together. On the top of its head is three pins. Its body has a pink heart stitched onto it 🩷.
History
* An exact date was found where it appeared in, otherwise, the edition release date is assumed.
The Legend of Pins' Origin
As the legend goes... Somewhere deep in the swamps of New Orleans... A girl stumbled upon a voodoo doll. Seemingly lost, she decided to take it home. That night... No one knows exactly what happened. All we know is that it was the first of many encounters. Many a folk have come forth to tell their story over the years... And they've given it a name... Pins.

Piper
Piper is a character released during . She is the 244th character in the game and the 29th surfer of 2025 .
Appearance
Piper is a blonde brawler who has a high bun hairstyle and dressed like a princess. She has a blue hairpin worn on the left side of her head, a pair of pink fingerless gloves, and white shoes. Meanwhile, her blue ball gown has a pink belt wrapped around her waist, a yellow flower on her chest, as well as white collar and lace at the end of her sleeves. She also carries her pink umbrella in-game.
Trivia
She, El Primo , Spike , Dynamike , Poco , and Max are the 29th, 30th, 31st, 32nd, 33rd, and 34th surfers released in 2025 , after Snake , Tang Yuan , Valentina , Kaleo , Rebeca Roar , Gabriel , Dinorange , Rocky , Rani , Finlay , Ribbon , Chicken Jake , Mallard Tricky , Oni Hime , Saru , LOC , Stevie , Berta , Costa , Yutani Tree Frog , Rochelle Rebelle , Asher , White Rabbit , Peter , Tara , Henry , Sunny , and 8 Ball Jake .
Her character ability for the Brawl Stars Showdown event is called Gunbrella , where she shoots a projectile at whoever is in first place to slow them down.
The umbrella that she is carrying is not an actual umbrella, but rather a gun disguised as an umbrella.
The umbrella that she is carrying is not an actual umbrella, but rather a gun disguised as an umbrella.
Her appearance in Subway Surfers is slightly different from her original appearance in Brawl Stars. In Subway Surfers, she wears white sneakers; while in Brawl Stars, her default skin in that game wears blue heeled shoes instead.
She rolls to the right instead of rolling to the front.
Piece Of Cake is her board .
In the Chinese version, her name is Peipei (佩佩) .

Player Profile
Player Profile is a game mechanic introduced in . It shows a player's currently selected character and hoverboard , their Top Run country, their high score, their amount of characters, boards, achievements owned, destinations played, multiplier number and their Top Run medals.
Trivia
Before this released in , profile portraits of Jake , Tricky , Fresh , Spike , Yutani , Ella , King and Tagbot and Default profile frame were introduced in in the Top Run , but profile portraits of Dino , Boombot , Hammy-Bee , Ballerina Tricky , and Pixel Jake were leaked in the game files.

Poco
Poco is a character released during . He is the 248th character in the game and the 33rd surfer of 2025 .
Appearance
Poco is a yellow-skinned skeleton Mariachi who wears a midnight blue sombrero and suit with a red ribbon tie. He also wears a pair of black shoes, has pink and green dots around his eyes along with a heart in the middle, and carries a pink guitar with a yellow skull that serves as its headstock.
Trivia
He, Piper , El Primo , Spike , Dynamike , and Max are the 29th, 30th, 31st, 32nd, 33rd, and 34th surfers released in 2025 , after Snake , Tang Yuan , Valentina , Kaleo , Rebeca Roar , Gabriel , Dinorange , Rocky , Rani , Finlay , Ribbon , Chicken Jake , Mallard Tricky , Oni Hime , Saru , LOC , Stevie , Berta , Costa , Yutani Tree Frog , Rochelle Rebelle , Asher , White Rabbit , Peter , Tara , Henry , Sunny , and 8 Ball Jake .
Poco is the third skeleton character in the game, after Manny and Bob the Blob .
He is also the second Mariachi in the game, after Manny with his Mariachi outfit.
He is also the second Mariachi in the game, after Manny with his Mariachi outfit.
His character ability for the Brawl Stars Showdown event is called Power Chord , where he uses his guitarrón to block the other players' vision.

Pogo Stick
Pogo Stick (formerly called the Power Jumper ) is a power-up in Subway Surfers . When collected, it will make your character jump really high into the sky filled with coins . Players might also have a chance to land on trains, rooftops, etc. It was introduced to the game in .
Trivia
This is one of five power-ups not to be upgradable, along with the Super Mysterizer , Old Headstart , Mega Headstart , and held Score Booster .
Its ability is slightly similar to the Super Sneakers , just that it's instant-use, has a different look and it makes the character jump a lot higher than normal.
Players can also get a chance to land on a roof after using it.
The Pogo Stick is one of the few power-ups that helps players get coins. The others are the Coin Magnet , the Super Sneakers , and the Jetpack .
It doesn’t appear at the same places that normal power-ups would appear, most of the time it would appear in front of roofs with coins on them.
The Pogo Stick shares the same colors as the Jetpack item.
The coins that appear in the air when the Pogo Stick is in use are arch-shaped.
One of the coin arches will have a random power-up at the end.
Like the Jetpack , the Pogo Stick makes players invincible to everything when they are on it. Unlike the Jetpack, if they see anything down below that is "good" (e.g. a key, mystery box, hunt token) they can swipe down at any time to land immediately and have a chance at getting the item. However, on the Jetpack, they are forced to miss it.
When Players use the Pogo Stick with a magnet, they'll earn every coin in each row. This is a good way to collect lots of coins at once.
It was formerly called the Power Jumper, but the name was changed to Pogo Stick in .
It contains exactly 45 coins, divided into 3 lanes, each lane contains 15 coins.
You can use this to do the Broken Jump Glitch .

Navigation

Power-Ups
Power-Ups are items in the game that either increases a certain ability or gives the character a special ability. There are 5 main power-ups in the game, which are the 2X Multiplier , Coin Magnet , Jetpack , Pogo Stick and the Super Sneakers . Certain missions that require the player to use 3 or more power-ups also count the hoverboard as one of them. Each power-up has a certain function, and can be used during gameplay. Some of them can also be upgraded to increase their usage time limit, but will need coins .
Four of the main power-ups (Coin Magnet, Jetpack, Super Sneaker and 2X Multiplier) can be upgraded on a scale of 6. Each upgrade increases their duration on the game by 5 seconds. The maximum duration of a power-up in the game is 30 seconds (with the exception of the Jetpack, which is 25 seconds). The power jumper counts towards a fifth power up in missions.
As the game progresses, more and more power-ups are added into the game. The following list lists out the power-ups currently available and the ones already removed from the game.
The first upgrade (for the 2X Multiplier , Coin Magnet , Jetpack and the Super Sneakers ) is 500, the second upgrade is 1000, the third upgrade is 3000, the fourth upgrade is 10000 and the last upgrade is 60000.
Currently Available Power-Ups
Removed/Unused Power-Up

In his character preview and scroll bar pose, he wears purple glasses, but on the homescreen and during gameplay his glasses are red instead. This is because his Home Screen and running model is different than the menu. SYBO applied the wrong color on the texture mapping to his glasses.

Pride Spike is basically Spike except that his mohawk is rainbow and he wears a white tank top, a black jacket with spikes at the shoulders and a pink heart on the back, a green and red tartan kilt with a Scottish purse and black shoes with pink shoelaces.
History
* An exact date was found where he appeared in, otherwise, the edition release date is assumed.
Trivia
Pride Spike is the 16th character released in 2021 , after Frankette , Spacebot , Ox , Rat , Qin , Hou , Zayn , Darryl , Lana , Bonnie , Buzz , Trym , Pridebot , Pride Jake , and Pride Fresh .
He's the second Spike character after Festive Spike .
He is Pride surfer the others being, Pride Jake , Pride Tricky, Pride Fresh , Pride Yutani , Pride Frank , Pridebot , and Pride Miss Maia .
He is the second character to wear Scottish clothing, the first being Callum .
His smile is a little broken with black on the side. This was not fixed yet.
In the Chinese Version, he made an appearance in the same update everywhere (Banners, Promo images..) along with the other Pride surfers, but he wasn't released due to the fact that LGBTQIA+ rights are not supported in China.
However, Pride Frank was later released as (Hangzhou 2025) surfer, which makes him and Pride Miss Maia the only Pride surfers to be released in the Chinese Version.
However, Pride Frank was later released as (Hangzhou 2025) surfer, which makes him and Pride Miss Maia the only Pride surfers to be released in the Chinese Version.

Prince K
Prince K is a character that can be unlocked by purchasing with a whopping 980,000. Prince K is the most expensive character of all characters in Subway Surfers . His 1st outfit, the Jag Outfit, costs 280. His 2nd outfit, the Shine Outfit, also costs 280.
Khalid Ibn-Malik is his real name but, the crew calls him "Prince K".
Appearance
Default Outfit
Prince K is a man with tan skin, who wears a dark brown suit and white socks with red and green stripes, a keffiyeh, and golden shoes, watch and sunglasses. It seems that he's of Arabian or northern African descent, due to his unique outfit.
Jag Outfit
During the edition, he received the Jag Outfit . He wears a white leopard robe, 2 golden headbands, and his sunglasses have turned gold.
Shine Outfit
During the , he received the most expensive outfit, the Shine Outfit, in which his clothes use a white and shiny color palette, and he receives a necklace.
Trivia
He is the second royal character, the first being King .
He, Tony and Jamie are the only characters with specs.
Unlike the other two, he is a non-limited character.
Unlike the other two, he is a non-limited character.
He is the most expensive character that can be obtained by coins, and also his Shine Outfit is the most expensive outfit that can be obtained by keys, although it’s been surpassed a few times, but only for a month each time it happened.
Since he costs 980,000, he is not only the most expensive character, but also the most expensive item that can be bought in the game.
He's the first character with two words in the name.
He had a sale along with many other surfers back during , he cost 99.
The cost of his Jag Outfit changed to 150 in or . It changed again to 280 in
His character movement was later used by J Balvin in , making him the second character to have animations reused for a new surfer.
Windglider is his favorite board , according to the old Subway Surfers website .
In version 3.42.3 ( ), his outfits were seperated
In the Chinese Version, his name becomes slightly different since , the letter "K" in his name was removed for unknown reasons, now he's simply called Prince (王子) .
In Subway Surfers+ , he costs 9,000 .
According to Subway Surfers City , he comes from a family with almost limitless wealth.
