Principal's Nightmare
Principal's Nightmare is a limited hoverboard released in . Like any other hoverboard, it protects the character from crashing for 30 seconds. When crashed, it will need to recharge for a few seconds before it can be used again.
Appearance
This is a dark green hoverboard that has a silver frame around it, with five spikes on the front and a chain on the right side. Its rear side is more darker and bluish green. For designs, it has a yellow crown with two green holes, an elongated, white " H " in Serif font, and lastly, a yellow and green striped tie strapped on the back.
Trivia
It, E-Racer , and Brainstormer are the 33rd, 34th, and 35th boards released in 2025 , after Hyper Viper , Lantern , Override , Fresh Love , Heartstopper , Dear Dart , Roarsome , Arara Board , Moongazer , Purple Spin , Cyan Note , Blue Riff , Eggscalibur , Bloomster , Edinburst , Guard Board , Trespasser , Mizu Dash , Zapline , Seven Seas , 13th Birthday , You Are Here , Freebird , Glitter Blaster , Float-Booster , Feeling Beachy , Street Style , Roll & Race , Midsummer , Business Time , Rabbit Racer , and Circuit Bunny .
It is Henry 's board .
This is the second hoverboard to have the longest name (16 characters long including the punctuation), the first being Back to the Future .
In the Chinese Version, it's 2026 board and it's called Formation Breaker (破阵者) .

Navigation

Promo Codes
Unlock Codes were a feature that were added in the update. It allowed players to redeem various promotional offers by going into settings, scrolling down to the "Promo Codes" option, and then entering a code provided by Kiloo & SYBO Games .
In the update, the feature was removed for iOS users, with Kiloo stating that they were not able to continue the feature due to App Store guidelines. However, the feature returned with the update. Before , its name was Promo Code.
However, in the update, this feature was discontinued on the iOS version again without any reason, But the promo codes came back for iOS with this link: https://subwaysurfers.com/redeem
Then later in 2021 in the update the feature was removed for both Android and IOS users and hasn't returned since.
Codes
The following table is a list of all the promo codes that were released by Kiloo & SYBO Games :
Gallery
Trivia
On almost every update day (usually on Thursdays) you could tune into Sybo's livestream on YouTube for free Promo Codes usually shown around 8-9 AM EST when this feature was still in the game.
Sybo would occasionally release promo codes through YouTube , Instagram , Facebook , and X (formerly Twitter) .
This feature is still available in the Chinese version

Appearance
Pumpkin Pete is a 13-year-old teenage boy from , he has a carved pumpkin on his head, grey dungarees with two yellow buttons with red thread inside and an orange pocket. Also, he wears a black shirt under his dungarees. He has orange and yellow striped socks with black, blue, orange and green shoes.

Punk
Punk is a limited hoverboard in Subway Surfers . It’s a limited hoverboard exclusive to . Like any other hoverboard, it protects you from crashing for 30 seconds. When crashed, the hoverboard will explode and need to recharge for a few seconds before using again. It costs 50.000.
Appearance
It's a purple hoverboard with a black, purple, and pink design on it. There's piercings and spikes all over the board, really igniting the feel of a punk. The board also has a purple part of the star, and "PUNK" is written on the bottom in pink.
Trivia
It is the 1st punk themed hoverboard.
It is the first board, the second being I-Scream .
It is the third hoverboard to have something writing on it (saying the word "Punk"), first being Bubblegum , saying the word “Pop”, the second being Jazz (saying the word “Jazz”), the fourth being Superhero (saying the word "Bam") and the fifth being Sharpeed (saying the word "Rivals").
In , it can be unlocked for 50.000.
In , it came back for 80.
In , , and , it came back for with Cathy and Morgan .
In , it can be unlocked for or in a Bundle for 200.000.
It last returned in .
Its name is similar to Spike 's Punk Outfit. This outfit also matches with Punk .
It's Callum 's first board . Their second board is I-Scream .
According to Bundle offers, Callum , Nina , Cathy and Morgan share this board.
It is not the only hoverboard that its name is a music genre . Others (or some others) are Jazz and Heavy Metal .
In the Chinese Version, it's called Punk Skateboard (朋克滑板) .

Qin
Qin  is a limited edition character from . He can be unlocked with  95,000 coins. His first outfit, the Warrior Outfit, can be unlocked with keys 100.
Appearance
Default Outfit
Qin is a Chinese teenage boy from / , who wears a traditional red, black and gold shi er liu mian hat and a red, black and gold mianfu with a dragon and mountain pattern on the underside of the outfit as well as white swirls on the sleeves.
Warrior Outfit
Launched in / , he wears a warrior outfit (hence his outfit name). He no longer wears his red hat and his hair is now in a man bun.
History
* An exact date was found where he appeared in, otherwise, the edition release date is assumed.

Queen of Hearts
Queen of Hearts is a limited hoverboard in Subway Surfers . It is the special board for .
Appearance
It is a square board with the image of the card queen of hearts with a spray can in the center. There are also some piercings, spikes on the board, and there are spray cans painted on one upper and one lower needle. At the bottom, a heart is painted in white and pink, small upper corners and large rear ones.
Trivia
It is a reference to Queen of Hearts card in the solitaire deck.
It is the second board, the first being Roller , the third being Astro Tune , and the fourth being Interstellar .
In the Trailer the board is bigger than it is in game.
In , it returned as a free gift.
In , it was re-released for 15,000.
In , it came back during Black Friday in the One Run Challenge in .
It is the 14th board of 2021 . After Secret Society , Endeavour , Discovery , Crane , Buddy Bear , Uprock , Bunny , Shuttle , 9th Birthday , Viking , Dragon Boat , Paint Palette , Sakura and Beach .
For unknown reasons, it did not reappear in .
It came back during in the Season Hunt for 80 .
It's Cleo 's first board and Darryl 's second board . Darryl 's first board is Uprock . While Cleo ’s second board is Tagger , and her third board is Sunny Sailor .
In the Chinese Version, this board have +5 Score (exclusive upgrade) and also have Double Jump upgrade.

Unlike Rat , Ox , Tiger , Dragon , Snake , and Hyper Viper , Rabbit did not return in for unknown reasons.

Rabbit Racer
Rabbit Racer is a limited hoverboard released in . Like any other hoverboard, it protects the character from crashing for 30 seconds. When crashed, it will need to recharge for a few seconds before it can be used again.
Appearance
It's a board with a sharp front and a rear engine wrapped in a golden band. Its base has a red background and a winking bunny design, imitating the expression of Peter 's hat in his Bun and Run Outfit . When equipped with Double Jump , a red spoiler is attached to the back.
Trivia
It, Business Time , and Circuit Bunny are the 30th, 31st, and 32nd boards released in 2025 , after Hyper Viper , Lantern , Override , Fresh Love , Heartstopper , Dear Dart , Roarsome , Arara Board , Moongazer , Purple Spin , Cyan Note , Blue Riff , Eggscalibur , Bloomster , Edinburst , Guard Board , Trespasser , Mizu Dash , Zapline , Seven Seas , 13th Birthday , You Are Here , Freebird , Glitter Blaster , Float-Booster , Feeling Beachy , Street Style , Roll & Race , and Midsummer .
It is Peter 's board .
There was a glitch on this hoverboard where the ending animation would be bugged when the Double Jump upgrade was turned on. It was fixed in .
In , it costs in Offer Trails .
In the Chinese Version, this board is (Sky City) board and called Rabbit Flies Forward (兔飞猛进) .

Rabbot
Rabbot  is a character released in the update. She's the 55th limited character in Subway Surfers, and the 53rd limited character in the World Tour series. She’s the first character made for the Easter Event. She costs 40.
Appearance
Default Outfit
Rabbot has the appearance of a robot rabbit with the colors pink and bronze.
Ironbun Outfit
Launched in , her colours have been changed to red and gold. Her leg springs and shoulder joints have also been recoloured to black from the original bronze colour.
History
* An exact date was found where she appeared in, otherwise, the edition release date is assumed.
Trivia
Her name is a combination of the words "Rabbit" and "Robot".
She's the fourth newcomer of 2019 after Alicia , Miss Maia , and Hugo .
She's the fourth robot character in the game, along with Tagbot , Boombot , Monkbot , Tankbot , Spacebot , Frankette , and Gingerbot
Rabbot is the first robot character that's feminine.
Rabbot is indeed female, due to her appearance in an International Woman's Day photo with other female surfers.
She's the first Easter character, the second being Bonnie from , and the third being George from .
Frankette was based on her body model.
In an unknown update, she lost HD graphics.
She didn’t come back in and along with every other Easter item because that editions weren’t Easter themed.
In the Chinese version's (Hohhot) update, she got her Ironbun outfit.
In the Chinese version, her name is Wow! Rabbit Robot (哇! 兔子机器人) and she is a non-limited character that costs 100 .
Her name was misspelled in the Word Hunt as it spelled "Rabott" instead of "Rabbot"
She is the fourth surfer to receive an outfit in 2023 (in ), after George , Bonnie and Festive Frank .
In an unknown update (probably ), Rabbot lost eye movement. This also happened with Olivia , Dylan , and Alicia who were fixed later, but Rabbot still needs to be fixed.
She is also the first and currently only female robot surfer.
She, Tagbot , Tankbot , Gingerbot , and Dummy are the only robots to have outfits.
Her Ironbun Outfit is based off Iron Man .
In the 3.42.3 version, her Ironbun Outfit became limited.

Radiant Rider
Radiant Rider is a limited hoverboard released in
Appearance
It takes the shape of a fanous (Ramadan lantern) with a golden metal frame, a hoop on top and a pink inside covered with golden patterns, there’s a golden bottom with a pink flame.
Trivia
It is the third board to use "Rider" on its name, the first being Wave Rider and the second being Rave Rider .
It is made to celebrate the month of Ramadan .
Even though it was released during the update, it is not an board. It was most likely supposed to be for the update. The same thing happened to Mayo Mania during the update because it was released early for the update.
It is the 13th board to released in 2024 after Skyrocket , Electro Shock , Bada-Bomb , Confetti Crush , Red Velvet , Roaring Heart , Lunar Scroll , Astro Tune , Interstellar , Shamrock Shebang , Megga Bite , and Fast and Festive .

Raggedy Runner
Raggedy Runner  is a hoverboard released during . It can be bought for 20.000.
Appearance
It's a board that looks like a voodoo doll in light pink with brown color, it has 2 eyes made of sewn buttons, at the bottom as a front it surrounds with green, blue and pink colors, in addition to having a can of blue paint under the board.
Trivia
It, Turbo Stump , and Brass Whizz are the 33rd, 34th, and 35th boards released in 2024 after Skyrocket , Electro Shock , Bada-Bomb , Confetti Crush , Red Velvet , Roaring Heart , Lunar Scroll , Astro Tune , Interstellar , Shamrock Shebang , Megga Bite , Fast and Festive , Radiant Rider , Jak , Tea Timer , Deli-Vroom , Yellow Sub , Jelly Board , Koinobori , Mayo Mania , 12th Birthday , Pixel Hoverboard , Street Grace , Alarm On , Rock n' Riley , Sunny Sailor , Laser Flip , Glarx 3000 , Standing Ovation , Risky Ride , Sporty Summer , Heavy Metal , Champ , and Arrow .
It's the second board , after Pumpkin .
It's Pins ' board , especially because it was the one who created the board. It is also Pink 's third board. Pink ’s first and second are Spring and Ghastly Glider .
In , it costs .
In and , it costs in Offer Trails .
It's the second doll themed board , the first being Flaming Doll .
It is the third board that has a spray can, the first being Sharpeed and the second being Skyrocket
It has the same abilities as Magic Carpet , Maple Leaf , Sunny Sailor , Glarx 3000 , and Fox Trail .
According to Bundle offers, Pink and Pins share this board.
In the Chinese Version, it's called Homemade Doll (自制玩偶) , and it's shape doesn't change in it's upgrades.

Rain
Rain is a limited character released in the update. Rain is the 161st character in the game. Rain is genderqueer and goes by she/they pronouns. They cost 300.
Appearance
Default Outfit
Rain is a 17-year-old American teenager from . They have a turquoise hair in a boy cut and eyebrows, a pair of yellow eyes worn with round, black glasses, and blushed on ears and nose. Their white T-shirt has a rainbow and peace sign that represents the LGBTQ+ community, and below that is a high-waist sky blue shorts. Underneath the white-laced black shoes is a red-striped white socks, and they have a happy-faced piercing on the left ear. In their animation, they spray and hold a placard that shows the flag of the LGBTQ+ community and the genderqueer flag.
Garden Outfit
Launched in , Rain's hair is now in pigtails, and they wear red-colored glasses and two yellow piercings in the left ear. They have an aquamarine T-shirt with dark green stripes under a dark blue gardener's suit with a beige badge with an apple design, by which there's also a patch of dark green sewn with red on their left leg of the said suit. On their hands are copper gloves with orange cuffs and black guards, and their boots are orange-colored with red and black straps. In their animation they paint the phrase " Play New Hope " with a drawing of the Earth in the shape of a heart.
History
* An exact date was found where they appeared in, otherwise, the edition release date is assumed.
Trivia
Rain is the seventh surfer released on 2023 after Rabbit , Soul , Tutti , Frutti , Spraybot and Catrine .
Rain is the fourth surfer, the first being Tony , the second being Darryl , the third being Lana , the fifth being Berta , the sixth being Mr. Gobbles , the seventh being Rosie and the eighth being Ballerina Latticina .
They are the second US surfer released in 2023 , the others being Spraybot and Hali .
They are the second US surfer released in 2023 , the others being Spraybot and Hali .
Rain is genderqueer and non-binary, using She/They/Them pronouns.
This makes them the first surfer in the game to be genderqueer.
This makes them the first surfer in the game to be genderqueer.
In 3.17.1, they were added to the Subway Studio .
Rain and Catrine are the first characters to be added to Subway Studio after .
They are the ninth character to have a spray can in their idles after Jake , Miss Maia , Bob The Blob , Charlie , Pink , Dummy , Super Runner Jake , and Song Yi .
Rain is the first character 2023 to have a spray can in their idles.
Rain is the first character 2023 to have a spray can in their idles.
They and Taha are the 14th and 15th surfers to receive a new outfit in 2024  (Garden and Chilli Taha in ) after Alfie , Ji-Yeong , Moira , George , Hasina , Cathy , Koral , Cleo , Vivienne , Tainá , Phoenix , Pink , and Morgan .
They're the fifth surfer of 2023 to receive a new outfit in 2024  (Garden outfit in ) after Alfie , Ji-Yeong , Vivienne , and Tainá .
They're the fifth surfer of 2023 to receive a new outfit in 2024  (Garden outfit in ) after Alfie , Ji-Yeong , Vivienne , and Tainá .
Rain is the first surfer who is 17 years old.
They are the third surfer with a confirmed age (17), the first being Clementine and the second being Catrine .

Color Shift is their board .

Ramona
Ramona is a limited character from update. She is the 34th limited character in the World Tour series and the 36th limited character in total. She can be unlocked for . Both her 1st outfit, the Piña Outfit and her 2nd outfit, the Elegant Outfit can be purchased for 75.
Appearance
Default Outfit
Ramona is an Afro-Cuban teenage girl from who appears to be a mechanic with a toolbelt. She has dark brown hair and wears a light pink t-shirt, blue overalls, white, purple, and red sneakers, a red bandana, and gold sunglasses. Also, she has a mole on her cheek.
Piña Outfit
Launched in , she wears a short blue t-shirt that shows her midriff, a pink, yellow and blue flowing skirt, yellow shoes with blue flowers and flowers in her hair. She doesn't have her sunglasses.
Elegant Outfit
Launched in , she wears an orange dress with a burpee belt and buckle, purple shoes with a red flower, a gold bracelet on her hand and a purple flower in her hair, which is flowing.
History
* An exact date was found where she appeared in, otherwise, the edition release date is assumed.
Flash Deals
She has appeared in every update costing in the flash deals from onward. This is still valid as of . One partial exception is in , during the period that the Midsummer Soiree bundle was offered, she was temporarily not in the flash deals. In her cost in the flash deals was increased from $2.99 to $3.99 for unknown reasons. During , her Piña Outfit could be bought for 75 in the Flash Deals .
Trivia
Her sunglasses are similar to the ones Rex wears for his Win Outfit, except the lenses are black and not light purple.
Ramona is the seventh newcomer and the fourth female newcomer of 2016 .
Chrome is her board.
She returns for Wild Wednesdays such as , , and .
She gets +5 Multiplier Bonus for Special Thursdays such as , , , , , and .
In , she did not return in any offer for unknown reasons, but she continued to remain in the flash deals for .
Her face texture is the same as Carmen .
In her SYBO pic, she has Zuri 's pose.
Ramona is the third character to have their animation's reused for a new character ( Vivienne in ).
She is currently the only surfer from Cuba.
Her last "free" appearance was in for 99,000.
In the 3.42.3 version, her Piña and Elegant Outfits became limited.
In the Chinese Version, her Piña Outfit changed to cover her middlriff and chest since , like what happened with other female characters.
She also have a flower on her right chest.
She also have a flower on her right chest.

Rani
Rani is a character released in . She is the 224th character in the game and ninth surfer of 2025 .
Appearance
Default Outfit
Rani is a 14-year-old Indian teenage girl from who is brown-haired and dark-skinned. She wears an indigo crop top and loose pants, with a same colored saree in golden diamond embellishments being draped across the outfit. Meanwhile, above her pants are orange and yellow fabric being tied on her waist, and her shoes are in deep pink with accents. Two gold bracelets are worn on each of her wrist, large gold earrings, and a nose ring with a chain connecting to her left ear. Contrasting Rocky , she has an aquamarine paint across her face, and hot pink powder on her fingertips.
Urban Vibes Outfit
Launched in , her hair is now in a loose ponytail, fixed with a red and indigo headband. She now has an oversized white shirt with indigo sleeves, designed with a fading blue music note on the middle. She also wears a pair of red cargo pants and lilac shoes. She also has brown markings on her face and arms.
History
* An exact date was found where she appeared in, otherwise, the edition release date is assumed.
Trivia
She and Rocky are the eighth and ninth surfers released in 2025 , after Snake , Tang Yuan , Valentina , Kaleo , Rebeca Roar , Gabriel , and Dinorange .
She is the fourth female surfer of 2025 after Tang Yuan , Valentina , and Rebeca Roar .
She is the fourth female surfer of 2025 after Tang Yuan , Valentina , and Rebeca Roar .
She is the fifth surfer, after Jay , Koral , Alia , and Rocky .
She is the 16th surfer whose name starts with R , after Roberto , Rex , Ramona , Rin , Rosa , Rabbot , Rat , Rabbit , Rain , Red Panda , Riley , Rudy Rascal , Ruhi , Rebeca Roar , and Rocky .
Rani (रानी) means Queen in Hindi.

She has a crush on Rocky .

Rat
Rat is a limited character from . He can be unlocked for 60.
Appearance
Rat is a Chinese boy from Asia. He wears a white Chinese rat mask that has gold eyebrows, a nose, a gold ear, a piercing that has a red fringe attached to it. The mouse mask also has some black whiskers with some red markings on the mask as well. He has a red and gold kung-fu robe with loose red pants, black shoes, and white bandages on his legs and he carries a gold staff with them. He also has a white rat tail and black hair that is in a braid.
History
* An exact date was found where he appeared in, otherwise, the edition release date is assumed.
Trivia
He has the same cost as Ox in (which also needs 60 to be unlocked).
Rat is the fourth character released in 2021 after Frankette , Spacebot , and Ox .
He is the second surfer, the first being Ox .
He is the seventh character that has a mask that covers the entirety of his face, the first being Frank , second being Izzy (Laki outfit only), third being Marco (Mask outfit only), fourth being Jaro (Joker outfit only), fifth being Mei (Islander outfit only), sixth being Ox , eighth being Pride Frank , and ninth being Tiger .
Rat also trains in Ox ’s dojo.
Rat is the first 12 animal Chinese calendar year character, the others being Ox , Tiger , Rabbit , Dragon , Snake , and Horse .
In , Rat has lost HD graphics, even though he didn't receive an outfit.
In the Chinese Version, his name is Rat Meng Meng (鼠萌萌) .
In his description was changed to a Lunar New Year Surfer .
His last appearance in the files was .
Rat is he/him, this was confirmed on a livestream in .

Rat Trap
Rat Trap is a hoverboard released in . Like any other hoverboard, it protects the character from crashing for 30 seconds. When crashed, it will need to recharge for a few seconds before it can be used again.
Appearance
A wooden hoverboard that looks like an elongated mouse trap with a booster. It has a yellow cheese on the front, and two spiky handles are wrapped on its hammer (the metal bar that snaps and catches in a real mouse trap).
Trivia
It, Sewer Surfer , 14th Birthday , and Bomb-Bastic are the 19th, 20th, 21st, and 22nd boards released in 2026 , after Road Rage , Frankmobile , Perfectoplasma , Fire Starter , Xtra Cool , Turbo Love , Gold Rush , The Green Flame , Turbo Love , Marbleous , Arena Rider , Major Speed , Sunny Side Up , Pixel Perfect , Buzz BNY , Fast Fur-ward , Cathletic Ride , and Fox Trotter .
It is the ninth board, after Hammer , Viking , Super Surfer , Danger Dasher , You Are Here , Freebird , Seven Seas , and Sewer Surfer .
It is Ratak 's board.

Ratak
Ratak is a character released in . He is the 277th character in the game and the 15th surfer of 2026 .
Appearance
Default Outfit
Ratak is a 15-year-old Danish male rat from The Sewers ( ) who has a blue skin, green eyes, and various piercings all over his ears, right eyebrow, and snout. He also has a dark blue mohawk hair. Ratak also wears a green, sleeveless crop top with a radioactive symbol; a long, muted purple pants with sharp ends and being held with a silver-buckled belt, and; an pair of black fingerless gloves. His shoes has a black and green checkered-design in white soles.
Radio Rative Outfit
Launched in , half of Ratak's face and body now have robotic elements, similar to a Cyborg . With that, his black robotic eye has a glowing red iris, and his nose piercing became black. Over his yellow-orange gradient shirt is a black leather jacket, and a yellow fingerless glove is worn on his right hand. He is also wearing a much more common blue jeans, and his shoes are similar to the one he's wearing on his Default Outfit, but in yellow instead of green.
Trivia
He, Toaxx , Red , and Chuck are the 14th, 15th, 16th, and 17th surfers released in 2026 , after Frank Noir , Holly , Sean Snow , Mia , Rosalita , Lorcan , Horse , Vittorio , Enzo , Sprinkle , Bunny Betty , Tsuki Chan , and Kaito .
He is also the seventh male 2026 surfer, after Frank Noir , Sean Snow , Lorcan , Vittorio , Enzo , and Kaito .
He is also the seventh male 2026 surfer, after Frank Noir , Sean Snow , Lorcan , Vittorio , Enzo , and Kaito .
He is the eighth surfer, after Freya , Trym , Super Runner Jake , Catrine , LOC , Stevie , and Toaxx .
He reuses Alexandre 's animations, although his animation is faster.
He is the 58th surfer to reuse animations. The previous surfers were Frankette , J Balvin , Vivienne , Captain Flash , Clockwork Johnny , Thunder , Azura , Astra , Lucky , Red Panda , Faiza , Electra , Riley , Glorgalax , Ventura , Leo , Ozzy , Billy Bean , Kedi , Ruhi , Pumpkin Pete , Leif , Demi Lovato , Kaleo , Rani , Finlay , Stevie , Berta , Costa , Rochelle Rebelle , Asher , White Rabbit , Peter , Henry , Tara , Sunny , Alma Brava , Mateo , Crewmate Jake , Crewmate Tricky , Crewmate Spike , Crewmate King , Crewmate Tasha , Crewmate Guard , Rosie , Ballerina Latticina , Holly , Sean Snow , Mia , Rosalita , Horse , Vittorio , Enzo , Bunny Betty , Tsuki Chan , and Toaxx .
He's the 11th surfer to reuse animations from a Chinese Version character (although the animation is from the International version).
He is the 58th surfer to reuse animations. The previous surfers were Frankette , J Balvin , Vivienne , Captain Flash , Clockwork Johnny , Thunder , Azura , Astra , Lucky , Red Panda , Faiza , Electra , Riley , Glorgalax , Ventura , Leo , Ozzy , Billy Bean , Kedi , Ruhi , Pumpkin Pete , Leif , Demi Lovato , Kaleo , Rani , Finlay , Stevie , Berta , Costa , Rochelle Rebelle , Asher , White Rabbit , Peter , Henry , Tara , Sunny , Alma Brava , Mateo , Crewmate Jake , Crewmate Tricky , Crewmate Spike , Crewmate King , Crewmate Tasha , Crewmate Guard , Rosie , Ballerina Latticina , Holly , Sean Snow , Mia , Rosalita , Horse , Vittorio , Enzo , Bunny Betty , Tsuki Chan , and Toaxx .

Rave Rider
Rave Rider is a limited board released in . It is the third Rivals board and is the board of Hali . It can be unlocked by completing stage 3 of a Rivals Challenge .
Appearance
It is a purple board with a hand drawn design on it and other colors (pink, orange, light lemon green and cyan) and it has a radio on the back of the board.
Trivia

Rave Rider is the third board after Tiki and Ukulele .
It is the third Rivals board. The first being Danger Dasher , the second being Future Wave and the fourth being Sharpeed .
Like other Rivals boards, it is based on the Groovy 's shape.
It is the eighth special birthday board after Super Surfer , Trickster , Boombastic , Mag-Neat-O , Zuper Zapper , Danger Dasher and Future Wave .

In , it either costs or 60 ads.

It has the same upgrades as Electro Shock , Champ , Brass Whizz , Cook-Express , Couch Surfer , Fear Tractor , Lantern , and The Green Flame .
It is Hali 's board .

Ray
Ray is the thirty-eighth limited hoverboard in Subway Surfers , the third Sydney-special board and a limited hoverboard released with . Like any other hoverboard, it will protect you from crashing for 30 seconds. When crashed, the board will explode and recharge for a few seconds before it can be used again. It has no special ability. It was released for 50,000.
Appearance
It takes the shape of a Manta Ray , it is similar to Jamanta , but it is not detailed the same way and Jamanta also has an ability ( Smooth Drift ).

Trivia
Lots of people in the Subway Surfers community hate this currency because they don't want to waste their money.
Since (except Bundles ), at least one new content is introduced costing real money.

Reappearances
Sometimes, old content reappears in the game, such as characters like Zombie Jake and Elf Tricky . They can be bought in 24 hours for real money.
Character Reappearances
Main article: Character Reappearances
Sometimes, old expired characters reappear in the game, like Zombie Jake , Elf Tricky , etc. They can be bought in 24 hours for real money. The latest character that reappeared was Lauren which was on 18 April 2018.
Gallery
Hoverboard Reappearances
Main article: Hoverboard Reappearances
Sometimes, old expired hoverboards reappear in the game, like  Rose ,  Cruiser  etc. They can be bought in 24 hours for real money. The latest hoverboard that reappeared was Beelzebook which was on 30 December 2020.
Gallery

Rebeca Roar
Rebeca Roar is a character who has been released in . She is the 220th character in the game and fifth surfer of 2025 .
Appearance
Default Outfit
Rebeca Roar is a 16-year-old Brazilian teenage girl from who simply wears a festive-themed jaguar suit, which includes pink and blue feathers on both head and shoes to match with her colorful makeup. She also has yellow pearl earrings and pink bangles as accessories.
Purrfection Outfit
Launched in , her outfit now nods to the concept of a snow leopard , as she wears a blue leopard-themed wintersuit, with her headgear being composed of an orange beanie, goggles, and her usual festive pink feathers which is now shaped like ears. She wears white paw mittens, pearl earrings, and winter boots with pink soles.
History
* An exact date was found where she appeared in, otherwise, the edition release date is assumed.
Trivia
She and Gabriel are the fifth and sixth surfers released in 2025 , after Snake , Tang Yuan , Valentina , and Kaleo .
She is the third female surfer of 2025 after Tang Yuan and Valentina .
She is the third female surfer of 2025 after Tang Yuan and Valentina .
She is the fifth surfer, after Carmen , Super Runner Fernando , Tainá , and Yutani Harlequin Toad .
She is the 13th South American surfer in the game, the 1st being Carmen , the 2nd being Edison , the 3rd being Carlos , the 4th being Sofia , the 5th being Tankbot , the 6th being Super Runner Fernando , the 7th being Bruno , the 8th being Tainá , the 9th being Yutani Harlequin Toad , the 10th being J Balvin , the 11th being Hammy-Bee , the 12th being Valentina and the 14th being Gabriel .
She is the eighth Brazilian surfer, after Carmen , Edison , Super Runner Fernando , Tainá , Yutani Harlequin Toad , Hammy-Bee and Valentina .
Her outfit resembles a Jaguar .

Recital
Recital is the fifth episode of Subway Surfers: The Animated Series .
Synopsis
Moments before her big recital, Tricky realizes she forgot to change out of her skate shoes. With her parents in the audience and a room filled with onlookers, Tricky does her best but fails to impress the heartless judge. Can Jake and Fresh somehow come to their friend's rescue?

Trivia
This is the fifth animated episode created by SYBO TV's YouTube channel.
Fresh and Yutani have no speaking roles in this episode.

Red
Red is a character released in . He is the 278th character in the game and the 16th surfer of 2026 .
Appearance
Default Outfit
Red is a male teenager wearing a hoodie featuring Red from Angry Birds , where the hood covers the upper half of his face. He is also wearing a pair of grey pants and grey shoes with red accents.
Trivia
He, Toaxx , Ratak , and Chuck are the 14th, 15th, 16th, and 17th surfers released in 2026 , after Frank Noir , Holly , Sean Snow , Mia , Rosalita , Lorcan , Horse , Vittorio , Enzo , Sprinkle , Bunny Betty , Tsuki Chan , and Kaito .
He is also the eighth male 2026 surfer, after Frank Noir , Sean Snow , Lorcan , Vittorio , Enzo , Kaito , and Ratak .
He is also the eighth male 2026 surfer, after Frank Noir , Sean Snow , Lorcan , Vittorio , Enzo , Kaito , and Ratak .
He is the first surfer, second being Chuck .
He is the Subway Surfers counterpart of Red from Angry Birds .
He reuses Yuto 's animations.
He is the 59th surfer to reuse animations. The previous surfers were Frankette , J Balvin , Vivienne , Captain Flash , Clockwork Johnny , Thunder , Azura , Astra , Lucky , Red Panda , Faiza , Electra , Riley , Glorgalax , Ventura , Leo , Ozzy , Billy Bean , Kedi , Ruhi , Pumpkin Pete , Leif , Demi Lovato , Kaleo , Rani , Finlay , Stevie , Berta , Costa , Rochelle Rebelle , Asher , White Rabbit , Peter , Henry , Tara , Sunny , Alma Brava , Mateo , Crewmate Jake , Crewmate Tricky , Crewmate Spike , Crewmate King , Crewmate Tasha , Crewmate Guard , Rosie , Ballerina Latticina , Holly , Sean Snow , Mia , Rosalita , Horse , Vittorio , Enzo , Bunny Betty , Tsuki Chan , Toaxx and Ratak .
He is the 59th surfer to reuse animations. The previous surfers were Frankette , J Balvin , Vivienne , Captain Flash , Clockwork Johnny , Thunder , Azura , Astra , Lucky , Red Panda , Faiza , Electra , Riley , Glorgalax , Ventura , Leo , Ozzy , Billy Bean , Kedi , Ruhi , Pumpkin Pete , Leif , Demi Lovato , Kaleo , Rani , Finlay , Stevie , Berta , Costa , Rochelle Rebelle , Asher , White Rabbit , Peter , Henry , Tara , Sunny , Alma Brava , Mateo , Crewmate Jake , Crewmate Tricky , Crewmate Spike , Crewmate King , Crewmate Tasha , Crewmate Guard , Rosie , Ballerina Latticina , Holly , Sean Snow , Mia , Rosalita , Horse , Vittorio , Enzo , Bunny Betty , Tsuki Chan , Toaxx and Ratak .
He releases a red feather trail when used in the game.
Bomb-Bastic is his board .

Red Panda
Red Panda is a limited character who released in . She is the 184th character in the game.
Appearance
Red Panda is an Irish girl in red panda suit. She has a red panda suit with a zipper on the front, patches on the knees, and stitches on the forehead and back.
History
* An exact date was found where she appeared in, otherwise, the edition release date is assumed.
Trivia
Red Panda is the 6th female surfer released in 2024 after Skye , Azura , Stella , Astra , and Meggan .
She is the 3rd surfer, after Lucky and Meggan . However, she is a Special Surfer instead.
She is the 2nd Special Surfer of 2024 , first being Dragon .
She is a female costume surfer and goes by She/Her pronouns as confirmed in the official livestream and her bio.
Her age is unknown unlike other surfers who had their character bios revealed before her (except for Captain Flash and Clockwork Johnny ), the 1st being Dragon .
She is the 7th character in a suit, the first is Yutani , the second is Dino , the third is Malik , the fourth is George , the fifth is Pride Yutani and Yutani Harlequin Toad being the sixth.
She is the second female character in a suit after Yutani , making it 12 years since a female character in suit.
She, Lucky and Meggan are the 7th, 8th and 9th surfers released in 2024 after Thunder , Skye , Azura , Dragon , Stella and Astra .
They're also first Irish surfers in the game.
They also the 10th, 11th and 12th surfers after Jamie , Buddy , Callum , George , Bonnie , Soul , Frutti , Vivienne and Lawrence who all came from British Isles.
They also second, third and fourth European surfers released in 2024 , the first being Azura (not counting Dragon who is a Chinese Zodiac Surfer, rather than a Greek Surfer).
They're also first Irish surfers in the game.
They also the 10th, 11th and 12th surfers after Jamie , Buddy , Callum , George , Bonnie , Soul , Frutti , Vivienne and Lawrence who all came from British Isles.
They also second, third and fourth European surfers released in 2024 , the first being Azura (not counting Dragon who is a Chinese Zodiac Surfer, rather than a Greek Surfer).
She has the same idle animations as Dino .
Her zodiac sign is Pisces ♓️.
Her birthday is between February 19 and March 20 (the exact date is unknown).
Her birthday is between February 19 and March 20 (the exact date is unknown).
The toy building in her animation is slightly different from the one in Dino 's.
According to a her Info post her mischievous side might have had a part in creating the Dossiers.
She is the 1st surfer who can be unlocked by . The other surfers that follow are Teabot , Electra , Hammy-Bee , Lily , Rudy Rascal , Leo , Pins , Audrey , Kedi , Pumpkin Pete , Ginger , Leif , Grand Juke , Tang Yuan , Valentina , Stella (Color Fever Outfit ), Finlay , and Lestari (Hot Spot Outfit).

Renegade
Renegade is a limited hoverboard released with . Like any other hoverboard, it protects you from crashing for 30 seconds. When crashed, the hoverboard will explode and need to recharge for a few seconds before using again. Like most of the others limited hoverboards, it costs 50,000.

Retro Orange
Retro Orange is a limited hoverboard released in the update.
Appearance
It's an orange neon post sign with Ji-Yeong's name in Korean (지영) written on it, modified as a vintage scooter. There is also an exhaust pipe on the left side that emits orange smoke.
Trivia
Retro Orange is the third board after Bubblegum and K-Dillac .
It's the 20th board released in 2023 after Carp Diem , Ghastly Glider , Fan-tastic , Viperfish , I-Scream , Tagger , Danger Dasher , 11th Birthday , Flying Horse , Color Shift , Big Boss Board , Future Wave , Jamanta , Kite , Sweet Chili , Rave Rider , Flaming Doll , and K-Dillac .
It is Alexandre 's third board. His first and second boards are Paint Palette and K-Dillac .

Reverse Challenge
Reverse Challenge is a new challenge in 2025 , which is mechanically the same as the Marathon Challenge , released in 3.44.0 ( ).
How to Play?
Set highscores for prizes.
Grab your rewards before a new event starts!
Event Cities and Surfers
Trivia
In this challenge, the surfer's controls are reversed:
If you steer your character to the right, they will go left.
If you steer your character to the left, they will go right.
If you make your character jump, they will roll.
If you make your character roll, they will jump.
If you steer your character to the right, they will go left.
If you steer your character to the left, they will go right.
If you make your character jump, they will roll.
If you make your character roll, they will jump.

Rex
Appearance
Default Outfit
Rex is an American teenage boy from that has black hair in a large pompadour, blue eyes, and a red and white jumpsuit. He is shown to be a performer, akin to Elvis Presley. He has a shapely jaw (more obvious in the start screen where he can turn his head), much like his inspiration.
Show Outfit
Launched in , his clothes are red, white and blue instead, and a star is placed on his belt. He also seems to have a short red cape on his back.
Win Outfit
Launched in , Rex wears a white suit jacket over a pink shirt, a black bolo tie, black dress pants, and matching white shoes. He also wears yellow shades with pink tinted lenses, and a white fedora hat.
Trivia
He bears a close resemblance to the legendary singer, Elvis Presley . Vegas is known for being popular for Elvis impersonators, and Rex's first two costumes resemble the flamboyant suits Elvis would wear during his Vegas performances in the 70's.
His third outfit, excluding the modern shades and hat, resemble the suits worn by Elvis before he headlined at Vegas, more commonly known as 50's Elvis.
His third outfit, excluding the modern shades and hat, resemble the suits worn by Elvis before he headlined at Vegas, more commonly known as 50's Elvis.
Rex is Latin for " king ". Elvis Presley was famously known as "The King".
He is the first limited character of 2015 .
Sometime in 2016 , his win screen model was changed slightly from his regular model. His win screen model was changed from the generic smile to a half-mouthed smile that furthers his Elvis-theme.
During the Wordy Weekend event, his Win Outfit's sunglasses look opaque but look transparent in the Me menu.
He is the first  surfer, the second being Cleo , the third being Stella , and the fourth being Astra .
Currently, Rex is the only male  surfer.

Ribbon
Ribbon is a character released in . She is the 226th character in the game and 11th surfer of 2025 .
Appearance
Default Outfit
Ribbon is a 13-year-old Scottish teenage girl from who has a brown, mint-dyed hair tied up with a pink ribbon, and wears a vibrant flowery dress. She also has mint green eyes, which works well with her purple eyelashes and pink eyeshadow. A blue flower earring is on her right ear, and her red doll shoes contain purple soles.

Riley
Riley is a limited character released in . They are the 194th character in the game.
Appearance
Default Outfit
Riley is a 15-year-old American gender-fluid teenage person from . They have pastel purple hair, they wear a pastel pink sweater with orange and red star shapes, they wear a brown belt, also they have orange hip covers on their sides, they wear white pants with flower shapes on them, and finally wear white shoes, with red laces, and with a pastel purple border. In their animation they have a soda drink and a purple skate with green wheels.
Aquamarine Outfit
Launched in , Riley now wears a summer/tropical-inspired outfit. Their outfit features a blue tank top with a prominent "17" on the chest, baggy blue pants with a decorative sash tie at the waist with a relaxed, summery vibe, and a flower in their hair and colorful wristbands. Additionally, their soda drink is now a 100% fruit drink with light yellow-orange in the base and teal blue in the straw.
History
* An exact date was found where they appeared in, otherwise, the edition release date is assumed.

The duo were also 3rd and 4th USA surfers of 2024 after Stella and Astra .
The duo were also 3rd and 4th USA surfers of 2024 after Stella and Astra .

They are the 3rd genderfluid character, the first being Teabot and the second being Hammy-Bee .

Rin
Rin is a special character, released in .
Her first outfit, the Lunar Outfit, which was released in , could be purchased for 15. Now it costs 150,000 in the Flash Deals (2025) .
Appearance
Default Outfit
Rin is a Chinese teenage girl from / that has dyed hair in white-pink color, combed in braid and hazel eyes. As for the clothing, she wears a black cap with a zipper design and a cyan band on her left wrist. She also wears a black shirt with a purple print of the eye and cyan details on her sleeves, revealing her midriff, and black tracksuits with pink and cyan stripes and sneakers with pink soles and cyan laces.
Lunar Outfit
Launched in / , she has brown hair, with her hair tied up with bows. She wears a red shirt with claret floral motifs with gold stripes and she wears blue shoes with flower decorations on it. She also holds a propeller but she does not carry it during gameplay.

Rivals
Rivals is a special anniversary event of Subway Surfers, it celebrates the game's 11th anniversary.
Summary
Rivals is an event that celebrates the 11th birthday anniversary of the game. This event features 4 Rivals of the core crew: Catrine , the group's leader and Jake 's Rival, Bruno , a technologist and Yutani 's Rival, Hali , a DJ and Fresh 's Rival, and Lawrence , a performance artist and Tricky 's Rival. Catrine , Bruno and Lawrence were surfers, where the core crew was originated from, while Hali was the only one not from that city (she was a surfer instead), The 5 current hoverboards of the Rivals are: Danger Dasher , Future Wave , Rave Rider , Sharpeed , and Ice Cool . The boards were released in , , , , and .
Trivia
This event featured 4 characters as the Rivals of the 4 main characters of the game (often being the main antagonists of the 4 core crew). Each Rival was released 2 updates after the last one ( was released after and ( Catrine was released after Frutti and Spraybot ), was released after and ( Bruno was released after Rain and Alfie ), was released after and ( Hali was released after Tainá , Yutani Harlequin Toad and Yuto ), and was released after and ( Lawrence was released after Thursday , Outatime Jake , Ji-Yeong and J Balvin ).
They all wear the same shoes with same-but-different colors of their shoe laces except Hali who have two different colours of hers (light red on the right side and the light green on the left side).
Bruno is autistic, amputee, and has a prosthetic left arm.
Hali is the only rival who is not from as confirmed in her "MEET THE CREW" page. She and Fresh also contested a virtual DJ battle.
Although in the Rivals comics it is stated that Bruno is from Argentina and he traveled to to battle Yutani , which would make him the 1st Rival not from and Hali the 2nd.
Although in the Rivals comics it is stated that Bruno is from Argentina and he traveled to to battle Yutani , which would make him the 1st Rival not from and Hali the 2nd.
Lawrence is the oldest rival, being 17. They're also non binary and go by He/They pronouns.
Sharpeed and Ice Cool are the only boards of the rivals that does not have the Double Jump ability, instead Sharpeed has Super Jump and Super Speed , while Ice Cool only has the Super Speed ability.
Sharpeed is also the only board that has one word on its name.
Initially, at the teaser video of , Catrine was introduced as a "New Surfer" like other surfers before her. However, when other Rivals after her comes next, the term were instantly changed to "New Rival" in their teaser videos. For example, in teaser video, Bruno is introduced as a "New Rival" instead of "New Surfer".
At the end, all of the Rivals were tied up with the core crew. Because of this, there is no winners or losers in the four battles.
All of the group's boards were based on Groovy 's shape, except for Ice Cool , which has Freestyler ’s shape.
Each of the Rivals also have a pact with Super Runners ( Super Runner Jake - Catrine , Super Runner Yutani - Bruno , Super Runner Fresh - Hali and Super Runner Tricky - Lawrence ).
The and updates had the Rivals Logo (®) in the map.
The group's logo (®) can be found on each of the crew's garments (spotted on Catrine 's hoodie, at the back of Bruno 's t-shirt, at Hali 's headphone and on Lawrence 's suspenders).
The Rivals remix is used in , and soundtracks, while is the only update not to use it in its soundtrack.
All the Rivals have the same letter with which the tour begins ( C atrine - C openhagen, B runo - B uenos Aires, H ali - H awaii and L awrence - L ondon).
Rivals is the 2nd event dedicated to the Subway Surfers Birthday, being dedicated to the 11th Anniversary , 1st being Super Runners event the which was dedicated to the 10th Anniversary .
Catrine , Lawrence , and Hali are the only rivals to have outfits since 2024 .
However, Catrine and Lawrence got outfits before the separations in and . Their outfits were not separated in the Subway Studio . Only Hali 's outfit is completely separated.
However, Catrine and Lawrence got outfits before the separations in and . Their outfits were not separated in the Subway Studio . Only Hali 's outfit is completely separated.
Bruno is currently the only rival to not have an outfit.

Road Rage
Road Rage is a hoverboard released in . Like any other hoverboard, it protects the character from crashing for 30 seconds. When crashed, it will need to recharge for a few seconds before it can be used again.
Appearance
A car board that has a dandelion yellow-colored base with a black vertical stripe. It also has a rear wing, and its red-colored front is connected to the flame paint that reaches the middle part of the board.
Trivia
This board, along with Frankmobile , and Perfectoplasma are the first boards released in 2026 .
It's the fourth board, after Standing Ovation , Risky Ride , and Glarx 3000 .
Just like Oni Hime 's Chill Bill Outfit, this board also references (or is similar to) the Chevrolet car used in Kill Bill .
It is Oni Hime 's second board . Her first board is Trespasser .

Roberto
Roberto was launched as a limited character in . He was the fifth limited character in Subway Surfers , and also the third limited character on the World Tour series. He was released for 95,000 and he now costs 100,000. His Fan Outfit can be bought for  75 and his Cules Outfit can be bought for  75 ( 35,000 in ) respectively.
Appearance
Default Outfit
Roberto is an Italian teenage boy from with a white, red, and green helmet, a black soccer shirt with a few white stripes at the sleeve and a soccer ball logo on it, khaki soccer shorts, green and red shoes and goggles on his helmet.
Fan Outfit
Launched in , the stripes on his shirt change to red and green, his shorts change to orange, he wears a red headband which shows his long brown hair, and he carries a soccer ball with him. His green helmet and goggles are removed.
Cules Outfit
Launched in , his shirt changes to a black jacket with violet and red short sleeves, his shorts change to red with violet details, and he wears a red backwards cap.
History
* An exact date was found where he appeared in, otherwise, the edition release date is assumed.
Trivia
If you notice, his shoes have the colors of the Flag of Italy (il Tricolore) , but with an addition of the color black.
His helmet also has the same colors.
His helmet also has the same colors.
His Cules Outfit is inspired by the "Culés", which is a term used to refer to the supporters of FC Barcelona , a Spanish soccer club.
Roberto in Fan Outfit only, is the third character to carry an item throughout the gameplay. The others being Fresh , Frank , and "some" Frank's variant (e.g. Festive Frank , Pride Frank ).
He, along with Festive Frank and Pride Frank are the only limited character to carry an item throughout the gameplay.
He, along with Festive Frank and Pride Frank are the only limited character to carry an item throughout the gameplay.
He is the only character to have one of his animations removed during an update.
He is the first character from Italy, the second being Marco , the third being Leo , the fourth being Vittorio , and the fifth being Enzo .
He is the first surfer, the second being Vittorio , and the third being Enzo .
He returned for Wild Wednesdays such as , , , and .
He's the first character to start with the letter R .

Rochelle Rebelle is a character released during . She is the 236th character in the game and the 21st surfer of 2025 .
Appearance
Default Outfit
Rochelle Rebelle is a 16-year-old American teenage girl from who wears a waistcoat shirt in pink and black stripes, matching it with a purple tie on top. She also has a green pants that shows off multiple colors and shapes. Other notable features include her bangles, ear piercings, and her pink-purple gradient hair that forms two gigantic rubber band "ears."

Rocky
Rocky is a character released in . He is the 223rd character in the game and eighth surfer of 2025 .
Appearance
Default Outfit
Rocky is a 15-year-old Indian teenage boy from who has a colorful, Holi -themed outfit, starting from his dark blue hair styled with his purple, circle-patterned bandana. As his face is splashed with a magenta paint, his left palm is covered with aquamarine paint, contrary to Rani 's. His clothing includes a magenta vest with gold accents, and a vibrant blue shirt. For the bottoms, he has pastel blue pants with decorative paint designs, wrapped with a brown belt, and finished off with maroon shoes. For jewelries, he has a golden pair of earrings, necklace, and a singular bangle on his left arm.

Rosa
Rosa is a limited character released during , unlockable with 100,000. She is also the sixteenth limited character in Subway Surfers, and the fourteenth limited character in the World Tour series. Her first outfit, The Fox Outfit, is unlockable for 75, and the second one, The Ceibo Outfit, costed 400 in Season Hunt ’s Tier 30 during its release ( ), but now costs 150. From till , her default and first outfit were non-limited, but her second outfit was still limited.
In the update, she could be obtained at level 10 in the Season Hunt (collect 80 ).
Appearance
Default Outfit
Rosa is a Mexican teenage girl from / with a red, white and turquoise outfit, while her hair is brown and long tied in a braid, with a big red rose. She wears a pair of black boots and a red, Mexican-specific belt. Her eyes are brown. She has thick eyebrows and eyelashes.
Fox Outfit
Launched in , she received an outfit too, the Fox Outfit, which costs 75. Her clothes and fan turned to black and red and now has a big black hat. She also has a black mask which covers the top of her face.
Ceibo Outfit
Launched in , she received the Ceibo Outfit. Her hair braided brown lilac ombre with ceibo flower decoration and Rosa wears a red shirt, silver double piercings on her left ear, three white necklaces, white pants, and red sneakers and white laces, she also has an Argentina flag lapel pin in her right leg.

Rudy
Rudy is the twenty-fourth limited hoverboard in Subway Surfers. Like any other hoverboard, it protects you from crashing for 30 seconds. It can only be unlocked by collecting 40 (Little Christmas Trees) during Week 2 & 3 at the Weekly Hunt or (Now 40 ). Like any other hoverboard, it protects your character from any obstacles for 30 seconds. When crashed, it will explode and need a few seconds to recharge before it can be used again. It was first released and had its only appearance in the edition.
In , Rudy made its comeback in the Wild Wednesday for sale with $15 (0.99).
In , Rudy made its comeback in the Weekly Hunt by collecting 40 penguins in the first and second week of the hunt.
Appearance
It takes the shape of the popular reindeer, Rudolph.
Trivia
It is based on Rudolph, the Red-Nosed Reindeer. Rudy is short for the name Rudolph.
This is the second Holiday Special hoverboard, the first being Jingles .
It is the last limited hoverboard of 2014.
Rudy was added to the game on 4 December 2014 with the update. Players could unlock this board by collecting 40 at the 2nd and 3rd weeks at the Weekly Hunt .
On 16 December 2015, it reappeared in a Wild Wednesdays event.
On 1 December 2016, it made its reappearance to the game as a hunt prize. Players who already unlocked this board received 10.
On 13 December 2017, it reappeared in a Wild Wednesdays event.
On 2018, it reappeared costing 40.
On 2019, it cost 20.
Rudy is the 3rd Christmas -themed board, the 1st being Snowflake , the 2nd being Jingles , the 4th being Choo Choo , the 5th being Glacier , the 6th being Sleigh , the 7th being Ginger Boom , the 8th being Ho Ho Hoverboard , the 9th being Snow Cloud , the 10th being Wrapped , the 11th being Wind-Up Rocket , the 12th being Snow Down , the 13th being Jingle Dingle , the 14th being Shiny Surprise , the 15th being Gadget Force , the 16th being Ice Cool , the 17th being Buck Lightdeer , the 18th being Chill Out , the 19th being Candy Crash , and the 20th being Mean Green Machine .
It is the third hoverboard released in a edition, the first is Snowflake , the second is Jingles , the fourth is Fauxpunx , and the fifth is Sharpeed .
Rudy returned in for 210, and in for 8,000.
In , it costs in Offer Trails .
This board has the same name with the surfer Rudy Rascal who was released in .
It's Buddy 's board .
It is the last board of 2014 .
In the Chinese Version, it's called Red Nose (红鼻子) .

Rudy Rascal
Rudy Rascal is a limited character released in . He is the 198th character of the game.
Appearance
Rudy Rascal is a 14-year-old American teenage boy from , who has red hair, green eyes and face freckles. Rudy has a green piercing on his right ear. He wears a white T-shirt with a vest over it, white pants with black dots and stains on them. He also wears red boots and gloves, as well as a brown hat with a green ribbon around it and a brown belt with pockets, in which he keeps his 2 spray cans.

SYBO Games
SYBO Games, or SYBO ApS is a game development studio located in Copenhagen, Denmark. They and Kiloo are the creators of the popular game, Subway Surfers . Kiloo left Subway Surfers in 2020 . SYBO's CEO is Mathias Gredal Nørvig (May 2017-present).
In 2022, the Swiss mobile game publisher Miniclip acquired SYBO Games.
History
SYBO Games was founded by Sylvester Rishøj Jensen and Bodie Jahn-Mulliner in 2010. A year before that, they won 1st prize for 'Best Animation Movie' at the Hamburg Animation Awards 2009.
The movie storyline they created was similar to the current game, the movie also led the founders of SYBO Games to create the game based on it.
Useful Websites
http://www.sybogames.com/ : SYBO Games' Official Website
https://subwaysurfers.com/ : SYBO Games' Official Website for Subway Surfers
https://subwaysurferscity.com/ : SYBO Games' Official Website for Subway Surfers City
https://www.facebook.com/sybogames : SYBO Games' Official Facebook Page
https://x.com/sybogames : SYBO Games' Official X (formerly Twitter) Page
https://www.instagram.com/subwaysurfers/ : SYBO Games' Official Subway Surfers Instagram Page
https://www.youtube.com/@subwaysurfers : SYBO Games' Official YouTube Channel
http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/SYBO : Wikipedia of SYBO Games

Salma
Salma is a limited character that was released in . She is the 41st limited character in Subway Surfers and the 39th limited character in the World Tour series. Both her 1st outfit, the Nomad Outfit and 2nd outfit, the Talisman Outfit, can be purchased for 75 each.
Appearance
Default Outfit
Salma is a Moroccan teenage snake charmer girl from with dark brown hair and green eyes. She wears a forest green tunic, teal leggings, gold sneakers, a black and silver jacket, a teal ring, and a teal turban. She also wears teal eyeshadow and dark green lipstick.
Nomad Outfit
Launched in , she wears a pink turban with gold bangles hanging down. She wears large gold ring earrings, a red top, and a dark blue skirt. She wears henna on her arms, legs, and face.
Talisman Outfit
Launched in , she gains a blue and white turban with a gold eye in the middle which is mostly inspired from the evil eye . She gains blue earrings and a white long-sleeved dress tied at her waist with a S blue ribbon. She also gains a nose piercing. She has a gold necklace and has pink slippers. She also has blue lipstick.
Trivia
She is confirmed as the 3rd female newcomer of 2017 . The others being Jolien and Freya .
She is the 4th newcomer of 2017 . The others being Jolien , Philip , and Freya .
She is the 1st surfer, 2nd being Taha , 3rd being Hamza , 4th being Faiza , and 5th being Teabot .

Same Animation Characters
Subway Surfers makes several characters have the same animation as previous characters .
List of Character
Notes
Characters that are variants of other characters, are not included in the list (e.g. Jake with Outatime Jake or Pixel Jake , Tricky with Ballerina Tricky , King with Guard King , Miss Maia with Pride Miss Maia , Yutani with Yutani Harlequin Toad , Rin with Parkour Rin , or Frank with Frank Noir ).
Characters in the list can be characters that use all or part of the animations of other characters. (e.g. Electra and Am ong Us Sur fe rs only reused one animation from Buzz while Glorgalax reused every animation from Buzz ).
Characters in the table are sorted by the version in which they appear.
Trivia
Dragon and Ruhi have same animations and are 2024 surfers.
Ribbon and Berta have same animations and are 2025 surfers.
Gabriel and Rochelle Rebelle have same animations and are 2025 surfers.
Saru and Asher have same animations and are 2025 surfers.
Rocky and Peter have same animations and are 2025 surfers.
Pierre and Lorcan have same animations and are 2026 surfers.
Ruhi is the first 2024 character, Berta is the first 2025 character, and Pierre is the first 2026 character to have the same animations from other character of the same year.
Captain Flash and Clockwork Johnny are the first 2023 characters with the same animations to be released in the same edition.
Vivienne is the first character with reused animations to receive an outfit. The following surfers with reused animations to receive outfits are Kaleo , Thunder , Rani , Stevie , Berta , Asher , Peter , Henry , Mateo , Lucky , Rosie , Finlay , Holly , Mia , Leif , Enzo , Bunny Betty , Ratak , Riley , Lestari , Sandy , and Pierre .
Some characters have their animations being reused for more than one new characters.
Buzz is the first character to have his animations reused for more than one character, such as Electra (partial), Glorgalax , and Am ong Us Sur fe rs (partial).
Maeko is the second character to have her animations reused for more than one character, such as Thunder , Kaleo , and Alma Brava .
Alia is the third character to have her animations reused for more than one character, such as White Rabbit and Tara .
Logan is the fourth character to have his animations reused for more than one character, such as Costa and Holly .
Manny is the fifth character to have his animations reused for more than one character, such as Billy Bean and Sean Snow .
Grand Juke is the sixth character to have his animations reused for more than one character, such as Sunny and Vittorio .
Rin is the seventh character to have her animations reused for more than one character, such as Kedi and Sprinkle (her Lunar Outfit).
Amy is the eighth character to have her animations reused for more than one character, such as Ballerina Latticina and Lestari .
Brody is the ninth character to have his animations reused for more than one character, such as Enzo and Sandy .
Ramona is the tenth character to have her animations reused for more than one character, such as Vivienne and Marie Macaron .
Buzz is the first character to have his animations reused for more than one character, such as Electra (partial), Glorgalax , and Am ong Us Sur fe rs (partial).
Maeko is the second character to have her animations reused for more than one character, such as Thunder , Kaleo , and Alma Brava .
Alia is the third character to have her animations reused for more than one character, such as White Rabbit and Tara .

Sandy
Sandy is a character released in . She is the 283rd character in the game and the 21st surfer of 2026 .
Appearance
Default Outfit
Sandy is a 16-year-old teenage girl from who is a lifeguard notably known for having pink, spiky, voluminous hair wrapped with a sky blue headband. She has pink eyes and white paint on her cheeks. She is wearing a warm white/pastel orange oversized shirt with a sky blue mini vest and dark blue accents. Besides that, she also has a sky blue Bermuda shorts, a warm white/pastel orange chunky shoes, and a high socks with yellow and blue stripes. For accessories, she has a gigantic star necklace and a warm white and bright orange bangles.
Sink or Swim Outfit
Also released in , Sandy's hair is now gradiented, tied, and fixed in a flower-like style. She is wearing a red visor cap in yellow accents and cross design. Above her orange life vest is a yellow and red rashguard, and her large, yellow-accented red shorts is being held with a large brown belt. Her feet has a warm orange/pastel orange sandal, worn together with an anklet of the same color on her right leg.
Trivia

She is also the tenth female 2026 surfer after Holly , Mia , Rosalita , Horse , Sprinkle , Bunny Betty , Tsuki Chan , Toaxx , and Lestari .

Saquon
Saquon (Saquon Barkley)  is a limited edition character from . He can be unlocked with  50.
Appearance
Default Outfit
Saquon is a 29 years old American man who is a football player from The Bronx, New York. In the game, he wears a blue jersey with the number "26" on it. He wears white pants, blue gloves and blue sneakers.

Saru
Saru is a character released in . He is the 230th character in the game and 15th surfer of 2025 .
Appearance
Default Outfit
Saru is a 14-year-old Japanese teenage boy from remarkably known for his large straw hat, red overshirt (with a black-sleeved white shirt and brown strap underneath), and blue cargo pants. His black hair covers his left eye, and he also has a bandage on his right cheek. His shoes are designed to look like a sandal.
Kyaputen Outfit
Launched in , his hair is now dyed light blue with visible black roots. His outfit is composed of a light blue jacket with fur collar layered over a dark blue shirt, blue jeans, and purple-accented belt and sneakers.
History
* An exact date was found where it appeared in, otherwise, the edition release date is assumed.
Trivia
He and Oni Hime are the 14th and 15th surfers released in 2025 , after Snake , Tang Yuan , Valentina , Kaleo , Rebeca Roar , Gabriel , Dinorange , Rocky , Rani , Finlay , Ribbon , Chicken Jake , and Mallard Tricky .
He and Oni Hime are the first and second surfers.
He is the sixth Japanese character. The first being Yutani (half American), the second beign Harumi , the third being Akira , the fourth being Yuto , and the fifth being Oni Hime .
His name, both of his outfits, and design are references to Monkey D. Luffy from One Piece .
In Japanese, Saru (猿) means monkey .
The name of his first outfit, Kyaputen (キャプテン), is the Japanese pronunciation of the word captain . This outfit references the moment when Luffy awakens his Gear 5.
In a post on Subway Surfers' official accounts, there is a wanted poster looking for Saru , and whoever finds him would recieve a reward of ฿3,000,000,000; very similar to Luffy's wanted poster.

Appearance
This board is inspired from the Scarab , which is one of the Ancient Egyptian symbols, it takes the shape of the scarab beetle , the board’s arms are golden, with a red head and green bottom along with golden stripes, during super speed power up, it makes green-yellowish gases, while during smooth drift power-up it’s wings appear to be green with golden stripes as in the center of the board.

Scarlett
On  she received the her 1st outfit, the Catrina Outfit, which costs 50.
Her 2nd outfit, the Botanical Horror Outfit released in  originally costing 400, now 150.
Appearance
Default Outfit
Scarlett is a female vampire from with plum red hair she wears up in a bun on the back of her head. Her face is a ghostly pale violet with seafoam green lips and clearly evident fangs; her eyebrows match her plum red hair. She wears a formal winter outfit consisting of a long sleeve purple corset jacket over a layered seafoam green skirt, and with a dark red over-skirt. The outfit is finished with a dark red bow at her neck held by a motif brooch. She wears skull earrings that match the brooch, as well as elbow-length red gloves; black tights; and purple heels. She carries a seafoam green umbrella which matches the color and style of her skirt. A bat hangs from the edge of her umbrella.
Catrina Outfit
Launched in , she wears an ornate long sleeve floral dress in navy blue with red flowers and luminous green foliage. The hem, the sleeve ends, the waist and the neckline are all adorned with frills in red and/or luminous green. Her décolletage is decorated with a spider-inspired design. She wears black Halloween tights, and luminous green shoes adorned with a red flower to tone with her dress. Her hair is worn in a more relaxed down style, her face is made up to match the outfit, and she wears red flowers at the front of her neck, and behind her left ear. On her head she wears an extraordinary hat in navy blue with luminous green edging; which seems to double as an umbrella The centerpiece of the hat incorporates a skull along with red flowers and yellow candles.
Botanical Horror Outfit
Launched in , her skin is now pale, her lips are painted in red lipstick, her eyes are now brown and her eyebrows are black, and she has a red diamond necklace around her neck. The hair is black and loose, on the head is a purple-black hat, and on top of it is a Plant-Monster, which has scary big teeth in the front and a big brown eye in the back. She is wearing a long black dress, which has slits at the end, and on her hands there is a ring with a red diamond on her index fingers. She has black tights on her legs, and she has black shoes on her feet.

Sci-Fly
Sci-Fly is a board released in . Like any other hoverboard, it will protect you from crashing for 30 seconds. When crashed, the board will explode and recharge for a few seconds before it can be used again. It has no special ability. It costs 26.000.
Appearance
This hoverboard resembles a control panel, revealing electrocardiogram on its screen, it has robotic arm on the left side that holds a flask evaporating green bubble, Equiping Super Jump will add red wire, the Super Speed will add extra robotic arm with red lever on the edge.
Trivia
It, Fear Tractor , Skeletuna , and Pitch Dark are the 43rd, 44th, 45th, and 46th boards released in 2024 after Skyrocket , Electro Shock , Bada-Bomb , Confetti Crush , Red Velvet , Roaring Heart , Lunar Scroll , Astro Tune , Interstellar , Shamrock Shebang , Megga Bite , Fast and Festive , Radiant Rider , Jak , Tea Timer , Deli-Vroom , Yellow Sub , Jelly Board , Koinobori , Mayo Mania , 12th Birthday , Pixel Hoverboard , Street Grace , Alarm On , Rock n' Riley , Sunny Sailor , Laser Flip , Glarx 3000 , Standing Ovation , Risky Ride , Sporty Summer , Heavy Metal , Champ , Arrow , Raggedy Runner , Turbo Stumb , Brass Whizz , Chop-Chop Board , Cook-Express , Moon Cake , Veggie Velocity , Couch Surfer , Catalyst , and Flash of Flavor .
It's the third board, the first being Flaming Doll , the second Fear Tractor , the fourth being Skeletuna , and the fifth being Pitch Dark .
It's Dr. Flyman 's board .
It's the 19th board in 2024 to cost , after Tea Timer , Deli-Vroom , Jelly Board , Yellow Sub , Pixel Hoverboard , Street Grace , Rock n' Riley , Sunny Sailor , Standing Ovation , Heavy Metal , Arrow , Raggedy Runner , Brass Whizz , Chop-Chop Board , Cook-Express , Catalyst , Flash of Flavor , and Fear Tractor .
It has the same abilities as Alarm On , Jingle Dingle , Heartstopper , and Roarsome . Which are Super Jump , Smooth Drift and Super Speed . But, Super Jump is the default ability for Alarm On .
This is the teenth board of 2024 that has a default ability, the first being Fast and Festive , the second being Koinobori , the third being Alarm On , the fourth being Street Grace , the fifth being Standing Ovation , the sixth being Glarx 3000 , the seventh being Heavy Metal , the eighth being Arrow , the ninth being Chop-Chop Board , the eleventh being Skeletuna , the twelfth being Pathfinder , the thirteenth being Cozy Cruiser , the fourteenth being Suitcase Saga , the fifteenth being Jingle Dingle , and the sixteenth being Shiny Surprise .

Scoot
Scoot is one of the hoverboards in Subway Surfers . Like any other hoverboard, it protects you from crashing for 30 seconds. When crashed, it will explode and recharge for a few seconds before it can be used again. It was released in the edition.
During the update, it received a new board upgrade, called Zap Sideways which costs 40.
During the update, it received a new board upgrade, called Speed Up (now Super Speed) which costs 50.
Appearance
The hoverboard looks like a unique scooter with the colors of the Italian flag, similar to Kick-Off . When the Zap Sideways upgrade is equipped, the front of the hoverboard becomes red and taller. The Super Speed upgrade adds a large rocket booster to the back.

Score
Score is a mechanism to see how many points you have gotten. The more multiplier you have, the faster you’ll get points. Score is a popular function of the game .
Trivia
It is one of the most popular and the most relevant functions of Subway Surfers .

Score Blast
Score Blast is a power-up released in , in which you can get 102000 points by watching 1 ad or 272000 points by watching 2 ads. But if you have a Multiplier Bonus , you can get more points.
It was released on June 24th, 2024.
Appearance
It is a blue hendecagram, with two borders in lighter shades of blue and an arrow pointing up in the middle.
History
Trivia
It is one of the three power-ups obtainable by ads, the others being Super Bubble and Multiplier Bonus .
It is one of the two ad obtainable power-ups you can get more if the same icon pops up during a run, the other being Multiplier Bonus .
Depending on how many ads you watch, you can get between a 306000, 476000, 646000, or 816000 multiplier if you get this three times. (the maximum amount of pop-ups per run)
Depending on how many ads you watch, you can get between a 306000, 476000, 646000, or 816000 multiplier if you get this three times. (the maximum amount of pop-ups per run)
Your score multiplier is also dependent, so if your score multiplier is higher, then the two scores you can choose from are increased.

Score Booster
Score Booster is a power-up that was introduced in  . It costs 3,000 and is available through the Mystery Box or the Super Mystery Box as a rare item. It is also possible to get it from Weekly Hunts . It increases the player's multiplier by 5, 6, or 7 until the end of the run (depending on how many the player uses).
History
The Score Booster was added on January 31st, 2013, with the update, replacing the old Headstart used in early editions.
On July 2nd, 2015, the allowed players to use the Score Booster 3 times as they would with Headstarts . The highest multiplier count is 37 (42 with the Special Thursdays).
In , it got a new look.
Trivia
Before it was added to the game, the  old Headstart had its place.
Its arrival made the highest possible multiplier to increase from 60 to 70. On Mystery Mondays , the use of the +10 Multiplier, the 2X Multiplier , and the Score Booster increases the maximum multiplier to 80.
The update increased the highest multiplier possible. With 3 Score Boosters, Mystery Mondays , Special Thursdays , and the 2X Multiplier , players can get their multiplier to 104x. However, it is only temporary.
When used, the multiplier will turn blue . (Until )
This, the 2X Multiplier , and the missions are the only things in the game that can increase the player's multiplier.
This and the 2X Multiplier are the only power-ups in the game not to be seen held by the character when used.
This, the Headstart , and the old Headstart are the only power-ups in the game that can be used at the start of the game just by tapping them once.
Both the Headstart and the Score Booster give the player a speed boost once they start the game.

Sean Snow
Sean Snow is a character released in . He is the 265th character in the game and the 3rd surfer of 2026 .
Appearance
Default Outfit
Sean Snow is a 16-year-old Canadian teenage boy from Ontario, who has a multicolored dragon-themed winterwear, implied by his headgear and windbreaker jacket's collar that is shaped like an open dragon's mouth. He is long-haired, has side bangs, and wears mittens, layered pants, and laced-up boots.

Season Challenge
Season Challenge is mechanically the same as Tag Time Attack . This challenge was released in 3.16.0 ( ). You need to complete stages 3 and 5 to unlock specific rewards from each season challenge.
In you need to complete stages 3 and 5 to unlock Super Runner Fernando and his Super Scout Outfit , in you need complete stages 3 and 5 to unlock Sweet Chili and Yuto , in you need complete stages 3 and 5 to unlock K-Dillac and Ji-Yeong , in you need complete stages 3 and 5 to unlock Skyrocket and Skye , in you need complete stages 3 and 5 to unlock Roaring Heart and Azura , in you need complete stage 5 to unlock Stella , in you need complete stages 3 and 5 to unlock Lucky and Shamrock Shebang , in you need complete stages 3 and 5 to unlock Hamza and Tea Timer , in you need complete stages 3 and 5 to unlock Finn , in you need complete stage 5 to unlock Pixel Jake , in you need complete stage 5 to unlock Riley , in you need complete stage 5 to unlock Glorgalax , in you need complete stage 5 to unlock Hélène , in you need complete stage 5 to unlock Ozzy , in you need complete stage 5 to unlock Taha and his Chili-Taha outfit, in you need complete stage 5 to unlock Ruhi , in you need complete stage 5 to unlock Logan , in you need complete stage 5 to unlock Sindri , in you need complete stage 5 to unlock Snake , in you need complete stage 5 to unlock Kaleo , in you need complete stage 5 to unlock Gabriel , in you need complete stage 5 to unlock Rocky , in you need complete stage 5 to unlock Saru , in you need complete stage 5 to unlock Stevie , in you need complete stage 5 to unlock Berta , in you need complete stage 5 to unlock Asher , in you need complete stage 5 to unlock Peter , in you need complete stage 5 to unlock Valentina 's Pink Aphrodite Outfit, in you need complete stage 5 to unlock Festive Tricky 's Endearing Outfit, in you need complete stage 5 to unlock Song Yi 's Lucky Koi Outfit.
How To Play
Pick up hourglasses to increase your time .
All points are added up for your total score.
Your surfers need to rest after each run.
Switch surfers to keep on going and get bigger rewards!
Event Cities & Surfers
Trivia
In , if you don't have J Balvin , you can still play him, but it takes 24 hours to play him again.
In , if you have J Balvin then you can run as much as you want (no limits).
This game mode was not used in , , , , - , , , onwards for unknown reasons. In these updates, this gamemode was replaced with Special Challenge .

Season Hunt
This page still needs more information. Help editing it to get more information about it!
Season Hunt is an  event  that requires the player to collect a certain amount of tokens to receive a prize. It was introduced in the update, and it replaced the Weekly Hunt . Unlike the Weekly Hunt, this didn't need to be collected weekly. You can collect it daily. The tokens appear slightly 2 dimensional this time compared to the Weekly Hunt ones.
This was taken from the beta Train Riders .

Season Hunt Dash
Season Hunt Dash is a new feature released in , where you can get 5 season hunt tokens by watching 1 ad, or 15 season hunt tokens by watching 2 ads. It is released in June 24th 2024.
Appearance
Trivia
Gallery

Season Quests
Season Quests is a feature added in 3.3.1 in , in which players have to fulfill quests, to earn the currency Sneakers, which are used to unlock rewards.
Season Quests are divided into two parts:
Daily Quests
Seasonal Quests
Daily Quests, as the name implies, are daily quests that reset within a day.
Seasonal Quests are more difficult missions, but give you more sneakers, and last for the whole tour, 3 more quests are added in a period of one week.
Gallery

Secret Society
Secret Society is a limited hoverboard that was released in the update. Like any other hoverboard, it protects you from crashing for 30 seconds. When crashed, the hoverboard will explode and need to recharge for a few seconds before using it again. It could be purchased for 50 or with Spacebot , Spaceship , and Frankette for 100.
Appearance
It's a black and dark gray colored tech-looking hoverboard with the dossier logo on the front. It has 2 fans on it and 2 rocket engines.
Trivia
It has the same logo as Roto and the other Space Boards.
It has the same shape as Discovery and Endeavour . The only difference is the color palette.
Unlike Discovery and Endeavour , it was called Special Board instead of Space Board.
Secret Society is the first board released in 2021 .
In , it can be unlocked in a new bundle with Spaceship , Frankette , and Spacebot for 100.
It returned during in the Season Hunt by collecting 400.
In and , it came back for in the same bundle.
It's the 2nd board, 1st being Endeavour , and 3rd being Discovery .
It's Frankette 's board.
Its last appearance was in .
In the Chinese Version, it's called Secret (秘密) , and it have +5 Score (exclusive upgrade) and also have Super Jump .

If the player taps the version number (eg. 2.31.0) one time, a Dev Info window will copy to clipboard.

Shamrock Frame
The Shamrock Frame is a frame released in the update. This frame could be unlocked in the One Run Challenge event in during .
Appearance
A green-colored frame with four-leaf shamrocks (or clovers) on its top-right and bottom-left corners, with a giant one bearing with stripes in the middle of its background. The actual frame also has some splatters in a lighter green shade.
