Shamrock Shebang is a limited hoverboard released in .
Appearance
It has a green border with a black shamrock and rectangle with a semicircle cut out of it and a spike, it also has one of the old Coins at the back. It also has a rainbow trail , similar to Medal , but the colors are purple, blue, yellow, and orange from left to right.
Trivia
It is the 200th hoverboard in the Subway Surfers' history.
Shamrock Shebang is the first board, the second being Megga Bite , the third being Fast and Festive , the fourth being Pixel Perfect , the fifth being Sunny Side Up , and the sixth being Buzz BNY .
It is the tenth board to released in 2024 after Skyrocket , Electro Shock , Bada-Bomb , Confetti Crush , Red Velvet , Roaring Heart , Lunar Scroll , Astro Tune , and Interstellar .
It is the first and so far only St.Patrick's Day themed board in Subway Surfers .
It is the first board of 2024 to only have one upgrade, the 2nd being Deli-Vroom , the 3rd being Jelly Board , the 4th being Pixel Hoverboard , the 5th being Street Grace (with default ability), the 6th being Rock n' Riley , the 7th being Laser Flip , the 8th being Glarx 3000 (with default ability), the 9th being Arrow (with default ability), the 10th being Turbo Stumb , the 11th being Pitch Dark , the 12th being Fall Speed , and the 13th being Icicle .

Sharpeed
Sharpeed is a limited board released in . It is the fourth and final Rivals board and is the board of Lawrence . It can unlocked by completing stage 3 of Rivals Challenge .
Appearance
Its appearance is that of a black board with ''Rivals'' written on it in Old English font and it has a circular saw under the board.
Trivia
Sharpeed the 21th board released in 2023 after Carp Diem , Ghastly Glider , Fan-tastic , Viperfish , I-Scream , Tagger , Danger Dasher , 11th Birthday , Flying Horse , Color Shift , Big Boss Board , Future Wave , Kite , Jamanta , Sweet Chili , Rave Rider , Flaming Doll , Back to the Future , K-Dillac , Superstar , Neo-Seoul and Retro Orange .
It is the fourth and last Rivals board after Danger Dasher , Future Wave , and Rave Rider .
Despite being released in  update it is a Rivals board like the Danger Dasher board which was released in the  update but is a Rivals board and like the Future Wave board which was released in the  update but is a Rivals board.
Unlike the three other Rivals boards, it is the only board to not equipped with the Double Jump ability. Instead, it has the Super Jump ability.
It is based on Groovy 's shape, like the other Rivals boards.
Sharpeed is the only Rivals board that has one word in its name.
It is the fifth board to have a word written on it (saying the word "Rivals"), the first being Bubblegum (saying the word "Pop"), the second being Jazz (saying the word "Jazz" on the bottom of the hoverboard), the third being Punk (saying the "Punk" on the bottom of the hoverboard) and the fourth being Superhero (saying the word "Bam").
In the Chinese version, it is a  board and called Super Gear (超级齿轮) .
It is the fourth board after Snowflake , Jingles , and Rudy .
In , it can be bought for or obtained by watching 60 ads.
In , it can be unlocked in the Season Hunt .
It is the 9th special birthday board after Super Surfer , Trickster , Boombastic , Mag-Neat-O , Zuper Zapper , Danger Dasher , Future Wave and Rave Rider .
It is the first board that has a spray can, the second being Skyrocket and the third being Raggedy Runner .
It’s Lawrence ’s board.
It have same upgrades as Monster , Smoking Slime , Jazz , Yellow Sub , Mayo Mania , Veggie Velocity , Bloomster , The De-lyre-ious , and Bias Boom .

Shin Supreme
Shin Supreme is a limited hoverboard released in . Like any other hoverboard, it protects the character from crashing for 30 seconds. When crashed, it will need to recharge for a few seconds before it can be used again.
Appearance
This is a black board with a red section at the top that has a white skull design, and below it, there are prominent white rib-like patterns. On one side of the board, there are several cylindrical protrusions, while on the other side, there are some dark, angular shapes.
Trivia
It, Fiesta , and Galactic Peel are the 42nd, 43rd, and 44th boards released in 2025 , after Hyper Viper , Lantern , Override , Fresh Love , Heartstopper , Dear Dart , Roarsome , Arara Board , Moongazer , Purple Spin , Cyan Note , Blue Riff , Eggscalibur , Bloomster , Edinburst , Guard Board , Trespasser , Mizu Dash , Zapline , Seven Seas , 13th Birthday , You Are Here , Freebird , Glitter Blaster , Float-Booster , Feeling Beachy , Street Style , Roll & Race , Midsummer , Business Time , Rabbit Racer , Circuit Bunny , E-Racer , Brainstormer , Principal's Nightmare , The De-lyre-ious , Moon Biter , 8 Ball , Piece Of Cake , Finish Line , and Motor Mania .
It's the sixth / board, the first being Prickly , the second being Casket , the third being Torito , the fourth being Smoking Slime , and the fifth being Fiesta .
It is Mateo 's board .
In , it costs .
Since its release in , it has a glitch where the ending animation is bugged when the Double Jump upgrade is turned on.
Future Wave , Street Grace , Cook-Express , Couch Surfer , Fear Tractor , Fall Speed , Lantern , You Are Here , Rabbit Racer , Moon Biter , and Pie Express had this glitch too, but they were later fixed in , while Shin Supreme still remains unfixed.
Future Wave , Street Grace , Cook-Express , Couch Surfer , Fear Tractor , Fall Speed , Lantern , You Are Here , Rabbit Racer , Moon Biter , and Pie Express had this glitch too, but they were later fixed in , while Shin Supreme still remains unfixed.

Shiny Surprise is a limited hoverboard released in . Like any other hoverboard, it protects you from crashing for 30 seconds. When crashed, the hoverboard will explode and need to recharge for a few seconds before using it again. It can be unlocked as a reward for completing the Holiday Hunt .

Si Woo
Si Woo is a character released in . He is the 259th character in the game and the 44th surfer of 2025 .
Appearance
Default Outfit
Si Woo is a 16-year-old South Korean teenage boy and idol from who is a member of the group R3VIVE . He has his light blue hair styled in a ponytail; and for his outfit, he wears a black-accented white T-shirt under a blue jacket with a single long tiered sleeve, a simple blue pants, a pair of platform boots, and a single black and green fingerless glove worn on his right hand. He also has a lip piercing and wrapped around his waist is a blue-green gradient belt, along with black fingerless gloves
Springtime Outfit
Released in , Si Woo now wears a chick hoodie underneath a muted lavender jacket, with some of his light blue hair sticking out. Below that is his blue and green kilt over an oversized blue pants, which is held by a purple belt. Aside from having his white sneakers with dark navy blue accents, he also have fingerless gloves and lip piercing as accessories.
History
* An exact date was found where it appeared in, otherwise, the edition release date is assumed.
Trivia
He and Joo Won are the 43th and 44th surfers released in 2025 , after Snake , Tang Yuan , Valentina , Kaleo , Rebeca Roar , Gabriel , Dinorange , Rocky , Rani , Finlay , Ribbon , Chicken Jake , Mallard Tricky , Oni Hime , Saru , LOC , Stevie , Berta , Costa , Yutani Tree Frog , Rochelle Rebelle , Asher , White Rabbit , Peter , Tara , Henry , Sunny , 8 Ball Jake , Piper , El Primo , Spike , Dynamike , Poco , Max , Alma Brava , Mateo , Crewmate Jake , Crewmate Tricky , Crewmate Spike , Crewmate King , Crewmate Tasha , and Crewmate Guard .
He is the fifth surfer, after Mina , Rin , Ji-Yeong and Joo Won .
He and Joo Won are the first and second male South Koreans surfers in the game.
He and Joo Won are the first and second male South Koreans surfers in the game.
He, Joo Won , and Lucky are members of the idol group R3VIVE .
He is the 14th surfer of 2025 to cost real money, the others being Rebeca Roar , Rocky , Ribbon , Oni Hime , LOC , Costa , Yutani Tree Frog , Rochelle Rebelle , White Rabbit , Tara , Sunny , Spike , and Alma Brava .
He is the only member of R3VIVE to cost in his release.
He is the only member of R3VIVE to cost in his release.
He is the third surfer from 2025 to get a new outfit in 2026 , after Oni Hime and Rebeca Roar .
He is the 19th surfer who is 16 years old, after Catrine , Bruno , Tainá , Hali , Lucky , Faiza , Electra , Ozzy , Kedi , Logan , Leif , Snake , Rebeca Roar , LOC , Costa , Rochelle Rebelle , Tara , Sunny , and Alma Brava .

Sindri
Sindri is a character released in . He is the 212th character in the game and 37th surfer of 2024 .
Appearance
Default Outfit
Sindri is a 14-year-old teenage Icelandic boy from . He has brown hair that's partially dyed red, grey eyes, and freckles. He wears a quilted jacket with shades of orange, red, and yellow, a white turtleneck, green pants with vertical stripes, white socks, and red sneakers. He holds the langspil (an Icelandic fiddle) in one hand and its bow in the other.
History

Skull Fire
Skull Fire is a hoverboard first introduced in as one of the 4 new boards from the edition. It is a type of hoverboard that protects from crashing for 30 seconds. When crashed, the hoverboard will explode and need to recharge for a few seconds before using it again. It costs 75,000.
On January 22, 2015 , the update gave it a new upgrade called Double Jump .
On March 5, 2015 , the update gave it a new upgrade called Super Speed .
Appearance
It looks like a hoverboard with a picture of fire bursting out from the front part of the hoverboard on a black background. When the Double Jump upgrade is selected, it gains six jet booster exhaust pipes on the sides. Its Super Speed upgrade adds a booster engine with a flame design at the back.
Trivia
Among all the hoverboards (excluding hoverboards with special abilities), the Skull Fire board used to be the most expensive board.
It has the same abilities as Future Wave , Skyrocket , Roaring Heart , Astro Tune , Street Grace , You Are Here , and Marbleous .
In the Chinese Version, it's called Flame (火焰) .

Skye
Skye is a limited character released in . She is the 176th character of the game and the second surfer of 2024 . She can be unlocked by completing the stage 5 of Season Challenge in .
Appearance
Default Outfit
Ai Jiahua (艾嘉桦), better known by her nickname Skye , is a 17-year-old Chinese teenage girl and racer from . A half of her hair is light green, and the other half is dyed in turquoise (though one lock of it has a darker hue). Her facial features include her black eyebrows and eyeliner, brown eyes, light pink lips, a small black heart facepaint under her right eye, a band-aid like plaster under it, and a skull earring on her right ear. On her neck is a black choker with spikes. She also has a white and black top, worn with a black jacket that has light green and yellow accents, a yellow cat logo on the back, and blue cuffs on the wrist. After that is a black shorts that has a white strap on right thigh and a gray belt. Together with her black fishnets is a skull-designed garter and a green sock on the left leg. Her black shoes have silver accents and chains on it.
Sky Attack Outfit
Launched in , Skye's hair is now shorter, curls inward, and the light green half of it is now dyed black. Over her cropped red-tipped, light brown blazer and white shirt is a red scarf, worn together with her brown gloves. Meanwhile, her dark brown skirt is kept with a belt that a giant silver buckle and two silver-embellished straps on the sides. Aside from her large brown platform boots, Skye is also wearing a pair of long white socks underneath, where her left thigh has a brown garter attached to her left boots. The face accessories from her prior outfit, the heart patch and the bandage, has been removed.

Smoking Slime
Smoking Slime is a limited hoverboard released in .
Appearance
It appears to be a bright, lime, and slimy board that has bones inside of it. Its base is a little higher than usual making some characters feet go inside the slime. When a player equips the Speed Up upgrade, the board gains a front grill and tailpipes, making it resemble a car. When a player equips the Super Jump upgrade, the board gains a silver skull on the front.

Smooth Drift
Smooth Drift is a hoverboard upgrade. When equipped, it makes the hoverboard glide softly and slowly when jumping and in mid-air.
List of Hoverboards
Trivia
There’s a bug with this upgrade where when you land, you float up high in the air. Players can use this as an advantage of going to higher places or for long air time.

Snake
Snake is a limited character released in . He is the 216th character in the game and 1st surfer of 2025 .
Appearance
Snake is a 16-year-old Chinese boy from Luoyang ( ), representing the 2025 Chinese Zodiac Animal Snake . His face is covered with a golden snake mask; which has two white eyes with red lining, a white mouth with two fangs, and long snake tongue. There is a patterned relief on the forehead, and on the sides there is a white cobra hood. He also has a black hair tied in a ponytail with a red hair tie. For his outfit, he wears a traditional wushu costume, which is a dark brown tunic with a golden collar, bottom, sleeve tips, and snake body design, and a pair of red pants with golden tips. He wears golden bracelets on both hands, and a golden tassel on his hip. For footwear, he wears red socks and red shoes, which has dark brown soles.
History
* An exact date was found where he appeared in, otherwise, the edition release date is assumed.
Trivia
He is the first surfer of 2025 .
He is the second surfer, the first being Song Yi , and the third being Tang Yuan .
Currently, Snake is the only male surfer.
He is the sixth character of the 12-animal Chinese calendar. Those before this are Rat , Ox , Tiger , Rabbit , Dragon , and Horse .
Hyper Viper is his board .
He is the 20th surfer whose name starts with S after Spike , Sun , Salma , Sofia , Scarlett , Saquon , Spacebot , Super Runner Jake , Super Runner Tricky , Super Runner Fresh , Super Runner Yutani , Song Yi , Super Runner Fernando , Soul , Spraybot , Skye , Stella , Sindri , and Snowy .
In the loading screen of , his mask is missing its fangs.
He is the third character to return in the update after his release, the first is Jia , and the second is The Burger King .
He is the second Zodiac surfer to be named by his edition instead of Special Surfer ( Luoyang Surfer ), the first being Tiger (named as Lunar New Year Surfer ).
He is the 12th surfer who is 16 years old, after Catrine , Bruno , Tainá , Hali , Lucky , Faiza , Electra , Ozzy , Kedi , Logan , and Leif .
His age is known (16 years old) unlike Dragon , whose age is unknown, for unknown reasons.
His age is known (16 years old) unlike Dragon , whose age is unknown, for unknown reasons.

His birthday is between October 23 and November 21 (the exact date is unknown).

Snowy
Snowy is a limited character released in , who is the winner of the Snow Storm craft-a-character. He is the 214th character in the game and 39th surfer of 2024 . He was made by @nick_the_artiste .
Appearance
Default Outfit
Snowy is a 15-year-old Austrian teenage snowglobe boy from . He has a turquoise snowman face with black eyes and a red mouth. He wears a petrol-colored jacket with white at the bottom representing snow, a white T-shirt, a red bow, a maroon scarf and pants, and red and turquoise shoes with two snowballs. He is wearing a red Christmas hat with teal pom-pom.
History

Soda Rush
Soda Rush is a new exclusive challenge released in  where the players can play in 10 different locations and receive prizes by collecting Soda Can ( ) tokens. This is similar to the , and challenges, with the only difference being where you must collect all the tokens in a single run and a run immediately ends as soon as you finished collecting them.

Sofia
Sofia is a limited character released to . She costs 95,000. Both her 1st outfit, the Gaucho Outfit, and her 2nd outfit, the Tango Outfit cost 30. She is the 48th limited character in Subway Surfers, and the 46th limited character in the World Tour series.
Appearance
Default Outfit
Sofia is an Argentinian teenage girl from who wears a green cap facing backwards, gray headphones around her neck, rainbow leggings, a pair of red sneakers, and a black tank top. She has brown eyes and brown hair. Her leggings have the same colors as Splash .
Gaucho Outfit
Launched in , she has a down hat, two pigtails, a white shirt, a red cape and brown trousers. She also has sepia black boots. She seems to be a cowgirl.
Tango Outfit
Launched in , she has a typical tango dance costume, a red frilly dress and a verdigris waist, the dress has a red flower on her bust, she wears red shoes with verdigris details including small verdirgis flowers, a transparent dark tights, her hairstyle is a hair clip with a red and verdigris flower.

Song Yi
Song Yi is a limited character from the update. The player must complete the entire Season Hunt to get her totaling to 400 . She is the 150th character in the game. Her first outfit, Golden Crush Outfit costs 400 in , currently 150.
Appearance
Default Outfit
Song Yi is a Chinese teenage opera dancer from . She has brown eyes and her whole face is painted white, with makeup consisting of red lipstick and smears that extends from her eyebrows to her cheeks. Her dark blue hair is fixed in a bun and a traditional headpiece, which includes a blue headband base and bluebirds, as well as pink and cream-colored beads. For her actual outfit, she wears a blue sleeveless vest above her turquoise shirt, a pair of dark blue pants, bandages wrapped around both of her arms, and a reddish pink ribbon belt tied around her waist. She also has white socks and pink sneakers in white straps and turquoise accents for footwear.
Golden Crush Outfit
Launched in , her hair became more shiny, saturated, and being tied in two messy buns, held with a red hairpin, golden ribbons, and a fan. Still painted entirely white, her makeup now includes a pink eyeshadow and red cheek markings. Her pink qi pao has purple patterns and is being wrapped in a yellow bandage-like fabric, which can also be seen in her left arm and right hand. Her red tights has two long white and red socks over it, worn with a pair of purple sandals.
Lucky Koi Outfit
Launched in , her face isn't fully covered in white anymore, though the red stains from her eyeshadow to cheeks have been more opaque, and her forehead now also has a large red circular marking on it. Her dark blue hair is still on a messy bun but it has orange tips and streaks, and is currently being held with two red ties. The long puffy-sleeved orange top she wears is being layered with a brown pinafore dress and a red vest that is stylized like a ribbon. Below that is a red pair of tights and orange sneakers that have cream accents.
History
* An exact date was found where she appeared in, otherwise, the edition release date is assumed.
Trivia
Song Yi is the 17th character released in 2022 after Fantasma , Alia , Zi Hao , Moira , The Burger King , Super Runner Yutani , Super Runner Fresh , Super Runner Tricky , Pride Miss Maia , Super Runner Jake , Dummy , George , Pink , Charlie , Tiger , and Hasina .
She is the first surfer, the second being Snake , and the third being Tang Yuan .
She is the eighth character to have a spray can in their idles, after Jake , Miss Maia , Bob The Blob , Charlie , Pink , Dummy , and Super Runner Jake .
Bob the Blob 's spray can is very similar to hers.
Bob the Blob 's spray can is very similar to hers.
According to SYBO's social media post , like Phoenix , she is also friends with Cleo .
She is a fan of the Supernovas group ( Astra , Stella and Ji-Yeong ), based on the official Friendship Day post.
She is usually smiling in her animation, but like Koral , Spike , Mala , Bruno , Yuto , Zi Hao , Thursday , Skye , Stella , Astra , Finn and Electra , she seems to have a very straight face with no expressions when you play as her.
She and Akira are the first surfers to receive new outfits in 2025 .
She is also the first surfer to get a second outfit in 2026 .
She is also the first surfer to get a second outfit in 2026 .
Night Lute , Lantern , and Lucky Fish are her boards .
In the (China Town) update of the Chinese version she makes an appearance on a stage in the show scene in the background a screen with her face in hologram.
Her last appearance in the files was in .

Soul
Soul is a limited character released in the update. He is the 156th character in the game and the second surfer of 2023 . He costed 400 during his release .
Appearance
Default Outfit
Soul is a British turquoise-colored spirit from who possessed a silver medieval armor holding a red and blue metallic shield.
Sir Easter Outfit
Launched in , his armor becomes more vibrant and colorful, with big blue bunny ears attached on its helmet and has a shield which is now in yellow, blue, and red. Additionally, his spirit becomes more blue.
Centurion Outfit
Launched in , Soul now has an overall golden armor, with his helmet now being a gladiator helmet with red crest. He also has a red garment draped across his shoulder to waist. His spirit is now a darker blue.
History
* An exact date was found where he appeared in, otherwise, the edition release date is assumed.

Special Challenge
Special Challenge is mechanically the same as Tag Time Attack and Season Challenge . This challenge was released in 3.52.0 ( ). You need to complete 5 stages to unlock specific rewards from each special challenge.
How To Play
Pick up hourglasses to increase your time .
All points are added up for your total score.
Your surfers need to rest to keep on going and get bigger rewards!
Event Cities & Surfers
Trivia
Some updates' Season Challenge are replaced with this gamemode. (Except for , in this update both Season Challenge and this gamemode are released)
Currently is the only update where the Special Challenge takes place in a different edition rather than being the same as the major edition (Example the major edition is but the Special Challenge takes place in instead of Brawl Stars Season).

Special Thursdays
The Special Thursday was an event that was introduced in the edition. Hence it's name, it is available on every Thursday. During this event, if the player is using a certain character , they automatically activate a +5  Score Booster  on their run. This applies until the end of the event. The event name changes according to the character who receives the score booster.
Trivia
For unknown reasons, this event was removed in .
Oddly its placeholder name is Warlike Thursday.

Events
See the events .

Speeder
Speeder is a limited hoverboard released with . It is the fiftieth limited hoverboard in Subway Surfers . Like any other hoverboard in the game, it protects you from crashing for 30 seconds. When crashed, it will need to recharge for 5 seconds before it can be used again. The Speeder can be bought with 50,000, like many other limited hoverboards.
Appearance
It resembles a Formula One race car .
Trivia
This is the third new limited hoverboard of 2017 , after Pedal and Jewelled .
This is the first limited hoverboard that has a special power on its default form. The second hoverboard is Leaf .

Spike
Spike is a character that can be unlocked by collecting 200 Spike's Guitars ( ) tokens.
Stuart McKay is his real name but, the crew calls him “Spike".
Appearance
Default Outfit
Spike looks like a "teenage punk rocker" with a white tank top, a black jacket with spikes at the shoulders and an red A on the back, light-blue skinny jeans, black shoes with red shoelaces, and has a red and gray Mohawk. He also has blue eyes.
In the  update, he received 2 new outfits, which are the Rock Outfit and the Punk Outfit, they cost 320 and 620 respectively.
Rock Outfit
In his Rock Outfit, a little more changes are visible. He loses his mohawk and wears black make up around his eyes. His T-shirt changes to a darker shade and he wears ripped dark blue jeans. He also has a spiked bracelet on his right arm. It costs 320.
Punk Outfit
In his Punk Outfit, there are some changes. he has spiky green hair, a red shirt and a blue tie with dark blue stripes. He also has face piercings, including one on his nose. It costs 620.
Limited Outfits (Variants)
Festive Spike ( )
Pride Spike ( )
Crewmate Spike ( )
Trivia
His haircut changes according to his outfits, similarly to Ella and Tasha .
His outfits are both based on different music genres. The Rock Outfit seems to be related on Black Metal Music. The Punk Outfit on Punk Rock Music.
His normal appearance is based on both rock and metal music.
The "A" on his back is the symbol for anarchy.
Callum is his sibling, according to the official post for Siblings Day.
Spike, Jake , Tricky , Fresh , Frank , Yutani , Boombot , Rin , Miss Maia , King , Dino and Tasha are the only characters in the game who have limited edition counterparts, Zombie Jake ( Halloween update), Elf Tricky ( Christmas update), Festive Fresh ( update), Festive Jake , Festive Tricky , Festive Spike , Festive Frank and Festive Yutani ( update), Pride Jake , Pride Tricky , Pride Fresh , Pride Spike , Pride Yutani , Pride Frank and Pridebot ( update), Spacebot ( update), Gingerbot ( update), Parkour Rin ( update), Super Runner Jake ( update), Pride Miss Maia and Super Runner Tricky ( ), Super Runner Fresh ( update), Super Runner Yutani ( update), Elf Jake , Elf Yutani and Elf Fresh ( update), Yutani Harlequin Toad ( update), Outatime Jake ( update), Pixel Jake , Ballerina Tricky and Guard King ( update), Dinorange ( update), Chicken Jake and Mallard Tricky ( update), 8 Ball Jake ( update), Crewmate Jake , Crewmate Tricky , Crewmate Spike , Crewmate King and Crewmate Tasha ( update), Frank Noir ( update).

He is also the only token character not to have a Super Runner counterpart.

In , he is introduced for the first time in with Thunder .
He is the fifth character(s) to have their animations reused for a new character ( Astra in ) after J Balvin ( Prince K ), Vivienne ( Ramona ), Captain Flash and Clockwork Johnny (both; new characters in ), Thunder ( Maeko ) and Azura ( Diego ).

Spike is Pansexual. He is the second Pansexual character, the first is Miss Maia .
Spike is the only surfer of the classic "five" to not receive an Elf variant, Super Runner variant or a Rival.
He shares the exact same name as Spike , the surfer, making this the first time in the history of Subway Surfers where a character has the exact same name as another character.

Spike's Guitar
Spike's Guitar is a character token needed to unlock Spike and his outfits. It can be obtained within the Token Box , Mystery Box or Super Mystery Box .

Spike (Brawl Stars)
Spike is a character released during . He is the 246th character in the game and the 31st surfer of 2025 .
Appearance
Spike is a cactus with an engraved face and a red flower on top of his head. He also wears brown shorts and a purple vest with golden patches on the sides.
Trivia
He, Piper , El Primo , Dynamike , Poco , and Max are the 29th, 30th, 31st, 32nd, 33rd, and 34th surfers released in 2025 , after Snake , Tang Yuan , Valentina , Kaleo , Rebeca Roar , Gabriel , Dinorange , Rocky , Rani , Finlay , Ribbon , Chicken Jake , Mallard Tricky , Oni Hime , Saru , LOC , Stevie , Berta , Costa , Yutani Tree Frog , Rochelle Rebelle , Asher , White Rabbit , Peter , Tara , Henry , Sunny , and 8 Ball Jake .
His character ability for the Brawl Stars Showdown event is called Stick Around , where he throws a trap ahead to slow down the other players.
He and Spike (Core Crew) are the first pair of surfers to share the same name in the game.
During gameplay, Spike's running animation is the same as Bob The Blob 's in the Trick or Treat Challenge .
He is the twelfth surfer of 2025 to cost real money, the others being Rebeca Roar , Rocky , Ribbon , Oni Hime , LOC , Costa , Yutani Tree Frog , Rochelle Rebelle , White Rabbit , Tara , and Sunny .
Unlike the others, he and Yutani Tree Frog haven't returned without costing . (Because he is a collab character)
Unlike the others, he and Yutani Tree Frog haven't returned without costing . (Because he is a collab character)

Sporty Summer
Sporty Summer is a limited hoverboard released in .
Appearance
Sporty Summer is a golden hoverboard with red, green, black, yellow and blue in the middle, resembling the colours of the Olympic ring that features 5 continents (America, Europe, Asia, Africa and Oceania/Australia).
Trivia
It, Glarx 3000 , Standing Ovation and Risky Ride are the 26th, 27th, 28th and 29th boards released in 2024 after Skyrocket , Electro Shock , Bada-Bomb , Confetti Crush , Red Velvet , Roaring Heart , Lunar Scroll , Astro Tune , Interstellar , Shamrock Shebang , Megga Bite , Fast and Festive , Radiant Rider , Jak , Tea Timer , Deli-Vroom , Yellow Sub , Jelly Board , Koinobori , Mayo Mania , 12th Birthday , Pixel Hoverboard , Street Grace , Alarm On , Rock n' Riley , Sunny Sailor and Laser Flip , and was released before Heavy Metal , Arrow , and Champ in .
It's the 4th board, after Rose , Sweetheart , and Paint Palette .
Just like Radiant Rider and Mayo Mania this board was released in the calendar of the update before its intended update ( ) and later being able to be unlocked on its intended update ( ).
This board celebrate games, which was held from July 26th to August 11th, 2024 .
Unlike the other boards and characters which were labelled " Paris Summer Games" before their labels were changed to " Paris" in 3.32.4, it was always a " Paris" board since .
The five stripes on it are the same colors as the five rings of the Olympics logo.
Because it was released in , and was named a board, it leaked the update.
It wasn't in the or trailer for unknown reasons. The same thing happened with Jak in .
It remained unchanged in 3.32.4, even though all the other Summer Games references were altered or removed for an unknown reason.
It's Phoenix 's third board . His first and second boards is Beach Pop and Fan-tastic .

Spraybot
Spraybot is a limited character released in .
Appearance
Spraybot is an American (Fan-made) robot from . He is a purple spray can head that has a pink smiley and a pastel blue star. His left eye is blue while the other is jungle green. His body and legs are like a mix of Tagbot 's and Boombot 's. His right arm is jungle green with a glowing white ring with pastel green borders around it. His left arm is blue with 2 dots of rose. Both his legs are spray cans. His right leg has a stroke of blue on a gray background with the other having a stroke of pink on a white background. His right leg has a sub word.
History
* An exact date was found where he appeared in, otherwise, the edition release date is assumed.

Spraycan Awards
During the update, the Spraycan awards were introduced. At the start of the  edition, trophies were able to be received again multiple times due to the Spraycan awards being introduced that time.
Obtaining all the Bronze awards will reward the player with 81. It will reward them with 135 if all Silver awards were collected. The player will be awarded 216 if they collected all Gold awards and 270 if all Diamonds were collected. They will be rewarded a total of 702 if all Bronze, Silver, Gold and Diamond awards were collected.
In a minor update, most Spraycan awards were replaced by Badges, but they function the same and have the same requirements as old Spraycan Awards, alongside some new ones, except they also reward a new form of profile customization and there's now a Champion rank, but some Spraycan awards remain.
Requirements
In order to receive all the awards, the player has to:
Own 60 characters
Complete 300 missions
Collect 30,000 coins from their friends
Collect the Microphone, Headphones, Cassette Tape and Platinum Record trophies
Collect the Emerald, Diamond, Ruby and Amethyst trophies
Complete the Word Hunt for 60 consecutive days
Own 70 boards
Get 36 medals in Top Run
Collect 10,000 powerups
Own 80 Outfits
Score 250,000 without collecting coins
Complete 9 missions in one run
Get 24 gold medals in Top Run
Wear Super Sneakers for 4 minutes
Collect exactly 2,012 coins in one run
Poke their friends 800 times
Pick up 100 keys in the Subway
Open 1,000 Mystery Boxes
Beat 250 friends in Top Run
Score 500,000 without jumping or rolling
Complete 40 Wordy Weekend challenges
Win 4 Jackpots
Complete 10 Wordy Weekend challenges in one weekend
Open 200 Super Mystery Boxes
Complete 20 Weekly Hunts in one run
Get 15 diamond medals in Top Run
Score 250,000 points without changing lanes
Watch Ads on 50 different days
Get 900 rewards in Daily High Score
Get all rewards in Daily High Score 90 times
Get 60 champion medals in Top Run
Tiers
Awards come in 4 different tiers: Bronze, Silver, Gold, and Diamond.
List of Spraycan Awards
Here are the types of awards and their requirements:
History
Trivia
In 3.49.1, when many Spraycan Awards became Badges , Jackpot Bonanza was renamed Lucky Duck, and Friends are Gold was renamed Helping Hands for unknown reasons.

Sprinkle
Sprinkle is a character released in . She is the 272nd character in the game and the 10th surfer of 2026 .
Appearance
Default Outfit
Sprinkle is a 14-year-old Irish teenage girl from wearing vibrant clothing and often holds a pinwheel in yellow, pink, green, and blue blades. Her purple jacket has long, multicolored striped sleeves, and a flower design that has a star in its center. She layers her blue jeans with a short blue and green plaid skirt, and below that are her pink pair of mary jane shoes. For her headwear, she has a green beret topped with a baby blue pompom, matched with her two butterfly hairclips. Sprinkle also wears a green backpack with blue straps, and a part of her short red hair is styled in pigtails.

Starboard
Starboard is a hoverboard which is also a free gift to anyone who downloads Subway Surfers . Like any other hoverboard, it protects you from crashing for 30 seconds. When crashed, it will explode and needs to recharge for a few seconds before it can be used again. Starboard was introduced during Subway Surfers: Holiday .
During the  , it received a board upgrade, called Star Trail , which is free.
During the , it received a new board upgrade, called  Double Jump which costs 45.
Appearance
It's quite basic, with three yellow stars on a green background (as written in its name). When the Star Trail upgrade is equipped, it gains a star-shaped thing on the back that shoots out stars. the Double Jump upgrade adds two hoses on each side as well as a front section with a fourth star.
History
Starboard was added to the game on December 1st, 2012 with the Holiday update.
On August 28th, 2014 , the update gave it a new upgrade called " Star Trail ".
On October 9th, 2014 , the update gave it a new upgrade called " Double Jump ".
Trivia
Starboard and Superhero were the first hoverboards to receive upgrades.
Starboard's Star Trail upgrade is the only free upgrade in the game so far.
It is the second free hoverboard, the first being the default hoverboard .
In the Chinese version, it's a board, and it's called Star (星星) , and it's not obtainable for Free anymore.
Both Lucy and Dino shares this board according to the old Subway Surfers website

Stay Low
Stay Low is a hoverboard upgrade. When equipped, it makes the character constantly stay down when running with a hoverboard , passing through obstacles that normally require to be rolled underneath. This ability is suggested for a few events such as Mystery Hurdles .
List of Hoverboards

Stella
Stella is a limited character released in . She is the 180th character in the game.
Appearance
Default Outfit
Stella is an 18-year-old American young woman/teenager from that has a hot pink hair with green antennae. She wears yellow starry sunglasses, a purple shirt and vest, a purple striped pants, as well as green gloves and shoes. She holds a purple keytar with green keys.
Color Fever Outfit
In celebration of the Holi festival during update, her hair is now braided down. She wears a bright pink shirt and black, long gloves, pairing it with her blue-tinted sunglasses, blue and purple pants, and black chunky boots. Her keytar is now cyan with dark blue keys, and her face is splashed with a dark blue paint.

Stevie
Stevie is a character released in . He is the 232nd character in the game and 17th surfer of 2025 .
Appearance
Default Outfit
Stevie is a 14-year-old Danish teenage boy from . He has a rounded face and a missing teeth. His white long coat is worn over an oversized gray T-shirt, and below that is a blue jogging pants with neon green accents. Other aspects of his outfit include his black socks under his white sandals, a purple eye mask which he used as a headband, and a gold-laced necklace, which has a Do Not Disturb door card hanging on it.
Hitchhiker Outfit
Still from , this outfit is leaning more into an adventurer-themed. He wears a vibrant green baseball cap designed with three country flags (Denmark, Brazil, and Canada), and a blue-collared black shirt having a orange-colored sling bag on the chest area. His bottom wear consists of floral orange shorts and dark-blue hiking boots with bright green accents and black soles.

Street Grace
Street Grace is a limited board released in and the board of Ballerina Tricky . Super Speed is its default ability.
Appearance
The appearance of this board might be inspired by the bottom part of Tricky 's ballet shoes with pink ribbon attached on the middle part, the bottom of it is green. When upgraded, it will add two small wings on the sides on the board.

Street Style
Street Style is a hoverboard released in . Like any other hoverboard, it protects the character from crashing for 30 seconds. When crashed, it will need to recharge for a few seconds before it can be used again.
Appearance
It is simply a wooden skateboard deck painted with black and magenta stripes, there are also yellow stars, purple color at the bottom. Equipping Stay Low will add two magenta handle bars to the left and right sides, Super Jump wild add lime outline around the board.
Trivia
It, Roll & Race , and Midsummer are the 27th, 28th, and 29th boards released in 2025 , after Hyper Viper , Lantern , Override , Fresh Love , Heartstopper , Dear Dart , Roarsome , Arara Board , Moongazer , Purple Spin , Cyan Note , Blue Riff , Eggscalibur , Bloomster , Edinburst , Guard Board , Trespasser , Mizu Dash , Zapline , Seven Seas , 13th Birthday , You Are Here , Freebird , Glitter Blaster , Float-Booster , and Feeling Beachy .
It's the second board, after Eagle .
It's Rochelle Rebelle 's board .
In , it costs in the Offer Trails .

Subway Showdown
Subway Showdown is a multiplayer game mode officially released in where you can race against five other players. It has five Leagues: Bronze , Silver , Gold , Platinum , and Diamond ; where on each league, there are three ranks, like Bronze I , Bronze II , and Bronze III .
For unknown reasons, Platinum league is removed since .
Each race costs one Ticket ( ). If you have less than three Tickets, you'll gain one free Ticket every four hours. You can also buy five Tickets for $1.49 ( ), or watch an ad for one free Ticket (once every six hours).

Subway Studio
The Subway Studio (or AR) is a feature introduced in 3.13.1, in this feature you can record videos with characters and boards in the real world.
Trivia
This feature was only available for Indonesia, UK, and Denmark users until June 22nd, 2023 .
In the official SYBO trailer , Jake , Tricky , Fresh , Yutani , Miss Maia , Dino and Guard with his Dog have better graphics (with more rim light).
The AR Mode was restricted to players of age 16 years and older.
It was later released for all players.
It is also the second age restricted feature, the first being Online Save (introduced in ).
It was later released for all players.
It is also the second age restricted feature, the first being Online Save (introduced in ).

Subway Surfers
Subway Surfers is an endless running video game developed & published by Kiloo & SYBO . The player takes on the role of an average teen (or, on rare occasions, a young adult/adult) vandalizing a subway train with spray paint, and is caught by The Guard and his dog . The player must run away from the two, who are chasing them. In the update, keys ( ) were added, which you can use to revive your character if the player should choose to use them for said purpose, you can also use them to unlock outfits. The game is available on iOS and Android platforms.
The game was launched in May of 2012 , a year later in 2013 " World Tour " became the theme of the game, where the settings are in cities like , , , , , , , and , only a few of the many locations that have been featured up until this point. The game starts with a default character, Jake . However, as players collect more Coins , Event Coins , Keys , Character Tokens , and Season Hunt Tokens they will eventually get the chance to unlock new characters and outfits . As well as coins and keys, they can collect spray cans ( ), hats ( ), stereos ( ), guitars ( ) and UFOs ( ), in order to unlock Tricky , Fresh , Spike , Yutani , and their outfits respectively. Also, some other characters in this game can be unlocked with Real Money and by collecting other tokens who change every update.
In Marathon Challenge was introduced which is similar to the main game but you get rewarded for how far you run. This mode was expanded to have more variations later on ( Tag Team , Mystery Hurdles , Tag Time Attack etc.)
In early 2020, Kiloo stopped developing and publishing the game for unknown reasons (however in SYBO history video it is possible that this happened due to a expired contract). That means that currently, SYBO is developing and publishing the game.
In , was introduced which is similar to the main game but you can’t touch the floor and the vines are spreaded around the floor. In there is also a similar new game mode to which is .
The official website for the game is https://subwaysurfers.com .
Gameplay
The object of the game is to run as far as possible in an endless subway while avoiding randomly generated obstacles that require the player to either jump (slide finger forward), duck (slide finger backwards) and dodge the oncoming trains in a precise manner. The game increases in difficulty with the subway altering to more tricky routes the more you run. It also increases in difficulty with the character’s running speed increasing until it caps at 3 minutes precisely after you first start the run. The player can also activate a Hoverboard to take a extra hit (1 when hitting a object, 2 when hitting the sidelines) if the player fails to avoid the obstacles their character is caught by the guard, but the player then gets the chance to revive or go to the home screen and start the run over.
Power-ups
Coin Magnet : Attracts coins even if the player is not in their path as long as if the coins are in the same plain as the player.
Jetpack : Allows the player to fly in the air, Grants temporary invincibility and allows players to collect many coins.
2X Multiplier : Doubles the player's current multiplier. (x10 = x20)
Super Sneakers : Allows the player to jump higher. Useful for collecting hunt tokens.
Pogo Stick : Makes the player jump high in the air and collect coins and a random power-up.
Headstart : Same power as the Jetpack except there are no coins and you get a free power-up at the end of it can be used 2 times after 1 use.
Score Booster : Boosts the player's multiplier by +5, +6, or +7.
Super Mysterizer : Gives a player an exclusive mystery power-up (These can only be collected on Mondays).
Hourglass : Adds 10s (5s in ) to the timer (exclusive to Tag Time Attack ).
Super Bubble : Adds 30s or 90s in (now available in every event).

Game Version History
See: Version History .
Subway Surfers frequently is being updated by SYBO Games . Updates were to add new characters and hoverboards and re-release existing ones, or to fix bugs. All versions of Subway Surfers listed can be found in Version History paage.

Other Media

Languages
The game is currently available in 16 languages. These are: English, Spanish, Latin American Spanish, Brazilian Portuguese, Portuguese, French, German, Italian, Dutch, Indonesian, Russian, Turkish, Japanese, Korean, Chinese and Chinese (Hong Kong).
Popularity
As of December 2019 , the app had 2.7 billion downloads, according to AppAnnie statics.
As of August 2020 , the game had 3 billion downloads worldwide, according to Subway Surfers ' official website.
As of May 2023 , the game had 4 billion downloads worldwide, according to Subway Surfers ' official website.

Trivia
Every character from the game (even the new ones) all have the same voice (specifically when they bump into something).
In this case, they grunt in the same voice but sometime low or high pitched.
When running into a train or hit by a train they say something similar to oops (though in-game it sounds like opss).
In this case, they grunt in the same voice but sometime low or high pitched.
When running into a train or hit by a train they say something similar to oops (though in-game it sounds like opss).
The ESRB for this game is rated Everyone 10+ and Apple rating as 9+ due to cartoon/fantasy violence.
At some date around August 17th 2025, the game became paid for some people for unknown reasons despite having always been free, on the IOS App Store the game costed around $6.99 USD for a short time, but then it got lowered and now costs $0.99 USD, it's still free on both Google Play Store and Amazon Appstore however.

It takes exactly 3 minutes to reach full speed when running.

Subway Surfers+
Subway Surfers+ is a 2025 re-release of the original Subway Surfers , developed and published by SYBO Games . It was globally released on December 4th, 2025, made exclusive to the Apple Arcade subscription service. This version of the game removes in-app purchases/microtransactions and advertisements, rebalances the currency economy ( Coins & Keys ), and allows for new ways to unlock Characters and Boards .
Gameplay
Jump into Subway Surfers+, the premium Apple Arcade edition of the iconic mobile game loved by billions. Dash through vibrant cityscapes, dodge trains, and collect your favorite characters and boards. Same run, new platform! (Description)
The game plays very identically to the free version of Subway Surfers, where you can choose a character , run away from the Guard whilst dodging trains and obstacles, collect power-Ups on the way, purchase new cosmetics with coins and keys , and many more.
What did change, however, are various methods of unlocking new characters and boards, as there are no longer ways to spend money on the game or watch advertisements to gain currency.
Major Gameplay Differences
Characters are now the main source of Base Multipliers (instead of Missions like the base game); Core Crew members will give you a single Base Multiplier, while others (depending on rarity) can give you either 2-4 Base Multipliers. The maximum Base Multiplier you could get (without Score Boosters ) was 160x (on launch day, the number increases each update).
All Core Crew members ( Jake , Tricky , Fresh , Yutani & Spike ), alongside their Outfits , are no longer locked behind Collectibles: each Core Crew member now costs 9,000 Coins, and Outfits are now 4,000-12,000 Coins (depending on the release date a certain Outfit was first made available on).
Boards no longer cost Keys to unlock; they instead cost 4,000 Coins. Board Upgrades now also cost Coins, and are cheaper, too.
Certain Characters, Boards, Frames and Profile Icons are now available through the All-Time Highscore reward track: beat the required highscore, and you get the reward tied to that score (for example, Pumpkin Pete is unlocked for reaching a 2.2m highscore). This does NOT apply to any game-mode and can only be done in a regular run on the current World Tour destination.
Collectables Box now only features Characters (65.67% of dropping) and Boards (34.33% of dropping), instead of only featuring Keys and Collectibles. This allows you to get certain Characters and/or Boards that are not present in the World Tour 's Shop rotation or in the Events tab.
This version of the game, as of writing this page, has a completely different World Tour destination schedule from the free version. Check out Subway Surfers+/World Tour for the full list.
Minor Gameplay Differences
All Mystery Boxes in the Shop (including the Collectables Box ) now cost Keys to purchase and open; Mystery Box costs 2, Super Mystery Box costs 6, & Collectables Box costs 18.
The Mini Mistery Box has been removed from this version of the game.
Missions can no longer be skipped with Coins or ADs: each mission skip now costs 4 Keys to do so.
A new way to revive yourself from being caught was added: upon being caught, a circle and cursor will appear. The circle has 3 markings: in red, green and yellow (with Jetpack ). Touching the screen while the cursor is in the red marking will end the run. Touching while the cursor is in the green marking will allow you to continue the run, and touching while the cursor is in the yellow marking (w/ Jetpack ) will allow you to continue the run AND get a free Jetpack . You can only revive 10 times, and the cursor will go faster and faster each time you revive.
The Friends & Badges systems have been removed from this version of the game. There were other features that weren't accessable at launch, such as Top Run & Leaderboards, but those have been brought back.
Trivia
This is the third other version of Subway Surfers to start with as the first ever destination.
This version of the game strangely used the app icon on launch day, despite already having an unique icon for the game used in promotional material. This has been corrected in further updates since.
This is the eleventh known re-release of Subway Surfers , with the previous release being the Chinese Version.
This is the seventh game in the Subway Surfers franchise, with the latest games being Subway Surfers City and Subway Surfers Paint Brawl .
This is the second Subway Surfers game that released on Apple Arcade, with the first being Subway Surfers Tag . However, unlike that game, this version strangely does not support controllers.
When this game was announced in November 2025, one of the web-articles said that there was going to be an implemented "jetpack mini-game," when there was none to be found of when the game came out. The "mini-game" most likely refers to the new revive system, or it may just be a common hoax.
In the update on this version, uses the image of Lana in Top Run pose.

Subway Surfers: The Animated Series
Subway Surfers: The Animated Series is an animated web series based on the game Subway Surfers . It ran starting from June 1 , 2018 on SYBO's YouTube channel "Subway Surfers" (formerly “SYBO TV”). However, there have not been any new episodes since it’s last release on January 11 2019.
Divulgation
On December 20, 2017 the Subway Surfers: Winter Mystery website was launched, which functioned as a kind of daily gift, because every day until December 7, 2017 this site would reveal the look of some character from the animated series.
On May 31, 2018, the day before the animated series premiered, the original game received an update in Venice Beach that was the location of the Subway Surfers TV Series Watch Festival on June 1, 2018, that had a lot of themed things of Subway Surfers and also had the Premiere of the first episode of the Animated Series.

Subway Surfers (Chinese version)
WARNING: Do not create Subway Surfers (Chinese Version) stuff pages in this wiki. This page is the only one that is allowed. For creating Subway Surfers (Chinese Version) stuff pages, please go to this Wiki .
Subway Surfers (地铁跑酷) also known as Subway Parkour , is a different version of Subway Surfers , but it's made by iDreamSky, which is a company from China, this game includes many exclusive contents and stuffs (Characters, Hoverboards... etc). Some of those exclusive Characters and Hoverboards are available in the Original version.
This game was released on November 27th, 2013

Trivia
Despite this game being only exclusive for China, anyone outside this country can playing this game if they have a real Chinese phone number, or if they download it from app store that lets you playing without need for it.
This game includes many exclusive things such as Characters , Hoverboards ,... Etc.
In this game, there are many characters and hoverboards from the original version that got different designs in this version.
In this game, there are many characters and hoverboards from the original version that got different designs in this version.
The Subway Showdown was inspired by the Race Mode from this game.
All the Challenges are available in this game, Team Takeover is the only one that is not available.
For unknown reasons, Subway Studio is not available.
This game includes an exclusive Hoverboard Upgrade called + Score , when the player activate an Hoverboard with this upgrade, a bonus Score multipliers will be added to the Score Multiplier, few hoverboards from the original version have this upgrade. This upgrade is divided into two types:
+5 Score : which added 5 Score Multipliers to your Score Multiplier.
+10 Score : it's the same but added 10 Score Multipliers instead.
+5 Score : which added 5 Score Multipliers to your Score Multiplier.
+10 Score : it's the same but added 10 Score Multipliers instead.

Subway Surfers (Korean Version)
Subway Surfers (서브웨이 서퍼) (originally known as Run! Gwangsu Subway Surfers (달려라! 광수 서브웨이 서퍼) was an exclusive version of Subway Surfers , made for the South Korea (Republic of Korea) and the KakaoTalk App, developed and published by Mocoga, this game includes some changes and exclusive stuffs (Ability for characters, Revamped GUI... etc). But later the game was shut down on September 24, 2014 .
This game was released on March 4, 2013 .
NOTE: This version of the game is currently a Lost Media.

Trivia
This is the 1st re-release of Subway Surfers , the 2nd being Chinese Version, (3rd if one counts Cancelled Taiwanese Version from Game Bar), the 4th being Uyghur Version and the 5th being Train Riders and the 6th being Taiwanese Version (IDreamSky Games Version).
This version is produced by Mocoga.
This is the 1st Subway Surfers game to be discontinued, the 2nd being Taiwanese Version (IDreamSky Games), the 3rd being Subway Surfers Blast , and the 4th being Subway Surfers Match .
This game was originally called Run! Gwangsu Subway Surfers (달려라! 광수 서브웨이 서퍼) during , but when the world tour begins, the name changed to Subway Surfers (서브웨이 서퍼) or Subway Surfers For Kakao (서브웨이 서퍼 For Kakao) .
In Fact, Gwangsu (광수) is actually Jake 's old name, means that the game's old name was a reference to him, but that has changed later.
In Fact, Gwangsu (광수) is actually Jake 's old name, means that the game's old name was a reference to him, but that has changed later.
The character's abilities system looks very similar to the one from Subway Surfers City .
Strangely, when the game was shut down, the Mocoga company itself has shut down, and there's no informations about this company currently at all, only Facebook page exists but the posts were deleted.

Subway Surfers City
For more info about this game, see Subway Surfers City Wiki
Subway Surfers City is a game made by SYBO Games . In some countries, it was soft launched on July 11th, 2024 . Released globally on February 26th, 2026
In the game, the classic Subway Surfers characters receive new updated designs, and there are many, Billy (Different from the Surfer ( Billy Bean ) in the original game),
Jay (different from the surfer Jay in the original game), as well Rosalita and many more to come.
Gameplay
The game plays just like the original Subway Surfers, but with different graphics and art styles, more obstacles, and gameplay mechanics. Unlike the original game, you now have to collect board energy to get a hoverboard, which fills up a meter as you collect more. You can upgrade characters and level up. Upgrading characters costs coins and unlocks more perks/abilities they can use and increase their score multiplier and also gives XP. You can gain XP by playing the game or upgrading your boards or characters. You gain different rewards for each level you progress, and completing season missions which also give you rewards.
There are more kinds of obstacles and they vary depending on the level, such as in The Docks where there are cargo crates that fall from the ceiling and you have to react quickly to not crash into them, bubbles in DeLorean Park where they give you sort of a double jump and 10 points, drones in Sunrise Boulevard that take you high up in the air. There are new objects such as air vents and bouncy trains that allow you to get to high places, explore areas and get power ups you normally can't reach. There are new power ups, the bouncy shields the are essentially super sneakers but you have to pound on the ground once, the battery which extends your time on the hoverboard.
Rewards
You can open Super Boxes with 100 keys which is the only current use for keys, these boxes give you Surfer Tokens, Board Tokens, Keys and coins. There are daily deals which you use coins you obtained and purchase Surfer Tokens. There is also a daily Ad Box which give you less amount of rewards than the Super Box and also the Bonus Ad Box which requires watching 10 ads anywhere in the game.
Trials
Trials are adrenaline-pumping unique short runs that require your best performance to get the best rewards.
You can unlock and upgrade characters to score more in trials, you've 3 tries with 3 different surfers and you can get one more try with each character by watching an ad.
The more you score the more rewards you get, for example; Surfer Token boxes, Board Token boxes and Keys.

Trivia
Subway Surfers City were originally called Hoverboard Heroes and it's published by SYBO, but in 2024 , Sybo Games renamed it as Subway Surfers City.

Concept arts
Secret Stars
Main Article: Secret Stars
This game has a new feature that substitutes score boosters for secret stars. Each secret star increases the multiplier by 1x and you can collect a maximum of 3 (on very rare occasions 4) stars per run. Currently, there are at least 38 secret stars available to collect with each one being in a specific location with more being added.

Subway Surfers Classic
Subway Surfers Classic is the first edition of Subway Surfers ever created. It was first released for iOS on May 24, 2012, and later released on Android on September 20, 2012. This edition is set in an unnamed fictional subway environment next to , along with cliffsides and forests.
The game was first released with five surfers : Jake (for free), Tricky (for 3 ), Fresh (for 50 ), Yutani (for 500 ) and Spike (for 200 ). More surfers joined the Core Crew in later updates: Frank (for 40,000 ), Ella (Formerly Frizzy; for 150,000 ), King (for 80,000 ), Ninja (for 20,000 ) and Lucy (for 7,000 ) were added on July 12 (iOS Only), and Tasha (for 30,000 ), Tagbot (for 12,000 ), Brody (for 350,000 ), Prince K (980,000 ) and Zoe (for 120,000 ) were added on September 13 (iOS Only) and September 20 (Android Only). Also, the first Hoverboard was made available (for free). All the new features in this update are permanent (unlimited).
This edition lasted from the game's initial launch up until the first World Tour edition, although two seasonal events, the Halloween and the Holiday , took place in this edition.

Subway Surfers Classic: Halloween
Subway Surfers Classic: Halloween is the 2nd update in the Subway Surfers and the first limited-time event in the game.
This edition is a special variation of , but with the Halloween themed map.
This edition releases the first new limited-time surfer : Zombie Jake , the zombie Halloween costume version of Jake , (for 95,000 ). The Guard wears the Halloween special Frankenstein's monster costume and his Dog wears the skeleton costume.
This edition was released on October 24th, 2012 .

Rather than replacing the original assets from , this event is only activated when the device's clock is set to a date and time from October 24 and November 4, 2012, at which point all the environment assets will be replaced.
Rather than replacing the original assets from , this event is only activated when the device's clock is set to a date and time from October 24 and November 4, 2012, at which point all the environment assets will be replaced.
A new character selection screen was introduced in this edition. It was revamped to reach up to the top of the screen in Holiday , and this would last until , where the background was changed, then fully revamped again in .
Gallery

Subway Surfers Classic: Holiday
Subway Surfers Classic: Holiday 2012 is the 3rd update in the Subway Surfers .
This edition is a special variation of , but with a Christmas themed map.
This edition releases a new limited surfer : Elf Tricky , the Santa's elf Christmas costume version of Tricky , (for 95,000 ) and five new permanent boards : Starboard (for free), Superhero (for 8,000 ), Freestyler (for 45,000 ), Big Kahuna (for 65,000 ), Lowrider (for 320,000 ) and Bouncer (for 280,000 ). The Guard wears the Christmas special Santa Claus costume and his Dog wears Rudolph the Red-Nosed Reindeer costume.
This edition was released on December 1st, 2012 .
New Content
New surfer — Elf Tricky , Holiday special
New board — Starboard , Original board
New board — Superhero , Original board
New board — Freestyler , Original board
New board — Big Kahuna , Original board
New board — Lowrider , Original board (with Stay Low ability)
New board — Bouncer , Original board (with Super Jump ability)
Trivia
This is the first edition to celebrate Christmas, the others being , , , , , , , , , , , , and .
It is the second limited update special variation edition, the first being Halloween .
This edition introduces a new feature — the Hoverboard choice along with five unlimited boards and not the only the default Hoverboard .
This edition also introduces the hoverboards' special powers.
This edition also introduces the hoverboards' special powers.
This is the first update to bring an exclusive outfit for Tricky ( Elf Tricky ).
In this update players could switch between the Christmas map and the default map (same as Halloween ).

Subway Surfers Demo
Subway Surfers Demo was a beta version of the main game was released by SYBO Games and Kiloo for test the game before the official release in May 12th (IOS)/September 20th (Android) in 2012 .
Differences between this version and the final version
There were some Minor and Major differences in general (Mechanics, Gameplay... etc) between this version and the final version as the following list:
(Note: most of these mechanics are not exist in the final version)
There was some bunis sound not exist in the final version like when you moving between left and right, or when you are running on the trains.
The coins, Super Sneakers , Hoverboards used to be have completely different sounds.
The Guard and his Dogs have different sounds.
The Power-Ups doesn't have Lightning in the map
The game's Soundtrack is completely different.
When you crash the Hoverboard, the game will perform slow motion.
You can't record your high score in this version.
When you got hit by a train, the character will not hitting the screen, instead the Guard will pull the character from the foot using his arm.
Due to animation bug, the both character and the guard will disappear (that happens sometimes when you got hit by the train while the guard is not behind you).
Due to animation bug, the both character and the guard will disappear (that happens sometimes when you got hit by the train while the guard is not behind you).
There were supposed to be three dogs, rather than just one dog.

Subway Surfers Gift Rush: Saint Petersburg
Subway Surfers Gift Rush: Saint Petersburg is a Gift Rush edition.
Trivia
This is the first update of the Marathon Challenge in Gift Rush .
In this special Christmas Marathon Challenge there was a special event Gift Rush where the snow-covered St. Petersburg scene is "discovered" where the surfer runs and by activating the board, christmas presents fly through the air and christmas trees grow on the scene, this event is very similar to the Play 2 Plant in .
The St. Petersburg scenery has been updated again from the previous 2020 version, the sky is clearer at night and the moon appears along with a shadow of Santa Claus on his sleigh.
So far, this is the only Marathon Challenge to take place in a world tour location before .
Because of this, it got a new and fully remixed soundtrack like locations from and onward have, the new soundtrack was a full version of .
Because of this, it got a new and fully remixed soundtrack like locations from and onward have, the new soundtrack was a full version of .

Neither Edison nor Banana appeared in the issue.

Subway Surfers Match
Subway Surfers Match was a Match-3 game that released on November 4th, 2022. This is considered to be a spin-off of the Subway Surfers games.
Gameplay
In this game, the player must move an object towards those with the same shape and color. This will cause them to break. Then the objects that are above will fall.
By winning, levels you get golden spray cans. The player must spend them for Jake to be able to perform a graffiti.
Boosters
There are boosters that you can create using the objects in levels.
Spray can : To create it, it is necessary to match objects forming a square. When activated, it will destroy a 5 tile area (+), then destroying a random tile on the screen. If combined with another spray can, in addition to destroying a 5 tile area (+), it will also launch 3 spray cans to destroy 3 random objects.
Rocket ; To create it, it is necessary to combine the objects forming a line of 4 objects. When activated, it will destroy a horizontal or vertical line depending on which side it is aiming at. If combined with the spray can, in addition to destroying a line, it will also destroy a 5 tile area (+). If combined with another rocket, it will destroy a horizontal and vertical line.
Bomb : To create it, it is necessary to combine the objects forming an L or T. If it is activated, it will destroy a 21 tile area (o). If combined with the rocket, it will destroy three horizontal and vertical lines. If combined with the spray can, it will destroy a 5 tile area (+) in addition to blowing up a 21 tile area (o).
Rainbow : To create it, it is necessary to combine the objects forming a line of 5 objects. When swapped with an object, it will destroy all objects of the same color. When combined with any booster, it will create more boosters of a same color that will activate automatically. If it is combined with another rainbow, it will destroy everything at once on the screen.
Before starting a level, you can bring power-ups into a level to give you an advantage:
Bomb + Rocket : Start with a Bomb and Rocket in the level.
Dual Rockets : Start with two Rockets in the level.
Rainbow : Start with a Rainbow Paint Can in the level.
There are also boosters that the player can reserve and use when he/she considers it necessary.
Pogo Stick : Tricky will throw a Pogo Stick that will destroy a tile.
Hoverboard : Jake will throw a Skateboard that will destroy a horizontal line.
King's Locket : King will throw his locket that will destroy a vertical line.
Magnet : Yutani will use her magnet to switch two objects around.
Boombox : Fresh will tune his boombox to destroy random objects in a 20-21 tile area.
Objects
Stone Bricks
Grass
Spraycans
Golden Tickets
Bottle Caps
Colored Spraycans
Areas
Train Station
Sneaker Store
Coffee Den
Basketball Court
Pizza Store
Skate Ramp
Donut Shop
Trivia
For unknown reasons, this game was removed on October 6th, 2025 from both the Apple App & Google Play Store. The game is still playable on Poki, yet very limited as such.

Subway Surfers Paint Brawl
Subway Surfers Paint Brawl (originally known as Paint Brawl : Color of War ) is an upcoming third person shooter game developed and created by Miniclip and Djinnworks Prime, but now controlled by Boom-808. In the game you are in a 4v4 battle equipped with squirt guns that shoot ink and partake in various game modes. It was soft launched in 2025 and reskinned as a Subway Surfers game in 2026.
On April 9th, 2026, the game was soft launched in UK, Portugal and Austria.
You can view the game here: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.miniclip.paintbrawl&hl=en_US
Trivia
It is the first Subway Surfers game made by Sybo's parent company Miniclip .
It used to be called Paint Brawl : Color of War that had original characters unrelated to Subway Surfers , but at an unknown date (possibly in January 2026), it was reskinned to have Subway Surfers characters and content for an unknown reason.
Later, on April 9th, 2026, the game was soft launched on some countries, and the game's name changed officially changed to Subway Surfers Paint Brawl , also the game is now controlled by Boom-808 company instead of Miniclip.
Later, on April 9th, 2026, the game was soft launched on some countries, and the game's name changed officially changed to Subway Surfers Paint Brawl , also the game is now controlled by Boom-808 company instead of Miniclip.
The character models are copied from Subway Surfers City .
The gameplay of this game is noticeably very similar to the Nintendo video game Splatoon , with many weapons that are very similar as well. Both games are 3rd person shooters with 4v4 battles with a game mode to cover the map with the most ink using squirt guns, and the result screens of both games are very similar.

Subway Surfers Play 2 Plant: New York
Subway Surfers Play 2 Plant: New York is a Play 2 Plant edition.
Appearance
The appearance of the Subway is dark and gray, but if you use a hoverboard you can add it’s color back. There is Play 2 Plant signs around the scenery.
Trivia
This is the first update of the Marathon Challenge in Play 2 Plant .
This Marathon Challenge is the first to have a collab, the New York Marathon Challenge is part of the Play 2 Plant event of the update, the goal of the marathon is to plant 200.000 trees, for this you need to use one of the 3 available boards Maple Leaf , Yellow Cab or Lumberjack to color the New York scenery that is all discolored, at the end of the marathon the scenery returns to its normal colors.
This event it's a mix of Marathon Challenge with the Tag Team ( hoverboard version ).
The taxi models have been changed without the top saying “TAXI”, the wheels are now just black circles, and there is a weird glitch where there is no front plate on the taxi.
Gallery

Subway Surfers Running Together: San Francisco
Running Together is mechanically the same as Tag Time Attack , but the coins are all colored (the colors of the LGBTQ+ flag ). This challenge was released in 3.12.0 ( ) dedicated to Pride Month . You need to complete stages 3 and 5 to unlock Pride Frank and Pride Yutani .

Subway Surfers Tag
Subway Surfers Tag is a 2022 endless rouge-like video game developed by SYBO Games , released exclusively for the Apple Arcade subscription service. It serves as the very first spin-off in the Subway Surfers franchise, and also the first game released since the original game (soon followed by Subway Surfers Match ).
The game revolves around the Core Crew (e.g. Jake , Tricky , Fresh & Yutani ), Frank and Miss Maia as they have to survive waves upon waves of various robots made by The Guard , all while spraying and performing tricks on Hoverboards .
Gameplay
Overview
Subway Surfers Tag's gameplay takes several rougelike elements and controls inspired by other mobile games of its kind, such as Age of Zombies .
During gameplay, your required to face against endless Waves of various robots made by The Guard. To do so, you'll need to use your Spray Can, which is a permanent weapon for any character you use (or any temporary weapon, though more on that later). Same Spray Can, however, can not be used infinitely -- it will have to cool down before you can use it again. Thus, the challenge is to strategically use the Spray Can to avoid having to recharge it.
Each run starts out with 3 Hearts, and each hit taken will remove 1 Heart from the count. If all of them have been lost, the run is over.
The Guard Sections
At certain points during your run, The Guard will appear to chase you down. The goal during his sections is to defeat him by empyting his health bar, whilst avoiding various attacks. Upon defeat, he will drop Coins and a temporary weapon for you to use. Each time he comes back, though, he becomes stronger and stronger, with new attacks thrown in to spice up the difficulty.
Tag Sites
Tag Sites are several locations in the gameplay area that allow you to spraypaint. Spraypainting those will allow you to collect Coins and a Heart (which is needed to make sure you won't die). Not all Tag Sites, however, are available from the get-go, as each one of them unlocks after a certain point in the run (EXCEPT for the very first one at the start of each playthrough).
Characters
Playable Characters
Jake (Unlocked for free)
Tricky (Unlocked from the Robo Road)
Fresh (Unlocked from the Robo Road)
Yutani (Unlocked from the Robo Road)
Frank (Unlocked from Daily Rewards)
Miss Maia (Unlocked from Daily Rewards)
Antagonists
Guard
Dog
Skins
Skins are an available cosmetic in the game that allow the certain characters to change appearances. These are available through speicific objectives, such as in the Robo Road and Challenges sub-menu.
For Jake:
J-Rex Red (Unlocked from the Robo Road)
J-Rex Green (Unlocked from the Challenges sub-menu)
The Red Bucket (Purchasable for 4,000 Coins)
The Yellow Bucket (Purchasable for 4,000 Coins)
Gallery
Trivia
- This is the first Subway Surfers game to release from SYBO since 2012 (even though Blades of Brim had released nearly a decade before this game).
- This is the first (and so far, the only ) game in the Subway Surfers franchise to support controllers (as one of the misc. standards in the Apple Arcade library)! In this game, you use the left analog stick for movement and UI navigation and the right analog stick for using weapons.

Subway Surfers World Tour: Aloha Hawaii 2025
Subway Surfers World Tour: Aloha Hawaii 2025 also known as Aloha Hawaii , is the 195th World Tour of Subway Surfers . This update released two new surfers: Valentina , and Kaleo , new outfit for Kaleo : Kiss Kiss, and 3 new boards: Fresh Love , Heartstopper , Dear Dart .
The Marathon Challenge take place in , and , the Tag Time Attack take place in , the Season Challenge take place in , the Mystery Hurdles take place in , the One Run Challenge take place in , the Plant Invasion: No Floor Challenge take place in , and the Floor Is Lava: No Floor Challenge take place in .
The Season Hunt token are Hearts ( ).
New Content
New Surfer - Valentina , Hawaii surfer
New Surfer - Kaleo , Hawaii surfer
Kaleo 's new outfit, Kiss Kiss
New Board - Fresh Love , Hawaii board
(+ Super Speed upgrade)
New Board - Heartstopper , Hawaii board (with Super Jump ability)
(+ Super Speed & Smooth Drift upgrades)
New Board - Dear Dart , Hawaii board (with Smooth Drift ability)
New Profiles - Valentina and Guard (Pink)
Trivia
This is the second update of 2025 .
This is the fifth release of ( , , and ).
This is the fourth re-release of ( , and ).
This is the fourth re-release of ( , and ).
This update celebrates the Saint Valentine's Day ( 2025 ).
This update is also known as Aloha Hawaii .
This is the seventh World Tour to have a subtitle in the city's name after , , , , , and (old logo).
This is the first time since that a new character has been released with a new outfit .
Kaleo has the same animations with Maeko , making it the 19th update after ( Frankette - Rabbot ), ( J Balvin - Prince K ), ( Vivienne - Ramona ), ( Thunder - Maeko ), ( Azura - Diego ), ( Astra - Spike ), ( Lucky - Ace and Red Panda - Dino ), ( Faiza - Zi Hao ), ( Electra - Buzz ), ( Riley - Catrine ), ( Glorgalax - Buzz and Ventura - Carlos ), ( Leo - Hou ), ( Ozzy - Nicolai ), ( Billy Bean - Manny ), ( Kedi - Rin and Ruhi - Dragon ), and ( Pumpkin Pete - George ), and ( Leif - E.Z. ) to reuse animations.
This is the ninth update to release a new fan-made character ( Valentina ), after , , , , , , , and .
This is the seventh update celebrates Saint Valentine's Day , after , , , , and .
The soundtrack for this update is the Hawaii 2023 (Bonus Soundtrack) , which was released in the update with 2023 Music Album , but supplemented with different sounds of the sea, birds, and etc.
returns as an event for the first time since , but it's a part of Marathon challenge now instead of its own Classic Mode .

This is the sixth updated that ended early after . , , , and .

Bugs and Fixes
The Smooth Drift / Super Jump glitch was fixed and now any item/power-up can be picked up any time it appears.
Sometimes, the loading screen stops loading at 55% for some devices.
The spray can bag is gone. This was fixed in a later update.
The new Aloha Hawaii soundtrack was released everywhere, but not on Instagram, instead if you release a video with this soundtrack, it will be written that it's Hawaii 2023 (Bonus Soundtrack) .
It is no longer possible to download images when you unlock a character /hoverboard, when you have a new record, or in Subway Studio .
In V3.41.3, the Super Sneakers no longer make sound when jumping.
This was fixed in .
For unknown reasons, the old Headstart sound from that returned in 3.0.1. was reverted back in 3.41.3.

Subway Surfers World Tour: Amsterdam
Subway Surfers World Tour: Amsterdam is the 60th installment in the Subway Surfers World Tour series and the 63rd update of the game.
This edition released the limited character Jolien and also gave her the new Florist Outfit , which costs 15 .
This edition also released the limited hoverboard , Pedal , as well as the Windmills ( ) as the Weekly Hunt .
It was released on December 29th, 2016 .
New Content
New surfer — Jolien , Amsterdam surfer
Jolien 's new outfit, Florist
New board — Pedal , Amsterdam board
Re-releases
- June 5th, 2020
Trivia

The 1st being , the 2nd being , the 3rd being , the 4th being , the 5th being , the 6th being , the 7th being , the 8th being , the 9th being , the 11th being , the 12th being , the 13th being , the 14th being , the 15th being , the 16th being the 17th being , the 18th being , the 19th being , and the 20th being .
So far it is the only time the first World Tour of a year is in Europe.

Subway Surfers World Tour: Amsterdam 2020
Subway Surfers World Tour: Amsterdam 2020 is the 115th update of Subway Surfers and the 117th ​​​​​installment in the World Tour series.
This edition includes the return of  Jolien  for 95,000 . with a new outfit called Spring Outfit for 25 . This edition also has the return of  Pedal  and Mei as a prize of the Season Hunt.
The Season Hunt tokens are  Windmills ( ).
It was released on 28 May 2020 in some Android devices and on IOS devices and on 5 June 2020 in all devices.
New Content
Jolien 's new outfit, Spring
Trivia
This is the second time that is released ( and  ).
This is the second 2017 edition in 2020, the first being and the third being .
This is also the second 2017 edition to be re-released in a row.
This is also the second 2017 edition to be re-released in a row.
This is the first time that is re-released.
This is the ninth consecutive relaunch. (After the , , , , , , , and ) This is also the eighth consecutive relaunch in 2020.
This is the seventh edition launched in 2020 .
This is the second version that is released only on some devices.
