Subway Surfers World Tour: Arabia
Subway Surfers World Tour: Arabia is the 33rd installment in the Subway Surfers World Tour series and the 36th update of the game.
This edition introduced a new limited edition character named Amira , who's an Arabian Dancer, with her new Genie outfit . This edition also introduced a new hoverboard called Old Dusty that costs 50,000.
The Weekly Hunt items for this edition are the Genie Lamps ( ).
It was released on April 16th, 2015 .

Subway Surfers World Tour: Arabia 2016 is the 46h installment in the Subway Surfers World Tour series and the 49th update of the game.
This edition re-released the limited character Amira along with her Genie Outfit from the 2015 edition (costing 15), and gave her the Jewel Outfit (costing 30).

The Marathon Challenge takes place in and , the Special Challenge takes place in , the Tag Time Attack takes place in , the Mystery Hurdles take place in , the One Run Challenge takes place in , the Plant Invasion: No Floor Challenge take place in , the Floor Is Lava: No Floor Challenge take place in , and the Subway Showdown take place in .
The Season Hunt tokens are Starfishes ( ) and the Soda Rush tokens are Soda Cans ( ).
It was released on June 1st, 2026 .

Lestari 's Hot Spot Outfit is misspelled as Hot Pot Outfit in the Shorts Trailer 's description.
Mei didn't return exclusively to this update for an unknown reason despite being a surfer. However, she was in the Flash Deals .
On this update, changes were made to the game, and some features became unavailable to players residing in Brazil , such as all weekly events: Mystery Monday , Terrific Tuesday , Fabulous Friday and Wordy Weekend . The Mystery Boxes are also no longer available or accessible in the game, and all the rewards have also changed. This is due to changes in the game's rating in Brazil by the Apple Store and Play Store , where it received an 18+ age rating, and according to SYBO's policies, these features were permanently removed for Brazilian players.
In 3.64.1 version, there was a new feature: Daily Spin , where you can spin the wheel and win certain prizes.
This feature was already softlaunched since for some users.
This feature was already softlaunched since for some users.
On the entrance of the "Two-lines Tunnel" area, there is a text poster on the left saying "BELI SEKERANG" [sic] which means "BUY NOW" in Indonesian, but is misspelled. This typo was likely overlooked by the developers. The correct pronounciation is "BELI SEK A RANG"
Bugs and Fixes
The issue with the character selection screen for Liu has been fixed.
K-Dillac 's flame has a black square glitch when equipped in the Player Profile since and still remains unfixed.
The Super Sneakers sounds are still messed up since 3.57.1 and still hasn't been fixed for unknown reasons. When you jump, the default jump sound plays instead of the jump sound from the Super Sneakers. Additionally, if you roll, it will play a Super Sneaker sound when it shouldn't.

Subway Studio 's yellow patterned background is still showing with a darker gradient since .

Additionally, the score for entering the Top Run (which is 25,000), often reappears, even if you already have a score in the Top Run.
The game's speed is still occuring to go too fast since .
On Google Play, the icon appears and screenshots are varies of the world tour.

Subway Surfers World Tour: Bangkok
Subway Surfers World Tour: Bangkok  is the 26th installment in the Subway Surfers  World Tour series and the 29th update of the game.
This edition introduced one outfit, for the new limited character  Noon , the Pink Outfit, which costs  30. It also introduced a new board, the  Turtle . This edition also introduced two more Board Upgrades, the first upgrade for Monster  and the second upgrade for the  Great White . A new  Spraycan Awards  was also introduced, the High Jumper. In this edition a new character was introduced, Dino , a Facebook Gift.
The Weekly Hunt tokens for this edition are Shells ( ).
It was released on November 6th, 2014 .
New Content
New surfer — Noon , Bangkok surfer
New surfer — Dino , Core Crew
Noon 's new outfit, Pink
New board — Turtle , Bangkok board
New upgrade for Monster , Super Speed
New upgrade for Great White , Smooth Drift

- March 2nd, 2017
- April 25th, 2019

The Weekly Hunt tokens are Buddha Heads ( ).

Subway Surfers World Tour: Beijing
Subway Surfers World Tour: Beijing is the 8th installment in the  Subway Surfers World Tour  series and the 11th update of the game.
It introduces a new limited character named Sun , a Chinese acrobat, and 2 new hoverboards : the Panda and the Dragon . It also introduces a new item, the Power Jumper (called Pogo Stick since ). When this item is collected, you will jump super high and collect coins . This edition also gives Fresh two new outfits , which are the Funk Outfit and the Sport Outfit.
The Weekly Hunt tokens are Dragons ( ).
It was released on August 1st, 2013 .

Subway Surfers World Tour: Beijing 2014
Subway Surfers World Tour: Beijing 2014 is the 23rd installment in the Subway Surfers World Tour series and the 26th update of the game.
It's the re-release of . This edition has only introduced one outfit unlike the previous editions. the outfit being the limited character Sun 's outfit, the Spot Outfit, which costs 30. It re-released the board Panda . This edition has also introduced new Board Upgrades, for the Starboard and the Superhero . A new Spraycan Award was also introduced called Coin Cautious.
The Weekly Hunt tokens are Dragons ( ).
It was released on August 28th, 2014 .

Subway Surfers World Tour: Beijing 2020
Subway Surfers World Tour: Beijing 2020 is the 109th update of Subway Surfers and the 111th ​​​​​installment in the World Tour series.
This edition includes the return of Sun for 95,000 with a brand new outfit called Rogue Outfit for 30 . and it also introduces three new characters, Monkbot , Liu and Ming both for 3,99. This edition also has the return of Panda for 50,000 , and introduces 2 new boards: Aero for 2,99 and Scroll for 60 . Rin return for 95,000 and also gets a new outfit called Lunar Outfit for 15 . Lee and Brandon returns for 95,000 , Ace , Mimi , Maeko and Amy returns for USD 3,99 (real money), and Cherry , Dragon , Rickshaw , Wayfarer and Fire Dragon returns for costs 50,000 or 60 .
The Weekly Hunt tokens are Kitties ( ).
It was released on January 23rd, 2020 .

Subway Surfers World Tour: Berlin 2021
Subway Surfers World Tour: Berlin 2021 is the 127th edition of the Subway Surfers World Tour series and the 129th installment in the World Tour series.
This edition features the return of the limited character called Nina , which costs 95,000, there is also a brand new character called Zayn , which costs 2.99. The edition also brings a new hoverboard, called Buddy Bear , as a prize for the Season Hunt along with Alex and her first outfit, the Techno Outfit.
This edition also introduced a new outfit for Nina called the White Night Outfit which costs 45.
The Season Hunt tokens of this edition are Ampelmännchen ( ).
The update was released accidentally on February 11th, 2021 for Android users. The game returned to the update in the same day and the update was officially released on February 18th, 2021 .

Subway Surfers World Tour: Cairo
Subway Surfers World Tour: Cairo is the 24th installment in the Subway Surfers World Tour series and the 27th update of the game.
This edition introduced one outfit , for the new limited character Jasmine , the Safari Outfit, which costs 30. It also introduced a new board, the Croc . This edition also introduced two more Board Upgrades, for the Great White and the second upgrade for the Superhero .
A new Spraycan Award was also introduced. In this edition, the appearance of the Mega Headstart changed.
The Weekly Hunt tokens for this edition are Scarabs ( ).
It was released on September 18th, 2014 .

Subway Surfers World Tour: Cairo 2018
Subway Surfers World Tour: Cairo 2018 is the 76th installment in the World Tour series and the 79th update of the game.
This edition marks the re-release of the limited character Jasmine , who is an Egyptian princess ( 95,000). It introduced a new outfit for Jasmine , the Ankh Outfit ( 30) and re-released the Safari Outfit ( 15). The Croc board also made a reappearance ( 50,000) and a new board was introduced, the Scarab board which can be bought for . It has two special powers, called the Smooth Drift ( 150), and the Speed Up ( 110). It can be bought in three bundles: Scarab Board, Scarab + Smooth Drift, Scarab + Smooth Drift + Speed Up.
The Weekly Hunt tokens are Falcons ( ).
It was released on December 28th, 2017 .

Subway Surfers World Tour: Cambridge
Subway Surfers World Tour: Cambridge is the 122nd update of Subway Surfers and the 124th installment in the World Tour series.
This edition introduces three new characters: Cathy , Noel and Morgan , who are known as the Scream Team. There is also a new board: Beelzebook that can be unlocked in the Season Hunt with Zombie Jake . Five other new non-limited hoverboards were also released in this update: Crew , Crew Crush , Surf & Spray , Blue Ice and Wild Style . These hoverboards are based off the Subway Surfers merchandise.
The tokens are Pumpkins ( ).
The update was released on October 22nd, 2020 .

Subway Surfers World Tour: Chang'an
Subway Surfers World Tour: Chang'an is the 132nd edition of the Subway Surfers World Tour series and also the 134th edition of Subway Surfers.
It has 7 new limited characters with the Pride denomination (they are Pridebot , Pride Jake , Pride Fresh , Pride Spike , Pride Tricky , Pride Yutani and Pride Frank ), with some costing 75 ( Pride Jake , Pride Fresh and Pride Spike ), and others costing a new currency introduced in this edition, called Event Coin ( ), with costs of 15,000, 20,000 and 30,000 for Pride Tricky , Pride Yutani and Pride Frank respectively. There is also a new hoverboard, called Dragon Boat , as a Season Hunt prize along with Pridebot .
The Season Hunt tokens are Zongzi ( ).
The update was released on June 3th, 2021 .

Subway Surfers World Tour: Easter Ireland
Subway Surfers World Tour: Ireland , also known as Easter Ireland , is the 181st World Tour of Subway Surfers and the 183rd installment of the game. This update releases three new characters: Lucky , Meggan and Red Panda . George and Moira have new outfits: Eggstravaganza and Holi. Also, this update includes four new boards: Shamrock Shebang , Megga Bite , Fast and Festive and Jak .

Subway Surfers World Tour: Greece Love Odyssey 2024
Subway Surfers World Tour: Greece 2024 , also known as Greece Love Odyssey , is the 2nd 2024 World Tour season (and the 179th update in the Subway Surfers game).
In this edition, the crew travels to Greece to celebrate Saint Valentine's Day .
This edition releases two new limited surfers : Azura (for 5 stages in Season Challenge ) and Dragon (for 5 stages in No Floor Challenge: Plant Invasion ); a new outfit for Alfie: Cupid (for 400 ); and four new limited boards : Roaring Heart (for 3 stages in Season Challenge ), Lunar Scroll (for 80 ), Confetti Crush (for 4 stages in Carnival Time ) and Red Velvet (for 20 days). The Guard wears the Romantic outfit.
The Season Hunt tokens for this edition are Hearts ( ).
This edition was released on January 29th, 2024 .

Subway Surfers World Tour: Hong Kong is the 88th installment in the World Tour series and the 91st update of the game.
This edition introduced a new character who is named Brandon ( 40), with his Kung Fu Outfit ( 15). It also introduced a new hoverboard, Wayfarer ( 50,000) with the Smooth Drift upgrade ( 150).
The Weekly Hunt tokens are Nunchucks ( ).

This is the 1st World Tour location in which take place on 2 continents; Turkey was a transcontinental country, situated among Europe and Asia.
On the European side, Türkiye is the 16th European country to included in the game, after Italy, France, Russia, United Kingdom, Greece, Romania, the Netherlands, Denmark, Spain, Iceland, Germany, Switzerland, Czech Republic, Monaco and Ireland.
On the Asian side, it is the 10th Asian country to included in the game, after China, Russia, South Korea, Japan, India, Indonesia, Saudi Arabia, United Arab Emirates, Singapore and Thailand.
However, Istanbul is the only edition to be located entirely in two continents. (Russia’s cities, and are both entirely in Europe)
On the European side, Türkiye is the 16th European country to included in the game, after Italy, France, Russia, United Kingdom, Greece, Romania, the Netherlands, Denmark, Spain, Iceland, Germany, Switzerland, Czech Republic, Monaco and Ireland.
On the Asian side, it is the 10th Asian country to included in the game, after China, Russia, South Korea, Japan, India, Indonesia, Saudi Arabia, United Arab Emirates, Singapore and Thailand.
However, Istanbul is the only edition to be located entirely in two continents. (Russia’s cities, and are both entirely in Europe)
This is also the 2nd edition to taken place in a transcontinental country in the game's history, after Russia; the country was also a transcontinental state, with the Western side bordering Europe and the Eastern side (mostly Siberia) bordering Asia.

Subway Surfers World Tour: Kenya
Subway Surfers World Tour: Kenya is the 40th installment of the Subway Surfers World Tour series and the 43rd update of the game.
This edition introduced a new character, Zuri , who is a Masai dancing girl (costing 95,000) with her City Outfit (costing 30), and a new hoverboard, Woody (costing 50,000). This edition also introduced a new Spraycan award , the Super Mystery Maestro.
The Weekly Hunt tokens are Shields ( ).
It was released on September 24th, 2015 .

Subway Surfers World Tour: Las Vegas
Subway Surfers World Tour: Las Vegas  is the 28th installment in the Subway Surfers World Tour series and the 31st update of the game.
This edition introduced the new limited character  Rex  and a new hoverboard, the  Roller . It also gave an outfit to Rex, the Show Outfit. This edition also introduced two more Board Upgrades, for the  Sunset and the second upgrade for the  Monster .
The Weekly Hunt tokens that need to be collected in this edition are Poker Spades ( ).
It was released on January 1st, 2015 . ( New Year's Day )

Subway Surfers World Tour: Las Vegas 2021
Subway Surfers World Tour: Las Vegas 2021 is the 136th edition of the Subway Surfers World Tour series and also the 138th edition of Subway Surfers.
This edition introduces a new character, Cleo , which costs 25,000 , Darryl returns and receives a new outfit , called Gonzo Outfit, which costs 22,000 . The Groovy hoverboard also makes a return, and a new board is added, called Queen of Hearts , which costs 15,000.
The Season Hunt tokens are Poker Spades ( ).

Subway Surfers World Tour: London
Subway Surfers World Tour: London is the 11th installment of the Subway Surfers World Tour series, the 2nd one to be taking place during Christmas , and the 14th update of the game.
This edition introduced a new limited character named Jamie , and two new Hoverboards , Snowflake and Jingles . The gameplay is Christmas-themed, with The Guard dressed up as Santa Claus and his dog as a reindeer, notably Rudolph. This edition also gave Ella (formerly named Frizzy) two new outfits, the Rasta Outfit and the Gold Outfit which cost 15 and 30 respectively.
Players needed to collect Christmas Trees ( ) for the Weekly Hunt .
It was released on November 21st 2013 .

Subway Surfers World Tour: London 2014
Subway Surfers World Tour: London 2014 is the 27th installment of the Subway Surfers World Tour series and the 30th update of the game.
This edition included the re-release of the hoverboard,  Snowflake , and introduced a new limited character, Buddy , along with a new token hoverboard , Rudy . It also gave an outfit to  Buddy , the Sunny Outfit. For some reason, Jamie was not re-released in this tour, even though he is a surfer. This edition also introduced two more board upgrades, for Freestyler and the second upgrade for  Big Kahuna . A new Spraycan Award was introduced, the Coin Counter. The gameplay had a Christmas theme, with  The Guard being dressed up as Santa and his dog as a reindeer.
Like the previous edition, players need to collect  Little Christmas Trees  ( ) in the Weekly Hunt .
It was released on December 4th, 2014 .

Subway Surfers World Tour: London 2018
Subway Surfers World Tour: London 2018 is the 91st installment in the World Tour series, and the 94th update of the game.
This edition marks the re-release of the limited character, Jamie for 95,000 , and gave him the new Top Hat Outfit for 15 , and the re-release of the limited hoverboard Snowflake for 50,000 . This edition is a Christmas special, so all Christmas-themed characters and boards are available.
The Weekly Hunt tokens needed to be collected for this edition are Gingerbread Cookies ( ), different from Little Christmas Trees ( ) from the & editions.
It was released on November 29th, 2018 .

Subway Surfers World Tour: London 2023
Subway Surfers World Tour: London 2023 is the 176th World Tour of Subway Surfers and the 178th installment of the game. This update released two new characters: Lawrence , a performance artist, who is the fourth and final member of the Rivals Crew and the rival of Tricky , and Vivienne , the fashionista, a new outfit for Alia : Sneaky Blinders and two new boards: Sharpeed , the last Rivals board, and Fauxpunx .
The Marathon Challenge takes place in and , the Tag Time Attack takes place in , the Hoverboard Challenge takes place in , the Mystery Hurdles takes place in , the last Rivals Challenge takes place in , the Plant Invasion: No Floor Challenge takes place in , and the One Run Challenge takes place in .
The Season Hunt tokens are Telephone Boxes ( ).
This update was released on November 20th, 2023 .

Subway Surfers World Tour: Los Angeles
Subway Surfers World Tour: Los Angeles is the 22nd installment of the Subway Surfers World Tour series and the 25th update of the game.
In this edition, it introduced Wayne , an actor, into the game along with his Chief Outfit , which costs 15. Ninja also received his second outfit, known as the Flame Outfit . A new hoverboard , the Cruiser , was also introduced into the game.
The Weekly Hunt tokens are Clapper Boards ( ).
It was released on July 31st, 2014 .

Subway Surfers World Tour: Lunar New Year 2023
Subway Surfers: Lunar New Year 2023 is the 161st edition of the World Tour series and the 163rd edition of Subway Surfers.
This edition have a new limited character called Rabbit as a Season Hunt prize (costing 400 on tier 30). Bonnie returns costing 20.000 and receives a new outfit, called Lucky Outfit, which costs 35.000 . George returns as a Season Hunt prize (costing 75 on tier 10) and receives a new outfit, called Moonbun Outfit, which costs 15.000 . Festive Frank returns in a bundle and receives a new outfit, called Fortune Outfit, which costs 150 . Rabbot returns as a prize of the Tag Time Attack and receives a new outfit, called Ironbun Outfit, which is also unlocked in the Tag Time Attack. Ox , Tiger , Rat , Coco , Paint Palette , Qin , Rin , Hou , and Harumi and Bubblegum returns in bundles, and Ox , Tiger , Rat and Bonnie (and her outfits) are part of the Crew Bonus.
This update introduces a new event, the Mystery Hurdles , in this update, the event are in .
The Marathon takes place in , the first Tag Time Attack takes place in , and the second Tag Time Attack takes place in .
The Season Hunt tokens are Paper Lanterns ( ).
This update was released on January 9th, 2023 .

Subway Surfers World Tour: Madagascar
Subway Surfers World Tour: Madagascar  is the 48th installment in the Subway Surfers World Tour series and 51st version of the game.
This edition introduced a new character, Aina , costing  95,000 who is described as a hip nature lover of the island of Madagascar. This version also introduced a new outfit, the Daisy Outfit for Aina costing 15 and a new board too, the Chameleon which is a wooden board with a printed chameleon which changes its color in a rainbow pattern costing  50,000.
This edition also introduces the new  Weekly Hunt tokens called Butterflies ( ).
It was released on March 31st, 2016 .

Subway Surfers World Tour: Marrakesh 2018 is the 90th installment in the World Tour series and the 93rd update of the game.

Subway Surfers World Tour: Mexico 2022
Subway Surfers World Tour: Mexico 2022 (also known as Mexico City 2022 ) is the 155th edition of the Subway Surfers World Tour series and also the 157th edition of Subway Surfers.
This edition has a new limited character called Fantasma , which is unlocked completing all stages of the new Tag Time Attack event. There's also a new limited hoverboard called Smoking Slime , which costs 35.000 along with its Speed Up and Super Jump upgrades, which both costs 30.000 . Casket returns as a Season Hunt prize. Bob The Blob returns as a Season Hunt prize too along with a new outfit, called Slime Outfit, which is also a Season Hunt prize. Morgan returns in the Halloween Calendar and Manny , Scarlett , Olivia , Zombie Jake , Zoe , Eddy , Cathy , Noel and Mike returns in bundles ( Manny , Scarlett , Olivia are part of the Crew Bonus).
The Marathon takes place in , while the Tag Time Attack takes place in .
The Season Hunt tokens are Sugar Skulls ( ).
This update was released on October 10th, 2022 .

Subway Surfers World Tour: Miami
Subway Surfers World Tour: Miami is the 6th installment to the Subway Surfers World Tour series, and the 9th update of the game.
It includes a new character called Nick that costs 95,000 , and a board called Flamingo that costs 50,000 . It also includes the newest non-limited board , Hot Rod . It costs 280,000 .
This tour introduced outfits to the game. A free outfit was given to Jake , which was the Dark Outfit. Beside that, the Star Outfit also became available. Tricky received two new outfits as well, one being Camo Outfit and the other being Heart Outfit.
The Weekly Hunt tokens are Flamingos ( ).
This update was released on May 30th, 2013 .

Subway Surfers World Tour: Moscow
Subway Surfers World Tour: Moscow is the 9th installment in the Subway Surfers World Tour series and the 12th update of the game.
It features a new limited character , Alex as well as a new hoverboard : Teddy . This edition also introduced two new outfits for Lucy , the Goth Outfit which costs  15 and the Steam Outfit which costs 30.
This edition's Weekly Hunt requires the player to collect Russian Dolls ( ).
It was released on September 5th, 2013 .

Subway Surfers World Tour: New Orleans
Subway Surfers World Tour: New Orleans is the 10th installment in the Subway Surfers World Tour series and the 13th update of the game. It contains a new limited character, Eddy (costing 95,000) and a new board , the Pumpkin Board (costing 50,000).
The gameplay has the Halloween theme, with the Guard dressed up as the iconic Frankenstein's monster and the dog as a skeleton.
This edition also introduced two new Halloween-themed outfit, the Clown Outfit for Frank and the Count Outfit for King . They both cost 15.
Its Weekly Hunt tokens are Pumpkins ( ).
It was released on October 10th, 2013 .

Subway Surfers World Tour: New Orleans 2014
Subway Surfers World Tour: New Orleans 2014  is the 25th installment in the Subway Surfers World Tour series and the 28th update of the game.
This edition re-released the character  Eddy and the  hoverboard ,  Pumpkin . It also gave an outfit to Eddy , the Trick Outfit costing 30. This edition has also introduced two more board upgrades: an upgrade for the  Big Kahuna  and a 2nd upgrade for the  Starboard . The gameplay has a Halloween theme, with the guard dressed up as the iconic Frankenstein's monster and the dog as a skeleton.
Like its previous release , players needed to collect Pumpkins ( ) in the Weekly Hunt .
It was released on 9 October 2014 for Android users and October 15th, 2014 for iOS users.

Subway Surfers World Tour: New York
Subway Surfers World Tour: New York 2013 is the 1st World Tour season and the 6th update in Subway Surfers .
In this edition, the crew travels to New York (USA, New York state), and it celebrates New Year ( 2013 ).
This edition releases a new limited surfer : Tony (for 95,000 ), a new limited board : Liberty (for 50,000 ) and three new permanent boards : Skull Fire (for 75,000 ), Sunset , (formerly Miami ; for 12,000 ) and Monster (for 30,000 ).
This edition was released on January 3rd, 2013 .

Subway Surfers World Tour: New York 2014
Subway Surfers World Tour: New York 2014 is the 15th installment in the Subway Surfers World Tour series and the 18th update of the game.
It's the second edition in Subway Surfers to be re-released (if you're looking for the earlier edition from 2013 , go here ). The edition gave King the Royal outfit and Tony the Folk outfit. Tony is the limited character for New York. Tony is the third limited character in Subway Surfers to get an outfit to wear. This edition introduced the Super Mysterizer on every Monday and re-introduced previous events such as Super Jackpots every Wednesday.
The Weekly Hunt tokens is Liberty Statues ( ).
It was released on March 6th, 2014 .
New Content
Jay 's new appearance
Tony 's new outfit, Folk
King 's new outfit, Royal

Subway Surfers World Tour: New York 2015
Subway Surfers World Tour: New York 2015 is the 39th installment in the Subway Surfers World Tour series and the 42nd update of the game.
It is the third time New York appeared in the series. This edition re-released Tony , costing 95,000, and also gave him the new Game Outfit for 30. The board Liberty was also re-released costing 50,000. This edition also introduced brand new looks for characters and hoverboards .
The Weekly Hunt tokens in this edition are Basketballs ( ).
It was released on September 3rd, 2015 .
New Content
Tony 's new outfit, Game
Trivia
This is the second edition that has been re-released twice. The first being .
This edition was the first one not to have a border around the app icon.
This edition gave a graphical overhaul for the game, with characters, boards and other assets being HD.
With the HD graphics, the characters no longer have pointer fingers, now looking as if they are holding a spraycan.
HD graphics and Rim Light were released for high end devices, but they weren't released for low end devices.
However, Rim Light would later be released for low end devices starting from .
However in the v3.32.3 update, all characters lost their HD graphics and rim light.

Subway Surfers World Tour: New York 2018
Subway Surfers World Tour: New York 2018 is the 86th installment in the Subway Surfers World Tour series and the 89th update of the game.
This edition marks the return of Tony (for 95,000) and the Liberty board (for 50,000). A new hoverboard, Yellow Cab (for 30) was also added.
The Weekly Hunt tokens are Basketballs ( ).
It was released on August 9th, 2018 .
New Content
New board — Yellow Cab , New York board
Trivia
This edition introduced the Online Save feature.
This is the fourth time is released ( , , & ).
This is the third time is re-released ( , & ).
From that edition onwards, the minimum requirement to play Subway Surfers on an Android device was Android 4.4 and higher.

Subway Surfers World Tour: New York 2021
Subway Surfers World Tour: New York 2021 is the 128th edition of Subway Surfers and also the 130th edition of the World Tour series.
This edition has the return of a limited character called Tony , which costs 95,000. This edition also has two new characters, one named Darryl , and the other named Lana , and both cost 2.99. There is also the return of the hoverboard , called Liberty , which costs 50,000. There is also a new hoverboard , called Uprock , as a prize for the Season Hunt along with Jack and his second outfit, called Dapper Outfit.
The Season Hunt items in this edition are Apples ( ).
It was released on March 11th, 2021 .

Subway Surfers World Tour: North Pole
Subway Surfers World Tour: North Pole is the 43rd installment of the Subway Surfers World Tour series and the 46th update of the game.
This edition is the Christmas special edition for 2015 and the last World Tour destination for 2015. This edition re-releases Buddy , the London-special character and makes him the Holiday special like the Elf Tricky . It gives him his third outfit, the Candy Outfit for 30. It introduces a limited new board the Choo Choo Board for 50,000. It releases a new award: The Diamond Surfer award . This version also gives upgrades to Jingles , the hunt special board of . The upgrades are Snow Trail (costing 30) and the Super Jump (costing 55).
The players need to collect Stockings ( ) for the Weekly Hunt .
It was released on December 3rd, 2015 .
New Content
Buddy 's new outfit, Candy
New board — Choo Choo , North Pole board
New upgrades for Jingles , Snow Trail & Super Jump

- November 28th, 2019
- December 13th, 2021

- December 8th, 2025

Subway Surfers World Tour: North Pole 2023 is the 177th World Tour of Subway Surfers and the 179th installment of the game. This update releases two new characters: Captain Flash and Clockwork Johnny , a new outfit for Bob The Blob called Jingle Outfit, and three new boards: Snow Down , Flash Jet , and Wind-Up Rocket .

This update was released on December 11th, 2023 .

This update takes many references from several anime:
The character teasers for this update is referred to “Who's that Pokémon?" from Pokémon .

Subway Surfers World Tour: Paris
Subway Surfers World Tour: Paris is the 7th installment in the Subway Surfers World Tour series and the 10th update of the game. It released a new limited edition character named Coco that costs 95,000. There's also a new hoverboard called  Rose that costs  50,000.
This edition also introduced four new outfits, two for Spike and two for Tagbot . The first Spike outfit being Rock Outfit and the second being Punk Outfit. As for Tagbot, the first was Space Outfit and the second was Toy Outfit.
Weekly Hunt tokens for this edition are Eiffel Towers ( ).
It has been released on June 27th, 2013 .

This edition has re-released the limited character  of Paris,  Coco , but also introduces her new Art Outfit, which costs 15. This edition has also introduced the Teleporter hoverboard and a new award , the "I Got The Power" Award. It has also introduced a new and most expensive  outfit , the Shine Outfit, which costs 280, for Prince K and re-released the limited hoverboard , Rose .
The Weekly Hunt tokens are Eiffel Towers ( ).
It was released on July 10th, 2014 .

Subway Surfers World Tour: Peru
Subway Surfers World Tour: Peru is the 50th installment in the World Tour series and the 53rd edition of Subway Surfers.
It introduces a new character , who is a mountain climber named Carlos , costing 95,000. It also introduces his new outfit, Inca Outfit, which costs 15. This edition also introduces a new board, Tumi , which costs 50,000.
The Weekly Hunt tokens are Incas ( ).
It was released on May 12th, 2016 .

Subway Surfers World Tour: Peru 2017
Subway Surfers World Tour: Peru 2017 is the 67th edition in the World Tour series and the 70th edition in Subway Surfers.
This edition marks the return of Carlos (costing 95,000), with a brand-new outfit called the Poncho Outfit (costing 15), and the return of the Tumi (costing 50,000).
The Weekly Hunt tokens are Incas ( ).
The edition was originally intended to release on June 1st, 2017 , however, due to a bug in the system, it was released on June 2nd, 2017 , instead.

Subway Surfers World Tour: Peru 2020
Subway Surfers World Tour: Peru 2020 is the 121st update of Subway Surfers and the 123rd installment in the World Tour series.
This edition includes the return of Carlos for 95,000 and a new fan-made character called Tankbot . Tumi also returns with a new upgrade, which is Zap Sideways . A brand new board was also added called Goat , which was introduced during a Surf Mart Sale.
The tokens are Incas ( ).
It was released on October 1st, 2020 .

Subway Surfers World Tour: Prague
Subway Surfers World Tour: Prague is the 47th edition of Subway Surfers and the 50th update of the game.
It introduces Jaro as a limited character (costing 95,000), with his Joker Outfit (costing 15), and Jouster as a limited hoverboard (costing 50,000). It also introduced new upgrades for the Chicky board to those who already unlocked it, being the Egg Trail , which is free, and the Speed Up , which costs 110.
The Weekly Hunt tokens are Dragon Eggs ( ).
It was released on March 10th, 2016 .

Subway Surfers World Tour: Rio
Subway Surfers World Tour: Rio is the 2nd World Tour season and the 5th update in Subway Surfers .
In this edition, the crew travels to Rio de Janeiro (Brazil), and it celebrates Brazilian Carnival.
This edition releases a new limited surfer : Carmen , a samba dancer, (for 95,000 ), a new limited board : Toucan (for 50,000 ) and two permanent boards : Lumberjack (for 4,000 ) and Daredevil (for 80,000 ).
In this edition, the new power-up Score Booster was released. It can increase the player's multiplier by 5, 6 or 7 in a run. Also now all Headstarts became "Mega" and the "Mini-Headstarts" have been removed.
This edition was released on January 31st, 2013 .
New Content
New surfer — Carmen , Rio surfer
New board — Toucan , Rio board
New board — Lumberjack , Original board
New board — Daredevil , Original board

Subway Surfers World Tour: Rio 2015
Subway Surfers World Tour: Rio 2015 is the 36th installment of the Subway Surfers World Tour series and the 41th update of the game.
This version re-released the limited character Carmen for 95,000. It introduces the new Shake Outfit for Carmen , costing 30. A new feature was introduced which allow players to use the Score Booster three times as how they would use Mega Headstarts . It also introduced the Birdie board for 50,000.
The players have to collect Toucans ( ) for the Weekly Hunt .
It was released on June 25th, 2015 .

Subway Surfers World Tour: Rio 2016
Subway Surfers World Tour: Rio 2016 is the 54th edition of the World Tour series and the 57th version of Subway Surfers.
This edition brings back Carmen (costing 95,000) and her Shake Outfit from the 2015 version (costing 15) and Birdie (costing 50,000). In this edition, Carmen also gets a new, Team Outfit, which costs 30, and it introduces the new Medal board, for which you need to collect 40 Torches in 2 weeks to obtain.
The Weekly Hunt tokens are Torches ( ), different from Toucans from the version.
It was released on August 4th, 2016 .

Subway Surfers World Tour: Rio 2019
Subway Surfers World Tour: Rio 2019 is the 92nd installment in the World Tour series and the 95th update of the game.
This edition brought back  Carmen ( 95,000) and her various outfits: Shake Outfit ( 15); Team Outfit ( 30). It also brought back Birdie ( 50,000). Rocket , a new hoverboard was also introduced to celebrate the New Year. It received a board bundle just like Scarab , Chicky and Color Cloud .
The Weekly Hunt tokens are Colorful Parrots ( ).
The edition was originally intended to be released on December 27th, 2018 , but was delayed due to a bug, and was released one day later, on December 28th, 2018 (see in the 2019 page).

Subway Surfers World Tour: Rio 2023
Subway Surfers World Tour: Rio 2023 is the 171st update in the World Tour series and the 173rd update of Subway Surfers, this update released two new characters: Tainá , and Yutani Harlequin Toad , a new outfit for Super Runner Fernando : Super Scout Outfit, and two new boards: Jamanta and Kite . This update was confirmed by SYBO in their X (formerly Twitter) status about Spring in June 2023.
The Marathon Challenge take place in and , the Tag Time Attack take place in , the Season Challenge take place in , the Hoverboard Challenge take place in , and the Mystery Hurdles take place in .
The Season Hunt tokens are Harlequin Toad ( ).
This update was released on August 7th, 2023 .

(+ Smooth Drift upgrade)
New board — Kite , Rio board
SYBO's info about this update
"Later this year, Subway Surfers is heading to Rio de Janeiro, offering players the opportunity to explore the rainforest and its wildlife. The game will feature a rainforest-themed environment, special characters, and outfits inspired by the Harlequin Toad. The update also includes the Underwater destination, which comes along with a refreshed and powered-up Manta Ray board."
NOTE: That this information was taken from the official Subway Surfers website.

Bugs & Fixes
The red graffiti on the blue cargo car is initially orange for unknown reasons, and the color changes to red when the character gets closer.

Subway Surfers World Tour: Rome
Subway Surfers World Tour: Rome is the 3rd World Tour season and the 6th update in Subway Surfers .
In this edition, the crew travels to Rome, Italy, and it celebrates Easter.
This edition releases a new limited surfer : Roberto , a scooter racer and a soccer fan, (for 95,000 ), two new limited boards : Kick-Off (for 50,000 ), Chicky (for 100 ), and a permanent board : Scoot (for 35,000 ).
There was a limited Egg Hunt mission that rewards players with the Chicky hoverboard after they collect 100 Easter Eggs ( ). This update also brought the ability to upgrade Power-Ups by 6 tiers, instead of 5.
This edition was released on February 28th, 2013 .
New Content
New surfer — Roberto , Rome surfer
New board — Kick-Off , Rome board
New board — Chicky , Easter board
New board — Scoot , Original board

- April 17th, 2014
- March 9th, 2026

Subway Surfers World Tour: Rome 2014
Subway Surfers World Tour: Rome 2014 is the 17th installment of the Subway Surfers World Tour series and the 20th update of the game.
It's the third edition to be re-released. This edition saw the re-release of the character , Roberto and the hoverboard , Kick-Off . It also gave an outfit to Roberto, the Fan Outfit, and gave Zoe her first outfit, the Curly Outfit. This edition also introduced Spraycan Awards , which replaces trophies , however, players have to re-collect trophies to get some of the awards.
On this edition players had to collect Easter Eggs ( ) as Weekly Hunt tokens, as it was an Easter special.
It was released on April 17th, 2014 .

Subway Surfers World Tour: Rome 2026
Subway Surfers World Tour: Rome 2026 is the 214th World Tour of Subway Surfers. This update released two new surfers: Vittorio and Enzo , two new outfits for Enzo and Soul : Gladiator and Centurion , and three new boards: Marbleous , Arena Rider , and Major Speed .
The Marathon Challenge takes place in and , the Special Challenge takes place in , the Tag Time Attack takes place in , the Mystery Hurdles take place in , the One Run Challenge takes place in , , and , the Plant Invasion: No Floor Challenge take place in , and the Floor Is Lava: No Floor Challenge take place in .
The Season Hunt tokens are Sunshines ( ) and the Soda Rush tokens are Soda Cans ( ).
It is released on March 9th, 2026 .

Subway Surfers World Tour: Saint Petersburg
Subway Surfers World Tour: Saint Petersburg  is the 75th installment of the Subway Surfers World Tour Series, and the 78th edition of Subway Surfers.
This edition introduced a new limited character,  Nicolai (costing   95.000). It also introduced the Frost Outfit for Nicolai (costing 15 keys). A new board was also introduced, Sleigh (costing 50.000). The gameplay has the Christmas theme, with the inspector dressed up as Santa and his dog as a reindeer.
The Weekly Hunt tokens are Snowflakes ( ).
It was released on November 30th, 2017 .

Subway Surfers World Tour: Saint Petersburg 2020
Subway Surfers World Tour: Saint Petersburg 2020 is the 124th update of Subway Surfers and the 126th installment in the World Tour series.
This edition has the return of a character called Nicolai that costs real money. He gets a new outfit called the Faux Fur Outfit for 25. Freya also returns for 60 with a new outfit called Winter Magic Outfit for 25. There are also 5 new festive characters called Festive Jake , Festive Tricky , Festive Spike , Festive Frank , and Festive Yutani . Festive Fresh returns on Season Hunt with a new outfit called the Hoodie Outfit, along with the Rudy and Lion boards.
The tokens are Snowflakes ( ).
It was released on December 10th, 2020 .

The Season Hunt tokens are Koi ( ) and the Soda Rush tokens are Soda Cans ( ).
It was released on April 20th, 2026 .

Subway Surfers World Tour: San Francisco
Subway Surfers World Tour: San Francisco  is the 45th installment in the  Subway Surfers World Tour series and the 48th update of the game.
This edition released Jenny , costing 95,000, with her Party Outfit, costing 15 and the hoverboard, Groovy , costing 50,000. A new award was introduced, the "Straight Ahead".
The Weekly Hunt tokens are Sea Lions ( ).
It was released on January 21st, 2016 .

Subway Surfers World Tour: San Francisco 2017
Subway Surfers World Tour: San Francisco 2017 is the 61st edition in the World Tour series and the 64th version in Subway Surfers.
This edition brings back Jenny (costing 95,000) and her Party Outfit ( 15) with a brand new outfit called the Pixel Outfit (costing 30), and the Groovy board (costing 50,000) with a brand new special power, the Flower Trail (costing 60).
The Weekly Hunt tokens are Sea Lions ( ).
It was released on January 19th, 2017 .

Subway Surfers World Tour: San Francisco 2019
Subway Surfers World Tour: San Francisco 2019 is the 95th update of Subway Surfers and the 98th update of the World Tour series.
This edition brought back the character Jenny and a new Promo Code character Miss Maia , costing 95,000, her Party outfit, costing 15 and her Pixel outfit, costing 30. It also brought back the hoverboard Groovy , costing 50,000. It also introduced the new Pixel Heart board, costing 50 .
It’s Weekly Hunt tokens are 8-bit Aliens ( ).
It was released on March 7th, 2019 .

Subway Surfers World Tour: San Francisco 2022
Subway Surfers World Tour: San Francisco 2022  is the 149th edition of the Subway Surfers World Tour series and also the 151st edition of Subway Surfers.
This edition has two new characters, Pride Miss Maia as a Season Hunt prize (costing 210 or tier 20), and Super Runner Tricky , which is unlocked through the Super Runner event. There's also a new hoverboard called Trickster , which is unlocked through the Super Runner event.
The Tag Team event for this update is held in .
The Season Hunt tokens are Rainbows ( ).
This update was released on June 7th, 2022 .

Subway Surfers World Tour: Seattle
Subway Surfers World Tour: Seattle is the 123rd update of Subway Surfers and the 125th installment in the World Tour series.
This edition has a new character called  Andy  that costs  75 with his first outfit called Gamer Outfit that costs  15. Pixel Heart also returns with the cost of 40.
Bjarki  and  Moose  returns on the Season Hunt , the tokens are  Elephants ( ).
It was released on November 12th, 2020 .

Trivia

This is the 2nd video game themed World Tour, the first being .
In real life, is known for having many video game stores and it is near the headquarters of some video game companies, so the video game theme makes sense.
Despite the update being about video games, the beginning of the background music is very clearly based on the song Smells Like Teen Spirit , this choice makes sense as Nirvana , the band that made the song, were from Seattle. There is also an 8-bit part in the middle of the song which more closely fits the video game theming.

Subway Surfers World Tour: Seoul
Subway Surfers World Tour: Seoul is the 14th installment of the Subway Surfers World Tour series and the 17th update of the game.
This edition introduced a new limited character , Mina , with her Robo outfit , and a hoverboard , Bubblegum . It also gave Brody a new outfit - the Posh Outfit.
The Weekly Hunt for this edition requires the player to collect Robots ( ).
It was released on February 13th, 2014 .

Subway Surfers World Tour: Seoul 2015
Subway Surfers World Tour: Seoul 2015 is the 29th installment of the Subway Surfers World Tour series and the 32nd update of the game.
This edition re-released the limited character Mina , and also gave her the new Pop Outfit , which costs 30. This edition also re-released the limited hoverboard , Bubblegum .
The Weekly Hunt tokens are Robots ( ). This edition also introduced two more upgrades , for the Skull Fire and the second upgrade for the Freestyler . This edition also introduced the Weekly Facebook Gift and the Mini Mystery Box.
It was released on January 22nd, 2015 .

Subway Surfers World Tour: Shenzhen Showdown 2024
Subway Surfers World Tour: Shenzhen 2024 , also known as Shenzhen Showdown , is the 1st 2024 World Tour season (and the 178th update in the Subway Surfers game).
In this edition, the crew travels to Shenzhen , China .
This edition releases two new limited surfers : Skye (for 5 stages in Season Challenge ) and Thunder (for 5 stages in ); and three new limited boards : Skyrocket (for 3 stages in Season Challenge ), Electro Shock (for 80 ) and Bada-Bomb (for 20 days).
The Season Hunt tokens for this edition are Showdown Logos ( ).
This edition was released on January 8th, 2024 .

Subway Surfers World Tour: Singapore
Subway Surfers World Tour: Singapore is the 52nd edition in the World Tour series and the 55th edition in Subway Surfers .
It introduced a new character, Jia , costing 95,000, with her new outfit, the Wild Outfit, costing 15. This edition also introduced a new board, Lion , costing 50,000.
The Weekly Hunt tokens are Orchids ( ).
It was released on June 23rd, 2016 .

Subway Surfers World Tour: Sneaky Sasquatch
Subway Surfers World Tour: Sneaky Sasquatch is an upcoming and exclusive update for the game Subway Surfers, exclusive to the Apple Arcade platform, in partnership with the game Sneaky Sasquatch, also from the same platform..
It introduced a new surfers Sneaky with 3 new outfits: Fishy Fella, Fake Jake and Fake Tricky.
During this edition's Weekly Hunt , players had to collect Gingerbread Cookies ]] ( }}).
It was released in TBA, 2026 .
New Content
New surfer — Sneaky , "Skater Boi"
Sneaky 's new outfit, Fishy Fella
Sneaky 's new outfit, Fake Jake
Sneaky 's new outfit, Fake Tricky
Trivia
This is, so far, the first and only exclusive update for Subway Surfers+ . There is no information yet on whether it will come to the original version of the game, as the Sneaky Sasquatch collaboration is also an official Apple Arcade game.
Sneaky reuses Hamza's animations in his Fishy Fella outfit, Jake's animations in his Fake Jake outfit, and Tricky's animations in his Fake Tricky outfit.
Generally speaking, this is the second Canadian update/map after , as the Sneaky Sasquatch game takes place in Squamish, Canada .

Subway Surfers World Tour: Space Station
Subway Surfers World Tour: Space Station is the 125th update of Subway Surfers and the 127th edition of the World Tour series.
This edition adds two brand new characters named Spacebot and Frankette . They both cost 2.99 . There are also 3 new hoverboards called Secret Society , Discovery & Endeavour . Ace and his Pilot Outfit and Starcruiser were re-released in the Season Hunt .
The hunt tokens are Infinity Logos ( ).
It was released on January 7th, 2021 .

There's also three new hoverboards, Snow Cloud is a prize of the Season Hunt (costing 210 on tier 20), Ho Ho Hoverboard , which costs 14.000 , and Wrapped is a free gift. The sound effect bug from 3.47.1 has been fixed and certain sound effects no longer randomly have a higher or lower pitch than usual.
In v3.49.1, the World Tour and Race Against The Clock Badges are bugged. They would soon be fixed.

Subway Surfers World Tour: Super Runner City 2026
Subway Surfers World Tour: Super Runner City 2026 is the 217th and current World Tour of Subway Surfers. This update released four new surfers: Toaxx , Ratak , Red , and Chuck , a new outfit for Ratak : Radio Rative , and four new boards: Sewer Surfer , Rat Trap , 14th Birthday , and Bomb-Bastic .
The Marathon Challenge takes place in and , the Special Challenge takes place in , the Tag Time Attack takes place in , the Mystery Hurdles takes place in , the One Run Challenge takes place in , the Plant Invasion: No Floor Challenge take place in , the Floor Is Lava: No Floor Challenge take place in , and the Subway Showdown take place in .
The Season Hunt tokens are Lightning Bolts ( ) and the Egg Rush tokens are Eggs ( ).
It was released on May 11th, 2026 .

Bugs and fixes:
These issues were fixed in 3.63.0 :
Harumi 's Fury Outfit was separated from her Default and Meow Outfit.
Song Yi 's Lucky Koi Outfit was separated from her Default and Golden Crush Outfit.
Lucky 's Haeng-un Outfit was separated from his Default Outfit.
This issue was added in 3.63.0 :
When you select "Default" in the Boombox , the "Super Runner City" will also be selected and vice versa. As a result, when you enter a gamemode, it doesn't sound as default. It always plays "Super Runner City".
Liu is bugged on the character select screen: her default outfits in her scroll bar and outfit icons are replaced with her outfit's scroll bar and icon (Birdwatcher).
These issues were fixed in 3.63.1 :
Select option when you unlock a hoverboard , which is missing in 3.60.1 , is now fixed.
Boombox bug from 3.61.0 is fixed.
When swiping up with the Super Sneakers to jump, the sound is still missing. Additionally, the run sound of the Super Sneakers (and running without the sneakers) still plays when you roll.
This bug has been in the game since  3.57.1 (four months prior) and still has not been fixed for unknown reasons.
K-Dillac 's flame has a black square glitch when equipped in the Player Profile since and still remains unfixed.
The Top Run sometimes doesn’t update your score.
Likely in 3.63.1, a new bug occurred where the default speed for the player running is higher than usual, also resulting in the game becoming faster than it should be at max speed. This also causes players to easily miss the last coin in coin arches at the beginning of a run.
One more importantly, the "I got (character)" screen was bugged with black screen when the Share button was clicked.
Leif 's eyebrow color is still red in his Default Outfit since .
For unknown reasons, Red Panda is missing from the character selection screen. She returned for some players in 3.63.0 , but finally returned for all players in 3.63.1 .
Logo of Subway Surfers in Google Play doesn't update from all the time. Apple App Store has the correct logo. Despite this, both Google Play and Apple App Store screenshots are showing the varies of gameplays, and not current version of gameplays. But it shows a picture of Angry Birds 2 collab.

Subway Surfers World Tour: Sydney
Subway Surfers World Tour: Sydney is the 4th installment in the  Subway Surfers World Tour series and the 7th update of the game.
In this edition, the crew travels to Sydney (Australia).
Sydney came out with a new Character , Kim , (95,000 ), a new Hoverboard , Outback , (50,000 ) and a new permanent board, Great White (20,000 ). The update had a new feature, Keys are used to revive the Character , continue the game when fails, and also to buy different Outfits for certain characters (however outfits were not introduced until ). But as usual, Keys are rare. They can be picked up while running or obtained by the Mystery Box .
This edition was released on April 4th, 2013 .
New Content
New surfer — Kim , Sydney surfer
New board — Outback , Sydney board
New board — Great White , Original board
Re-releases
- July 23rd, 2015
- April 21st, 2016
- August 26th, 2024
- June 22th, 2026
Trivia
This is the 1st edition to be placed in Australia and Oceania.
is currently the only location placed in Australia and Oceania.
Oceania is currently the only continent without a robot surfer (Not counting Antarctica).
Every release introduces at least one new board. In 2013 Outback , in 2015 Wave Rider , in 2016 Ray and in 2024 Chop-Chop Board , Cook-Express , Moon Cake , and Veggie Velocity .
On the loading screen, on the left of the tracks is a vast desert while the right is the famous Sydney Opera House, which is one of the many landmarks of Australia.
As a result of the Save Me! feature, all the remaining - Guard animations were altered to be longer (or in the case of one shorter).
This edition has 1 train not counting the Cargo train.
This is the first update of Subway Surfers not to celebrate any specific event, festival or collaboration. The second being , the third being , the fourth being , and the fifth being .

Subway Surfers World Tour: Sydney 2015
Subway Surfers World Tour: Sydney 2015  is the 37th installment in the  Subway Surfers  World Tour series and the 40th update of the game.
In this update, Kim got a new hairstyle and a new outfit , which is the Dive Outfit, and a new board which is the Wave Rider , replacing the Outback . A new Spraycan Award was introduced, the Jackpot Bonanza.
Players also had to collect Boomerangs ( ).
It was released on July 23rd, 2015 .

Outback  never reappeared as a limited hoverboard in this edition, it was replaced by Wave Rider .
This is the first edition to not re-release a board according to the board's tour.

Subway Surfers World Tour: Sydney 2016
Subway Surfers World Tour: Sydney 2016  is the 49th installment in the Subway Surfers World Tour series and 52nd version of the game.
In this edition Kim , the Sydney Special costing  95,000, makes a return, she is described as an ultimate surfer chick. This version also introduced a new outfit for Kim , the Coast Outfit costing 30 and re-released the Dive Outfit costing 15. This version also introduced a new board, the third Sydney Special board, called Ray . It cost 50,000.
The Weekly Hunt tokens are Boomerangs ( ).
It was released on April 21st, 2016 .

New board — Ray , Sydney board

Subway Surfers World Tour: Sydney 2024
Subway Surfers World Tour: Sydney 2024 is the 189th World Tour of Subway Surfers and 191st installment of the game. This update releases two new surfers: Audrey and Billy Bean , new outfits for Taha and Rain : Chili-Taha and Garden, and 4 new boards: Chop-Chop Board , Cook-Express , Moon Cake , and Veggie Velocity .
The Marathon Challenge take place in , the Tag Time Attack takes place in , the Mystery Hurdles takes place in , the Season Challenge takes place in , the Classic Mode takes place in , the Plant Invasion: No Floor Challenge takes place in (as Back to School Challenge ), and Floor Is Lava: No Floor Challenge takes place in .
The Season Hunt token are Starfish  ( ), and the Veggie Hunt tokens are Lettuce Leaves ( ), Tomatoes ( ), Avocados ( ) and Veggie Patties ( ).
This update was released on August 26th, 2024 .

Bugs and Fixes
In 3.34.0, if the player jumps into a wall with Super Sneakers while the Hoverboard was activated, the Hoverboard will explode and the character crashes to the wall, resulting in game over. This was one of oldest glitches to the game, also have existed in 1.0 versions. This was fixed in 3.34.1.
In 3.34.0, if the player jumps into a wall with Super Sneakers while the Hoverboard was activated, the Hoverboard will explode and the character crashes to the wall, resulting in game over. This was one of oldest glitches to the game, also have existed in 1.0 versions. This was fixed in 3.34.1.

Subway Surfers World Tour: São Paulo
Subway Surfers World Tour: São Paulo is the 20th installment of the Subway Surfers World Tour series and the 23rd update of the game.
A new limited character , Edison , along with his Urban Outfit, which costs 30, has been added into the game. This edition also introduced the " Top Run " which only lasts for a week per round and a new Spraycan Awards , the "Always on the Top" Award. It also introduced a new Outfits , the Biker Outfit, which costs 30 , for Zoe and a new limited Hoverboard , the Banana .
The Weekly Hunt tokens are Soccer Balls ( ).
It was released on June 19th, 2014 .

Subway Surfers World Tour: Tokyo
Subway Surfers World Tour: Tokyo is the 5th installment of the Subway Surfers World Tour series and the 8th update of the game.
This edition introduced a new character , Harumi , costing 95,000 and two new hoverboards , Kitty , costing 50.000 and Cherry , costing 60  (there was also a cancelled hoverboard; Fortune ).
It also introduces the all new Weekly Hunt (new version of Egg Hunt ), plus a new type of token to get, Japanese Keychains ! Japanese Keychains were use to get prizes from the Weekly Hunt .
It was released on May 2nd, 2013 .
New Content
New surfer — Harumi , Tokyo surfer
New board — Fortune , Tokyo board
New board — Kitty , Tokyo board
New board — Cherry , Tokyo board
Re-releases
- May 29th, 2014
- November 5th, 2015
- March 1st, 2018
- July 19th, 2021
- August 28th, 2023
- April 20th, 2026
Trivia
This is the 1st edition to be located in Asia, the 2nd being , the 3rd being , the 4th being , the 5th being , the 6th being , the 7th being , the 8th being , the 9th being , the 10th being , the 11th being , the 12th being , the 13th being , the 14th being , the 15th being , and the 16th being .
This is the first release of .
This is the first edition to take place in Japan, with the second being .
Throughout the update the flag of the rising sun shown which is controversial in parts of East Asia due to the flag's significant usage as a symbol of Japanese imperialism during the Second World War, which is likely the reason for the removal of the Fortune Board and the redesign of buildings with the flag design on them, changing the colour from red to blue, in a minor update.
This edition celebrates the 1st Anniversary of Subway Surfers .
This is the last edition with Tagbot having eyebrows.
This is the last version of Subway Surfers supported on iOS 4.3.

Subway Surfers World Tour: Tokyo 2014
Subway Surfers World Tour: Tokyo 2014 is the 19th installment of the Subway Surfers World Tour series and the 22nd update of the game.
It is the 4th edition to be re-released. This edition has re-released Harumi , the limited character for Tokyo. Two new outfits have been introduced, the Meow Outfit for Harumi , and the Yang Outfit for Ninja and each outfit costs 15. This edition also introduced the new board the Windglider , which allows players to glide through the air for a limited time. This edition also saw the introduction of the purchasable Hoverboard, Kitty . It also brought the Cherry hoverboard back for one day under the name Cherry Comeback .
The Weekly Hunt tokens are Japanese Keychains ( ).
It was released on May 29th, 2014 .
New Content

Ninja 's new outfit, Yang
New board — Windglider , Original board
Trivia

This is the first re-release of .
This city is the fourth to be released for a year in a row.
This is the ninth update of Subway Surfers not to celebrate any specific event,festival or collaboration.The first being Sydney ,the second being Miami ,the third being Paris ,the fourth being Beijing ,the fifth being Moscow, the sixth being Mumbai ,the seventh being Miami and the eighth being Mexico City.

Subway Surfers World Tour: Tokyo 2015
Subway Surfers World Tour: Tokyo 2015 is the 42nd installment in the Subway Surfers World Tour series and the 45th update of the game.
This edition re-released Harumi (costing 95,000), and also gave her the new Fury Outfit (costing 30). This edition also re-released the Kitty board (costing 50,000).
The Weekly Hunt tokens are Geisha Keychains ( ).
It was released on November 5th, 2015 .
New Content
Harumi 's new outfit, Fury
Trivia
This edition is dedicated to the Autumn season.
This is the second time was re-released ( and ).
This is the third time released ( , and ).
In the Tokyo 2015 SYBO Official Trailer from YouTube , the name of the title that they put was Japan, not Tokyo. It was an error, as this edition does not feature the entire country of Japan.
This is the second edition to take place at sunset, the others being , , , , , , , , , , , and .
This is the second Autumn themed update after .
This was released on Guy Fawkes Night , which is a celebration in the UK. However this edition is not in the UK and does not celebrate Guy Fawkes Night.
So far this is the only Autumn-themed update located on the Asian continent.

Subway Surfers World Tour: Tokyo 2018
Subway Surfers World Tour: Tokyo 2018 is the 79th edition in Subway Surfers and the 82nd update of the game.
This edition marks the comeback of Harumi for 95,000 as well as the returning board Kitty for 50,000 .
The Weekly Hunt tokens are Geisha Keychains ( ).
It was released on March 1st, 2018 .

Subway Surfers World Tour: Tokyo 2021
Subway Surfers World Tour: Tokyo 2021 is the 134th edition of the Subway Surfers World Tour series and also the 136th edition of Subway Surfers.
This edition has a new limited character named Akira , which costs 25,000 . There is also the return of the limited character named Bonnie , which costs 15,000 . There is also a new hoverboard, called Sakura , which costs 15,000 . There is also the return of two hoverboards, one called Cherry , as a Season Hunt prize. And another one called Medal , which costs 60 .
This edition also introduced a new outfit for Bonnie called the Harajuku Outfit costing 22,000 .
The Season Hunt tokens are Japanese Keychains ( ).
The update was released on July 19th, 2021 .

Subway Surfers World Tour: Transylvania
Subway Surfers World Tour: Transylvania is the 41st installment in the Subway Surfers World Tour series and the 44th update of the game.
This edition introduced a new character, Mike , who's a werewolf, costing   95,000, with his Howl Outfit, costing   30, and a new hoverboard , Phantom , costing   50,000. This also came up with a new award - the Big Game Hunter.
The Weekly Hunt tokens are Ghosts ( ).
It was released on October 15th, 2015 .

Mike 's new outfit, Howl
New board — Phantom , Transylvania board

Subway Surfers World Tour: Transylvania 2016
Subway Surfers World Tour: Transylvania 2016 is the 57th edition in the World Tour series and the 60th edition in Subway Surfers. It is the re-released edition of .
This edition brings back Mike (costing 95,000) and his Howl Outfit from the 2015 version (costing 15), with a new outfit called the Jäger Outfit (costing 30), and Phantom board (costing 50,000) with the new Zap Sideways upgrade (costing 80). In the Google Play version, a brand new board, Hexed , was released costing .
The Weekly Hunt tokens are Ghosts ( ).
It was released on October 13th, 2016 .

Subway Surfers World Tour: Underwater 2024
Subway Surfers World Tour: Underwater 2024 is the 183rd World Tour of Subway Surfers and the 185th installment of the game. This update releases two new characters: Finn and Electra . Koral and Cathy have new outfits: Sub Explorer and Seaside. Also this update includes three new hoverboards: Yellow Sub , Jelly Board and Koinobori .
The Marathon Challenge takes place in , the Tag Time Attack takes place in , the Spooky Sprint takes place in , the Mystery Hurdles takes place in , the Season Challenge takes place in , the Earth Run take place in , and the No Floor Challenge takes place in .
The Season Hunt tokens are Starfish ( ).
This update was released on April 22nd, 2024 .

Subway Surfers World Tour: Vancouver
Subway Surfers World Tour: Vancouver is the 18th installment of the Subway Surfers World Tour series and the 21st update of the game.
It introduced a tomboyish girl scout named Olivia . Like all other previous edition, two new outfits were introduced, which are the Skate Outfit. The Moose board was introduced too. In this edition, a new Spraycan Award was introduced, the "Letter Chaser".
During this edition's Weekly Hunt , players had to collect Maple Leaves ( ).
It was released in May 8th, 2014 .
New Content
New surfer — Olivia , Vancouver surfer
Olivia 's new outfit, Skate
Prince K 's new outfit, Jag
New board — Moose , Vancouver board
Re-releases
- November 1st, 2021
- March 14th, 2022
- November 4th, 2024
Trivia

In this edition, the guard is dressed as a mountie and his dog appears brown.
This is the second edition in North America not to take place in the USA, even though there is a city in Washington that has the same name. The first North America edition to not take place in the USA is (Now known as ). This edition takes place in Canada.
This celebrates the second anniversary of Subway Surfers .

Subway Surfers World Tour: Vegas Queens 2024
Subway Surfers World Tour: Las Vegas 2024 , also known as Vegas Queens , is the 3rd 2024 World Tour season (and the 180th update in the Subway Surfers game).
In this edition, the crew travels to Las Vegas, Nevada state, the USA , to celebrate the Women's Day .
This edition releases two new limited surfers : Stella (for 5 stages in Season Challenge and Astra (for 5 stages in No Floor Challenge: Plant Invasion ); a new outfit for Ji-Yeong: Celestial (for 400 ); and two new limited boards : Interstellar (for 20 days) and Astro Tune (for 80 ).
The Season Hunt tokens for this edition are Poker Spades ( ).
This edition was released on February 19th, 2024 .

This edition releases the third and the fourth soundtracks of Las Vegas after BE KIND and LAS VEGAS (released in 2021 ), VEGAS QUEENS (in-game main version) and HIGHER (complete song version). These are completely new tracks.
Higher is the second song in the game after Bling (from ) with Surf as Yourself (from ), Vamos Dançar (from ), Colors (from ) and I'll Always Win (from ) coming after.
Astra and Ji-Yeong are the singers of Higher and Stella is the instrumental performer (playing the keytar).
The vocals were performed by Sakari Greenwell ( Astra ) and Zhavanya Meidi ( Ji-Yeong ).
Ji-Yeong 's comeback might be a reference to her phrase "Just wait, next year, see me on the World Tour !" (From " Bling ").

Subway Surfers World Tour: Venice
Subway Surfers World Tour: Venice is the 35th installment of the Subway Surfers World Tour series and the 38th update of the game.
This edition released a new character named Marco , a gondolier boy along with his Mask Outfit , which costs 30. The Gondola hoverboard was also released into the game.
The Weekly Hunt tokens are Opera Masks ( ).
It was released on June 4th, 2015 .

Subway Surfers World Tour: Venice 2016
Subway Surfers World Tour: Venice 2016 is the 53rd in the World Tour series and the 56th update in Subway Surfers .
This edition brings back Marco (costing 95,000) and his Mask Outfit from the 2015 edition (costing 15). It gives Marco a new outfit, the Noble Outfit (costing 30), and a brand new board, Orni (costing 50,000). The difference between this update and the others is that in this update, the limited board gets an upgrade for the first time. Orni was released with the Smooth Drift upgrade costing 150 (now 60).
The Weekly Hunt tokens are Opera Masks ( ).
It was released for Android on July 5th, 2016 , for iOS on July 7th, 2016 , and for Windows 10 on July 11th, 2016 .

New board — Orni , Venice board
(+ Smooth Drift upgrade)

Subway Surfers World Tour: Venice 2019
Subway Surfers World Tour: Venice 2019 is the 94th update of Subway Surfers and the 97th installment in the World Tour series.
This edition brings back  Marco ( 95,000) and his Mask Outfit and Noble Outfit costing 15 and  30 respectively, and also brings back the  Gondola and the Sweetheart with Orni , costing  50,000.
The Weekly Hunt tokens are  Carnival Masks ( ).
It was released on February 7th, 2019 .

Subway Surfers World Tour: Venice Beach
Subway Surfers World Tour: Venice Beach is the 83rd edition in the World Tour series and the 86th edition of Subway Surfers.
This introduces a brand new character named Dylan (costing 95,000), with a brand new outfit called the Lifeguard Outfit (costing 15), and a new board called Renegade (costing 50,000). This edition celebrates the world premiere of the first episode of the Animated Series . Another character, named Boombot , has also been introduced. Another new board, called the Bass Blaster , was released. It could only be unlocked by purchasing the Welcome Pack.
The Weekly Hunt tokens are Skater Stickers ( ).
It was released on May 31st, 2018 .

Bugs and Fixes
Teddy and Sleigh are now labeled as Special Boards.
Gabriel 's Rad In Red Outfit is running in Subway Studio .
Several sound effects have a chance of randomly having a much higher or lower pitch than usual.
This was fixed in .
There is a problem with popup notification after you reach the score or goal in any challenges and get the rewards. For example, if the player is playing the Daily Challenge and reach the score or goal, a popup notification will appear. But, if the player is playing to another challenges and reach the same score or goal, the Daily Challenge popup notification will still appear even though the player is in another challenges like or which causes popup notifications to keep appearing.
This has been fixed in version 3.48.5.

Subway Surfers World Tour: Winter Holiday
Subway Surfers World Tour: Winter Holiday (also known as North Pole 2016 ) is the 59th edition in the World Tour series and the 62nd edition in Subway Surfers.
This edition gives Elf Tricky a new outfit called the Ice Outfit (costing 15). Also, a new character named Malik (costing 95,000) is added to the crew. Malik also has a new outfit called the Tusk Outfit costing 15. A new board, called the Glacier costing 50,000 was also released.
The Weekly Hunt tokens are Penguins ( ).
It was released on December 1st, 2016 .

Subway Surfers World Tour: Winter Holiday 2019
Subway Surfers World Tour: Winter Holiday 2019  (also known as North Pole 2019 ) is the 107th update of Subway Surfers and the 109th installment in the World Tour series.
This edition includes the return of Malik for 50,000 and Elf Tricky for , with new outfits called Penguin Outfit and Candy Outfit respectively for 20 and also have the return of Glacier for 20 .
The Weekly Hunt tokens are Penguins ( ).
It was released on November 28th, 2019 .
New Content
New surfer — Festive Fresh , Holiday special
Malik 's new outfit, Penguin
Elf Tricky 's new outfit, Candy

Subway Surfers World Tour: Winter Wonderland
Subway Surfers World Tour: Winter Wonderland is the 194th World Tour of Subway Surfers and 196th installment of the game. This update releases two new surfers: Snowy and Grand Juke , 2 new outfits for Gingerbot and Lawrence : Wrapper and Snowballer, and 4 new boards: Jingle Dingle , Shiny Surprise , Gadget Force , and Ice Cool .
The Marathon Challenges take place in and , the Mystery Hurdles takes place in , the Wrapped Challenge & New Year Challenge takes place in , the Plant Invasion: No Floor Challenge takes place in , the Floor Is Lava: No Floor Challenge takes place in , and the One Run Challenge takes place in .
The Season Hunt token are Snowflakes ( ), and the Holiday Hunt tokens are Decoration ( ), Cookie ( ), Bell ( ), and Candy ( ).
This update was released on December 9th, 2024 .

Subway Surfers World Tour: Winter Xtreme
Subway Surfers World Tour: Winter Xtreme is the 212th World Tour of Subway Surfers. This update released three new surfers: Sean Snow , Mia , and Rosalita , two new outfits for Mia and Rebeca Roar : Alpine Amour and Purrfection , and three new boards: Fire Starter , Xtra Cool , and Turbo Love .
The Marathon Challenge takes place in and , the Special Challenge takes place in , the Mystery Hurdles take place in , the Tag Time Attack takes place in , the One Run Challenge takes place in and , the Plant Invasion: No Floor Challenge take place in , and the Floor Is Lava: No Floor Challenge take place in .
The Season Hunt token are Snowflakes ( ).
It was released on January 26th, 2026 .

Subway Surfers World Tour: Year of the Snake
Subway Surfers World Tour: Luoyang 2025 also known as Year of the Snake is the 194th World Tour of Subway Surfers . This update released two new surfers: Snake , Tang Yuan , 2 new outfits for Song Yi and Akira : Golden Crush and Night Rider, and 3 new boards: Hyper Viper , Lantern , and Override .

Subway Surfers World Tour: Zurich
Subway Surfers World Tour: Zurich  is the 96th update of Subway Surfers and the 98th installment in the World Tour series.
This edition brought two new characters  Hugo  and a new Easter special character  Rabbot that costs 40 . Hugo costs 95,000 , And his new outfit called Mountain Outfit, costing 15 . It also introduced the new Clockwork board, costing 50.000 .
It’s Weekly Hunt tokens are  Chocolate Bunnies ( ).
It was released on April 4th, 2019 .
New Content
New surfer — Hugo , Zürich surfer
New surfer — Rabbot , Easter surfer
Hugo 's new outfit, Mountain
New board — Clockwork , Zürich board
Re-releases
- June 18th, 2020

You can now receive 3 keys in your Daily Video .

The 1st being , the 2nd being , the 3rd being , the 4th being , the 5th being , the 6th , the 7th being , the 8th being , the 9th being , the 10th being , the 11th being , the 12th being , the 13th being , the 14th being , the 15th being the 17th being , the 18th being , the 19th being , and the 20th being .

Subway Surfers World Tour: Zurich 2020
Subway Surfers World Tour: Zurich 2020 is the 116th update of Subway Surfers and the 118th ​​​​​installment in the World Tour series.
This edition includes the return of  Hugo  as a prize of the Season Hunt , with a new outfit called Pirate Outfit for 30 .
This edition also has the return of  Clockwork  as a prize of the Season Hunt , the tokens are Pocket Watches ( ).
It was released on June 18th, 2020 .

Subway Surfers World Tour 2024: Paris edition
Subway Surfers World Tour: Paris 2024 , is the 187th World Tour of Subway Surfers and the 189th installment of the game. This update releases two new surfers: Hélène and Leo , new outfits for Tainá and Phoenix : Judoka and Summer, and 4 new boards: Heavy Metal , Arrow , Sporty Summer and Champ .

The Season Hunt tokens are Gold Medal ( ).
This update released on July 15th, 2024 .

Suitcase Saga
Suitcase Saga is a board released in . It costs 22.000 .
Appearance
It is an orange suitcase with blue and white accents. It features a design resembling the Icelandic flag, a blue sheep-like emblem, and a circular mountain sticker. What seems to be a white and red sock can be seen sticking out of the side. The case has a handle and triangular metallic blue corner protectors.
Trivia
It, Cozy Cruiser , and Icicle are the 50th, 51st, and 52nd boards released in 2024 after Skyrocket , Electro Shock , Bada-Bomb , Confetti Crush , Red Velvet , Roaring Heart , Lunar Scroll , Astro Tune , Interstellar , Shamrock Shebang , Megga Bite , Fast and Festive , Radiant Rider , Jak , Tea Timer , Deli-Vroom , Yellow Sub , Jelly Board , Koinobori , Mayo Mania , 12th Birthday , Pixel Hoverboard , Street Grace , Alarm On , Rock n' Riley , Sunny Sailor , Laser Flip , Glarx 3000 , Standing Ovation , Risky Ride , Sporty Summer , Heavy Metal , Champ , Arrow , Raggedy Runner , Turbo Stumb , Brass Whizz , Chop-Chop Board , Cook-Express , Moon Cake , Veggie Velocity , Couch Surfer , Catalyst , Flash of Flavor , Fear Tractor , Sci-Fly , Skeletuna , Pitch Dark , Fox Trail , Fall Speed , and Pathfinder .
It is the fifth board, the first being Big Blue , the second being Boombastic , the third being Cozy Cruiser , and the fourth being Icicle .
This is the fourteenth board of 2024 that has a default ability, the first being Fast and Festive , the second being Koinobori , the third being Alarm On , the fourth being Street Grace , the fifth being Standing Ovation , the sixth being Glarx 3000 , the seventh being Heavy Metal , the eighth being Arrow , the ninth being Chop-Chop Board , the teenth being Sci-Fly , the eleventh being Skeletuna , the twelfth being Pathfinder , the thirteenth being Cozy Cruiser , the fifteenth being Jingle Dingle , and the sixteenth being Shiny Surprise .

Sun
Appearance
Default Outfit
Sun is a Chinese teenage boy from . He has his brown hair styled in an unusual way, with gold rods that arch upward. He wears light white makeup on his face and magenta circles around his eyes. He wears a red, yellow and black outfit completed with dark black boots and a green belt.
Spot Outfit
In , he received the Spot Outfit, which costs 30. There, he looks like a monk, where he shaved his head, with two lighter spots on it, his shirt changes into a red monk outfit, his boots are switched with stockings and sandals, and his scarf is changed into a necklace. Also, instead of a green sash he now wears a black belt.
Rogue Outfit
In , he received the Rogue Outfit, which costs 30. In this outfit, he has black hair styled in a way similar to his original outfit, he gets a violet jacket with a torn sleeve, a red glove on his right arm, a robotic arm for his left arm, yellow pants, and dark purple shoes. He also wears a red mask.
Trivia
Sun is a direct reference to Sun Wukong, the Monkey King . His name is also a reference to Sun Yat-sen , who was known as a political figure in history. From the other side in the Chinese version, there's surfer called Wukong and like Sun, he is a direct reference to Monkey King .
In the other SYBO run game, Blades Of Brim, there's character called Wukong and he is also a direct reference to Monkey King .
Him, along with Noon ,  Ninja  and  Brandon are the only martial artists in the game.
He, Noon  and Brandon  are the only limited martial artists in the game.
He has Jake and Ninja ’s scrollbar poses.

Sunny
Sunny is a character released during . He is the 242nd character in the game and the 27th surfer of 2025 .
Appearance
Default Outfit
Sunny is a 16-year-old Greek teenage boy from who has a pair of brown eyes and curly blonde hair that sticks through his golden sun crown. He is wearing a gold-accented red fabric draped across his brown shirt, matching with his brown-lined white pants and golden accessories (from his earrings, bangles, and epaulettes). For footwear, he has a brown, gold, and red-colored sneakers.
History
* An exact date was found where it appeared in, otherwise, the edition release date is assumed.

Sunny Side Up
Sunny Side Up is a hoverboard released in . Like any other hoverboard, it protects the character from crashing for 30 seconds. When crashed, it will need to recharge for a few seconds before it can be used again.
Appearance
A savory hoverboard that is seemingly made with a giant bacon and a sunny side up egg. The bacon is its base, which is supported with the board's booster that extends underneath it.
